   25: # TEMP WARNING SWEEP SNAPSHOT (ENGINE-3, pre-fix):
   26: # 1) Decimal / numeric warnings: 0
   27: # 2) Datetime / timezone warnings: 0
   28: # 3) SQLAlchemy warnings: 0
   29: # 4) JSON serialization warnings: 0
   30: # 5) Deprecation warnings: 45,739 (pytest-asyncio on Python 3.14, including import-time failure under -W error)
   31: # 6) Pytest warnings (marks/fixtures): 1 (pytest-asyncio loop-scope deprecation)
   32: # 7) Trigger / DB warnings: 3 (unclosed sqlite connection ResourceWarning surfaced as PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning)

   34: WORKBENCH_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
   35: # Allow `workbench.backend.db.core.*` submodule imports while keeping `db.py` as the facade.
   36: __path__ = [str(Path(__file__).with_suffix(""))]
   37: 
   38: 
   39: def resolve_data_dir() -> Path:
   40:     override = os.getenv("WORKBENCH_DATA_DIR")
   41:     if override:
   42:         return Path(override).expanduser().resolve()
   43:     appdata = os.getenv("APPDATA")
   44:     if appdata:
   45:         return (Path(appdata) / "Local AI Workbench" / "data").resolve()
   46:     return (WORKBENCH_DIR / "data").resolve()
   47: 
   48:

  451: 
  452: def _resolve_engine4_explanation_max_chars() -> int:
  453:     raw = str(os.getenv("WORKBENCH_ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_MAX_CHARS", "12000") or "12000").strip()
  454:     try:
  455:         value = int(raw)
  456:     except ValueError:
  457:         value = 12000
  458:     return max(value, 256)
  459: 
  460: 
  461: ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_MAX_CHARS = _resolve_engine4_explanation_max_chars()
  462: ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES = ("5", "6")
  463: ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_REVENUE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES = ("4",)
  464: ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_PAYABLE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES = ("21",)
  465: ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_RECEIVABLE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES = ("11",)
  466: _HEX64_RE = re.compile(r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$")
  467: _ENGINE3_TOKEN_RE = re.compile(r"[a-z0-9_]+")
  468: _ENGINE3_NUMERIC_TOKEN_RE = re.compile(
  469:     r"""
  470:     (?<![A-Za-z])
  471:     (?:
  472:         (?:\$|USD\s*)?-?\d{1,3}(?:,\d{3})+(?:\.\d+)?%?
  473:         |
  474:         (?:\$|USD\s*)?-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?%?
  475:     )
  476:     (?![A-Za-z])
  477:     """,
  478:     re.IGNORECASE | re.VERBOSE,
  479: )
  480: _ENGINE3_METRIC_UPPER_TOKEN_RE = re.compile(r"\b[A-Z]{3,}(?:\s+[A-Z]{3,})*\b")
  481: _ENGINE3_METRIC_TITLE_PHRASE_RE = re.compile(r"\b[A-Z][a-z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z]+)+\b")
  482: _ENGINE3_PERIOD_MONTH_NAME_RE = re.compile(
  483:     r"\b(?:JANUARY|FEBRUARY|MARCH|APRIL|MAY|JUNE|JULY|AUGUST|SEPTEMBER|OCTOBER|NOVEMBER|DECEMBER|JAN|FEB|MAR|APR|JUN|JUL|AUG|SEP|SEPT|OCT|NOV|DEC)\b",
  484:     re.IGNORECASE,
  485: )
  486: _ENGINE3_PERIOD_YYYY_MM_RE = re.compile(r"\b\d{4}-\d{2}\b")
  487: _ENGINE3_PERIOD_YEAR_RE = re.compile(r"\b\d{4}\b")
  488: _ENGINE3_PERIOD_QUARTER_RE = re.compile(r"\bQ[1-4]\b", re.IGNORECASE)
  489: _ENGINE3_PERIOD_FY_RE = re.compile(r"\bFY\d{2,4}\b", re.IGNORECASE)
  490: _ENGINE3_METRIC_STOP_WORDS = {
  491:     "A",
  492:     "AN",
  493:     "AND",
  494:     "AS",
  495:     "AT",
  496:     "BY",
  497:     "FOR",
  498:     "FROM",
  499:     "IN",
  500:     "INTO",
  501:     "IS",
  502:     "OF",
  503:     "ON",
  504:     "OR",
  505:     "THE",
  506:     "TO",
  507:     "WITH",
  508:     "WITHOUT",
  509: }
  510: _ENGINE3_FINANCE_KEYWORDS = (
  511:     "REVENUE",
  512:     "EBITDA",
  513:     "MARGIN",
  514:     "PROFIT",
  515:     "EXPENSE",
  516:     "COST",
  517:     "ASSETS",
  518:     "LIABILITIES",
  519:     "EQUITY",
  520:     "CASH FLOW",
  521:     "OPERATING INCOME",
  522:     "NET INCOME",
  523:     "GROSS PROFIT",
  524:     "OPERATING MARGIN",
  525: )
  526: 
  527: 
  528: def utc_now_iso() -> str:
  529:     return datetime.now(UTC).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
  530: 
  531: 
  532: def _runtime_mode() -> str:
  533:     return str(os.getenv("WORKBENCH_RUNTIME_MODE", "dev")).strip().lower() or "dev"
  534: 
  535: 
  536: def _resolved_backend_raw() -> str:
  537:     db_provider_raw = str(os.getenv(DB_PROVIDER_ENV, "")).strip()
  538:     if db_provider_raw:
  539:         return db_provider_raw
  540:     return str(os.getenv(RUNTIME_DB_BACKEND_ENV, "")).strip()
  541: 
  542: 
  543: def _resolved_backend() -> str:
  544:     return normalize_backend(_resolved_backend_raw() or "sqlite")
  545: 
  546: 
  547: def _database_url_from_postgres_env() -> str:
  548:     host = str(os.getenv("POSTGRES_HOST", "")).strip()
  549:     port = str(os.getenv("POSTGRES_PORT", "")).strip() or "5432"
  550:     user = str(os.getenv("POSTGRES_USER", "")).strip()
  551:     password = str(os.getenv("POSTGRES_PASSWORD", "")).strip()
  552:     database = str(os.getenv("POSTGRES_DB", "")).strip()
  553: 
  554:     missing: list[str] = []
  555:     if not host:
  556:         missing.append("POSTGRES_HOST")
  557:     if not port:
  558:         missing.append("POSTGRES_PORT")
  559:     if not user:
  560:         missing.append("POSTGRES_USER")
  561:     if not password:
  562:         missing.append("POSTGRES_PASSWORD")
  563:     if not database:
  564:         missing.append("POSTGRES_DB")
  565:     if missing:
  566:         missing_csv = ", ".join(missing)
  567:         raise RuntimeError(
  568:             "PostgreSQL backend selected, but DATABASE_URL is not set and required postgres env vars "
  569:             f"are missing: {missing_csv}"
  570:         )
  571: 
  572:     encoded_user = quote_plus(user)
  573:     encoded_password = quote_plus(password)
  574:     encoded_database = quote_plus(database)
  575:     return f"postgresql://{encoded_user}:{encoded_password}@{host}:{port}/{encoded_database}"
  576: 
  577: 
  578: def _resolved_database_url() -> str:
  579:     direct_database_url = str(os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "")).strip()
  580:     if direct_database_url:
  581:         return direct_database_url
  582:     if _resolved_backend() == "postgres":
  583:         return _database_url_from_postgres_env()
  584:     return ""
  585: 
  586: 
  587: def _provider_cache_key() -> tuple[str, str, str, str]:
  588:     backend = _resolved_backend()
  589:     database_url = _resolved_database_url()
  590:     db_path_key = str(Path(DB_PATH).resolve(strict=False))
  591:     migrations_key = str(Path(MIGRATIONS_DIR).resolve(strict=False))
  592:     return (backend, database_url, db_path_key, migrations_key)
  593: 
  594: 
  595: def _build_runtime_db_provider() -> RuntimeDbProvider:
  596:     backend = _resolved_backend()
  597:     runtime_mode = _runtime_mode()
  598:     backend_raw = _resolved_backend_raw()
  599:     if runtime_mode == "prod" and not backend_raw:
  600:         raise RuntimeError(
  601:             "DB_PROVIDER or WORKBENCH_RUNTIME_DB_BACKEND must be explicitly set in prod mode."
  602:         )
  603:     if backend == "postgres":
  604:         database_url = _resolved_database_url()
  605:         if not database_url:
  606:             raise RuntimeError(
  607:                 "DATABASE_URL (or POSTGRES_HOST/POSTGRES_PORT/POSTGRES_USER/POSTGRES_PASSWORD/POSTGRES_DB) "
  608:                 "is required when postgres backend is selected."
  609:             )
  610:         if not (
  611:             database_url.startswith("postgres://")
  612:             or database_url.startswith("postgresql://")
  613:         ):
  614:             raise RuntimeError(
  615:                 "DATABASE_URL must use postgres:// or postgresql:// when postgres backend is selected."
  616:             )
  617:         return PostgresProvider(
  618:             database_url=database_url,
  619:             migrations_dir=MIGRATIONS_DIR,
  620:             schema_migrations_table=SCHEMA_MIGRATIONS_TABLE,
  621:             utc_now_iso=utc_now_iso,
  622:             retry_attempts=DB_RETRY_ATTEMPTS,
  623:             retry_delay_seconds=DB_RETRY_DELAY_SECONDS,
  624:         )
  625:     return SQLiteProvider(
  626:         db_path=DB_PATH,
  627:         migrations_dir=MIGRATIONS_DIR,
  628:         schema_migrations_table=SCHEMA_MIGRATIONS_TABLE,
  629:         utc_now_iso=utc_now_iso,
  630:         retry_attempts=DB_RETRY_ATTEMPTS,
  631:         retry_delay_seconds=DB_RETRY_DELAY_SECONDS,
  632:     )
  633: 
  634: 
  635: def get_runtime_db_provider() -> RuntimeDbProvider:
  636:     global _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE_KEY, _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE
  637:     key = _provider_cache_key()
  638:     with _DB_PROVIDER_LOCK:
  639:         if _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE is not None and _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE_KEY == key:
  640:             return _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE
  641:         _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE = _build_runtime_db_provider()
  642:         _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE_KEY = key
  643:         return _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE
  644: 
  645: 
  646: def runtime_db_backend() -> str:
  647:     return get_runtime_db_provider().backend
  648: 
  649: 
  650: def reset_runtime_db_provider_for_tests() -> None:
  651:     global _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE_KEY, _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE
  652:     with _DB_PROVIDER_LOCK:
  653:         _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE_KEY = None
  654:         _DB_PROVIDER_CACHE = None
  655: 
  656: 
  657: def init_db() -> None:
  658:     migration_mode = normalize_migration_mode(os.getenv(DB_MIGRATION_MODE_ENV, "auto"))
  659:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  660:     provider.init_db(migration_mode=migration_mode)
  661: 
  662: 
  663: def get_connection(*, autocommit: bool = False) -> Any:
  664:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  665:     conn = provider.connect()
  666:     if hasattr(conn, "autocommit"):
  667:         try:
  668:             conn.autocommit = bool(autocommit)
  669:         except Exception:
  670:             pass
  671:     return conn
  672: 
  673: 
  674: def sanitize_title(title: str) -> str:
  675:     from workbench.backend.db.core.normalize import sanitize_title as _sanitize_title
  676: 
  677:     return _sanitize_title(title, invalid_title_chars=INVALID_TITLE_CHARS)
  678: 
  679: 
  680: def check_schema(required_tables: Iterable[str]) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]:
  681:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  682:     return provider.check_schema(required_tables)
  683: 
  684: 
  685: def list_table_columns(table: str) -> set[str]:
  686:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  687:     return provider.list_table_columns(table)
  688: 
  689: 
  690: def list_table_indexes(table: str) -> dict[str, tuple[str, ...]]:
  691:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  692:     return provider.list_table_indexes(table)
  693: 
  694: 
  695: @contextmanager
  696: def get_conn() -> Iterable[Any]:
  697:     provider = get_runtime_db_provider()
  698:     conn = get_connection(autocommit=False)
  699:     try:
  700:         yield conn
  701:         provider.commit_with_retry(conn)
  702:     finally:
  703:         provider.close(conn)
  704: 
  705: 
  706: def list_conversations() -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  707:     with get_conn() as conn:
  708:         rows = conn.execute(
  709:             """
  710:             SELECT id, title, workspace_path, created_at, updated_at
  711:             FROM conversations
  712:             ORDER BY datetime(updated_at) DESC, id DESC
  713:             """
  714:         ).fetchall()
  715:     return [dict(row) for row in rows]
  716: 
  717: 
  718: def create_conversation(title: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
  719:     conversation_id = str(uuid4())
  720:     now = utc_now_iso()
  721:     conversation_title = sanitize_title((title or "").strip()) or "New chat"
  722: 
  723:     with get_conn() as conn:
  724:         conn.execute(
  725:             """
  726:             INSERT INTO conversations (id, title, workspace_path, created_at, updated_at)
  727:             VALUES (?, ?, NULL, ?, ?)
  728:             """,
  729:             (conversation_id, conversation_title, now, now),
  730:         )
  731:         row = conn.execute(
  732:             """
  733:             SELECT id, title, workspace_path, created_at, updated_at
  734:             FROM conversations
  735:             WHERE id = ?
  736:             """,
  737:             (conversation_id,),
  738:         ).fetchone()
  739: 
  740:     return dict(row) if row else {}
  741: 
  742: 
  743: def get_conversation(conversation_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  744:     with get_conn() as conn:
  745:         conversation = conn.execute(
  746:             """
  747:             SELECT id, title, workspace_path, created_at, updated_at
  748:             FROM conversations
  749:             WHERE id = ?
  750:             """,
  751:             (conversation_id,),
  752:         ).fetchone()
  753:         if not conversation:
  754:             return None
  755: 
  756:         message_rows = conn.execute(
  757:             """
  758:             SELECT role, content, created_at
  759:             FROM messages
  760:             WHERE conversation_id = ?
  761:             ORDER BY id ASC
  762:             """,
  763:             (conversation_id,),
  764:         ).fetchall()
  765: 
  766:         upload_rows = conn.execute(
  767:             """
  768:             SELECT original_name, stored_path, created_at
  769:             FROM uploads
  770:             WHERE conversation_id = ?
  771:             ORDER BY id DESC
  772:             """,
  773:             (conversation_id,),
  774:         ).fetchall()
  775: 
  776:     return {
  777:         **dict(conversation),
  778:         "messages": [
  779:             {"role": row["role"], "content": row["content"], "ts": row["created_at"]}
  780:             for row in message_rows
  781:         ],
  782:         "uploads": [dict(row) for row in upload_rows],
  783:     }
  784: 
  785: 
  786: def get_messages(conversation_id: str, limit: int = 12) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
  787:     with get_conn() as conn:
  788:         rows = conn.execute(
  789:             """
  790:             SELECT role, content, created_at
  791:             FROM messages
  792:             WHERE conversation_id = ?
  793:             ORDER BY id DESC
  794:             LIMIT ?
  795:             """,
  796:             (conversation_id, limit),
  797:         ).fetchall()
  798:     rows = list(reversed(rows))
  799:     return [
  800:         {"role": row["role"], "content": row["content"], "ts": row["created_at"]}
  801:         for row in rows
  802:     ]
  803: 
  804: 
  805: def add_message(conversation_id: str, role: str, content: str) -> dict[str, str]:
  806:     now = utc_now_iso()
  807:     with get_conn() as conn:
  808:         conn.execute(
  809:             """
  810:             INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, created_at)
  811:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
  812:             """,
  813:             (conversation_id, role, content, now),
  814:         )
  815:         conn.execute(
  816:             "UPDATE conversations SET updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?",
  817:             (now, conversation_id),
  818:         )
  819: 
  820:     return {"role": role, "content": content, "ts": now}
  821: 
  822: 
  823: def set_workspace_path(conversation_id: str, workspace_path: str | None) -> None:
  824:     now = utc_now_iso()
  825:     with get_conn() as conn:
  826:         conn.execute(
  827:             """
  828:             UPDATE conversations
  829:             SET workspace_path = ?, updated_at = ?
  830:             WHERE id = ?
  831:             """,
  832:             (workspace_path, now, conversation_id),
  833:         )
  834: 
  835: 
  836: def set_title_if_default(conversation_id: str, user_message: str) -> None:
  837:     short_title = " ".join(user_message.strip().split())
  838:     if not short_title:
  839:         return
  840:     short_title = sanitize_title(short_title[:64])
  841:     if not short_title:
  842:         return
  843:     with get_conn() as conn:
  844:         current = conn.execute(
  845:             "SELECT title FROM conversations WHERE id = ?",
  846:             (conversation_id,),
  847:         ).fetchone()
  848:         if not current:
  849:             return
  850:         if current["title"] != "New chat":
  851:             return
  852:         conn.execute(
  853:             "UPDATE conversations SET title = ? WHERE id = ?",
  854:             (short_title, conversation_id),
  855:         )
  856: 
  857: 
  858: def add_upload(
  859:     conversation_id: str,
  860:     original_name: str,
  861:     stored_path: str,
  862:     raw_content_sha256: str | None = None,
  863: ) -> dict[str, str]:
  864:     now = utc_now_iso()
  865:     normalized_hash = str(raw_content_sha256 or "").strip().lower()
  866:     uploads_columns = list_table_columns("uploads")
  867:     has_raw_hash_column = "raw_content_sha256" in uploads_columns
  868:     with get_conn() as conn:
  869:         if has_raw_hash_column:
  870:             conn.execute(
  871:                 """
  872:                 INSERT INTO uploads (
  873:                     conversation_id,
  874:                     original_name,
  875:                     stored_path,
  876:                     created_at,
  877:                     raw_content_sha256
  878:                 )
  879:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
  880:                 """,
  881:                 (conversation_id, original_name, stored_path, now, normalized_hash or None),
  882:             )
  883:         else:
  884:             conn.execute(
  885:                 """
  886:                 INSERT INTO uploads (conversation_id, original_name, stored_path, created_at)
  887:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
  888:                 """,
  889:                 (conversation_id, original_name, stored_path, now),
  890:             )
  891:         conn.execute(
  892:             "UPDATE conversations SET updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?",
  893:             (now, conversation_id),
  894:         )
  895:     payload: dict[str, str] = {
  896:         "original_name": original_name,
  897:         "stored_path": stored_path,
  898:         "created_at": now,
  899:     }
  900:     if normalized_hash:
  901:         payload["raw_content_sha256"] = normalized_hash
  902:     return payload
  903: 
  904: 
  905: def add_raw_ingest(
  906:     *,
  907:     tenant_id: str,
  908:     workspace_id: str,
  909:     source_type: str,
  910:     source_system: str,
  911:     storage_ref: str,
  912:     original_filename: str | None,
  913:     content_type: str | None,
  914:     byte_size: int,
  915:     raw_content_sha256: str,
  916: ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  917:     columns = list_table_columns("wb_raw_ingests")
  918:     if not columns:
  919:         return None
  920: 
  921:     normalized_hash = str(raw_content_sha256 or "").strip().lower()
  922:     if len(normalized_hash) != 64:
  923:         raise ValueError("raw_content_sha256 must be a 64-character lowercase hex string")
  924: 
  925:     ingest_id = f"ri_{uuid4().hex}"
  926:     now = utc_now_iso()
  927:     normalized_original_name = str(original_filename or "").strip() or None
  928:     normalized_content_type = str(content_type or "").strip() or None
  929:     with get_conn() as conn:
  930:         conn.execute(
  931:             """
  932:             INSERT INTO wb_raw_ingests (
  933:                 id,
  934:                 tenant_id,
  935:                 workspace_id,
  936:                 source_type,
  937:                 source_system,
  938:                 received_at,
  939:                 raw_content_sha256,
  940:                 byte_size,
  941:                 storage_ref,
  942:                 original_filename,
  943:                 content_type,
  944:                 ingest_metadata_json
  945:             )
  946:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
  947:             ON CONFLICT(tenant_id, workspace_id, raw_content_sha256) DO NOTHING
  948:             """,
  949:             (
  950:                 ingest_id,
  951:                 str(tenant_id).strip(),
  952:                 str(workspace_id).strip(),
  953:                 str(source_type).strip(),
  954:                 str(source_system).strip(),
  955:                 now,
  956:                 normalized_hash,
  957:                 int(byte_size),
  958:                 str(storage_ref).strip(),
  959:                 normalized_original_name,
  960:                 normalized_content_type,
  961:                 "{}",
  962:             ),
  963:         )
  964:         row = conn.execute(
  965:             """
  966:             SELECT
  967:                 id,
  968:                 tenant_id,
  969:                 workspace_id,
  970:                 source_type,
  971:                 source_system,
  972:                 received_at,
  973:                 raw_content_sha256,
  974:                 byte_size,
  975:                 storage_ref,
  976:                 original_filename,
  977:                 content_type
  978:             FROM wb_raw_ingests
  979:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
  980:               AND workspace_id = ?
  981:               AND raw_content_sha256 = ?
  982:             ORDER BY datetime(received_at) DESC, id DESC
  983:             LIMIT 1
  984:             """,
  985:             (str(tenant_id).strip(), str(workspace_id).strip(), normalized_hash),
  986:         ).fetchone()
  987:     return dict(row) if row else None
  988: 
  989: 
  990: def _normalize_required_text(value: str, *, field_name: str) -> str:
  991:     from workbench.backend.db.core.normalize import (
  992:         _normalize_required_text as _normalize_required_text_impl,
  993:     )
  994: 
  995:     return _normalize_required_text_impl(value, field_name=field_name)
  996: 
  997: 
  998: def _normalize_engine1_scenario(value: str) -> str:
  999:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name="scenario").lower()
 1000:     if normalized not in ENGINE1_ALLOWED_SCENARIOS:
 1001:         raise ValueError("scenario must be one of: actual, budget, forecast.")
 1002:     return normalized
 1003: 
 1004: 
 1005: def engine1_zero_rows_output_fingerprint() -> str:
 1006:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes([]))
 1007: 
 1008: 
 1009: def _engine1_input_fingerprint(
 1010:     *,
 1011:     tenant_id: str,
 1012:     workspace_id: str,
 1013:     raw_ingest_id: str,
 1014:     raw_content_sha256: str,
 1015:     scenario: str,
 1016:     period_key: str,
 1017:     transformation_version: str,
 1018: ) -> str:
 1019:     payload = {
 1020:         "period_key": period_key,
 1021:         "raw_content_sha256": raw_content_sha256,
 1022:         "raw_ingest_id": raw_ingest_id,
 1023:         "scenario": scenario,
 1024:         "tenant_id": tenant_id,
 1025:         "transformation_version": transformation_version,
 1026:         "workspace_id": workspace_id,
 1027:     }
 1028:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 1029: 
 1030: 
 1031: def create_engine1_canonical_run_skeleton(
 1032:     *,
 1033:     tenant_id: str,
 1034:     workspace_id: str,
 1035:     raw_ingest_id: str,
 1036:     scenario: str,
 1037:     period_key: str,
 1038: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 1039:     canonical_columns = list_table_columns("wb_canonical_runs")
 1040:     raw_columns = list_table_columns("wb_raw_ingests")
 1041:     if not canonical_columns or not raw_columns:
 1042:         raise RuntimeError("Engine1 canonical schema is not available.")
 1043: 
 1044:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 1045:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(
 1046:         workspace_id,
 1047:         field_name="workspace_id",
 1048:     )
 1049:     normalized_raw_ingest_id = _normalize_required_text(
 1050:         raw_ingest_id,
 1051:         field_name="raw_ingest_id",
 1052:     )
 1053:     normalized_scenario = _normalize_engine1_scenario(scenario)
 1054:     normalized_period_key = _normalize_required_text(period_key, field_name="period_key")
 1055:     transformation_version = ENGINE1_TRANSFORMATION_VERSION
 1056: 
 1057:     with get_conn() as conn:
 1058:         raw_ingest_row = conn.execute(
 1059:             """
 1060:             SELECT id, tenant_id, workspace_id, raw_content_sha256
 1061:             FROM wb_raw_ingests
 1062:             WHERE id = ?
 1063:             LIMIT 1
 1064:             """,
 1065:             (normalized_raw_ingest_id,),
 1066:         ).fetchone()
 1067:         if not raw_ingest_row:
 1068:             raise LookupError("raw_ingest_id was not found.")
 1069: 
 1070:         raw_tenant = str(raw_ingest_row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 1071:         raw_workspace = str(raw_ingest_row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 1072:         raw_hash = str(raw_ingest_row["raw_content_sha256"] or "").strip().lower()
 1073:         if raw_tenant != normalized_tenant or raw_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 1074:             raise PermissionError("raw_ingest_id does not belong to tenant/workspace scope.")
 1075: 
 1076:         input_fingerprint = _engine1_input_fingerprint(
 1077:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 1078:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 1079:             raw_ingest_id=normalized_raw_ingest_id,
 1080:             raw_content_sha256=raw_hash,
 1081:             scenario=normalized_scenario,
 1082:             period_key=normalized_period_key,
 1083:             transformation_version=transformation_version,
 1084:         )
 1085: 
 1086:         existing_row = conn.execute(
 1087:             """
 1088:             SELECT
 1089:                 id,
 1090:                 tenant_id,
 1091:                 workspace_id,
 1092:                 scenario,
 1093:                 period_key,
 1094:                 transformation_version,
 1095:                 raw_ingest_id,
 1096:                 airlock_doc_id,
 1097:                 run_created_at,
 1098:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1099:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1100:                 status,
 1101:                 error_code,
 1102:                 error_text
 1103:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1104:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 1105:               AND workspace_id = ?
 1106:               AND scenario = ?
 1107:               AND period_key = ?
 1108:               AND transformation_version = ?
 1109:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 1110:             ORDER BY datetime(run_created_at) DESC, id DESC
 1111:             LIMIT 1
 1112:             """,
 1113:             (
 1114:                 normalized_tenant,
 1115:                 normalized_workspace,
 1116:                 normalized_scenario,
 1117:                 normalized_period_key,
 1118:                 transformation_version,
 1119:                 input_fingerprint,
 1120:             ),
 1121:         ).fetchone()
 1122:         if existing_row:
 1123:             return dict(existing_row), False
 1124: 
 1125:         canonical_run_id = f"cr_{uuid4().hex}"
 1126:         now = utc_now_iso()
 1127:         running_placeholder_sha = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 1128:             b"engine1_phase1c_running"
 1129:         )
 1130:         conn.execute(
 1131:             """
 1132:             INSERT INTO wb_canonical_runs (
 1133:                 id,
 1134:                 tenant_id,
 1135:                 workspace_id,
 1136:                 scenario,
 1137:                 period_key,
 1138:                 transformation_version,
 1139:                 raw_ingest_id,
 1140:                 airlock_doc_id,
 1141:                 run_created_at,
 1142:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1143:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1144:                 status,
 1145:                 error_code,
 1146:                 error_text
 1147:             )
 1148:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, ?, ?, ?, 'RUNNING', NULL, NULL)
 1149:             """,
 1150:             (
 1151:                 canonical_run_id,
 1152:                 normalized_tenant,
 1153:                 normalized_workspace,
 1154:                 normalized_scenario,
 1155:                 normalized_period_key,
 1156:                 transformation_version,
 1157:                 normalized_raw_ingest_id,
 1158:                 now,
 1159:                 input_fingerprint,
 1160:                 running_placeholder_sha,
 1161:             ),
 1162:         )
 1163: 
 1164:         output_fingerprint = engine1_zero_rows_output_fingerprint()
 1165:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 1166:             """
 1167:             UPDATE wb_canonical_runs
 1168:             SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 1169:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 1170:                 error_code = NULL,
 1171:                 error_text = NULL
 1172:             WHERE id = ?
 1173:               AND status = 'RUNNING'
 1174:             """,
 1175:             (output_fingerprint, canonical_run_id),
 1176:         )
 1177:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0)) != 1:
 1178:             raise RuntimeError("Failed to finalize canonical run state transition.")
 1179: 
 1180:         created_row = conn.execute(
 1181:             """
 1182:             SELECT
 1183:                 id,
 1184:                 tenant_id,
 1185:                 workspace_id,
 1186:                 scenario,
 1187:                 period_key,
 1188:                 transformation_version,
 1189:                 raw_ingest_id,
 1190:                 airlock_doc_id,
 1191:                 run_created_at,
 1192:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1193:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1194:                 status,
 1195:                 error_code,
 1196:                 error_text
 1197:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1198:             WHERE id = ?
 1199:             LIMIT 1
 1200:             """,
 1201:             (canonical_run_id,),
 1202:         ).fetchone()
 1203:         if not created_row:
 1204:             raise RuntimeError("Canonical run was not persisted.")
 1205:         return dict(created_row), True
 1206: 
 1207: 
 1208: def _normalize_engine1_hash(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 1209:     normalized = str(value or "").strip().lower()
 1210:     if not _HEX64_RE.match(normalized):
 1211:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a 64-character lowercase hex string.")
 1212:     return normalized
 1213: 
 1214: 
 1215: def _normalize_engine1_currency(value: Any) -> str:
 1216:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(str(value or "").upper(), field_name="transaction_currency")
 1217:     if not re.match(r"^[A-Z]{3}$", normalized):
 1218:         raise ValueError("transaction_currency must be a 3-letter uppercase currency code.")
 1219:     return normalized
 1220: 
 1221: 
 1222: def _normalize_engine1_decimal(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> Decimal:
 1223:     try:
 1224:         return Decimal(str(value))
 1225:     except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
 1226:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be numeric.") from exc
 1227: 
 1228: 
 1229: def _engine1_decimal_to_str(value: Decimal) -> str:
 1230:     normalized = value.normalize()
 1231:     text = format(normalized, "f")
 1232:     if "." in text:
 1233:         text = text.rstrip("0").rstrip(".")
 1234:     return text or "0"
 1235: 
 1236: 
 1237: def _build_engine1_row_hashes(
 1238:     *,
 1239:     scenario: str,
 1240:     period_key: str,
 1241:     row_payload: dict[str, Any],
 1242: ) -> tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]:
 1243:     entity_code = _normalize_required_text(
 1244:         row_payload.get("entity_code", ""),
 1245:         field_name="entity_code",
 1246:     )
 1247:     account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 1248:         row_payload.get("account_code", ""),
 1249:         field_name="account_code",
 1250:     )
 1251:     source_row_ref = _normalize_required_text(
 1252:         row_payload.get("source_row_ref", ""),
 1253:         field_name="source_row_ref",
 1254:     )
 1255:     source_row_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 1256:         row_payload.get("source_row_sha256"),
 1257:         field_name="source_row_sha256",
 1258:     )
 1259:     currency = _normalize_engine1_currency(row_payload.get("transaction_currency"))
 1260:     debit_decimal = _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 1261:         row_payload.get("debit", 0),
 1262:         field_name="debit",
 1263:     )
 1264:     credit_decimal = _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 1265:         row_payload.get("credit", 0),
 1266:         field_name="credit",
 1267:     )
 1268:     if debit_decimal < 0 or credit_decimal < 0:
 1269:         raise ValueError("debit and credit must be greater than or equal to 0.")
 1270:     amount_signed = debit_decimal - credit_decimal
 1271: 
 1272:     identity_payload = {
 1273:         "account_code": account_code,
 1274:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 1275:         "period_key": period_key,
 1276:         "scenario": scenario,
 1277:         "source_row_ref": source_row_ref,
 1278:         "source_row_sha256": source_row_sha256,
 1279:         "transaction_currency": currency,
 1280:     }
 1281:     identity_sha = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 1282:         determinism.canonical_json_bytes(identity_payload)
 1283:     )
 1284:     canonical_payload = {
 1285:         **identity_payload,
 1286:         "amount_signed": _engine1_decimal_to_str(amount_signed),
 1287:         "credit": _engine1_decimal_to_str(credit_decimal),
 1288:         "debit": _engine1_decimal_to_str(debit_decimal),
 1289:         "fact_type": "journal_line",
 1290:     }
 1291:     row_sha = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(canonical_payload))
 1292:     normalized_row = {
 1293:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 1294:         "account_code": account_code,
 1295:         "source_row_ref": source_row_ref,
 1296:         "source_row_sha256": source_row_sha256,
 1297:         "transaction_currency": currency,
 1298:         "debit": float(debit_decimal),
 1299:         "credit": float(credit_decimal),
 1300:         "amount_signed": float(amount_signed),
 1301:         "canonical_row_identity_sha256": identity_sha,
 1302:         "canonical_row_sha256": row_sha,
 1303:     }
 1304:     return identity_sha, row_sha, normalized_row
 1305: 
 1306: 
 1307: def _engine1_output_fingerprint_for_run(conn: Any, canonical_run_id: str) -> str:
 1308:     rows = conn.execute(
 1309:         """
 1310:         SELECT canonical_row_sha256
 1311:         FROM wb_ledger_facts
 1312:         WHERE canonical_run_id = ?
 1313:         ORDER BY canonical_row_sha256 ASC
 1314:         """
 1315:         ,
 1316:         (canonical_run_id,),
 1317:     ).fetchall()
 1318:     values = [str(row["canonical_row_sha256"] or "").strip().lower() for row in rows]
 1319:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(values))
 1320: 
 1321: 
 1322: def insert_engine1_canonical_rows(
 1323:     *,
 1324:     tenant_id: str,
 1325:     workspace_id: str,
 1326:     canonical_run_id: str,
 1327:     rows: list[dict[str, Any]],
 1328: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 1329:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 1330:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 1331:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(canonical_run_id, field_name="canonical_run_id")
 1332:     if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
 1333:         raise ValueError("rows must contain at least one canonical ledger row payload.")
 1334: 
 1335:     with get_conn() as conn:
 1336:         run_row = conn.execute(
 1337:             """
 1338:             SELECT
 1339:                 id,
 1340:                 tenant_id,
 1341:                 workspace_id,
 1342:                 scenario,
 1343:                 period_key,
 1344:                 raw_ingest_id,
 1345:                 airlock_doc_id,
 1346:                 status
 1347:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1348:             WHERE id = ?
 1349:             LIMIT 1
 1350:             """,
 1351:             (normalized_run_id,),
 1352:         ).fetchone()
 1353:         if not run_row:
 1354:             raise LookupError("canonical_run_id was not found.")
 1355: 
 1356:         run_tenant = str(run_row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 1357:         run_workspace = str(run_row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 1358:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 1359:             raise PermissionError("canonical_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 1360: 
 1361:         run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 1362:         if run_status not in {"RUNNING", "SUCCEEDED"}:
 1363:             raise ValueError("canonical_run status does not allow ledger row insertion.")
 1364: 
 1365:         run_scenario = _normalize_engine1_scenario(str(run_row["scenario"] or ""))
 1366:         run_period_key = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["period_key"] or ""), field_name="period_key")
 1367:         raw_ingest_id = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["raw_ingest_id"] or ""), field_name="raw_ingest_id")
 1368:         airlock_doc_id = str(run_row["airlock_doc_id"] or "").strip() or None
 1369: 
 1370:         seen_identity_keys: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()
 1371:         normalized_rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 1372:         for payload in rows:
 1373:             if not isinstance(payload, dict):
 1374:                 raise ValueError("Each row payload must be an object.")
 1375:             identity_sha, _, normalized_row = _build_engine1_row_hashes(
 1376:                 scenario=run_scenario,
 1377:                 period_key=run_period_key,
 1378:                 row_payload=payload,
 1379:             )
 1380:             dedupe_key = (identity_sha, str(normalized_row["source_row_sha256"]))
 1381:             if dedupe_key in seen_identity_keys:
 1382:                 raise ValueError("Duplicate canonical rows are not allowed in the same run.")
 1383:             seen_identity_keys.add(dedupe_key)
 1384:             normalized_rows.append(normalized_row)
 1385: 
 1386:         now = utc_now_iso()
 1387:         for normalized_row in normalized_rows:
 1388:             row_id = f"lf_{uuid4().hex}"
 1389:             try:
 1390:                 conn.execute(
 1391:                     """
 1392:                     INSERT INTO wb_ledger_facts (
 1393:                         id,
 1394:                         tenant_id,
 1395:                         workspace_id,
 1396:                         canonical_run_id,
 1397:                         scenario,
 1398:                         period_key,
 1399:                         entity_code,
 1400:                         account_code,
 1401:                         dimension_json,
 1402:                         fact_type,
 1403:                         description,
 1404:                         debit,
 1405:                         credit,
 1406:                         amount_signed,
 1407:                         transaction_currency,
 1408:                         reporting_currency,
 1409:                         fx_rate_applied,
 1410:                         amount_reporting,
 1411:                         raw_ingest_id,
 1412:                         airlock_doc_id,
 1413:                         source_row_ref,
 1414:                         source_row_sha256,
 1415:                         canonical_row_identity_sha256,
 1416:                         canonical_row_sha256,
 1417:                         created_at
 1418:                     )
 1419:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '{}', 'journal_line', NULL, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 1420:                     """,
 1421:                     (
 1422:                         row_id,
 1423:                         normalized_tenant,
 1424:                         normalized_workspace,
 1425:                         normalized_run_id,
 1426:                         run_scenario,
 1427:                         run_period_key,
 1428:                         str(normalized_row["entity_code"]),
 1429:                         str(normalized_row["account_code"]),
 1430:                         float(normalized_row["debit"]),
 1431:                         float(normalized_row["credit"]),
 1432:                         float(normalized_row["amount_signed"]),
 1433:                         str(normalized_row["transaction_currency"]),
 1434:                         str(normalized_row["transaction_currency"]),
 1435:                         float(normalized_row["amount_signed"]),
 1436:                         raw_ingest_id,
 1437:                         airlock_doc_id,
 1438:                         str(normalized_row["source_row_ref"]),
 1439:                         str(normalized_row["source_row_sha256"]),
 1440:                         str(normalized_row["canonical_row_identity_sha256"]),
 1441:                         str(normalized_row["canonical_row_sha256"]),
 1442:                         now,
 1443:                     ),
 1444:                 )
 1445:             except sqlite3.IntegrityError as exc:
 1446:                 raise ValueError(
 1447:                     "Duplicate canonical rows are not allowed in the same run."
 1448:                 ) from exc
 1449:             except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 1450:                 message = str(exc).lower()
 1451:                 if "unique" in message and "wb_ledger_facts" in message:
 1452:                     raise ValueError(
 1453:                         "Duplicate canonical rows are not allowed in the same run."
 1454:                     ) from exc
 1455:                 raise
 1456: 
 1457:         output_fingerprint = _engine1_output_fingerprint_for_run(conn, normalized_run_id)
 1458:         conn.execute(
 1459:             """
 1460:             UPDATE wb_canonical_runs
 1461:             SET output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 1462:                 status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 1463:                 error_code = NULL,
 1464:                 error_text = NULL
 1465:             WHERE id = ?
 1466:             """,
 1467:             (output_fingerprint, normalized_run_id),
 1468:         )
 1469:         updated_run = conn.execute(
 1470:             """
 1471:             SELECT
 1472:                 id,
 1473:                 tenant_id,
 1474:                 workspace_id,
 1475:                 scenario,
 1476:                 period_key,
 1477:                 transformation_version,
 1478:                 raw_ingest_id,
 1479:                 airlock_doc_id,
 1480:                 run_created_at,
 1481:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1482:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1483:                 status,
 1484:                 error_code,
 1485:                 error_text
 1486:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1487:             WHERE id = ?
 1488:             LIMIT 1
 1489:             """,
 1490:             (normalized_run_id,),
 1491:         ).fetchone()
 1492:         if not updated_run:
 1493:             raise RuntimeError("canonical_run_id became unavailable after row insertion.")
 1494:         return {
 1495:             "canonical_run": dict(updated_run),
 1496:             "inserted_count": len(normalized_rows),
 1497:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint,
 1498:         }
 1499: 
 1500: 
 1501: def _canonical_json_text(value: Any) -> str:
 1502:     from workbench.backend.db.core.determinism import (
 1503:         _canonical_json_text as _canonical_json_text_impl,
 1504:     )
 1505: 
 1506:     return _canonical_json_text_impl(value)
 1507: 
 1508: 
 1509: def _normalize_engine2_period_key(value: str) -> str:
 1510:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name="period_key")
 1511:     if not re.match(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}$", normalized):
 1512:         raise ValueError("period_key must use YYYY-MM format.")
 1513:     return normalized
 1514: 
 1515: 
 1516: def _normalize_engine2_entity_code(value: str) -> str:
 1517:     return _normalize_required_text(value, field_name="entity_code")
 1518: 
 1519: 
 1520: def _normalize_engine2_tolerance_snapshot(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 1521:     if value is None:
 1522:         return {}
 1523:     if not isinstance(value, dict):
 1524:         raise ValueError("tolerance_snapshot must be a JSON object.")
 1525:     return value
 1526: 
 1527: 
 1528: def _engine2_zero_rows_output_fingerprint() -> str:
 1529:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes([]))
 1530: 
 1531: 
 1532: def _resolve_engine2_canonical_anchors(
 1533:     conn: Any,
 1534:     *,
 1535:     tenant_id: str,
 1536:     workspace_id: str,
 1537:     canonical_run_ids: list[str] | None,
 1538:     canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors: list[str] | None,
 1539: ) -> list[str]:
 1540:     anchors: set[str] = set()
 1541: 
 1542:     normalized_run_ids = sorted(
 1543:         {
 1544:             _normalize_required_text(str(run_id), field_name="canonical_run_id")
 1545:             for run_id in (canonical_run_ids or [])
 1546:             if str(run_id or "").strip()
 1547:         }
 1548:     )
 1549:     for run_id in normalized_run_ids:
 1550:         row = conn.execute(
 1551:             """
 1552:             SELECT tenant_id, workspace_id, status, output_fingerprint_sha256
 1553:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1554:             WHERE id = ?
 1555:             LIMIT 1
 1556:             """,
 1557:             (run_id,),
 1558:         ).fetchone()
 1559:         if not row:
 1560:             raise LookupError(f"canonical_run_id '{run_id}' was not found.")
 1561:         row_tenant = str(row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 1562:         row_workspace = str(row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 1563:         if row_tenant != tenant_id or row_workspace != workspace_id:
 1564:             raise PermissionError("canonical_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 1565:         row_status = str(row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 1566:         if row_status != "SUCCEEDED":
 1567:             raise RuntimeError("canonical_run_id must reference a SUCCEEDED canonical run.")
 1568:         anchor = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 1569:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 1570:             field_name="canonical_run_output_fingerprint_sha256",
 1571:         )
 1572:         anchors.add(anchor)
 1573: 
 1574:     normalized_anchors = sorted(
 1575:         {
 1576:             _normalize_engine1_hash(
 1577:                 anchor,
 1578:                 field_name="canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors",
 1579:             )
 1580:             for anchor in (canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors or [])
 1581:             if str(anchor or "").strip()
 1582:         }
 1583:     )
 1584:     for anchor in normalized_anchors:
 1585:         row = conn.execute(
 1586:             """
 1587:             SELECT id
 1588:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1589:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 1590:               AND workspace_id = ?
 1591:               AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 1592:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 1593:             LIMIT 1
 1594:             """,
 1595:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, anchor),
 1596:         ).fetchone()
 1597:         if not row:
 1598:             raise LookupError(
 1599:                 "canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors must reference existing SUCCEEDED canonical runs."
 1600:             )
 1601:         anchors.add(anchor)
 1602: 
 1603:     resolved = sorted(anchors)
 1604:     if not resolved:
 1605:         raise ValueError(
 1606:             "At least one canonical anchor is required via canonical_run_ids or canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors."
 1607:         )
 1608:     return resolved
 1609: 
 1610: 
 1611: def _engine2_reconciliation_input_fingerprint(
 1612:     *,
 1613:     tenant_id: str,
 1614:     workspace_id: str,
 1615:     scenario: str,
 1616:     period_key: str,
 1617:     entity_code: str,
 1618:     tolerance_snapshot: dict[str, Any],
 1619:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 1620: ) -> str:
 1621:     payload = {
 1622:         "canonical_input_anchors": canonical_anchors,
 1623:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 1624:         "period_key": period_key,
 1625:         "scenario": scenario,
 1626:         "tenant_id": tenant_id,
 1627:         "tolerance_snapshot": tolerance_snapshot,
 1628:         "workspace_id": workspace_id,
 1629:     }
 1630:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 1631: 
 1632: 
 1633: def create_engine2_reconciliation_run_skeleton(
 1634:     *,
 1635:     tenant_id: str,
 1636:     workspace_id: str,
 1637:     scenario: str,
 1638:     period_key: str,
 1639:     entity_code: str,
 1640:     tolerance_snapshot: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 1641:     canonical_run_ids: list[str] | None = None,
 1642:     canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors: list[str] | None = None,
 1643: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 1644:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e2_reconciliation_runs")
 1645:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e2_reconciliation_run_events")
 1646:     if not run_columns or not event_columns:
 1647:         raise RuntimeError("Engine2 reconciliation schema is not available.")
 1648: 
 1649:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 1650:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 1651:     normalized_scenario = _normalize_engine1_scenario(scenario)
 1652:     normalized_period = _normalize_engine2_period_key(period_key)
 1653:     normalized_entity_code = _normalize_engine2_entity_code(entity_code)
 1654:     normalized_tolerance_snapshot = _normalize_engine2_tolerance_snapshot(tolerance_snapshot)
 1655: 
 1656:     with get_conn() as conn:
 1657:         canonical_anchors = _resolve_engine2_canonical_anchors(
 1658:             conn,
 1659:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 1660:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 1661:             canonical_run_ids=canonical_run_ids,
 1662:             canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors=canonical_run_output_fingerprint_anchors,
 1663:         )
 1664:         input_fingerprint = _engine2_reconciliation_input_fingerprint(
 1665:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 1666:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 1667:             scenario=normalized_scenario,
 1668:             period_key=normalized_period,
 1669:             entity_code=normalized_entity_code,
 1670:             tolerance_snapshot=normalized_tolerance_snapshot,
 1671:             canonical_anchors=canonical_anchors,
 1672:         )
 1673:         existing_row = conn.execute(
 1674:             """
 1675:             SELECT
 1676:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1677:                 tenant_id,
 1678:                 workspace_id,
 1679:                 scenario,
 1680:                 period_key,
 1681:                 entity_code,
 1682:                 tolerance_snapshot_json,
 1683:                 canonical_input_anchors_json,
 1684:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1685:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1686:                 status,
 1687:                 error_code,
 1688:                 error_text,
 1689:                 created_at,
 1690:                 updated_at
 1691:             FROM e2_reconciliation_runs
 1692:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 1693:               AND workspace_id = ?
 1694:               AND scenario = ?
 1695:               AND period_key = ?
 1696:               AND entity_code = ?
 1697:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 1698:             ORDER BY created_at DESC, reconciliation_run_id DESC
 1699:             LIMIT 1
 1700:             """,
 1701:             (
 1702:                 normalized_tenant,
 1703:                 normalized_workspace,
 1704:                 normalized_scenario,
 1705:                 normalized_period,
 1706:                 normalized_entity_code,
 1707:                 input_fingerprint,
 1708:             ),
 1709:         ).fetchone()
 1710:         if existing_row:
 1711:             return dict(existing_row), False
 1712: 
 1713:         now = utc_now_iso()
 1714:         reconciliation_run_id = f"rr_{uuid4().hex}"
 1715:         output_fingerprint = _engine2_zero_rows_output_fingerprint()
 1716:         tolerance_json = _canonical_json_text(normalized_tolerance_snapshot)
 1717:         anchors_json = _canonical_json_text(canonical_anchors)
 1718: 
 1719:         conn.execute(
 1720:             """
 1721:             INSERT INTO e2_reconciliation_runs (
 1722:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1723:                 tenant_id,
 1724:                 workspace_id,
 1725:                 scenario,
 1726:                 period_key,
 1727:                 entity_code,
 1728:                 tolerance_snapshot_json,
 1729:                 canonical_input_anchors_json,
 1730:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1731:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1732:                 status,
 1733:                 error_code,
 1734:                 error_text,
 1735:                 created_at,
 1736:                 updated_at
 1737:             )
 1738:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'RUNNING', NULL, NULL, ?, ?)
 1739:             """,
 1740:             (
 1741:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1742:                 normalized_tenant,
 1743:                 normalized_workspace,
 1744:                 normalized_scenario,
 1745:                 normalized_period,
 1746:                 normalized_entity_code,
 1747:                 tolerance_json,
 1748:                 anchors_json,
 1749:                 input_fingerprint,
 1750:                 output_fingerprint,
 1751:                 now,
 1752:                 now,
 1753:             ),
 1754:         )
 1755:         conn.execute(
 1756:             """
 1757:             INSERT INTO e2_reconciliation_run_events (
 1758:                 event_id,
 1759:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1760:                 tenant_id,
 1761:                 workspace_id,
 1762:                 event_seq,
 1763:                 event_type,
 1764:                 from_status,
 1765:                 to_status,
 1766:                 event_payload_json,
 1767:                 created_at
 1768:             )
 1769:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 'STATUS_TRANSITION', NULL, 'RUNNING', '{}', ?)
 1770:             """,
 1771:             (f"rre_{uuid4().hex}", reconciliation_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, now),
 1772:         )
 1773:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 1774:             """
 1775:             UPDATE e2_reconciliation_runs
 1776:             SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 1777:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 1778:                 error_code = NULL,
 1779:                 error_text = NULL,
 1780:                 updated_at = ?
 1781:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 1782:               AND status = 'RUNNING'
 1783:             """,
 1784:             (output_fingerprint, now, reconciliation_run_id),
 1785:         )
 1786:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0)) != 1:
 1787:             raise RuntimeError("Failed to finalize reconciliation run state transition.")
 1788:         conn.execute(
 1789:             """
 1790:             INSERT INTO e2_reconciliation_run_events (
 1791:                 event_id,
 1792:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1793:                 tenant_id,
 1794:                 workspace_id,
 1795:                 event_seq,
 1796:                 event_type,
 1797:                 from_status,
 1798:                 to_status,
 1799:                 event_payload_json,
 1800:                 created_at
 1801:             )
 1802:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 2, 'STATUS_TRANSITION', 'RUNNING', 'SUCCEEDED', '{}', ?)
 1803:             """,
 1804:             (f"rre_{uuid4().hex}", reconciliation_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, now),
 1805:         )
 1806: 
 1807:         created_row = conn.execute(
 1808:             """
 1809:             SELECT
 1810:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1811:                 tenant_id,
 1812:                 workspace_id,
 1813:                 scenario,
 1814:                 period_key,
 1815:                 entity_code,
 1816:                 tolerance_snapshot_json,
 1817:                 canonical_input_anchors_json,
 1818:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1819:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1820:                 status,
 1821:                 error_code,
 1822:                 error_text,
 1823:                 created_at,
 1824:                 updated_at
 1825:             FROM e2_reconciliation_runs
 1826:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 1827:             LIMIT 1
 1828:             """,
 1829:             (reconciliation_run_id,),
 1830:         ).fetchone()
 1831:         if not created_row:
 1832:             raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run was not persisted.")
 1833:         return dict(created_row), True
 1834: 
 1835: 
 1836: def _engine2_next_reconciliation_event_seq(conn: Any, reconciliation_run_id: str) -> int:
 1837:     from workbench.backend.db.core.events import (
 1838:         _engine2_next_reconciliation_event_seq as _engine2_next_reconciliation_event_seq_impl,
 1839:     )
 1840: 
 1841:     return _engine2_next_reconciliation_event_seq_impl(conn, reconciliation_run_id)
 1842: 
 1843: 
 1844: def _engine2_append_reconciliation_event(
 1845:     conn: Any,
 1846:     *,
 1847:     reconciliation_run_id: str,
 1848:     tenant_id: str,
 1849:     workspace_id: str,
 1850:     event_type: str,
 1851:     from_status: str | None,
 1852:     to_status: str | None,
 1853:     payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 1854: ) -> None:
 1855:     from workbench.backend.db.core.events import (
 1856:         _engine2_append_reconciliation_event as _engine2_append_reconciliation_event_impl,
 1857:     )
 1858: 
 1859:     _engine2_append_reconciliation_event_impl(
 1860:         conn,
 1861:         reconciliation_run_id=reconciliation_run_id,
 1862:         tenant_id=tenant_id,
 1863:         workspace_id=workspace_id,
 1864:         event_type=event_type,
 1865:         from_status=from_status,
 1866:         to_status=to_status,
 1867:         payload=payload,
 1868:         canonical_json_text=_canonical_json_text,
 1869:         utc_now_iso=utc_now_iso,
 1870:     )
 1871: 
 1872: 
 1873: def _engine2_parse_anchor_json(value: Any) -> list[str]:
 1874:     raw = str(value or "").strip()
 1875:     if not raw:
 1876:         raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run canonical anchors are missing.")
 1877:     try:
 1878:         parsed = json.loads(raw)
 1879:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 1880:         raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run canonical anchors are invalid JSON.") from exc
 1881:     if not isinstance(parsed, list):
 1882:         raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run canonical anchors must be a JSON list.")
 1883:     anchors = sorted(
 1884:         {
 1885:             _normalize_engine1_hash(item, field_name="canonical_input_anchors_json")
 1886:             for item in parsed
 1887:             if str(item or "").strip()
 1888:         }
 1889:     )
 1890:     if not anchors:
 1891:         raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run canonical anchors are empty.")
 1892:     return anchors
 1893: 
 1894: 
 1895: def _engine2_resolve_anchor_run_ids(
 1896:     conn: Any,
 1897:     *,
 1898:     tenant_id: str,
 1899:     workspace_id: str,
 1900:     scenario: str,
 1901:     period_key: str,
 1902:     anchors: list[str],
 1903: ) -> list[str]:
 1904:     resolved_run_ids: list[str] = []
 1905:     for anchor in anchors:
 1906:         rows = conn.execute(
 1907:             """
 1908:             SELECT id
 1909:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 1910:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 1911:               AND workspace_id = ?
 1912:               AND scenario = ?
 1913:               AND period_key = ?
 1914:               AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 1915:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 1916:             ORDER BY id ASC
 1917:             """,
 1918:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, scenario, period_key, anchor),
 1919:         ).fetchall()
 1920:         if len(rows) != 1:
 1921:             raise RuntimeError(
 1922:                 "Canonical anchors cannot deterministically resolve canonical runs."
 1923:             )
 1924:         resolved_run_ids.append(str(rows[0]["id"]))
 1925:     return sorted(resolved_run_ids)
 1926: 
 1927: 
 1928: def _engine2_reconciliation_diff_identity_payload(
 1929:     *,
 1930:     scenario: str,
 1931:     period_key: str,
 1932:     entity_code: str,
 1933:     account_code: str,
 1934:     dimension_payload: Any,
 1935: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 1936:     return {
 1937:         "account_code": account_code,
 1938:         "dimension_json": dimension_payload,
 1939:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 1940:         "period_key": period_key,
 1941:         "scenario": scenario,
 1942:     }
 1943: 
 1944: 
 1945: def _engine2_reconciliation_row_payload(
 1946:     *,
 1947:     identity_payload: dict[str, Any],
 1948:     tb_value: Decimal,
 1949:     gl_value: Decimal,
 1950:     delta_value: Decimal,
 1951: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 1952:     return {
 1953:         **identity_payload,
 1954:         "tb_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(tb_value),
 1955:         "gl_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(gl_value),
 1956:         "delta": _engine1_decimal_to_str(delta_value),
 1957:     }
 1958: 
 1959: 
 1960: def compute_engine2_reconciliation_diffs(
 1961:     *,
 1962:     tenant_id: str,
 1963:     workspace_id: str,
 1964:     reconciliation_run_id: str,
 1965: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 1966:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e2_reconciliation_runs")
 1967:     diff_columns = list_table_columns("e2_reconciliation_diffs")
 1968:     if not run_columns or not diff_columns:
 1969:         raise RuntimeError("Engine2 reconciliation diff schema is not available.")
 1970: 
 1971:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 1972:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 1973:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(
 1974:         reconciliation_run_id,
 1975:         field_name="reconciliation_run_id",
 1976:     )
 1977: 
 1978:     with get_conn() as conn:
 1979:         run_row = conn.execute(
 1980:             """
 1981:             SELECT
 1982:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 1983:                 tenant_id,
 1984:                 workspace_id,
 1985:                 scenario,
 1986:                 period_key,
 1987:                 entity_code,
 1988:                 canonical_input_anchors_json,
 1989:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 1990:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 1991:                 status,
 1992:                 created_at,
 1993:                 updated_at
 1994:             FROM e2_reconciliation_runs
 1995:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 1996:             LIMIT 1
 1997:             """,
 1998:             (normalized_run_id,),
 1999:         ).fetchone()
 2000:         if not run_row:
 2001:             raise LookupError("reconciliation_run_id was not found.")
 2002: 
 2003:         run_tenant = str(run_row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 2004:         run_workspace = str(run_row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 2005:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 2006:             raise PermissionError("reconciliation_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 2007: 
 2008:         run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 2009:         if run_status not in {"RUNNING", "SUCCEEDED"}:
 2010:             raise RuntimeError("reconciliation_run status does not allow diff computation.")
 2011: 
 2012:         existing_diff_row = conn.execute(
 2013:             """
 2014:             SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
 2015:             FROM e2_reconciliation_diffs
 2016:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 2017:             """,
 2018:             (normalized_run_id,),
 2019:         ).fetchone()
 2020:         existing_diff_count = int(existing_diff_row["row_count"] or 0) if existing_diff_row else 0
 2021:         if existing_diff_count > 0 and run_status == "SUCCEEDED":
 2022:             return {
 2023:                 "reconciliation_run": dict(run_row),
 2024:                 "diff_count": existing_diff_count,
 2025:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": str(run_row["output_fingerprint_sha256"] or ""),
 2026:                 "idempotent": True,
 2027:             }
 2028: 
 2029:         scenario = _normalize_engine1_scenario(str(run_row["scenario"] or ""))
 2030:         period_key = _normalize_engine2_period_key(str(run_row["period_key"] or ""))
 2031:         entity_code = _normalize_engine2_entity_code(str(run_row["entity_code"] or ""))
 2032:         anchors = _engine2_parse_anchor_json(run_row["canonical_input_anchors_json"])
 2033:         canonical_run_ids = _engine2_resolve_anchor_run_ids(
 2034:             conn,
 2035:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 2036:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 2037:             scenario=scenario,
 2038:             period_key=period_key,
 2039:             anchors=anchors,
 2040:         )
 2041: 
 2042:         placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in canonical_run_ids)
 2043:         fact_params: list[Any] = [
 2044:             normalized_tenant,
 2045:             normalized_workspace,
 2046:             scenario,
 2047:             period_key,
 2048:             entity_code,
 2049:             *canonical_run_ids,
 2050:         ]
 2051:         counts_row = conn.execute(
 2052:             f"""
 2053:             SELECT
 2054:                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fact_type = 'balance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS tb_rows,
 2055:                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fact_type = 'journal_line' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gl_rows
 2056:             FROM wb_ledger_facts
 2057:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 2058:               AND workspace_id = ?
 2059:               AND scenario = ?
 2060:               AND period_key = ?
 2061:               AND entity_code = ?
 2062:               AND canonical_run_id IN ({placeholders})
 2063:             """,
 2064:             tuple(fact_params),
 2065:         ).fetchone()
 2066:         tb_rows = int(counts_row["tb_rows"] or 0) if counts_row else 0
 2067:         gl_rows = int(counts_row["gl_rows"] or 0) if counts_row else 0
 2068:         if tb_rows <= 0 or gl_rows <= 0:
 2069:             raise RuntimeError(
 2070:                 "Unable to deterministically resolve TB and GL truth sets from canonical facts."
 2071:             )
 2072: 
 2073:         update_running_cursor = conn.execute(
 2074:             """
 2075:             UPDATE e2_reconciliation_runs
 2076:             SET status = 'RUNNING',
 2077:                 error_code = NULL,
 2078:                 error_text = NULL,
 2079:                 updated_at = ?
 2080:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 2081:               AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'SUCCEEDED')
 2082:             """,
 2083:             (utc_now_iso(), normalized_run_id),
 2084:         )
 2085:         if int(getattr(update_running_cursor, "rowcount", 0)) != 1:
 2086:             raise RuntimeError("Failed to transition reconciliation run to RUNNING.")
 2087:         if run_status != "RUNNING":
 2088:             _engine2_append_reconciliation_event(
 2089:                 conn,
 2090:                 reconciliation_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 2091:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 2092:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 2093:                 event_type="STATUS_TRANSITION",
 2094:                 from_status=run_status,
 2095:                 to_status="RUNNING",
 2096:                 payload={},
 2097:             )
 2098: 
 2099:         if existing_diff_count > 0:
 2100:             conn.execute(
 2101:                 "DELETE FROM e2_reconciliation_diffs WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?",
 2102:                 (normalized_run_id,),
 2103:             )
 2104: 
 2105:         aggregate_rows = conn.execute(
 2106:             f"""
 2107:             SELECT
 2108:                 account_code,
 2109:                 COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') AS dimension_json,
 2110:                 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fact_type = 'balance' THEN amount_signed ELSE 0 END), 6) AS tb_value,
 2111:                 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fact_type = 'journal_line' THEN amount_signed ELSE 0 END), 6) AS gl_value
 2112:             FROM wb_ledger_facts
 2113:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 2114:               AND workspace_id = ?
 2115:               AND scenario = ?
 2116:               AND period_key = ?
 2117:               AND entity_code = ?
 2118:               AND canonical_run_id IN ({placeholders})
 2119:             GROUP BY account_code, COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}')
 2120:             ORDER BY account_code ASC, COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') ASC
 2121:             """,
 2122:             tuple(fact_params),
 2123:         ).fetchall()
 2124:         if not aggregate_rows:
 2125:             raise RuntimeError(
 2126:                 "Unable to deterministically resolve TB and GL truth sets from canonical facts."
 2127:             )
 2128: 
 2129:         row_hashes: list[str] = []
 2130:         inserted = 0
 2131:         created_at = utc_now_iso()
 2132:         for aggregate_row in aggregate_rows:
 2133:             account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 2134:                 str(aggregate_row["account_code"] or ""),
 2135:                 field_name="account_code",
 2136:             )
 2137:             raw_dimension = str(aggregate_row["dimension_json"] or "{}").strip() or "{}"
 2138:             try:
 2139:                 dimension_payload = json.loads(raw_dimension)
 2140:             except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 2141:                 raise RuntimeError("Unable to deterministically resolve canonical dimension values.") from exc
 2142:             canonical_dimension_json = _canonical_json_text(dimension_payload)
 2143:             tb_decimal = _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 2144:                 aggregate_row["tb_value"],
 2145:                 field_name="tb_value",
 2146:             )
 2147:             gl_decimal = _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 2148:                 aggregate_row["gl_value"],
 2149:                 field_name="gl_value",
 2150:             )
 2151:             delta_decimal = tb_decimal - gl_decimal
 2152: 
 2153:             identity_payload = _engine2_reconciliation_diff_identity_payload(
 2154:                 scenario=scenario,
 2155:                 period_key=period_key,
 2156:                 entity_code=entity_code,
 2157:                 account_code=account_code,
 2158:                 dimension_payload=dimension_payload,
 2159:             )
 2160:             identity_sha = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 2161:                 determinism.canonical_json_bytes(identity_payload)
 2162:             )
 2163:             row_payload = _engine2_reconciliation_row_payload(
 2164:                 identity_payload=identity_payload,
 2165:                 tb_value=tb_decimal,
 2166:                 gl_value=gl_decimal,
 2167:                 delta_value=delta_decimal,
 2168:             )
 2169:             row_sha = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(row_payload))
 2170:             conn.execute(
 2171:                 """
 2172:                 INSERT INTO e2_reconciliation_diffs (
 2173:                     diff_id,
 2174:                     tenant_id,
 2175:                     workspace_id,
 2176:                     reconciliation_run_id,
 2177:                     account_code,
 2178:                     dimension_json,
 2179:                     tb_value,
 2180:                     gl_value,
 2181:                     delta,
 2182:                     identity_sha256,
 2183:                     row_sha256,
 2184:                     created_at
 2185:                 )
 2186:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 2187:                 """,
 2188:                 (
 2189:                     f"rd_{uuid4().hex}",
 2190:                     normalized_tenant,
 2191:                     normalized_workspace,
 2192:                     normalized_run_id,
 2193:                     account_code,
 2194:                     canonical_dimension_json,
 2195:                     float(tb_decimal),
 2196:                     float(gl_decimal),
 2197:                     float(delta_decimal),
 2198:                     identity_sha,
 2199:                     row_sha,
 2200:                     created_at,
 2201:                 ),
 2202:             )
 2203:             inserted += 1
 2204:             row_hashes.append(row_sha)
 2205: 
 2206:         output_fingerprint = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 2207:             determinism.canonical_json_bytes(sorted(row_hashes))
 2208:         )
 2209:         finalized_at = utc_now_iso()
 2210:         update_final_cursor = conn.execute(
 2211:             """
 2212:             UPDATE e2_reconciliation_runs
 2213:             SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 2214:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 2215:                 error_code = NULL,
 2216:                 error_text = NULL,
 2217:                 updated_at = ?
 2218:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 2219:               AND status = 'RUNNING'
 2220:             """,
 2221:             (output_fingerprint, finalized_at, normalized_run_id),
 2222:         )
 2223:         if int(getattr(update_final_cursor, "rowcount", 0)) != 1:
 2224:             raise RuntimeError("Failed to finalize reconciliation run diff computation.")
 2225:         _engine2_append_reconciliation_event(
 2226:             conn,
 2227:             reconciliation_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 2228:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 2229:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 2230:             event_type="STATUS_TRANSITION",
 2231:             from_status="RUNNING",
 2232:             to_status="SUCCEEDED",
 2233:             payload={
 2234:                 "diff_count": inserted,
 2235:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint,
 2236:             },
 2237:         )
 2238:         updated_run = conn.execute(
 2239:             """
 2240:             SELECT
 2241:                 reconciliation_run_id,
 2242:                 tenant_id,
 2243:                 workspace_id,
 2244:                 scenario,
 2245:                 period_key,
 2246:                 entity_code,
 2247:                 tolerance_snapshot_json,
 2248:                 canonical_input_anchors_json,
 2249:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 2250:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 2251:                 status,
 2252:                 error_code,
 2253:                 error_text,
 2254:                 created_at,
 2255:                 updated_at
 2256:             FROM e2_reconciliation_runs
 2257:             WHERE reconciliation_run_id = ?
 2258:             LIMIT 1
 2259:             """,
 2260:             (normalized_run_id,),
 2261:         ).fetchone()
 2262:         if not updated_run:
 2263:             raise RuntimeError("Reconciliation run became unavailable after diff computation.")
 2264:         return {
 2265:             "reconciliation_run": dict(updated_run),
 2266:             "diff_count": inserted,
 2267:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint,
 2268:             "idempotent": False,
 2269:         }
 2270: 
 2271: 
 2272: def _engine2_classification_candidate_rules(
 2273:     *,
 2274:     account_code: str,
 2275:     period_key: str,
 2276:     tb_value: Decimal,
 2277:     gl_value: Decimal,
 2278:     delta_value: Decimal,
 2279:     dimension_payload: dict[str, Any],
 2280: ) -> list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]]:
 2281:     candidates: list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]] = []
 2282:     if tb_value != Decimal("0") and gl_value == Decimal("0"):
 2283:         candidates.append(
 2284:             (
 2285:                 "MISSING_GL",
 2286:                 "TB value exists while GL value is zero.",
 2287:                 {"rule": "MISSING_GL", "tb_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(tb_value), "gl_value": "0"},
 2288:             )
 2289:         )
 2290:     if tb_value == Decimal("0") and gl_value != Decimal("0"):
 2291:         candidates.append(
 2292:             (
 2293:                 "MISSING_TB",
 2294:                 "GL value exists while TB value is zero.",
 2295:                 {"rule": "MISSING_TB", "tb_value": "0", "gl_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(gl_value)},
 2296:             )
 2297:         )
 2298: 
 2299:     if delta_value == Decimal("0"):
 2300:         return candidates
 2301: 
 2302:     mapping_status = str(dimension_payload.get("mapping_status") or "").strip().lower()
 2303:     source_account = str(dimension_payload.get("source_account_code") or "").strip()
 2304:     mapped_account = str(dimension_payload.get("mapped_account_code") or "").strip()
 2305:     if mapping_status in {"unmapped", "mismatch", "mapping_difference"}:
 2306:         candidates.append(
 2307:             (
 2308:                 "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE",
 2309:                 "Mapping status indicates mismatch.",
 2310:                 {"rule": "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE", "mapping_status": mapping_status},
 2311:             )
 2312:         )
 2313:     elif source_account and source_account != account_code:
 2314:         candidates.append(
 2315:             (
 2316:                 "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE",
 2317:                 "Source account does not match reconciled account.",
 2318:                 {"rule": "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE", "source_account_code": source_account},
 2319:             )
 2320:         )
 2321:     elif mapped_account and mapped_account != account_code:
 2322:         candidates.append(
 2323:             (
 2324:                 "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE",
 2325:                 "Mapped account does not match reconciled account.",
 2326:                 {"rule": "MAPPING_DIFFERENCE", "mapped_account_code": mapped_account},
 2327:             )
 2328:         )
 2329: 
 2330:     tx_currency = str(dimension_payload.get("transaction_currency") or "").strip().upper()
 2331:     report_currency = str(dimension_payload.get("reporting_currency") or "").strip().upper()
 2332:     fx_rate = dimension_payload.get("fx_rate_applied")
 2333:     fx_rate_decimal: Decimal | None = None
 2334:     if fx_rate not in (None, "", False):
 2335:         try:
 2336:             fx_rate_decimal = _normalize_engine1_decimal(fx_rate, field_name="fx_rate_applied")
 2337:         except ValueError:
 2338:             fx_rate_decimal = None
 2339:     if (tx_currency and report_currency and tx_currency != report_currency) or (
 2340:         fx_rate_decimal is not None and fx_rate_decimal != Decimal("1")
 2341:     ):
 2342:         candidates.append(
 2343:             (
 2344:                 "FX_DIFFERENCE",
 2345:                 "Currency or FX rate markers indicate FX variance.",
 2346:                 {
