 4306:             """,
 4307:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, anchor),
 4308:         ).fetchone()
 4309:         if not row:
 4310:             raise LookupError("canonical_anchors must reference existing SUCCEEDED canonical runs.")
 4311:     return normalized
 4312: 
 4313: 
 4314: def _engine2b_empty_output_fingerprint() -> str:
 4315:     return determinism.sha256_hex_text("ENGINE2B_EMPTY_OUTPUT")
 4316: 
 4317: 
 4318: ENGINE2B_MIS_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[str, set[str]] = {
 4319:     "QUEUED": {"RUNNING", "FAILED"},
 4320:     "RUNNING": {"SUCCEEDED", "FAILED"},
 4321:     "SUCCEEDED": set(),
 4322:     "FAILED": set(),
 4323: }
 4324: 
 4325: 
 4326: def _normalize_engine2b_mis_run_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 4327:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 4328:     if normalized not in ENGINE2B_MIS_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS:
 4329:         allowed = ", ".join(sorted(ENGINE2B_MIS_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS))
 4330:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 4331:     return normalized
 4332: 
 4333: 
 4334: def transition_engine2b_mis_run_status(
 4335:     *,
 4336:     tenant_id: str,
 4337:     workspace_id: str,
 4338:     mis_run_id: str,
 4339:     to_status: str,
 4340: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 4341:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 4342:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 4343:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 4344:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine2b_mis_run_status(
 4345:         to_status,
 4346:         field_name="to_status",
 4347:     )
 4348: 
 4349:     with get_conn() as conn:
 4350:         row = conn.execute(
 4351:             """
 4352:             SELECT
 4353:                 id,
 4354:                 tenant_id,
 4355:                 workspace_id,
 4356:                 template_version_id,
 4357:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4358:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 4359:                 period_scope_json,
 4360:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4361:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4362:                 status,
 4363:                 created_at,
 4364:                 updated_at
 4365:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4366:             WHERE id = ?
 4367:             LIMIT 1
 4368:             """,
 4369:             (normalized_run_id,),
 4370:         ).fetchone()
 4371:         if not row:
 4372:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 4373:         run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(
 4374:             str(row["tenant_id"] or ""),
 4375:             field_name="tenant_id",
 4376:         )
 4377:         run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(
 4378:             str(row["workspace_id"] or ""),
 4379:             field_name="workspace_id",
 4380:         )
 4381:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 4382:             raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 4383: 
 4384:         from_status = _normalize_engine2b_mis_run_status(
 4385:             str(row["status"] or ""),
 4386:             field_name="status",
 4387:         )
 4388:         if from_status == normalized_to_status:
 4389:             return dict(row), False
 4390:         if normalized_to_status not in ENGINE2B_MIS_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS[from_status]:
 4391:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status does not allow transition.")
 4392: 
 4393:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 4394:             """
 4395:             UPDATE e2b_mis_runs
 4396:             SET status = ?,
 4397:                 updated_at = ?
 4398:             WHERE id = ?
 4399:               AND tenant_id = ?
 4400:               AND workspace_id = ?
 4401:               AND status = ?
 4402:             """,
 4403:             (
 4404:                 normalized_to_status,
 4405:                 utc_now_iso(),
 4406:                 normalized_run_id,
 4407:                 normalized_tenant,
 4408:                 normalized_workspace,
 4409:                 from_status,
 4410:             ),
 4411:         )
 4412:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 4413:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status transition failed.")
 4414: 
 4415:         updated_row = conn.execute(
 4416:             """
 4417:             SELECT
 4418:                 id,
 4419:                 tenant_id,
 4420:                 workspace_id,
 4421:                 template_version_id,
 4422:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4423:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 4424:                 period_scope_json,
 4425:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4426:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4427:                 status,
 4428:                 created_at,
 4429:                 updated_at
 4430:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4431:             WHERE id = ?
 4432:               AND tenant_id = ?
 4433:               AND workspace_id = ?
 4434:             LIMIT 1
 4435:             """,
 4436:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 4437:         ).fetchone()
 4438:         if not updated_row:
 4439:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status transition verification failed.")
 4440:         return dict(updated_row), True
 4441: 
 4442: 
 4443: def _try_mark_engine2b_mis_run_failed(
 4444:     *,
 4445:     tenant_id: str,
 4446:     workspace_id: str,
 4447:     mis_run_id: str,
 4448: ) -> None:
 4449:     try:
 4450:         normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 4451:         normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 4452:         normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 4453:     except ValueError:
 4454:         return
 4455:     try:
 4456:         with get_conn() as conn:
 4457:             conn.execute(
 4458:                 """
 4459:                 UPDATE e2b_mis_runs
 4460:                 SET status = 'FAILED',
 4461:                     updated_at = ?
 4462:                 WHERE id = ?
 4463:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 4464:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 4465:                   AND status = 'RUNNING'
 4466:                 """,
 4467:                 (
 4468:                     utc_now_iso(),
 4469:                     normalized_run_id,
 4470:                     normalized_tenant,
 4471:                     normalized_workspace,
 4472:                 ),
 4473:             )
 4474:     except Exception:
 4475:         return
 4476: 
 4477: 
 4478: def compute_engine2b_mis_input_fingerprint(
 4479:     *,
 4480:     template_version_id: str,
 4481:     version_fingerprint_sha256: str,
 4482:     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256: str,
 4483:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
 4484: ) -> str:
 4485:     payload = {
 4486:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 4487:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4488:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 4489:         ),
 4490:         "period_scope_json": _normalize_engine2b_period_scope_json(period_scope_json),
 4491:         "template_version_id": _normalize_required_text(
 4492:             template_version_id,
 4493:             field_name="template_version_id",
 4494:         ),
 4495:         "version_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 4496:             version_fingerprint_sha256,
 4497:             field_name="version_fingerprint_sha256",
 4498:         ),
 4499:     }
 4500:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 4501: 
 4502: 
 4503: def create_engine2b_mis_run_skeleton(
 4504:     *,
 4505:     tenant_id: str,
 4506:     workspace_id: str,
 4507:     template_version_id: str,
 4508:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 4509:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
 4510: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 4511:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e2b_mis_runs")
 4512:     template_columns = list_table_columns("e2b_mis_templates")
 4513:     version_columns = list_table_columns("e2b_mis_template_versions")
 4514:     if not run_columns or not template_columns or not version_columns:
 4515:         raise RuntimeError("Engine2B MIS run schema is not available.")
 4516: 
 4517:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 4518:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 4519:     normalized_template_version_id = _normalize_required_text(
 4520:         template_version_id,
 4521:         field_name="template_version_id",
 4522:     )
 4523:     normalized_period_scope = _normalize_engine2b_period_scope_json(period_scope_json)
 4524: 
 4525:     with get_conn() as conn:
 4526:         _ensure_engine2b_workspace_scope_exists(
 4527:             conn,
 4528:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 4529:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 4530:         )
 4531:         version_row = conn.execute(
 4532:             """
 4533:             SELECT
 4534:                 v.id,
 4535:                 v.template_id,
 4536:                 v.tenant_id AS version_tenant_id,
 4537:                 v.workspace_id AS version_workspace_id,
 4538:                 v.version_number,
 4539:                 v.version_fingerprint_sha256,
 4540:                 v.certified_at,
 4541:                 t.id AS template_id_ref,
 4542:                 t.tenant_id AS template_tenant_id,
 4543:                 t.workspace_id AS template_workspace_id,
 4544:                 t.current_version,
 4545:                 t.status AS template_status
 4546:             FROM e2b_mis_template_versions v
 4547:             JOIN e2b_mis_templates t
 4548:               ON t.id = v.template_id
 4549:             WHERE v.id = ?
 4550:             LIMIT 1
 4551:             """,
 4552:             (normalized_template_version_id,),
 4553:         ).fetchone()
 4554:         if not version_row:
 4555:             raise LookupError("template_version_id was not found.")
 4556: 
 4557:         version_tenant = str(version_row["version_tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 4558:         version_workspace = str(version_row["version_workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 4559:         template_tenant = str(version_row["template_tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 4560:         template_workspace = str(version_row["template_workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 4561:         if (
 4562:             version_tenant != normalized_tenant
 4563:             or version_workspace != normalized_workspace
 4564:             or template_tenant != normalized_tenant
 4565:             or template_workspace != normalized_workspace
 4566:         ):
 4567:             raise PermissionError("template_version_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 4568: 
 4569:         template_status = str(version_row["template_status"] or "").strip().upper()
 4570:         current_version = int(version_row["current_version"] or 0)
 4571:         version_number = int(version_row["version_number"] or 0)
 4572:         certified_at = str(version_row["certified_at"] or "").strip()
 4573:         if template_status != "CERTIFIED" or not certified_at or current_version != version_number:
 4574:             raise RuntimeError("template_version_id must reference a CERTIFIED template version.")
 4575: 
 4576:         resolved_anchors = _resolve_engine2b_canonical_anchors(
 4577:             conn,
 4578:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 4579:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 4580:             canonical_anchors=canonical_anchors,
 4581:         )
 4582:         canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256 = _engine2b_lineage_anchor_sha256(resolved_anchors)
 4583:         version_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 4584:             version_row["version_fingerprint_sha256"],
 4585:             field_name="version_fingerprint_sha256",
 4586:         )
 4587:         input_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine2b_mis_input_fingerprint(
 4588:             template_version_id=normalized_template_version_id,
 4589:             version_fingerprint_sha256=version_fingerprint_sha256,
 4590:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256=canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4591:             period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
 4592:         )
 4593:         output_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine2b_empty_output_fingerprint()
 4594:         anchors_json_text = _canonical_json_text(resolved_anchors)
 4595:         period_scope_text = _canonical_json_text(normalized_period_scope)
 4596: 
 4597:         existing_row = conn.execute(
 4598:             """
 4599:             SELECT
 4600:                 id,
 4601:                 tenant_id,
 4602:                 workspace_id,
 4603:                 template_version_id,
 4604:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4605:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 4606:                 period_scope_json,
 4607:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4608:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4609:                 status,
 4610:                 created_at,
 4611:                 updated_at
 4612:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4613:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 4614:               AND workspace_id = ?
 4615:               AND template_version_id = ?
 4616:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 4617:             ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
 4618:             LIMIT 1
 4619:             """,
 4620:             (
 4621:                 normalized_tenant,
 4622:                 normalized_workspace,
 4623:                 normalized_template_version_id,
 4624:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4625:             ),
 4626:         ).fetchone()
 4627:         if existing_row:
 4628:             return dict(existing_row), False
 4629: 
 4630:         run_id = f"mrun_{uuid4().hex}"
 4631:         now = utc_now_iso()
 4632:         try:
 4633:             conn.execute(
 4634:                 """
 4635:                 INSERT INTO e2b_mis_runs (
 4636:                     id,
 4637:                     tenant_id,
 4638:                     workspace_id,
 4639:                     template_version_id,
 4640:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4641:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 4642:                     period_scope_json,
 4643:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4644:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4645:                     status,
 4646:                     created_at,
 4647:                     updated_at
 4648:                 )
 4649:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'QUEUED', ?, ?)
 4650:                 """,
 4651:                 (
 4652:                     run_id,
 4653:                     normalized_tenant,
 4654:                     normalized_workspace,
 4655:                     normalized_template_version_id,
 4656:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4657:                     anchors_json_text,
 4658:                     period_scope_text,
 4659:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4660:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4661:                     now,
 4662:                     now,
 4663:                 ),
 4664:             )
 4665:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
 4666:             existing_after_conflict = conn.execute(
 4667:                 """
 4668:                 SELECT
 4669:                     id,
 4670:                     tenant_id,
 4671:                     workspace_id,
 4672:                     template_version_id,
 4673:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4674:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 4675:                     period_scope_json,
 4676:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4677:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4678:                     status,
 4679:                     created_at,
 4680:                     updated_at
 4681:                 FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4682:                 WHERE tenant_id = ?
 4683:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 4684:                   AND template_version_id = ?
 4685:                   AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 4686:                 LIMIT 1
 4687:                 """,
 4688:                 (
 4689:                     normalized_tenant,
 4690:                     normalized_workspace,
 4691:                     normalized_template_version_id,
 4692:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4693:                 ),
 4694:             ).fetchone()
 4695:             if existing_after_conflict:
 4696:                 return dict(existing_after_conflict), False
 4697:             raise
 4698:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 4699:             message = str(exc).lower()
 4700:             if "unique" in message or "duplicate" in message:
 4701:                 existing_after_conflict = conn.execute(
 4702:                     """
 4703:                     SELECT
 4704:                         id,
 4705:                         tenant_id,
 4706:                         workspace_id,
 4707:                         template_version_id,
 4708:                         canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4709:                         canonical_anchors_json,
 4710:                         period_scope_json,
 4711:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4712:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4713:                         status,
 4714:                         created_at,
 4715:                         updated_at
 4716:                     FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4717:                     WHERE tenant_id = ?
 4718:                       AND workspace_id = ?
 4719:                       AND template_version_id = ?
 4720:                       AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 4721:                     LIMIT 1
 4722:                     """,
 4723:                     (
 4724:                         normalized_tenant,
 4725:                         normalized_workspace,
 4726:                         normalized_template_version_id,
 4727:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4728:                     ),
 4729:                 ).fetchone()
 4730:                 if existing_after_conflict:
 4731:                     return dict(existing_after_conflict), False
 4732:             raise
 4733: 
 4734:         created_row = conn.execute(
 4735:             """
 4736:             SELECT
 4737:                 id,
 4738:                 tenant_id,
 4739:                 workspace_id,
 4740:                 template_version_id,
 4741:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 4742:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 4743:                 period_scope_json,
 4744:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 4745:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 4746:                 status,
 4747:                 created_at,
 4748:                 updated_at
 4749:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4750:             WHERE id = ?
 4751:               AND tenant_id = ?
 4752:               AND workspace_id = ?
 4753:             LIMIT 1
 4754:             """,
 4755:             (run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 4756:         ).fetchone()
 4757:         if not created_row:
 4758:             raise RuntimeError("Engine2B MIS run was not persisted.")
 4759:         return dict(created_row), True
 4760: 
 4761: 
 4762: def resolve_engine2b_mis_run_periods(
 4763:     *,
 4764:     tenant_id: str,
 4765:     workspace_id: str,
 4766:     mis_run_id: str,
 4767: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 4768:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 4769:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 4770:     normalized_mis_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 4771: 
 4772:     with get_conn() as conn:
 4773:         row = conn.execute(
 4774:             """
 4775:             SELECT
 4776:                 id,
 4777:                 tenant_id,
 4778:                 workspace_id,
 4779:                 template_version_id,
 4780:                 period_scope_json,
 4781:                 status
 4782:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 4783:             WHERE id = ?
 4784:             LIMIT 1
 4785:             """,
 4786:             (normalized_mis_run_id,),
 4787:         ).fetchone()
 4788:         if not row:
 4789:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 4790:         run_tenant = str(row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 4791:         run_workspace = str(row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 4792:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 4793:             raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 4794: 
 4795:         status = str(row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 4796:         if status not in {"QUEUED", "RUNNING"}:
 4797:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run_id status does not allow period resolution.")
 4798: 
 4799:         raw_period_scope = str(row["period_scope_json"] or "").strip()
 4800:         if not raw_period_scope:
 4801:             raise RuntimeError("period_scope_json is missing.")
 4802:         try:
 4803:             parsed_period_scope = json.loads(raw_period_scope)
 4804:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 4805:             raise ValueError("period_scope_json is invalid JSON.") from exc
 4806:         normalized_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(parsed_period_scope)
 4807: 
 4808:         version_row = conn.execute(
 4809:             """
 4810:             SELECT period_grain
 4811:             FROM e2b_mis_template_versions
 4812:             WHERE id = ?
 4813:               AND tenant_id = ?
 4814:               AND workspace_id = ?
 4815:             LIMIT 1
 4816:             """,
 4817:             (
 4818:                 str(row["template_version_id"] or "").strip(),
 4819:                 normalized_tenant,
 4820:                 normalized_workspace,
 4821:             ),
 4822:         ).fetchone()
 4823:         if not version_row:
 4824:             raise LookupError("template_version_id was not found for mis_run_id.")
 4825:         template_grain = _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(
 4826:             str(version_row["period_grain"] or "")
 4827:         )
 4828:         if template_grain != str(normalized_scope["grain"]):
 4829:             raise RuntimeError("template period grain mismatch for period scope.")
 4830: 
 4831:         comparator_plan = resolve_engine2b_period_comparators(
 4832:             current_period=normalized_scope["current_period"],
 4833:             grain=template_grain,
 4834:             comparisons=normalized_scope["comparisons"],
 4835:         )
 4836:         return comparator_plan
 4837: 
 4838: 
 4839: def _engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(token: str) -> list[str]:
 4840:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(str(token or ""), field_name="period_token")
 4841:     month_match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})-(\d{2})$", normalized)
 4842:     if month_match:
 4843:         year = int(month_match.group(1))
 4844:         month = int(month_match.group(2))
 4845:         if month < 1 or month > 12:
 4846:             raise RuntimeError("Unable to deterministically resolve comparator period token.")
 4847:         return [f"{year:04d}-{month:02d}"]
 4848: 
 4849:     quarter_match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})-Q([1-4])$", normalized.upper())
 4850:     if quarter_match:
 4851:         year = int(quarter_match.group(1))
 4852:         quarter = int(quarter_match.group(2))
 4853:         start_month = (quarter - 1) * 3 + 1
 4854:         return [f"{year:04d}-{month:02d}" for month in range(start_month, start_month + 3)]
 4855: 
 4856:     year_match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})$", normalized)
 4857:     if year_match:
 4858:         year = int(year_match.group(1))
 4859:         return [f"{year:04d}-{month:02d}" for month in range(1, 13)]
 4860: 
 4861:     raise RuntimeError("Unable to deterministically resolve comparator period token.")
 4862: 
 4863: 
 4864: def _engine2b_parse_measure_account_codes(measure_id: str, definition: Any) -> list[str]:
 4865:     normalized_measure = _normalize_required_text(measure_id, field_name="measure_id")
 4866:     if not isinstance(definition, dict):
 4867:         raise RuntimeError(
 4868:             f"Measure '{normalized_measure}' definition is not deterministically resolvable."
 4869:         )
 4870: 
 4871:     explicit_codes: list[str] = []
 4872:     account_codes_payload = definition.get("account_codes")
 4873:     if isinstance(account_codes_payload, list):
 4874:         explicit_codes.extend(
 4875:             _normalize_required_text(str(item or ""), field_name=f"{normalized_measure}.account_codes").upper()
 4876:             for item in account_codes_payload
 4877:             if str(item or "").strip()
 4878:         )
 4879:     single_account_code = definition.get("account_code")
 4880:     if isinstance(single_account_code, str) and single_account_code.strip():
 4881:         explicit_codes.append(
 4882:             _normalize_required_text(
 4883:                 single_account_code,
 4884:                 field_name=f"{normalized_measure}.account_code",
 4885:             ).upper()
 4886:         )
 4887:     if explicit_codes:
 4888:         return sorted(set(explicit_codes))
 4889: 
 4890:     formula = definition.get("formula")
 4891:     if isinstance(formula, str) and formula.strip():
 4892:         formula_text = formula.strip()
 4893:         extracted = [
 4894:             _normalize_required_text(code, field_name=f"{normalized_measure}.formula").upper()
 4895:             for code in re.findall(r"account_([A-Za-z0-9_\-]+)", formula_text)
 4896:         ]
 4897:         if extracted:
 4898:             return sorted(set(extracted))
 4899: 
 4900:     raise RuntimeError(
 4901:         f"Measure '{normalized_measure}' definition is not deterministically resolvable."
 4902:     )
 4903: 
 4904: 
 4905: def compute_engine2b_variance_rows(
 4906:     *,
 4907:     template_version_payload: dict[str, Any],
 4908:     resolved_period_comparator_plan: dict[str, Any],
 4909:     canonical_fact_data: list[dict[str, Any]],
 4910: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 4911:     if not isinstance(template_version_payload, dict):
 4912:         raise RuntimeError("Template version payload is invalid.")
 4913:     if not isinstance(resolved_period_comparator_plan, dict):
 4914:         raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 4915:     if not isinstance(canonical_fact_data, list):
 4916:         raise RuntimeError("Canonical fact data is invalid.")
 4917: 
 4918:     measure_definitions = template_version_payload.get("measure_definitions_json")
 4919:     if not isinstance(measure_definitions, dict) or not measure_definitions:
 4920:         raise RuntimeError("Template measure definitions are missing.")
 4921:     dimension_definitions = template_version_payload.get("dimension_definitions_json")
 4922:     if not isinstance(dimension_definitions, dict):
 4923:         raise RuntimeError("Template dimension definitions are invalid.")
 4924:     dimension_keys = sorted(str(key).strip() for key in dimension_definitions.keys() if str(key).strip())
 4925:     current_period_token = _normalize_required_text(
 4926:         str(resolved_period_comparator_plan.get("current") or ""),
 4927:         field_name="current_period",
 4928:     )
 4929:     comparators_payload = resolved_period_comparator_plan.get("comparators")
 4930:     if not isinstance(comparators_payload, dict):
 4931:         raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 4932:     comparator_map: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 4933:     for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 4934:         if role not in comparators_payload:
 4935:             continue
 4936:         values = comparators_payload.get(role)
 4937:         if not isinstance(values, list) or not values:
 4938:             raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 4939:         comparator_map[role] = [
 4940:             _normalize_required_text(str(value or ""), field_name=f"comparators.{role}")
 4941:             for value in values
 4942:         ]
 4943:     if not comparator_map:
 4944:         raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 4945: 
 4946:     current_periods = _engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(current_period_token)
 4947:     comparator_source_periods: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 4948:     for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 4949:         tokens = comparator_map.get(role)
 4950:         if not tokens:
 4951:             continue
 4952:         source_periods: list[str] = []
 4953:         for token in tokens:
 4954:             source_periods.extend(_engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(token))
 4955:         deduped_sorted = sorted(set(source_periods))
 4956:         if not deduped_sorted:
 4957:             raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 4958:         comparator_source_periods[role] = deduped_sorted
 4959: 
 4960:     measure_account_codes: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
 4961:     for measure_id in sorted(str(key).strip() for key in measure_definitions.keys() if str(key).strip()):
 4962:         selector_codes = _engine2b_parse_measure_account_codes(
 4963:             measure_id,
 4964:             measure_definitions.get(measure_id),
 4965:         )
 4966:         measure_account_codes[measure_id] = set(selector_codes)
 4967:     if not measure_account_codes:
 4968:         raise RuntimeError("Template measure definitions are missing.")
 4969: 
 4970:     aggregation: dict[tuple[str, str, str], Decimal] = {}
 4971:     dimension_payloads_by_key: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
 4972:     relevant_periods = set(current_periods)
 4973:     for values in comparator_source_periods.values():
 4974:         relevant_periods.update(values)
 4975: 
 4976:     for fact_row in canonical_fact_data:
 4977:         if not isinstance(fact_row, dict):
 4978:             raise RuntimeError("Canonical fact data is invalid.")
 4979:         period_key = _normalize_required_text(
 4980:             str(fact_row.get("period_key") or ""),
 4981:             field_name="period_key",
 4982:         )
 4983:         if period_key not in relevant_periods:
 4984:             continue
 4985:         account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 4986:             str(fact_row.get("account_code") or ""),
 4987:             field_name="account_code",
 4988:         ).upper()
 4989:         amount_value = _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 4990:             fact_row.get("amount_signed"),
 4991:             field_name="amount_signed",
 4992:         )
 4993:         raw_dimension = str(fact_row.get("dimension_json") or "{}").strip() or "{}"
 4994:         try:
 4995:             parsed_dimension = json.loads(raw_dimension)
 4996:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 4997:             raise RuntimeError("Canonical fact dimension_json is invalid.") from exc
 4998:         if not isinstance(parsed_dimension, dict):
 4999:             raise RuntimeError("Canonical fact dimension_json is invalid.")
 5000:         normalized_dimensions = {
 5001:             key: _normalize_required_text(
 5002:                 str(parsed_dimension.get(key, "")),
 5003:                 field_name=f"dimensions.{key}",
 5004:             )
 5005:             if str(parsed_dimension.get(key, "")).strip()
 5006:             else ""
 5007:             for key in dimension_keys
 5008:         }
 5009:         dimension_key = _canonical_json_text(normalized_dimensions)
 5010:         dimension_payloads_by_key[dimension_key] = normalized_dimensions
 5011:         for measure_id, codes in measure_account_codes.items():
 5012:             if account_code not in codes:
 5013:                 continue
 5014:             aggregate_key = (period_key, dimension_key, measure_id)
 5015:             current = aggregation.get(aggregate_key, Decimal("0"))
 5016:             aggregation[aggregate_key] = current + amount_value
 5017: 
 5018:     if not aggregation:
 5019:         raise RuntimeError("No canonical facts resolved for deterministic variance computation.")
 5020: 
 5021:     rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 5022:     for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 5023:         baseline_periods = comparator_source_periods.get(role)
 5024:         if not baseline_periods:
 5025:             continue
 5026:         for measure_id in sorted(measure_account_codes.keys()):
 5027:             dimension_keys_for_measure = sorted(
 5028:                 {
 5029:                     dim_key
 5030:                     for (period, dim_key, measure) in aggregation.keys()
 5031:                     if measure == measure_id and (period in current_periods or period in baseline_periods)
 5032:                 }
 5033:             )
 5034:             for dimension_key in dimension_keys_for_measure:
 5035:                 current_value = sum(
 5036:                     aggregation.get((period, dimension_key, measure_id), Decimal("0"))
 5037:                     for period in current_periods
 5038:                 )
 5039:                 baseline_value = sum(
 5040:                     aggregation.get((period, dimension_key, measure_id), Decimal("0"))
 5041:                     for period in baseline_periods
 5042:                 )
 5043:                 if current_value == Decimal("0") and baseline_value == Decimal("0"):
 5044:                     continue
 5045:                 absolute_variance = current_value - baseline_value
 5046:                 percentage_variance: Decimal | None = None
 5047:                 if baseline_value != Decimal("0"):
 5048:                     percentage_variance = absolute_variance / baseline_value
 5049: 
 5050:                 dimensions_payload = dict(dimension_payloads_by_key.get(dimension_key) or {})
 5051:                 identity_payload = {
 5052:                     "canonical_dimension_tuple": dimensions_payload,
 5053:                     "measure_id": measure_id,
 5054:                     "period_role": role,
 5055:                 }
 5056:                 row_identity_sha256 = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 5057:                     determinism.canonical_json_bytes(identity_payload)
 5058:                 )
 5059:                 rows.append(
 5060:                     {
 5061:                         "row_identity_sha256": row_identity_sha256,
 5062:                         "period_role": role,
 5063:                         "measure_id": measure_id,
 5064:                         "dimensions": dimensions_payload,
 5065:                         "current_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(current_value),
 5066:                         "baseline_value": _engine1_decimal_to_str(baseline_value),
 5067:                         "absolute_variance": _engine1_decimal_to_str(absolute_variance),
 5068:                         "percentage_variance": (
 5069:                             None
 5070:                             if percentage_variance is None
 5071:                             else _engine1_decimal_to_str(percentage_variance)
 5072:                         ),
 5073:                     }
 5074:                 )
 5075: 
 5076:     if not rows:
 5077:         raise RuntimeError("No deterministic variance rows could be computed.")
 5078:     rows.sort(key=lambda item: str(item.get("row_identity_sha256") or ""))
 5079:     return rows
 5080: 
 5081: 
 5082: def canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 5083:     if not isinstance(payload, dict):
 5084:         raise ValueError("MIS output payload must be a JSON object.")
 5085:     mode = _normalize_required_text(str(payload.get("mode") or ""), field_name="mode").upper()
 5086:     if mode != "CALENDAR":
 5087:         raise ValueError("MIS output payload mode must be CALENDAR.")
 5088:     grain = _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(str(payload.get("grain") or ""))
 5089:     current = normalize_calendar_period(payload.get("current"), grain)
 5090:     template_version_id = _normalize_required_text(
 5091:         str(payload.get("template_version_id") or ""),
 5092:         field_name="template_version_id",
 5093:     )
 5094:     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5095:         payload.get("canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"),
 5096:         field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 5097:     )
 5098:     comparators_payload = payload.get("comparators")
 5099:     if not isinstance(comparators_payload, dict):
 5100:         raise ValueError("MIS output payload comparators must be an object.")
 5101:     canonical_comparators: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 5102:     for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 5103:         if role not in comparators_payload:
 5104:             continue
 5105:         values = comparators_payload.get(role)
 5106:         if not isinstance(values, list):
 5107:             raise ValueError("MIS output payload comparator periods must be arrays.")
 5108:         canonical_values = sorted(
 5109:             {
 5110:                 _normalize_required_text(str(item or ""), field_name=f"comparators.{role}")
 5111:                 for item in values
 5112:                 if str(item or "").strip()
 5113:             }
 5114:         )
 5115:         canonical_comparators[role] = canonical_values
 5116: 
 5117:     rows_payload = payload.get("rows")
 5118:     if not isinstance(rows_payload, list):
 5119:         raise ValueError("MIS output payload rows must be an array.")
 5120:     canonical_rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 5121:     for row in rows_payload:
 5122:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
 5123:             raise ValueError("MIS output payload row is invalid.")
 5124:         row_identity = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5125:             row.get("row_identity_sha256"),
 5126:             field_name="row_identity_sha256",
 5127:         )
 5128:         period_role = _normalize_engine2b_period_comparator(row.get("period_role"))
 5129:         measure_id = _normalize_required_text(
 5130:             str(row.get("measure_id") or ""),
 5131:             field_name="measure_id",
 5132:         )
 5133:         dimensions = _normalize_engine2b_json_object(
 5134:             row.get("dimensions") or {},
 5135:             field_name="dimensions",
 5136:         )
 5137:         current_value = _engine1_decimal_to_str(
 5138:             _normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("current_value"), field_name="current_value")
 5139:         )
 5140:         baseline_value = _engine1_decimal_to_str(
 5141:             _normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("baseline_value"), field_name="baseline_value")
 5142:         )
 5143:         absolute_variance = _engine1_decimal_to_str(
 5144:             _normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("absolute_variance"), field_name="absolute_variance")
 5145:         )
 5146:         percentage_raw = row.get("percentage_variance")
 5147:         percentage_variance = (
 5148:             None
 5149:             if percentage_raw is None
 5150:             else _engine1_decimal_to_str(
 5151:                 _normalize_engine1_decimal(
 5152:                     percentage_raw,
 5153:                     field_name="percentage_variance",
 5154:                 )
 5155:             )
 5156:         )
 5157:         canonical_rows.append(
 5158:             {
 5159:                 "row_identity_sha256": row_identity,
 5160:                 "period_role": period_role,
 5161:                 "measure_id": measure_id,
 5162:                 "dimensions": dimensions,
 5163:                 "current_value": current_value,
 5164:                 "baseline_value": baseline_value,
 5165:                 "absolute_variance": absolute_variance,
 5166:                 "percentage_variance": percentage_variance,
 5167:             }
 5168:         )
 5169:     canonical_rows.sort(key=lambda item: str(item.get("row_identity_sha256") or ""))
 5170: 
 5171:     return {
 5172:         "mode": mode,
 5173:         "grain": grain,
 5174:         "current": current,
 5175:         "template_version_id": template_version_id,
 5176:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 5177:         "comparators": canonical_comparators,
 5178:         "rows": canonical_rows,
 5179:     }
 5180: 
 5181: 
 5182: def compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 5183:     canonical_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(payload)
 5184:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(canonical_payload))
 5185: 
 5186: 
 5187: def persist_engine2b_mis_output(
 5188:     *,
 5189:     tenant_id: str,
 5190:     workspace_id: str,
 5191:     mis_run_id: str,
 5192:     structured_output_payload: dict[str, Any],
 5193:     output_fingerprint_sha256: str,
 5194: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 5195:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 5196:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 5197:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 5198:     normalized_output_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5199:         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5200:         field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
 5201:     )
 5202:     canonical_output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(structured_output_payload)
 5203:     recomputed_hash = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(canonical_output_payload)
 5204:     if recomputed_hash != normalized_output_hash:
 5205:         raise RuntimeError("Output fingerprint mismatch for deterministic variance payload.")
 5206: 
 5207:     with get_conn() as conn:
 5208:         run_row = conn.execute(
 5209:             """
 5210:             SELECT id, tenant_id, workspace_id, status, output_fingerprint_sha256
 5211:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 5212:             WHERE id = ?
 5213:             LIMIT 1
 5214:             """,
 5215:             (normalized_run_id,),
 5216:         ).fetchone()
 5217:         if not run_row:
 5218:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 5219:         run_tenant = str(run_row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 5220:         run_workspace = str(run_row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 5221:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 5222:             raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 5223: 
 5224:         existing = conn.execute(
 5225:             """
 5226:             SELECT
 5227:                 id,
 5228:                 tenant_id,
 5229:                 workspace_id,
 5230:                 mis_run_id,
 5231:                 structured_output_json,
 5232:                 artifact_refs_json,
 5233:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 5234:                 created_at
 5235:             FROM e2b_mis_outputs
 5236:             WHERE mis_run_id = ?
 5237:               AND tenant_id = ?
 5238:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5239:             LIMIT 1
 5240:             """,
 5241:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 5242:         ).fetchone()
 5243:         if existing:
 5244:             existing_payload_raw = str(existing["structured_output_json"] or "").strip()
 5245:             try:
 5246:                 existing_payload = json.loads(existing_payload_raw)
 5247:             except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5248:                 raise RuntimeError("Persisted MIS output payload is invalid.") from exc
 5249:             existing_hash = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(existing_payload)
 5250:             if existing_hash != normalized_output_hash:
 5251:                 raise RuntimeError("Existing MIS output hash mismatch detected.")
 5252:             run_output_hash = str(run_row["output_fingerprint_sha256"] or "").strip().lower()
 5253:             if run_output_hash and run_output_hash != normalized_output_hash:
 5254:                 raise RuntimeError("Run output fingerprint mismatch detected.")
 5255:             status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5256:             if status != "SUCCEEDED" or run_output_hash != normalized_output_hash:
 5257:                 update_cursor = conn.execute(
 5258:                     """
 5259:                     UPDATE e2b_mis_runs
 5260:                     SET output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 5261:                         status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 5262:                         updated_at = ?
 5263:                     WHERE id = ?
 5264:                       AND tenant_id = ?
 5265:                       AND workspace_id = ?
 5266:                       AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'SUCCEEDED')
 5267:                     """,
 5268:                     (
 5269:                         normalized_output_hash,
 5270:                         utc_now_iso(),
 5271:                         normalized_run_id,
 5272:                         normalized_tenant,
 5273:                         normalized_workspace,
 5274:                     ),
 5275:                 )
 5276:                 if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 5277:                     raise RuntimeError("MIS run state transition failed during idempotent output persistence.")
 5278:             return dict(existing), True
 5279: 
 5280:         status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5281:         if status != "RUNNING":
 5282:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status must be RUNNING before variance persistence.")
 5283: 
 5284:         now = utc_now_iso()
 5285:         structured_output_json = _canonical_json_text(canonical_output_payload)
 5286:         artifact_refs_payload: list[Any] = []
 5287:         artifact_refs_json = _canonical_json_text(artifact_refs_payload)
 5288:         replay_bundle_hash = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
 5289:             determinism.canonical_json_bytes(
 5290:                 {
 5291:                     "artifact_refs_json": artifact_refs_payload,
 5292:                     "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": canonical_output_payload["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
 5293:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": normalized_output_hash,
 5294:                     "template_version_id": canonical_output_payload["template_version_id"],
 5295:                 }
 5296:             )
 5297:         )
 5298:         output_id = f"mout_{uuid4().hex}"
 5299:         conn.execute(
 5300:             """
 5301:             INSERT INTO e2b_mis_outputs (
 5302:                 id,
 5303:                 tenant_id,
 5304:                 workspace_id,
 5305:                 mis_run_id,
 5306:                 structured_output_json,
 5307:                 artifact_refs_json,
 5308:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 5309:                 created_at
 5310:             )
 5311:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 5312:             """,
 5313:             (
 5314:                 output_id,
 5315:                 normalized_tenant,
 5316:                 normalized_workspace,
 5317:                 normalized_run_id,
 5318:                 structured_output_json,
 5319:                 artifact_refs_json,
 5320:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 5321:                 now,
 5322:             ),
 5323:         )
 5324:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 5325:             """
 5326:             UPDATE e2b_mis_runs
 5327:             SET output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
 5328:                 status = 'SUCCEEDED',
 5329:                 updated_at = ?
 5330:             WHERE id = ?
 5331:               AND tenant_id = ?
 5332:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5333:               AND status = 'RUNNING'
 5334:             """,
 5335:             (
 5336:                 normalized_output_hash,
 5337:                 now,
 5338:                 normalized_run_id,
 5339:                 normalized_tenant,
 5340:                 normalized_workspace,
 5341:             ),
 5342:         )
 5343:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 5344:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status must be RUNNING before variance persistence.")
 5345: 
 5346:         stored = conn.execute(
 5347:             """
 5348:             SELECT
 5349:                 id,
 5350:                 tenant_id,
 5351:                 workspace_id,
 5352:                 mis_run_id,
 5353:                 structured_output_json,
 5354:                 artifact_refs_json,
 5355:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 5356:                 created_at
 5357:             FROM e2b_mis_outputs
 5358:             WHERE id = ?
 5359:               AND tenant_id = ?
 5360:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5361:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 5362:             LIMIT 1
 5363:             """,
 5364:             (output_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_run_id),
 5365:         ).fetchone()
 5366:         if not stored:
 5367:             raise RuntimeError("MIS output was not persisted.")
 5368:         return dict(stored), False
 5369: 
 5370: 
 5371: def compute_engine2b_mis_variance(
 5372:     *,
 5373:     tenant_id: str,
 5374:     workspace_id: str,
 5375:     mis_run_id: str,
 5376: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 5377:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 5378:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 5379:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 5380: 
 5381:     with get_conn() as conn:
 5382:         run_row = conn.execute(
 5383:             """
 5384:             SELECT
 5385:                 id,
 5386:                 tenant_id,
 5387:                 workspace_id,
 5388:                 status
 5389:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 5390:             WHERE id = ?
 5391:             LIMIT 1
 5392:             """,
 5393:             (normalized_run_id,),
 5394:         ).fetchone()
 5395:         if not run_row:
 5396:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 5397:         run_tenant = str(run_row["tenant_id"] or "").strip()
 5398:         run_workspace = str(run_row["workspace_id"] or "").strip()
 5399:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 5400:             raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 5401:         run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5402:         if run_status == "SUCCEEDED":
 5403:             existing = conn.execute(
 5404:                 """
 5405:                 SELECT structured_output_json
 5406:                 FROM e2b_mis_outputs
 5407:                 WHERE mis_run_id = ?
 5408:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 5409:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 5410:                 LIMIT 1
 5411:                 """,
 5412:                 (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 5413:             ).fetchone()
 5414:             if existing:
 5415:                 raw_payload = str(existing["structured_output_json"] or "").strip()
 5416:                 try:
 5417:                     parsed_payload = json.loads(raw_payload)
 5418:                 except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5419:                     raise RuntimeError("Persisted MIS output payload is invalid.") from exc
 5420:                 canonical_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(parsed_payload)
 5421:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(canonical_payload)
 5422:                 row_count = len(list(canonical_payload.get("rows") or []))
 5423:                 return {
 5424:                     "mis_run_id": normalized_run_id,
 5425:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5426:                     "status": "SUCCEEDED",
 5427:                     "row_count": int(row_count),
 5428:                     "idempotent": True,
 5429:                     "output_id": "",
 5430:                 }
 5431:         if run_status not in {"QUEUED", "RUNNING"}:
 5432:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run status must be RUNNING before variance computation.")
 5433: 
 5434:     if run_status == "QUEUED":
 5435:         transition_engine2b_mis_run_status(
 5436:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 5437:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 5438:             mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 5439:             to_status="RUNNING",
 5440:         )
 5441: 
 5442:     should_mark_failed = True
 5443:     try:
 5444:         with get_conn() as conn:
 5445:             run_row = conn.execute(
 5446:                 """
 5447:                 SELECT
 5448:                     id,
 5449:                     tenant_id,
 5450:                     workspace_id,
 5451:                     template_version_id,
 5452:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 5453:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 5454:                     period_scope_json,
 5455:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5456:                     status
 5457:                 FROM e2b_mis_runs
 5458:                 WHERE id = ?
 5459:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 5460:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 5461:                 LIMIT 1
 5462:                 """,
 5463:                 (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 5464:             ).fetchone()
 5465:             if not run_row:
 5466:                 raise RuntimeError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 5467:             run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5468:             if run_status != "RUNNING":
 5469:                 raise RuntimeError("mis_run status must be RUNNING before variance computation.")
 5470: 
 5471:             try:
 5472:                 template_version_row = conn.execute(
 5473:                     """
 5474:                     SELECT
 5475:                         v.id,
 5476:                         v.version_fingerprint_sha256,
 5477:                         v.period_grain,
 5478:                         v.semantic_structure_json,
 5479:                         v.dimension_definitions_json,
 5480:                         v.measure_definitions_json,
 5481:                         v.compatibility_metadata_json,
 5482:                         v.certified_at,
 5483:                         t.status AS template_status
 5484:                     FROM e2b_mis_template_versions v
 5485:                     JOIN e2b_mis_templates t
 5486:                       ON t.id = v.template_id
 5487:                     WHERE v.id = ?
 5488:                       AND v.tenant_id = ?
 5489:                       AND v.workspace_id = ?
 5490:                     LIMIT 1
 5491:                     """,
 5492:                     (
 5493:                         str(run_row["template_version_id"] or "").strip(),
 5494:                         normalized_tenant,
 5495:                         normalized_workspace,
 5496:                     ),
 5497:                 ).fetchone()
 5498:                 if not template_version_row:
 5499:                     raise LookupError("template_version_id was not found.")
 5500:                 template_status = str(template_version_row["template_status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5501:                 certified_at = str(template_version_row["certified_at"] or "").strip()
 5502:                 if template_status != "CERTIFIED" or not certified_at:
 5503:                     raise RuntimeError("template_version_id must reference a CERTIFIED template version.")
 5504: 
 5505:                 raw_anchor_json = str(run_row["canonical_anchors_json"] or "").strip()
 5506:                 try:
 5507:                     parsed_anchors = json.loads(raw_anchor_json)
 5508:                 except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5509:                     raise RuntimeError("canonical_anchors_json is invalid.") from exc
 5510:                 resolved_anchors = _normalize_engine2b_anchor_list(parsed_anchors)
 5511:                 anchor_period_rows: list[tuple[str, str]] = []
 5512:                 for anchor in resolved_anchors:
 5513:                     anchor_rows = conn.execute(
 5514:                         """
 5515:                         SELECT id, period_key
 5516:                         FROM wb_canonical_runs
 5517:                         WHERE tenant_id = ?
 5518:                           AND workspace_id = ?
 5519:                           AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 5520:                           AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 5521:                         ORDER BY id ASC
 5522:                         """,
 5523:                         (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, anchor),
 5524:                     ).fetchall()
 5525:                     if not anchor_rows:
 5526:                         raise RuntimeError("canonical_anchors must reference existing SUCCEEDED canonical runs.")
 5527:                     for row in anchor_rows:
 5528:                         anchor_period_rows.append(
 5529:                             (
 5530:                                 _normalize_required_text(str(row["id"] or ""), field_name="canonical_run_id"),
 5531:                                 _normalize_required_text(str(row["period_key"] or ""), field_name="period_key"),
 5532:                             )
 5533:                         )
 5534: 
 5535:                 comparator_plan = resolve_engine2b_mis_run_periods(
 5536:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 5537:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 5538:                     mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 5539:                 )
 5540:                 required_periods: set[str] = set(
 5541:                     _engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(str(comparator_plan["current"]))
 5542:                 )
 5543:                 comparators = comparator_plan.get("comparators")
 5544:                 if not isinstance(comparators, dict):
 5545:                     raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 5546:                 for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 5547:                     values = comparators.get(role)
 5548:                     if not values:
 5549:                         continue
 5550:                     for token in values:
 5551:                         required_periods.update(_engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(str(token)))
 5552: 
 5553:                 run_ids_for_period: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 5554:                 for canonical_run_id, period_key in anchor_period_rows:
 5555:                     run_ids_for_period.setdefault(period_key, []).append(canonical_run_id)
 5556:                 missing_periods = sorted(period for period in required_periods if period not in run_ids_for_period)
 5557:                 if missing_periods:
 5558:                     raise RuntimeError(
 5559:                         "Unable to deterministically resolve required comparator periods from canonical anchors."
 5560:                     )
 5561: 
 5562:                 fact_run_ids = sorted(
 5563:                     {
 5564:                         run_id
 5565:                         for period in sorted(required_periods)
 5566:                         for run_id in run_ids_for_period.get(period, [])
 5567:                     }
 5568:                 )
 5569:                 if not fact_run_ids:
 5570:                     raise RuntimeError("No canonical facts resolved for deterministic variance computation.")
 5571:                 run_placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in fact_run_ids)
 5572:                 period_placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in sorted(required_periods))
 5573:                 params: list[Any] = [
 5574:                     normalized_tenant,
 5575:                     normalized_workspace,
 5576:                     *fact_run_ids,
 5577:                     *sorted(required_periods),
 5578:                 ]
 5579:                 fact_rows = conn.execute(
 5580:                     f"""
 5581:                     SELECT
 5582:                         period_key,
 5583:                         account_code,
 5584:                         COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') AS dimension_json,
 5585:                         amount_signed
 5586:                     FROM wb_ledger_facts
 5587:                     WHERE tenant_id = ?
 5588:                       AND workspace_id = ?
 5589:                       AND canonical_run_id IN ({run_placeholders})
 5590:                       AND period_key IN ({period_placeholders})
 5591:                     ORDER BY period_key ASC, account_code ASC, COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') ASC, id ASC
 5592:                     """,
 5593:                     tuple(params),
 5594:                 ).fetchall()
 5595:                 canonical_fact_data = [dict(row) for row in fact_rows]
 5596: 
 5597:                 template_version_payload = {
 5598:                     "id": str(template_version_row["id"] or "").strip(),
 5599:                     "version_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5600:                         template_version_row["version_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5601:                         field_name="version_fingerprint_sha256",
 5602:                     ),
 5603:                     "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(
 5604:                         str(template_version_row["period_grain"] or "")
 5605:                     ),
 5606:                     "semantic_structure_json": json.loads(
 5607:                         str(template_version_row["semantic_structure_json"] or "{}")
 5608:                     ),
 5609:                     "dimension_definitions_json": json.loads(
 5610:                         str(template_version_row["dimension_definitions_json"] or "{}")
 5611:                     ),
 5612:                     "measure_definitions_json": json.loads(
 5613:                         str(template_version_row["measure_definitions_json"] or "{}")
 5614:                     ),
 5615:                     "compatibility_metadata_json": json.loads(
 5616:                         str(template_version_row["compatibility_metadata_json"] or "{}")
 5617:                     ),
 5618:                 }
 5619:             except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5620:                 raise RuntimeError("Template version JSON payload is invalid.") from exc
 5621: 
 5622:             variance_rows = compute_engine2b_variance_rows(
 5623:                 template_version_payload=template_version_payload,
 5624:                 resolved_period_comparator_plan=comparator_plan,
 5625:                 canonical_fact_data=canonical_fact_data,
 5626:             )
 5627:             output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(
 5628:                 {
 5629:                     "mode": "CALENDAR",
 5630:                     "grain": str(template_version_payload["period_grain"]),
 5631:                     "current": str(comparator_plan["current"]),
 5632:                     "template_version_id": str(template_version_payload["id"]),
 5633:                     "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5634:                         run_row["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
 5635:                         field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 5636:                     ),
 5637:                     "comparators": dict(comparator_plan.get("comparators") or {}),
 5638:                     "rows": variance_rows,
 5639:                 }
 5640:             )
 5641:             output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(output_payload)
 5642:             output_row, idempotent = persist_engine2b_mis_output(
 5643:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 5644:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 5645:                 mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 5646:                 structured_output_payload=output_payload,
 5647:                 output_fingerprint_sha256=output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5648:             )
 5649:             should_mark_failed = False
 5650:             return {
 5651:                 "mis_run_id": normalized_run_id,
 5652:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5653:                 "status": "SUCCEEDED",
 5654:                 "row_count": len(variance_rows),
 5655:                 "idempotent": bool(idempotent),
 5656:                 "output_id": str(output_row.get("id") or ""),
 5657:             }
 5658:     except Exception:
 5659:         if should_mark_failed:
 5660:             _try_mark_engine2b_mis_run_failed(
 5661:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 5662:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 5663:                 mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 5664:             )
 5665:         raise
 5666: 
 5667: 
 5668: def load_engine2b_replay_inputs(
 5669:     *,
 5670:     tenant_id: str,
 5671:     workspace_id: str,
 5672:     mis_run_id: str,
 5673: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 5674:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 5675:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 5676:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 5677: 
 5678:     with get_conn() as conn:
 5679:         run_row = conn.execute(
 5680:             """
 5681:             SELECT
 5682:                 id,
 5683:                 tenant_id,
 5684:                 workspace_id,
 5685:                 template_version_id,
 5686:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 5687:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 5688:                 period_scope_json,
 5689:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5690:                 status
 5691:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 5692:             WHERE id = ?
 5693:               AND tenant_id = ?
 5694:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5695:             LIMIT 1
 5696:             """,
 5697:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 5698:         ).fetchone()
 5699:         if not run_row:
 5700:             maybe_unscoped = conn.execute(
 5701:                 """
 5702:                 SELECT id
 5703:                 FROM e2b_mis_runs
 5704:                 WHERE id = ?
 5705:                 LIMIT 1
 5706:                 """,
 5707:                 (normalized_run_id,),
 5708:             ).fetchone()
 5709:             if maybe_unscoped:
 5710:                 raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 5711:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 5712: 
 5713:         run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5714:         if run_status != "SUCCEEDED":
 5715:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run_id must be SUCCEEDED for replay validation.")
 5716: 
 5717:         template_version_row = conn.execute(
 5718:             """
 5719:             SELECT
 5720:                 v.id,
 5721:                 v.version_fingerprint_sha256,
 5722:                 v.period_grain,
 5723:                 v.semantic_structure_json,
 5724:                 v.dimension_definitions_json,
 5725:                 v.measure_definitions_json,
 5726:                 v.compatibility_metadata_json,
 5727:                 v.certified_at,
 5728:                 t.status AS template_status
 5729:             FROM e2b_mis_template_versions v
 5730:             JOIN e2b_mis_templates t
 5731:               ON t.id = v.template_id
 5732:             WHERE v.id = ?
 5733:               AND v.tenant_id = ?
 5734:               AND v.workspace_id = ?
 5735:             LIMIT 1
 5736:             """,
 5737:             (
 5738:                 str(run_row["template_version_id"] or "").strip(),
 5739:                 normalized_tenant,
 5740:                 normalized_workspace,
 5741:             ),
 5742:         ).fetchone()
 5743:         if not template_version_row:
 5744:             raise RuntimeError("template_version_id was not found for replay validation.")
 5745:         template_status = str(template_version_row["template_status"] or "").strip().upper()
 5746:         certified_at = str(template_version_row["certified_at"] or "").strip()
 5747:         if template_status != "CERTIFIED" or not certified_at:
 5748:             raise RuntimeError("template_version_id must reference a CERTIFIED template version.")
 5749: 
 5750:         output_row = conn.execute(
 5751:             """
 5752:             SELECT
 5753:                 id,
 5754:                 structured_output_json
 5755:             FROM e2b_mis_outputs
 5756:             WHERE mis_run_id = ?
 5757:               AND tenant_id = ?
 5758:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5759:             LIMIT 1
 5760:             """,
 5761:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 5762:         ).fetchone()
 5763:         if not output_row:
 5764:             raise LookupError("mis_output for mis_run_id was not found.")
 5765: 
 5766:         raw_period_scope = str(run_row["period_scope_json"] or "").strip()
 5767:         if not raw_period_scope:
 5768:             raise ValueError("period_scope_json is missing.")
 5769:         try:
 5770:             parsed_period_scope = json.loads(raw_period_scope)
 5771:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5772:             raise ValueError("period_scope_json is invalid JSON.") from exc
 5773:         normalized_period_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(parsed_period_scope)
 5774: 
 5775:         raw_anchor_json = str(run_row["canonical_anchors_json"] or "").strip()
 5776:         try:
 5777:             parsed_anchors = json.loads(raw_anchor_json)
 5778:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5779:             raise RuntimeError("canonical_anchors_json is invalid.") from exc
 5780:         resolved_anchors = _normalize_engine2b_anchor_list(parsed_anchors)
 5781:         computed_lineage_anchor = _engine2b_lineage_anchor_sha256(resolved_anchors)
 5782:         stored_lineage_anchor = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5783:             run_row["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
 5784:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 5785:         )
 5786:         if computed_lineage_anchor != stored_lineage_anchor:
 5787:             raise RuntimeError("canonical lineage anchor mismatch detected.")
 5788: 
 5789:         comparator_plan = resolve_engine2b_period_comparators(
 5790:             current_period=normalized_period_scope["current_period"],
 5791:             grain=normalized_period_scope["grain"],
 5792:             comparisons=normalized_period_scope["comparisons"],
 5793:         )
 5794: 
 5795:         anchor_period_rows: list[tuple[str, str]] = []
 5796:         for anchor in resolved_anchors:
 5797:             anchor_rows = conn.execute(
 5798:                 """
 5799:                 SELECT id, period_key
 5800:                 FROM wb_canonical_runs
 5801:                 WHERE tenant_id = ?
 5802:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 5803:                   AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 5804:                   AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 5805:                 ORDER BY id ASC
 5806:                 """,
 5807:                 (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, anchor),
 5808:             ).fetchall()
 5809:             if not anchor_rows:
 5810:                 raise RuntimeError("canonical_anchors must reference existing SUCCEEDED canonical runs.")
 5811:             for row in anchor_rows:
 5812:                 anchor_period_rows.append(
 5813:                     (
 5814:                         _normalize_required_text(str(row["id"] or ""), field_name="canonical_run_id"),
 5815:                         _normalize_required_text(str(row["period_key"] or ""), field_name="period_key"),
 5816:                     )
 5817:                 )
 5818: 
 5819:         required_periods: set[str] = set(
 5820:             _engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(str(comparator_plan["current"]))
 5821:         )
 5822:         comparators = comparator_plan.get("comparators")
 5823:         if not isinstance(comparators, dict):
 5824:             raise RuntimeError("Resolved period comparator plan is invalid.")
 5825:         for role in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 5826:             values = comparators.get(role)
 5827:             if not values:
 5828:                 continue
 5829:             for token in values:
 5830:                 required_periods.update(_engine2b_expand_calendar_period_token(str(token)))
 5831: 
 5832:         run_ids_for_period: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 5833:         for canonical_run_id, period_key in anchor_period_rows:
 5834:             run_ids_for_period.setdefault(period_key, []).append(canonical_run_id)
 5835:         missing_periods = sorted(period for period in required_periods if period not in run_ids_for_period)
 5836:         if missing_periods:
 5837:             raise RuntimeError("Unable to deterministically resolve required comparator periods from canonical anchors.")
 5838: 
 5839:         fact_run_ids = sorted(
 5840:             {
 5841:                 run_id
 5842:                 for period in sorted(required_periods)
 5843:                 for run_id in run_ids_for_period.get(period, [])
 5844:             }
 5845:         )
 5846:         if not fact_run_ids:
 5847:             raise RuntimeError("No canonical facts resolved for deterministic variance computation.")
 5848:         run_placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in fact_run_ids)
 5849:         period_placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in sorted(required_periods))
 5850:         params: list[Any] = [
 5851:             normalized_tenant,
 5852:             normalized_workspace,
 5853:             *fact_run_ids,
 5854:             *sorted(required_periods),
 5855:         ]
 5856:         fact_rows = conn.execute(
 5857:             f"""
 5858:             SELECT
 5859:                 period_key,
 5860:                 account_code,
 5861:                 COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') AS dimension_json,
 5862:                 amount_signed
 5863:             FROM wb_ledger_facts
 5864:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 5865:               AND workspace_id = ?
 5866:               AND canonical_run_id IN ({run_placeholders})
 5867:               AND period_key IN ({period_placeholders})
 5868:             ORDER BY period_key ASC, account_code ASC, COALESCE(dimension_json, '{{}}') ASC, id ASC
 5869:             """,
 5870:             tuple(params),
 5871:         ).fetchall()
 5872:         canonical_fact_data = [dict(row) for row in fact_rows]
 5873: 
 5874:         try:
 5875:             template_version_payload = {
 5876:                 "id": str(template_version_row["id"] or "").strip(),
 5877:                 "version_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5878:                     template_version_row["version_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5879:                     field_name="version_fingerprint_sha256",
 5880:                 ),
 5881:                 "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(
 5882:                     str(template_version_row["period_grain"] or "")
 5883:                 ),
 5884:                 "semantic_structure_json": json.loads(
 5885:                     str(template_version_row["semantic_structure_json"] or "{}")
 5886:                 ),
 5887:                 "dimension_definitions_json": json.loads(
 5888:                     str(template_version_row["dimension_definitions_json"] or "{}")
 5889:                 ),
 5890:                 "measure_definitions_json": json.loads(
 5891:                     str(template_version_row["measure_definitions_json"] or "{}")
 5892:                 ),
 5893:                 "compatibility_metadata_json": json.loads(
 5894:                     str(template_version_row["compatibility_metadata_json"] or "{}")
 5895:                 ),
 5896:             }
 5897:             stored_output_payload = json.loads(
 5898:                 str(output_row["structured_output_json"] or "{}")
 5899:             )
 5900:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 5901:             raise RuntimeError("Persisted replay inputs contain invalid JSON.") from exc
 5902: 
 5903:     canonical_stored_output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(
 5904:         stored_output_payload
 5905:     )
 5906:     stored_output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(
 5907:         canonical_stored_output_payload
 5908:     )
 5909:     return {
 5910:         "mis_run_id": normalized_run_id,
 5911:         "tenant_id": normalized_tenant,
 5912:         "workspace_id": normalized_workspace,
 5913:         "template_version_payload": template_version_payload,
 5914:         "comparator_plan": comparator_plan,
 5915:         "canonical_fact_data": canonical_fact_data,
 5916:         "stored_output_payload": canonical_stored_output_payload,
 5917:         "stored_output_fingerprint_sha256": stored_output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5918:         "stored_run_output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5919:             run_row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5920:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
 5921:         ),
 5922:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": stored_lineage_anchor,
 5923:     }
 5924: 
 5925: 
 5926: def recompute_engine2b_mis_output_for_replay(
 5927:     replay_inputs: dict[str, Any],
 5928: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 5929:     variance_rows = compute_engine2b_variance_rows(
 5930:         template_version_payload=dict(replay_inputs["template_version_payload"]),
 5931:         resolved_period_comparator_plan=dict(replay_inputs["comparator_plan"]),
 5932:         canonical_fact_data=list(replay_inputs["canonical_fact_data"]),
 5933:     )
 5934:     template_payload = dict(replay_inputs["template_version_payload"])
 5935:     comparator_plan = dict(replay_inputs["comparator_plan"])
 5936:     output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(
 5937:         {
 5938:             "mode": "CALENDAR",
 5939:             "grain": str(template_payload["period_grain"]),
 5940:             "current": str(comparator_plan["current"]),
 5941:             "template_version_id": str(template_payload["id"]),
 5942:             "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5943:                 replay_inputs["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
 5944:                 field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 5945:             ),
 5946:             "comparators": dict(comparator_plan.get("comparators") or {}),
 5947:             "rows": variance_rows,
 5948:         }
 5949:     )
 5950:     output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(output_payload)
 5951:     return {
 5952:         "output_payload": output_payload,
 5953:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
 5954:         "row_count": len(variance_rows),
 5955:     }
 5956: 
 5957: 
 5958: def engine2b_replay_validate_run(
 5959:     *,
 5960:     tenant_id: str,
 5961:     workspace_id: str,
 5962:     mis_run_id: str,
 5963: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
