 5964:     replay_inputs = load_engine2b_replay_inputs(
 5965:         tenant_id=tenant_id,
 5966:         workspace_id=workspace_id,
 5967:         mis_run_id=mis_run_id,
 5968:     )
 5969:     recomputed = recompute_engine2b_mis_output_for_replay(replay_inputs)
 5970:     recomputed_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5971:         recomputed["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5972:         field_name="recomputed_output_fingerprint_sha256",
 5973:     )
 5974:     stored_run_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5975:         replay_inputs["stored_run_output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5976:         field_name="stored_output_fingerprint_sha256",
 5977:     )
 5978:     stored_payload_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 5979:         replay_inputs["stored_output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 5980:         field_name="stored_output_fingerprint_sha256",
 5981:     )
 5982:     mismatch = recomputed_hash != stored_run_hash or recomputed_hash != stored_payload_hash
 5983:     result: dict[str, Any] = {
 5984:         "mis_run_id": str(replay_inputs["mis_run_id"]),
 5985:         "stored_output_fingerprint_sha256": stored_run_hash,
 5986:         "recomputed_output_fingerprint_sha256": recomputed_hash,
 5987:         "replay_ok": not mismatch,
 5988:         "idempotent": True,
 5989:         "row_count": int(recomputed["row_count"]),
 5990:     }
 5991:     if mismatch:
 5992:         result["reason_code"] = "REPLAY_HASH_MISMATCH"
 5993:     return result
 5994: 
 5995: 
 5996: def _normalize_engine2b_artifact_refs(value: Any) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
 5997:     if value is None:
 5998:         return []
 5999:     if not isinstance(value, list):
 6000:         raise RuntimeError("artifact_refs_json must be a list.")
 6001: 
 6002:     normalized_refs: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 6003:     for item in value:
 6004:         if not isinstance(item, dict):
 6005:             raise RuntimeError("artifact_refs_json entries must be objects.")
 6006:         ref_type = _normalize_required_text(
 6007:             str(item.get("type") or ""),
 6008:             field_name="artifact_refs_json.type",
 6009:         )
 6010:         storage_key = _normalize_required_text(
 6011:             str(item.get("storage_key") or ""),
 6012:             field_name="artifact_refs_json.storage_key",
 6013:         )
 6014:         sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6015:             item.get("sha256"),
 6016:             field_name="artifact_refs_json.sha256",
 6017:         )
 6018:         normalized_refs.append(
 6019:             {
 6020:                 "type": ref_type,
 6021:                 "storage_key": storage_key,
 6022:                 "sha256": sha256,
 6023:             }
 6024:         )
 6025:     normalized_refs.sort(
 6026:         key=lambda row: (
 6027:             str(row.get("type") or ""),
 6028:             str(row.get("storage_key") or ""),
 6029:             str(row.get("sha256") or ""),
 6030:         )
 6031:     )
 6032:     return normalized_refs
 6033: 
 6034: 
 6035: def canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 6036:     if not isinstance(payload, dict):
 6037:         raise ValueError("Evidence bundle payload must be an object.")
 6038: 
 6039:     schema_version = _normalize_required_text(
 6040:         str(payload.get("schema_version") or ""),
 6041:         field_name="schema_version",
 6042:     )
 6043: 
 6044:     mis_run = payload.get("mis_run")
 6045:     if not isinstance(mis_run, dict):
 6046:         raise ValueError("mis_run is required.")
 6047:     mis_run_payload = {
 6048:         "id": _normalize_required_text(str(mis_run.get("id") or ""), field_name="mis_run.id"),
 6049:         "tenant_id": _normalize_required_text(
 6050:             str(mis_run.get("tenant_id") or ""),
 6051:             field_name="mis_run.tenant_id",
 6052:         ),
 6053:         "workspace_id": _normalize_required_text(
 6054:             str(mis_run.get("workspace_id") or ""),
 6055:             field_name="mis_run.workspace_id",
 6056:         ),
 6057:         "status": _normalize_required_text(
 6058:             str(mis_run.get("status") or ""),
 6059:             field_name="mis_run.status",
 6060:         ).upper(),
 6061:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6062:             mis_run.get("input_fingerprint_sha256"),
 6063:             field_name="mis_run.input_fingerprint_sha256",
 6064:         ),
 6065:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6066:             mis_run.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
 6067:             field_name="mis_run.output_fingerprint_sha256",
 6068:         ),
 6069:     }
 6070: 
 6071:     template_version = payload.get("template_version")
 6072:     if not isinstance(template_version, dict):
 6073:         raise ValueError("template_version is required.")
 6074:     template_version_payload = {
 6075:         "id": _normalize_required_text(
 6076:             str(template_version.get("id") or ""),
 6077:             field_name="template_version.id",
 6078:         ),
 6079:         "version_number": int(template_version.get("version_number") or 0),
 6080:         "version_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6081:             template_version.get("version_fingerprint_sha256"),
 6082:             field_name="template_version.version_fingerprint_sha256",
 6083:         ),
 6084:         "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(
 6085:             str(template_version.get("period_grain") or "")
 6086:         ),
 6087:     }
 6088: 
 6089:     lineage = payload.get("lineage")
 6090:     if not isinstance(lineage, dict):
 6091:         raise ValueError("lineage is required.")
 6092:     anchors = _normalize_engine2b_anchor_list(lineage.get("canonical_anchors"))
 6093:     lineage_payload = {
 6094:         "canonical_anchors": anchors,
 6095:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6096:             lineage.get("canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"),
 6097:             field_name="lineage.canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 6098:         ),
 6099:     }
 6100: 
 6101:     period_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(payload.get("period_scope"))
 6102: 
 6103:     period_resolution = payload.get("period_resolution")
 6104:     if not isinstance(period_resolution, dict):
 6105:         raise ValueError("period_resolution is required.")
 6106:     resolution_current = _normalize_required_text(
 6107:         str(period_resolution.get("current") or ""),
 6108:         field_name="period_resolution.current",
 6109:     )
 6110:     resolution_comparators_raw = period_resolution.get("comparators")
 6111:     if not isinstance(resolution_comparators_raw, dict):
 6112:         raise ValueError("period_resolution.comparators is required.")
 6113:     resolution_comparators: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
 6114:     for comparator in ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER:
 6115:         values = resolution_comparators_raw.get(comparator)
 6116:         if values is None:
 6117:             continue
 6118:         if not isinstance(values, list):
 6119:             raise ValueError("period_resolution.comparators entries must be lists.")
 6120:         resolution_comparators[comparator] = [
 6121:             _normalize_required_text(
 6122:                 str(item or ""),
 6123:                 field_name=f"period_resolution.comparators.{comparator}",
 6124:             )
 6125:             for item in values
 6126:         ]
 6127:     period_resolution_payload = {
 6128:         "current": resolution_current,
 6129:         "comparators": resolution_comparators,
 6130:     }
 6131: 
 6132:     output_summary = payload.get("output_summary")
 6133:     if not isinstance(output_summary, dict):
 6134:         raise ValueError("output_summary is required.")
 6135:     ordering = output_summary.get("ordering")
 6136:     if not isinstance(ordering, dict):
 6137:         raise ValueError("output_summary.ordering is required.")
 6138:     output_summary_payload = {
 6139:         "row_count": int(output_summary.get("row_count") or 0),
 6140:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6141:             output_summary.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
 6142:             field_name="output_summary.output_fingerprint_sha256",
 6143:         ),
 6144:         "ordering": {
 6145:             "rows": _normalize_required_text(
 6146:                 str(ordering.get("rows") or ""),
 6147:                 field_name="output_summary.ordering.rows",
 6148:             ),
 6149:             "comparators": _normalize_required_text(
 6150:                 str(ordering.get("comparators") or ""),
 6151:                 field_name="output_summary.ordering.comparators",
 6152:             ),
 6153:         },
 6154:     }
 6155: 
 6156:     hash_chain = payload.get("hash_chain")
 6157:     if not isinstance(hash_chain, dict):
 6158:         raise ValueError("hash_chain is required.")
 6159:     hash_chain_payload = {
 6160:         "run_output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6161:             hash_chain.get("run_output_fingerprint_sha256"),
 6162:             field_name="hash_chain.run_output_fingerprint_sha256",
 6163:         ),
 6164:         "mis_output_replay_bundle_hash": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6165:             hash_chain.get("mis_output_replay_bundle_hash"),
 6166:             field_name="hash_chain.mis_output_replay_bundle_hash",
 6167:         ),
 6168:         "mis_output_payload_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6169:             hash_chain.get("mis_output_payload_sha256"),
 6170:             field_name="hash_chain.mis_output_payload_sha256",
 6171:         ),
 6172:     }
 6173: 
 6174:     artifact_refs = _normalize_engine2b_artifact_refs(payload.get("artifact_refs"))
 6175: 
 6176:     canonical_payload = {
 6177:         "schema_version": schema_version,
 6178:         "mis_run": mis_run_payload,
 6179:         "template_version": template_version_payload,
 6180:         "lineage": lineage_payload,
 6181:         "period_scope": period_scope,
 6182:         "period_resolution": period_resolution_payload,
 6183:         "output_summary": output_summary_payload,
 6184:         "hash_chain": hash_chain_payload,
 6185:         "artifact_refs": artifact_refs,
 6186:     }
 6187:     return _canonical_json_text(canonical_payload)
 6188: 
 6189: 
 6190: def compute_engine2b_evidence_bundle_sha256(bundle_json: str) -> str:
 6191:     normalized_json = _normalize_required_text(bundle_json, field_name="bundle_json")
 6192:     try:
 6193:         parsed = json.loads(normalized_json)
 6194:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 6195:         raise ValueError("bundle_json must be valid JSON.") from exc
 6196:     canonical_json = canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(parsed)
 6197:     return determinism.sha256_hex_text(canonical_json)
 6198: 
 6199: 
 6200: def build_engine2b_evidence_bundle(
 6201:     *,
 6202:     tenant_id: str,
 6203:     workspace_id: str,
 6204:     mis_run_id: str,
 6205: ) -> tuple[str, str]:
 6206:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6207:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6208:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6209: 
 6210:     with get_conn() as conn:
 6211:         run_row = conn.execute(
 6212:             """
 6213:             SELECT
 6214:                 id,
 6215:                 tenant_id,
 6216:                 workspace_id,
 6217:                 template_version_id,
 6218:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 6219:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 6220:                 period_scope_json,
 6221:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 6222:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 6223:                 status
 6224:             FROM e2b_mis_runs
 6225:             WHERE id = ?
 6226:               AND tenant_id = ?
 6227:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6228:             LIMIT 1
 6229:             """,
 6230:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 6231:         ).fetchone()
 6232:         if not run_row:
 6233:             maybe_unscoped = conn.execute(
 6234:                 """
 6235:                 SELECT id
 6236:                 FROM e2b_mis_runs
 6237:                 WHERE id = ?
 6238:                 LIMIT 1
 6239:                 """,
 6240:                 (normalized_run_id,),
 6241:             ).fetchone()
 6242:             if maybe_unscoped:
 6243:                 raise PermissionError("mis_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 6244:             raise LookupError("mis_run_id was not found.")
 6245: 
 6246:         run_status = str(run_row["status"] or "").strip().upper()
 6247:         if run_status != "SUCCEEDED":
 6248:             raise RuntimeError("mis_run_id must be SUCCEEDED for evidence export.")
 6249: 
 6250:         template_row = conn.execute(
 6251:             """
 6252:             SELECT
 6253:                 v.id,
 6254:                 v.version_number,
 6255:                 v.version_fingerprint_sha256,
 6256:                 v.period_grain,
 6257:                 v.certified_at,
 6258:                 t.status AS template_status
 6259:             FROM e2b_mis_template_versions v
 6260:             JOIN e2b_mis_templates t
 6261:               ON t.id = v.template_id
 6262:             WHERE v.id = ?
 6263:               AND v.tenant_id = ?
 6264:               AND v.workspace_id = ?
 6265:             LIMIT 1
 6266:             """,
 6267:             (
 6268:                 str(run_row["template_version_id"] or "").strip(),
 6269:                 normalized_tenant,
 6270:                 normalized_workspace,
 6271:             ),
 6272:         ).fetchone()
 6273:         if not template_row:
 6274:             raise RuntimeError("template_version_id was not found for evidence export.")
 6275:         template_status = str(template_row["template_status"] or "").strip().upper()
 6276:         certified_at = str(template_row["certified_at"] or "").strip()
 6277:         if template_status != "CERTIFIED" or not certified_at:
 6278:             raise RuntimeError("template_version_id must reference a CERTIFIED template version.")
 6279: 
 6280:         output_row = conn.execute(
 6281:             """
 6282:             SELECT
 6283:                 id,
 6284:                 structured_output_json,
 6285:                 artifact_refs_json,
 6286:                 replay_bundle_hash
 6287:             FROM e2b_mis_outputs
 6288:             WHERE mis_run_id = ?
 6289:               AND tenant_id = ?
 6290:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6291:             LIMIT 1
 6292:             """,
 6293:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 6294:         ).fetchone()
 6295:         if not output_row:
 6296:             raise LookupError("mis_output for mis_run_id was not found.")
 6297: 
 6298:         try:
 6299:             parsed_period_scope = json.loads(str(run_row["period_scope_json"] or "{}"))
 6300:             normalized_period_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(parsed_period_scope)
 6301:             comparator_plan = resolve_engine2b_period_comparators(
 6302:                 current_period=normalized_period_scope["current_period"],
 6303:                 grain=normalized_period_scope["grain"],
 6304:                 comparisons=normalized_period_scope["comparisons"],
 6305:             )
 6306:             parsed_anchors = json.loads(str(run_row["canonical_anchors_json"] or "[]"))
 6307:             normalized_anchors = _normalize_engine2b_anchor_list(parsed_anchors)
 6308:             parsed_output_payload = json.loads(str(output_row["structured_output_json"] or "{}"))
 6309:             canonical_output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(parsed_output_payload)
 6310:             parsed_artifact_refs = json.loads(str(output_row["artifact_refs_json"] or "[]"))
 6311:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 6312:             raise RuntimeError("Persisted evidence export inputs contain invalid JSON.") from exc
 6313: 
 6314:         recomputed_lineage_anchor = _engine2b_lineage_anchor_sha256(normalized_anchors)
 6315:         stored_lineage_anchor = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6316:             run_row["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
 6317:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 6318:         )
 6319:         if recomputed_lineage_anchor != stored_lineage_anchor:
 6320:             raise RuntimeError("Lineage hash verification failed for mis_run_id.")
 6321:         for anchor in normalized_anchors:
 6322:             anchor_row = conn.execute(
 6323:                 """
 6324:                 SELECT id
 6325:                 FROM wb_canonical_runs
 6326:                 WHERE tenant_id = ?
 6327:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 6328:                   AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 6329:                   AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 6330:                 LIMIT 1
 6331:                 """,
 6332:                 (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, anchor),
 6333:             ).fetchone()
 6334:             if not anchor_row:
 6335:                 raise RuntimeError("Lineage hash verification failed for mis_run_id.")
 6336: 
 6337:         stored_run_output_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6338:             run_row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 6339:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
 6340:         )
 6341:         recomputed_output_hash = compute_engine2b_mis_output_fingerprint(canonical_output_payload)
 6342:         if stored_run_output_hash != recomputed_output_hash:
 6343:             raise RuntimeError("Output fingerprint verification failed for mis_run_id.")
 6344: 
 6345:         replay_bundle_hash = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6346:             output_row["replay_bundle_hash"],
 6347:             field_name="replay_bundle_hash",
 6348:         )
 6349:         artifact_refs = _normalize_engine2b_artifact_refs(parsed_artifact_refs)
 6350:         rows_payload = canonical_output_payload.get("rows")
 6351:         row_count = len(rows_payload) if isinstance(rows_payload, list) else 0
 6352: 
 6353:     bundle_payload = {
 6354:         "schema_version": "engine2b.evidence_bundle.v1",
 6355:         "mis_run": {
 6356:             "id": normalized_run_id,
 6357:             "tenant_id": normalized_tenant,
 6358:             "workspace_id": normalized_workspace,
 6359:             "status": run_status,
 6360:             "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6361:                 run_row["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
 6362:                 field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
 6363:             ),
 6364:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": stored_run_output_hash,
 6365:         },
 6366:         "template_version": {
 6367:             "id": _normalize_required_text(str(template_row["id"] or ""), field_name="template_version.id"),
 6368:             "version_number": int(template_row["version_number"] or 0),
 6369:             "version_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6370:                 template_row["version_fingerprint_sha256"],
 6371:                 field_name="version_fingerprint_sha256",
 6372:             ),
 6373:             "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(str(template_row["period_grain"] or "")),
 6374:         },
 6375:         "lineage": {
 6376:             "canonical_anchors": normalized_anchors,
 6377:             "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": stored_lineage_anchor,
 6378:         },
 6379:         "period_scope": normalized_period_scope,
 6380:         "period_resolution": comparator_plan,
 6381:         "output_summary": {
 6382:             "row_count": int(row_count),
 6383:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": stored_run_output_hash,
 6384:             "ordering": {
 6385:                 "rows": "row_identity_sha256_asc",
 6386:                 "comparators": "ENGINE2B_PERIOD_COMPARISON_ORDER",
 6387:             },
 6388:         },
 6389:         "hash_chain": {
 6390:             "run_output_fingerprint_sha256": stored_run_output_hash,
 6391:             "mis_output_replay_bundle_hash": replay_bundle_hash,
 6392:             "mis_output_payload_sha256": recomputed_output_hash,
 6393:         },
 6394:         "artifact_refs": artifact_refs,
 6395:     }
 6396:     bundle_json = canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(bundle_payload)
 6397:     bundle_sha256 = compute_engine2b_evidence_bundle_sha256(bundle_json)
 6398:     return bundle_json, bundle_sha256
 6399: 
 6400: 
 6401: def export_engine2b_evidence_bundle(
 6402:     *,
 6403:     tenant_id: str,
 6404:     workspace_id: str,
 6405:     mis_run_id: str,
 6406: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6407:     bundle_columns = list_table_columns("e2b_mis_evidence_bundles")
 6408:     if not bundle_columns:
 6409:         raise RuntimeError("Engine2B evidence bundle schema is not available.")
 6410: 
 6411:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6412:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6413:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6414: 
 6415:     bundle_json, bundle_sha256 = build_engine2b_evidence_bundle(
 6416:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6417:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6418:         mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6419:     )
 6420: 
 6421:     with get_conn() as conn:
 6422:         existing = conn.execute(
 6423:             """
 6424:             SELECT
 6425:                 id,
 6426:                 tenant_id,
 6427:                 workspace_id,
 6428:                 mis_run_id,
 6429:                 bundle_sha256,
 6430:                 bundle_json,
 6431:                 storage_ref,
 6432:                 created_at
 6433:             FROM e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6434:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 6435:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6436:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 6437:             LIMIT 1
 6438:             """,
 6439:             (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_run_id),
 6440:         ).fetchone()
 6441:         if existing:
 6442:             existing_sha = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6443:                 existing["bundle_sha256"],
 6444:                 field_name="bundle_sha256",
 6445:             )
 6446:             existing_json = str(existing["bundle_json"] or "").strip()
 6447:             existing_computed_sha = compute_engine2b_evidence_bundle_sha256(existing_json)
 6448:             if (
 6449:                 existing_sha != existing_computed_sha
 6450:                 or existing_sha != bundle_sha256
 6451:                 or canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(json.loads(existing_json)) != bundle_json
 6452:             ):
 6453:                 raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6454:             return {
 6455:                 "bundle": dict(existing),
 6456:                 "idempotent": True,
 6457:             }
 6458: 
 6459:         bundle_id = f"mevd_{uuid4().hex}"
 6460:         now = utc_now_iso()
 6461:         conn.execute(
 6462:             """
 6463:             INSERT INTO e2b_mis_evidence_bundles (
 6464:                 id,
 6465:                 tenant_id,
 6466:                 workspace_id,
 6467:                 mis_run_id,
 6468:                 bundle_sha256,
 6469:                 bundle_json,
 6470:                 storage_ref,
 6471:                 created_at
 6472:             )
 6473:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 6474:             """,
 6475:             (
 6476:                 bundle_id,
 6477:                 normalized_tenant,
 6478:                 normalized_workspace,
 6479:                 normalized_run_id,
 6480:                 bundle_sha256,
 6481:                 bundle_json,
 6482:                 None,
 6483:                 now,
 6484:             ),
 6485:         )
 6486: 
 6487:         stored = conn.execute(
 6488:             """
 6489:             SELECT
 6490:                 id,
 6491:                 tenant_id,
 6492:                 workspace_id,
 6493:                 mis_run_id,
 6494:                 bundle_sha256,
 6495:                 bundle_json,
 6496:                 storage_ref,
 6497:                 created_at
 6498:             FROM e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6499:             WHERE id = ?
 6500:               AND tenant_id = ?
 6501:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6502:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 6503:             LIMIT 1
 6504:             """,
 6505:             (bundle_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_run_id),
 6506:         ).fetchone()
 6507:         if not stored:
 6508:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle was not persisted.")
 6509:         return {
 6510:             "bundle": dict(stored),
 6511:             "idempotent": False,
 6512:         }
 6513: 
 6514: 
 6515: def _engine2b_evidence_storage_ref(
 6516:     *,
 6517:     tenant_id: str,
 6518:     workspace_id: str,
 6519:     mis_run_id: str,
 6520:     bundle_sha256: str,
 6521: ) -> str:
 6522:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6523:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6524:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6525:     normalized_bundle_sha = _normalize_engine1_hash(bundle_sha256, field_name="bundle_sha256")
 6526:     tenant_hash = determinism.sha256_hex_text(normalized_tenant)[:16]
 6527:     workspace_hash = determinism.sha256_hex_text(normalized_workspace)[:16]
 6528:     run_hash = determinism.sha256_hex_text(normalized_run_id)[:16]
 6529:     return (
 6530:         f"engine2b/evidence/{tenant_hash}/{workspace_hash}/"
 6531:         f"{run_hash}/{normalized_bundle_sha}.json"
 6532:     )
 6533: 
 6534: 
 6535: def _load_engine2b_evidence_bundle_for_scope(
 6536:     *,
 6537:     tenant_id: str,
 6538:     workspace_id: str,
 6539:     mis_run_id: str,
 6540: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6541:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6542:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6543:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6544: 
 6545:     with get_conn() as conn:
 6546:         row = conn.execute(
 6547:             """
 6548:             SELECT
 6549:                 id,
 6550:                 tenant_id,
 6551:                 workspace_id,
 6552:                 mis_run_id,
 6553:                 bundle_sha256,
 6554:                 bundle_json,
 6555:                 storage_ref,
 6556:                 created_at
 6557:             FROM e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6558:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 6559:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6560:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 6561:             LIMIT 1
 6562:             """,
 6563:             (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_run_id),
 6564:         ).fetchone()
 6565:         if row:
 6566:             return dict(row)
 6567: 
 6568:         maybe_unscoped = conn.execute(
 6569:             """
 6570:             SELECT id
 6571:             FROM e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6572:             WHERE mis_run_id = ?
 6573:             LIMIT 1
 6574:             """,
 6575:             (normalized_run_id,),
 6576:         ).fetchone()
 6577:         if maybe_unscoped:
 6578:             raise PermissionError("mis_run_id evidence bundle is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 6579:         raise LookupError("Evidence bundle for mis_run_id was not found.")
 6580: 
 6581: 
 6582: def export_engine2b_evidence_artifact(
 6583:     *,
 6584:     tenant_id: str,
 6585:     workspace_id: str,
 6586:     mis_run_id: str,
 6587: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6588:     from workbench.backend.storage import get_storage_provider
 6589: 
 6590:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6591:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6592:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6593: 
 6594:     export_result = export_engine2b_evidence_bundle(
 6595:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6596:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6597:         mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6598:     )
 6599:     bundle_row = export_result.get("bundle") if isinstance(export_result, dict) else {}
 6600:     if not isinstance(bundle_row, dict):
 6601:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle export returned invalid payload.")
 6602: 
 6603:     try:
 6604:         raw_bundle_json = str(bundle_row.get("bundle_json") or "").strip()
 6605:         parsed_bundle = json.loads(raw_bundle_json)
 6606:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 6607:         raise RuntimeError("Persisted evidence bundle JSON is invalid.") from exc
 6608:     canonical_bundle_json = canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(parsed_bundle)
 6609:     bundle_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6610:         bundle_row.get("bundle_sha256"),
 6611:         field_name="bundle_sha256",
 6612:     )
 6613:     if compute_engine2b_evidence_bundle_sha256(canonical_bundle_json) != bundle_sha256:
 6614:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6615: 
 6616:     bundle_bytes = canonical_bundle_json.encode("utf-8")
 6617:     if determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(bundle_bytes) != bundle_sha256:
 6618:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6619: 
 6620:     deterministic_ref = _engine2b_evidence_storage_ref(
 6621:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6622:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6623:         mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6624:         bundle_sha256=bundle_sha256,
 6625:     )
 6626:     provider = get_storage_provider()
 6627:     existing_ref = str(bundle_row.get("storage_ref") or "").strip()
 6628: 
 6629:     if existing_ref:
 6630:         if existing_ref != deterministic_ref:
 6631:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6632:         try:
 6633:             stored_bytes = provider.get_bytes(existing_ref)
 6634:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 6635:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.") from exc
 6636:         if determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(stored_bytes) != bundle_sha256 or stored_bytes != bundle_bytes:
 6637:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6638:         refreshed = _load_engine2b_evidence_bundle_for_scope(
 6639:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6640:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6641:             mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6642:         )
 6643:         return {
 6644:             "bundle": refreshed,
 6645:             "storage_ref": existing_ref,
 6646:             "idempotent": True,
 6647:         }
 6648: 
 6649:     try:
 6650:         provider.put_bytes(deterministic_ref, bundle_bytes, content_type="application/json")
 6651:     except FileExistsError:
 6652:         try:
 6653:             stored_bytes = provider.get_bytes(deterministic_ref)
 6654:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 6655:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.") from exc
 6656:         if determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(stored_bytes) != bundle_sha256 or stored_bytes != bundle_bytes:
 6657:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6658:     except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 6659:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence artifact write failed.") from exc
 6660: 
 6661:     with get_conn() as conn:
 6662:         cursor = conn.execute(
 6663:             """
 6664:             UPDATE e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6665:             SET storage_ref = ?
 6666:             WHERE id = ?
 6667:               AND tenant_id = ?
 6668:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6669:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 6670:               AND storage_ref IS NULL
 6671:               AND bundle_sha256 = ?
 6672:             """,
 6673:             (
 6674:                 deterministic_ref,
 6675:                 _normalize_required_text(str(bundle_row.get("id") or ""), field_name="bundle_id"),
 6676:                 normalized_tenant,
 6677:                 normalized_workspace,
 6678:                 normalized_run_id,
 6679:                 bundle_sha256,
 6680:             ),
 6681:         )
 6682:         if int(getattr(cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 6683:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle storage_ref update failed.")
 6684:         stored_row = conn.execute(
 6685:             """
 6686:             SELECT
 6687:                 id,
 6688:                 tenant_id,
 6689:                 workspace_id,
 6690:                 mis_run_id,
 6691:                 bundle_sha256,
 6692:                 bundle_json,
 6693:                 storage_ref,
 6694:                 created_at
 6695:             FROM e2b_mis_evidence_bundles
 6696:             WHERE id = ?
 6697:               AND tenant_id = ?
 6698:               AND workspace_id = ?
 6699:               AND mis_run_id = ?
 6700:               AND bundle_sha256 = ?
 6701:               AND storage_ref = ?
 6702:             LIMIT 1
 6703:             """,
 6704:             (
 6705:                 _normalize_required_text(str(bundle_row.get("id") or ""), field_name="bundle_id"),
 6706:                 normalized_tenant,
 6707:                 normalized_workspace,
 6708:                 normalized_run_id,
 6709:                 bundle_sha256,
 6710:                 deterministic_ref,
 6711:             ),
 6712:         ).fetchone()
 6713:         if not stored_row:
 6714:             raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle storage_ref update failed.")
 6715:         return {
 6716:             "bundle": dict(stored_row),
 6717:             "storage_ref": deterministic_ref,
 6718:             "idempotent": False,
 6719:         }
 6720: 
 6721: 
 6722: def get_engine2b_evidence_artifact(
 6723:     *,
 6724:     tenant_id: str,
 6725:     workspace_id: str,
 6726:     mis_run_id: str,
 6727: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6728:     from workbench.backend.storage import get_storage_provider
 6729: 
 6730:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 6731:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 6732:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run_id, field_name="mis_run_id")
 6733: 
 6734:     bundle_row = _load_engine2b_evidence_bundle_for_scope(
 6735:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6736:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6737:         mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6738:     )
 6739:     storage_ref = str(bundle_row.get("storage_ref") or "").strip()
 6740:     if not storage_ref:
 6741:         raise LookupError("Evidence artifact for mis_run_id was not found.")
 6742: 
 6743:     bundle_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
 6744:         bundle_row.get("bundle_sha256"),
 6745:         field_name="bundle_sha256",
 6746:     )
 6747:     expected_ref = _engine2b_evidence_storage_ref(
 6748:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 6749:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 6750:         mis_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 6751:         bundle_sha256=bundle_sha256,
 6752:     )
 6753:     if storage_ref != expected_ref:
 6754:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6755: 
 6756:     provider = get_storage_provider()
 6757:     try:
 6758:         stored_bytes = provider.get_bytes(storage_ref)
 6759:     except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 6760:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.") from exc
 6761:     if determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(stored_bytes) != bundle_sha256:
 6762:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6763:     try:
 6764:         parsed_bundle = json.loads(stored_bytes.decode("utf-8"))
 6765:     except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 6766:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.") from exc
 6767:     canonical_bundle_json = canonicalize_engine2b_evidence_bundle_payload(parsed_bundle)
 6768:     if canonical_bundle_json.encode("utf-8") != stored_bytes:
 6769:         raise RuntimeError("Evidence bundle hash mismatch detected.")
 6770: 
 6771:     return {
 6772:         "bundle_id": str(bundle_row.get("id") or ""),
 6773:         "mis_run_id": normalized_run_id,
 6774:         "bundle_sha256": bundle_sha256,
 6775:         "storage_ref": storage_ref,
 6776:         "bundle_json": parsed_bundle,
 6777:         "content_type": "application/json",
 6778:     }
 6779: 
 6780: 
 6781: ENGINE3_EXECUTION_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[str, set[str]] = {
 6782:     "QUEUED": {"RUNNING", "FAILED"},
 6783:     "RUNNING": {"DRAFT_READY", "PARTIAL_SUCCESS", "FAILED", "CANCELLED"},
 6784:     "DRAFT_READY": set(),
 6785:     "FAILED": set(),
 6786:     "PARTIAL_SUCCESS": set(),
 6787:     "CANCELLED": set(),
 6788: }
 6789: 
 6790: 
 6791: def _normalize_engine3_action_type(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 6792:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 6793:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_ACTION_TYPES:
 6794:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} is not supported for Engine-3.")
 6795:     return normalized
 6796: 
 6797: 
 6798: def _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 6799:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 6800:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
 6801:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES)
 6802:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 6803:     return normalized
 6804: 
 6805: 
 6806: def _normalize_engine3_actor_type(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 6807:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 6808:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_EVENT_ACTOR_TYPES:
 6809:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of SYSTEM, USER.")
 6810:     return normalized
 6811: 
 6812: 
 6813: def _normalize_engine3_execution_event_type(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 6814:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 6815:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_EXECUTION_EVENT_TYPES:
 6816:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_EXECUTION_EVENT_TYPES)
 6817:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 6818:     return normalized
 6819: 
 6820: 
 6821: def _normalize_engine3_json_object(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6822:     if not isinstance(value, dict):
 6823:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a JSON object.")
 6824:     return value
 6825: 
 6826: 
 6827: def _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6828:     if value is None:
 6829:         return {}
 6830:     return _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name=field_name)
 6831: 
 6832: 
 6833: def _normalize_engine3_period_key(value: Any, *, grain: str) -> str:
 6834:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(str(value or ""), field_name="action_scope_json.period.period_key")
 6835:     if grain == "MONTH":
 6836:         if not re.match(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}$", normalized):
 6837:             raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period.period_key must use YYYY-MM for MONTH grain.")
 6838:         return normalized
 6839:     if grain == "QUARTER":
 6840:         quarter_match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})-Q([1-4])$", normalized.upper())
 6841:         if not quarter_match:
 6842:             raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period.period_key must use YYYY-Q[1-4] for QUARTER grain.")
 6843:         return f"{quarter_match.group(1)}-Q{quarter_match.group(2)}"
 6844:     if grain == "YEAR":
 6845:         if not re.match(r"^\d{4}$", normalized):
 6846:             raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period.period_key must use YYYY for YEAR grain.")
 6847:         return normalized
 6848:     raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period.grain is invalid.")
 6849: 
 6850: 
 6851: def _normalize_engine3_currency_code(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 6852:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 6853:     if not re.match(r"^[A-Z]{3}$", normalized):
 6854:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a 3-letter ISO currency code.")
 6855:     return normalized
 6856: 
 6857: 
 6858: def _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 6859:     action_scope_json: Any,
 6860:     *,
 6861:     action_type: str,
 6862: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 6863:     scope = _normalize_engine3_json_object(action_scope_json, field_name="action_scope_json")
 6864:     top_allowed = {"mode", "action_type", "period", "entity_scope", "baseline_anchors"}
 6865:     unknown_top = sorted(set(scope.keys()) - top_allowed)
 6866:     missing_top = sorted(top_allowed - set(scope.keys()))
 6867:     if unknown_top or missing_top:
 6868:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json must include only required top-level keys.")
 6869: 
 6870:     mode = _normalize_required_text(scope.get("mode"), field_name="action_scope_json.mode").upper()
 6871:     if mode != "CALENDAR":
 6872:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.mode must be CALENDAR.")
 6873: 
 6874:     scope_action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(
 6875:         scope.get("action_type"),
 6876:         field_name="action_scope_json.action_type",
 6877:     )
 6878:     if scope_action_type != action_type:
 6879:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.action_type must match action_type.")
 6880: 
 6881:     period = _normalize_engine3_json_object(scope.get("period"), field_name="action_scope_json.period")
 6882:     period_allowed = {"grain", "period_key"}
 6883:     if sorted(set(period.keys()) - period_allowed) or sorted(period_allowed - set(period.keys())):
 6884:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period must include only grain and period_key.")
 6885:     period_grain = _normalize_required_text(
 6886:         period.get("grain"),
 6887:         field_name="action_scope_json.period.grain",
 6888:     ).upper()
 6889:     if period_grain not in ENGINE3_ACTION_SCOPE_GRAINS:
 6890:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.period.grain is invalid.")
 6891:     period_key = _normalize_engine3_period_key(period.get("period_key"), grain=period_grain)
 6892: 
 6893:     entity_scope = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
 6894:         scope.get("entity_scope"),
 6895:         field_name="action_scope_json.entity_scope",
 6896:     )
 6897:     entity_allowed = {"entity_ids", "ledger_id", "base_currency"}
 6898:     if sorted(set(entity_scope.keys()) - entity_allowed) or sorted(entity_allowed - set(entity_scope.keys())):
 6899:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.entity_scope must include only entity_ids, ledger_id, base_currency.")
 6900:     raw_entities = entity_scope.get("entity_ids")
 6901:     if not isinstance(raw_entities, list) or not raw_entities:
 6902:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.entity_scope.entity_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 6903:     normalized_entities = sorted(
 6904:         {
 6905:             _normalize_required_text(entity_id, field_name="action_scope_json.entity_scope.entity_ids")
 6906:             for entity_id in raw_entities
 6907:             if str(entity_id or "").strip()
 6908:         }
 6909:     )
 6910:     if not normalized_entities:
 6911:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.entity_scope.entity_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 6912:     ledger_id = _normalize_required_text(
 6913:         entity_scope.get("ledger_id"),
 6914:         field_name="action_scope_json.entity_scope.ledger_id",
 6915:     )
 6916:     base_currency = _normalize_engine3_currency_code(
 6917:         entity_scope.get("base_currency"),
 6918:         field_name="action_scope_json.entity_scope.base_currency",
 6919:     )
 6920: 
 6921:     baseline = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
 6922:         scope.get("baseline_anchors"),
 6923:         field_name="action_scope_json.baseline_anchors",
 6924:     )
 6925:     baseline_allowed = {"required", "anchor_types"}
 6926:     if sorted(set(baseline.keys()) - baseline_allowed) or sorted(baseline_allowed - set(baseline.keys())):
 6927:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.baseline_anchors must include only required and anchor_types.")
 6928:     required_value = baseline.get("required")
 6929:     if not isinstance(required_value, bool):
 6930:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.baseline_anchors.required must be boolean.")
 6931:     anchor_types_raw = baseline.get("anchor_types")
 6932:     if not isinstance(anchor_types_raw, list):
 6933:         raise ValueError("action_scope_json.baseline_anchors.anchor_types must be an array.")
 6934:     anchor_types = sorted(
 6935:         {
 6936:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="action_scope_json.baseline_anchors.anchor_types")
 6937:             for item in anchor_types_raw
 6938:             if str(item or "").strip()
 6939:         }
 6940:     )
 6941: 
 6942:     return {
 6943:         "mode": mode,
 6944:         "action_type": scope_action_type,
 6945:         "period": {
 6946:             "grain": period_grain,
 6947:             "period_key": period_key,
 6948:         },
 6949:         "entity_scope": {
 6950:             "entity_ids": normalized_entities,
 6951:             "ledger_id": ledger_id,
 6952:             "base_currency": base_currency,
 6953:         },
 6954:         "baseline_anchors": {
 6955:             "required": required_value,
 6956:             "anchor_types": anchor_types,
 6957:         },
 6958:     }
 6959: 
 6960: 
 6961: def _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors: list[str] | None) -> list[str]:
 6962:     if canonical_anchors is None:
 6963:         raise ValueError("canonical_anchors is required.")
 6964:     if not isinstance(canonical_anchors, list) or not canonical_anchors:
 6965:         raise ValueError("canonical_anchors must include at least one anchor.")
 6966:     normalized = sorted(
 6967:         {
 6968:             _normalize_engine1_hash(anchor, field_name="canonical_anchors")
 6969:             for anchor in canonical_anchors
 6970:             if str(anchor or "").strip()
 6971:         }
 6972:     )
 6973:     if not normalized:
 6974:         raise ValueError("canonical_anchors must include at least one valid anchor.")
 6975:     return normalized
 6976: 
 6977: 
 6978: def _engine3_lineage_anchor_sha256(canonical_anchors: list[str]) -> str:
 6979:     normalized = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors)
 6980:     return determinism.sha256_hex_text("\n".join(normalized))
 6981: 
 6982: 
 6983: def compute_engine3_canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256(canonical_anchors: list[str]) -> str:
 6984:     return _engine3_lineage_anchor_sha256(canonical_anchors)
 6985: 
 6986: 
 6987: def _resolve_engine3_canonical_anchors(
 6988:     conn: Any,
 6989:     *,
 6990:     tenant_id: str,
 6991:     workspace_id: str,
 6992:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 6993: ) -> list[str]:
 6994:     normalized = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors)
 6995:     for anchor in normalized:
 6996:         row = conn.execute(
 6997:             """
 6998:             SELECT id
 6999:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 7000:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 7001:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7002:               AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 7003:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 7004:             LIMIT 1
 7005:             """,
 7006:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, anchor),
 7007:         ).fetchone()
 7008:         if not row:
 7009:             raise LookupError("canonical_anchors must reference existing SUCCEEDED canonical runs.")
 7010:     return normalized
 7011: 
 7012: 
 7013: def _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(value: Any) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
 7014:     if value is None:
 7015:         return []
 7016:     if not isinstance(value, list):
 7017:         raise ValueError("artifact_refs_json must be an array.")
 7018:     normalized: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 7019:     for item in value:
 7020:         if not isinstance(item, dict):
 7021:             raise ValueError("artifact_refs_json items must be objects.")
 7022:         allowed_keys = {"type", "storage_key", "sha256"}
 7023:         if sorted(set(item.keys()) - allowed_keys) or sorted(allowed_keys - set(item.keys())):
 7024:             raise ValueError("artifact_refs_json items must include only type, storage_key, sha256.")
 7025:         normalized.append(
 7026:             {
 7027:                 "type": _normalize_required_text(item.get("type"), field_name="artifact_refs_json.type"),
 7028:                 "storage_key": _normalize_required_text(
 7029:                     item.get("storage_key"),
 7030:                     field_name="artifact_refs_json.storage_key",
 7031:                 ),
 7032:                 "sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(item.get("sha256"), field_name="artifact_refs_json.sha256"),
 7033:             }
 7034:         )
 7035:     normalized.sort(
 7036:         key=lambda row: (
 7037:             row["type"],
 7038:             row["storage_key"],
 7039:             row["sha256"],
 7040:         )
 7041:     )
 7042:     return normalized
 7043: 
 7044: 
 7045: def _engine3_empty_output_fingerprint() -> str:
 7046:     return determinism.sha256_hex_text("ENGINE3_EMPTY_OUTPUT")
 7047: 
 7048: 
 7049: def compute_engine3_execution_input_fingerprint(
 7050:     *,
 7051:     action_type: str,
 7052:     module_template_refs_json: dict[str, Any] | None,
 7053:     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256: str,
 7054:     canonical_anchors_json: list[str],
 7055:     action_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
 7056:     deterministic_config_json: dict[str, Any] | None,
 7057: ) -> str:
 7058:     normalized_action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(action_type, field_name="action_type")
 7059:     normalized_module_refs = _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7060:         module_template_refs_json,
 7061:         field_name="module_template_refs_json",
 7062:     )
 7063:     normalized_config = _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7064:         deterministic_config_json,
 7065:         field_name="deterministic_config_json",
 7066:     )
 7067:     normalized_anchors = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors_json)
 7068:     payload = {
 7069:         "action_scope_json": _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 7070:             action_scope_json,
 7071:             action_type=normalized_action_type,
 7072:         ),
 7073:         "action_type": normalized_action_type,
 7074:         "canonical_anchors_json": normalized_anchors,
 7075:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 7076:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7077:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 7078:         ),
 7079:         "deterministic_config_json": normalized_config,
 7080:         "module_template_refs": normalized_module_refs,
 7081:     }
 7082:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 7083: 
 7084: 
 7085: def compute_engine3_replay_bundle_hash(
 7086:     *,
 7087:     input_fingerprint_sha256: str,
 7088:     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256: str,
 7089:     action_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
 7090:     output_fingerprint_sha256: str,
 7091:     artifact_refs_json: list[dict[str, str]] | list[dict[str, Any]] | None,
 7092: ) -> str:
 7093:     normalized_scope = _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 7094:         action_scope_json,
 7095:         action_type=_normalize_engine3_action_type(
 7096:             action_scope_json.get("action_type") if isinstance(action_scope_json, dict) else None,
 7097:             field_name="action_scope_json.action_type",
 7098:         ),
 7099:     )
 7100:     output_hash = str(output_fingerprint_sha256 or "").strip().lower()
 7101:     if output_hash and not _HEX64_RE.match(output_hash):
 7102:         raise ValueError("output_fingerprint_sha256 must be empty or a 64-char sha256 hash.")
 7103:     normalized_artifacts = _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(artifact_refs_json)
 7104:     canonical_payload = {
 7105:         "action_scope_json": normalized_scope,
 7106:         "artifact_refs_json": normalized_artifacts,
 7107:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 7108:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7109:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
 7110:         ),
 7111:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 7112:             input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7113:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
 7114:         ),
 7115:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_hash,
 7116:     }
 7117:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(canonical_payload))
 7118: 
 7119: 
 7120: def _ensure_engine3_workspace_scope_exists(
 7121:     conn: Any,
 7122:     *,
 7123:     tenant_id: str,
 7124:     workspace_id: str,
 7125: ) -> None:
 7126:     row = conn.execute(
 7127:         """
 7128:         SELECT tenant_id
 7129:         FROM iam_workspaces
 7130:         WHERE workspace_id = ?
 7131:         LIMIT 1
 7132:         """,
 7133:         (workspace_id,),
 7134:     ).fetchone()
 7135:     if not row:
 7136:         raise LookupError("workspace_id was not found.")
 7137:     row_tenant_id = _normalize_required_text(str(row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 7138:     if row_tenant_id != tenant_id:
 7139:         raise PermissionError("workspace_id does not belong to tenant_id.")

 7147:     from workbench.backend.db.core.events import (
 7148:         _engine3_next_event_seq as _engine3_next_event_seq_impl,
 7149:     )
 7150: 
 7151:     return _engine3_next_event_seq_impl(conn, execution_run_id=execution_run_id)

 7154: def _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 7155:     conn: Any,
 7156:     *,
 7157:     execution_run_id: str,
 7158:     tenant_id: str,
 7159:     workspace_id: str,
 7160:     event_type: str,
 7161:     event_payload_json: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7162:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
 7163:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
 7164:     from_status: str | None = None,
 7165:     to_status: str | None = None,
 7166:     created_at: str | None = None,
 7167: ) -> str:
 7168:     from workbench.backend.db.core.events import (
 7169:         _insert_engine3_execution_event_row as _insert_engine3_execution_event_row_impl,
 7170:     )
 7171: 
 7172:     return _insert_engine3_execution_event_row_impl(
 7173:         conn,
 7174:         execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
 7175:         tenant_id=tenant_id,
 7176:         workspace_id=workspace_id,
 7177:         event_type=event_type,
 7178:         event_payload_json=event_payload_json,
 7179:         actor_type=actor_type,
 7180:         actor_id=actor_id,
 7181:         from_status=from_status,
 7182:         to_status=to_status,
 7183:         created_at=created_at,
 7184:         normalize_required_text=lambda value, field_name: _normalize_required_text(
 7185:             value,
 7186:             field_name=field_name,
 7187:         ),
 7188:         normalize_event_type=lambda value, field_name: _normalize_engine3_execution_event_type(
 7189:             value,
 7190:             field_name=field_name,
 7191:         ),
 7192:         normalize_optional_json_object=lambda value, field_name: _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7193:             value,
 7194:             field_name=field_name,
 7195:         ),
 7196:         normalize_actor_type=lambda value, field_name: _normalize_engine3_actor_type(
 7197:             value,
 7198:             field_name=field_name,
 7199:         ),
 7200:         normalize_execution_run_status=lambda value, field_name: _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(
 7201:             value,
 7202:             field_name=field_name,
 7203:         ),
 7204:         canonical_json_text=_canonical_json_text,
 7205:         utc_now_iso=utc_now_iso,
 7206:     )
