 7208: 
 7209: def create_engine3_execution_run(
 7210:     *,
 7211:     tenant_id: str,
 7212:     workspace_id: str,
 7213:     action_type: str,
 7214:     action_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
 7215:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 7216:     module_template_refs_json: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7217:     deterministic_config_json: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7218: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 7219:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_runs")
 7220:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 7221:     if not run_columns or not event_columns:
 7222:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution schema is not available.")
 7223: 
 7224:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 7225:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 7226:     normalized_action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(action_type, field_name="action_type")
 7227:     normalized_scope = _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 7228:         action_scope_json,
 7229:         action_type=normalized_action_type,
 7230:     )
 7231:     normalized_module_refs = _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7232:         module_template_refs_json,
 7233:         field_name="module_template_refs_json",
 7234:     )
 7235:     normalized_config = _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7236:         deterministic_config_json,
 7237:         field_name="deterministic_config_json",
 7238:     )
 7239: 
 7240:     with get_conn() as conn:
 7241:         _ensure_engine3_workspace_scope_exists(
 7242:             conn,
 7243:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 7244:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 7245:         )
 7246:         resolved_anchors = _resolve_engine3_canonical_anchors(
 7247:             conn,
 7248:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 7249:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 7250:             canonical_anchors=canonical_anchors,
 7251:         )
 7252:         canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256 = _engine3_lineage_anchor_sha256(resolved_anchors)
 7253:         input_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine3_execution_input_fingerprint(
 7254:             action_type=normalized_action_type,
 7255:             module_template_refs_json=normalized_module_refs,
 7256:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256=canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7257:             canonical_anchors_json=resolved_anchors,
 7258:             action_scope_json=normalized_scope,
 7259:             deterministic_config_json=normalized_config,
 7260:         )
 7261:         artifact_refs_payload: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 7262:         replay_bundle_hash = compute_engine3_replay_bundle_hash(
 7263:             input_fingerprint_sha256=input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7264:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256=canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7265:             action_scope_json=normalized_scope,
 7266:             output_fingerprint_sha256="",
 7267:             artifact_refs_json=artifact_refs_payload,
 7268:         )
 7269: 
 7270:         existing = conn.execute(
 7271:             """
 7272:             SELECT
 7273:                 id,
 7274:                 tenant_id,
 7275:                 workspace_id,
 7276:                 action_type,
 7277:                 action_scope_json,
 7278:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7279:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 7280:                 module_template_refs_json,
 7281:                 deterministic_config_json,
 7282:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7283:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7284:                 artifact_refs_json,
 7285:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 7286:                 status,
 7287:                 failure_code,
 7288:                 failure_details_json,
 7289:                 created_at,
 7290:                 started_at,
 7291:                 completed_at
 7292:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 7293:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 7294:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7295:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 7296:             ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
 7297:             LIMIT 1
 7298:             """,
 7299:             (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, input_fingerprint_sha256),
 7300:         ).fetchone()
 7301:         if existing:
 7302:             return dict(existing), False
 7303: 
 7304:         run_id = f"e3run_{uuid4().hex}"
 7305:         now = utc_now_iso()
 7306:         try:
 7307:             conn.execute(
 7308:                 """
 7309:                 INSERT INTO e3_execution_runs (
 7310:                     id,
 7311:                     tenant_id,
 7312:                     workspace_id,
 7313:                     action_type,
 7314:                     action_scope_json,
 7315:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7316:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 7317:                     module_template_refs_json,
 7318:                     deterministic_config_json,
 7319:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7320:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7321:                     artifact_refs_json,
 7322:                     replay_bundle_hash,
 7323:                     status,
 7324:                     failure_code,
 7325:                     failure_details_json,
 7326:                     created_at,
 7327:                     started_at,
 7328:                     completed_at
 7329:                 )
 7330:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, ?, ?, 'QUEUED', NULL, NULL, ?, NULL, NULL)
 7331:                 """,
 7332:                 (
 7333:                     run_id,
 7334:                     normalized_tenant,
 7335:                     normalized_workspace,
 7336:                     normalized_action_type,
 7337:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_scope),
 7338:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7339:                     _canonical_json_text(resolved_anchors),
 7340:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_module_refs),
 7341:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_config),
 7342:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7343:                     _canonical_json_text(artifact_refs_payload),
 7344:                     replay_bundle_hash,
 7345:                     now,
 7346:                 ),
 7347:             )
 7348:             _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 7349:                 conn,
 7350:                 execution_run_id=run_id,
 7351:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 7352:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 7353:                 event_type="RUN_CREATED",
 7354:                 from_status=None,
 7355:                 to_status="QUEUED",
 7356:                 event_payload_json={"status": "QUEUED"},
 7357:                 actor_type="SYSTEM",
 7358:                 actor_id="engine3_system",
 7359:                 created_at=now,
 7360:             )
 7361:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
 7362:             conflict = conn.execute(
 7363:                 """
 7364:                 SELECT
 7365:                     id,
 7366:                     tenant_id,
 7367:                     workspace_id,
 7368:                     action_type,
 7369:                     action_scope_json,
 7370:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7371:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 7372:                     module_template_refs_json,
 7373:                     deterministic_config_json,
 7374:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7375:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7376:                     artifact_refs_json,
 7377:                     replay_bundle_hash,
 7378:                     status,
 7379:                     failure_code,
 7380:                     failure_details_json,
 7381:                     created_at,
 7382:                     started_at,
 7383:                     completed_at
 7384:                 FROM e3_execution_runs
 7385:                 WHERE tenant_id = ?
 7386:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 7387:                   AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 7388:                 LIMIT 1
 7389:                 """,
 7390:                 (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, input_fingerprint_sha256),
 7391:             ).fetchone()
 7392:             if conflict:
 7393:                 return dict(conflict), False
 7394:             raise
 7395:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 7396:             message = str(exc).lower()
 7397:             if "unique" in message or "duplicate" in message:
 7398:                 conflict = conn.execute(
 7399:                     """
 7400:                     SELECT
 7401:                         id,
 7402:                         tenant_id,
 7403:                         workspace_id,
 7404:                         action_type,
 7405:                         action_scope_json,
 7406:                         canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7407:                         canonical_anchors_json,
 7408:                         module_template_refs_json,
 7409:                         deterministic_config_json,
 7410:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7411:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7412:                         artifact_refs_json,
 7413:                         replay_bundle_hash,
 7414:                         status,
 7415:                         failure_code,
 7416:                         failure_details_json,
 7417:                         created_at,
 7418:                         started_at,
 7419:                         completed_at
 7420:                     FROM e3_execution_runs
 7421:                     WHERE tenant_id = ?
 7422:                       AND workspace_id = ?
 7423:                       AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 7424:                     LIMIT 1
 7425:                     """,
 7426:                     (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, input_fingerprint_sha256),
 7427:                 ).fetchone()
 7428:                 if conflict:
 7429:                     return dict(conflict), False
 7430:             raise
 7431: 
 7432:         created = conn.execute(
 7433:             """
 7434:             SELECT
 7435:                 id,
 7436:                 tenant_id,
 7437:                 workspace_id,
 7438:                 action_type,
 7439:                 action_scope_json,
 7440:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7441:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 7442:                 module_template_refs_json,
 7443:                 deterministic_config_json,
 7444:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7445:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7446:                 artifact_refs_json,
 7447:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 7448:                 status,
 7449:                 failure_code,
 7450:                 failure_details_json,
 7451:                 created_at,
 7452:                 started_at,
 7453:                 completed_at
 7454:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 7455:             WHERE id = ?
 7456:               AND tenant_id = ?
 7457:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7458:             LIMIT 1
 7459:             """,
 7460:             (run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 7461:         ).fetchone()
 7462:         if not created:
 7463:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution run was not persisted.")
 7464:         return dict(created), True
 7465: 
 7466: 
 7467: 
 7468: def append_engine3_execution_event(
 7469:     *,
 7470:     tenant_id: str,
 7471:     workspace_id: str,
 7472:     execution_run_id: str,
 7473:     event_type: str,
 7474:     from_status: str | None = None,
 7475:     to_status: str | None = None,
 7476:     event_payload_json: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7477:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
 7478:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
 7479: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 7480:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 7481:     if not event_columns:
 7482:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution event schema is not available.")
 7483: 
 7484:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 7485:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 7486:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
 7487:     normalized_event_type = _normalize_engine3_execution_event_type(event_type, field_name="event_type")
 7488:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
 7489:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
 7490:     normalized_payload = _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(
 7491:         event_payload_json,
 7492:         field_name="event_payload_json",
 7493:     )
 7494:     normalized_from = (
 7495:         _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(from_status, field_name="from_status")
 7496:         if from_status is not None
 7497:         else None
 7498:     )
 7499:     normalized_to = (
 7500:         _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
 7501:         if to_status is not None
 7502:         else None
 7503:     )
 7504: 
 7505:     with get_conn() as conn:
 7506:         run_row = conn.execute(
 7507:             """
 7508:             SELECT id, tenant_id, workspace_id
 7509:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 7510:             WHERE id = ?
 7511:             LIMIT 1
 7512:             """,
 7513:             (normalized_run_id,),
 7514:         ).fetchone()
 7515:         if not run_row:
 7516:             raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
 7517:         run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 7518:         run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 7519:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 7520:             raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 7521: 
 7522:         event_id = _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 7523:             conn,
 7524:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 7525:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 7526:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 7527:             event_type=normalized_event_type,
 7528:             from_status=normalized_from,
 7529:             to_status=normalized_to,
 7530:             event_payload_json=normalized_payload,
 7531:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
 7532:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
 7533:         )
 7534:         row = conn.execute(
 7535:             """
 7536:             SELECT
 7537:                 id,
 7538:                 execution_run_id,
 7539:                 tenant_id,
 7540:                 workspace_id,
 7541:                 event_seq,
 7542:                 event_type,
 7543:                 from_status,
 7544:                 to_status,
 7545:                 event_payload_json,
 7546:                 actor_type,
 7547:                 actor_id,
 7548:                 created_at
 7549:             FROM e3_execution_events
 7550:             WHERE id = ?
 7551:               AND execution_run_id = ?
 7552:               AND tenant_id = ?
 7553:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7554:             LIMIT 1
 7555:             """,
 7556:             (event_id, normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 7557:         ).fetchone()
 7558:         if not row:
 7559:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution event was not persisted.")
 7560:         return dict(row)
 7561: 
 7562: 
 7563: def transition_engine3_execution_run_status(
 7564:     *,
 7565:     tenant_id: str,
 7566:     workspace_id: str,
 7567:     execution_run_id: str,
 7568:     to_status: str,
 7569:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
 7570:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
 7571:     failure_code: str | None = None,
 7572:     failure_details_json: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7573: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 7574:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_runs")
 7575:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 7576:     if not run_columns or not event_columns:
 7577:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution schema is not available.")
 7578: 
 7579:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 7580:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 7581:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
 7582:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
 7583:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
 7584:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
 7585:     normalized_failure_details = (
 7586:         _normalize_engine3_optional_json_object(failure_details_json, field_name="failure_details_json")
 7587:         if failure_details_json is not None
 7588:         else None
 7589:     )
 7590:     normalized_failure_code = (
 7591:         _normalize_required_text(failure_code, field_name="failure_code") if failure_code else None
 7592:     )
 7593: 
 7594:     with get_conn() as conn:
 7595:         run_row = conn.execute(
 7596:             """
 7597:             SELECT
 7598:                 id,
 7599:                 tenant_id,
 7600:                 workspace_id,
 7601:                 status,
 7602:                 started_at,
 7603:                 completed_at
 7604:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 7605:             WHERE id = ?
 7606:             LIMIT 1
 7607:             """,
 7608:             (normalized_run_id,),
 7609:         ).fetchone()
 7610:         if not run_row:
 7611:             raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
 7612:         run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 7613:         run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 7614:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 7615:             raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 7616: 
 7617:         from_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
 7618:         if from_status == normalized_to_status:
 7619:             refreshed = conn.execute(
 7620:                 """
 7621:                 SELECT
 7622:                     id,
 7623:                     tenant_id,
 7624:                     workspace_id,
 7625:                     action_type,
 7626:                     action_scope_json,
 7627:                     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7628:                     canonical_anchors_json,
 7629:                     module_template_refs_json,
 7630:                     deterministic_config_json,
 7631:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7632:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7633:                     artifact_refs_json,
 7634:                     replay_bundle_hash,
 7635:                     status,
 7636:                     failure_code,
 7637:                     failure_details_json,
 7638:                     created_at,
 7639:                     started_at,
 7640:                     completed_at
 7641:                 FROM e3_execution_runs
 7642:                 WHERE id = ?
 7643:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 7644:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 7645:                 LIMIT 1
 7646:                 """,
 7647:                 (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 7648:             ).fetchone()
 7649:             if not refreshed:
 7650:                 raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution run became unavailable.")
 7651:             return dict(refreshed), False
 7652: 
 7653:         allowed = ENGINE3_EXECUTION_RUN_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(from_status, set())
 7654:         if normalized_to_status not in allowed:
 7655:             raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow transition.")
 7656: 
 7657:         now = utc_now_iso()
 7658:         started_at = str(run_row["started_at"] or "").strip() or None
 7659:         completed_at = str(run_row["completed_at"] or "").strip() or None
 7660:         failure_code_value: str | None = None
 7661:         failure_details_value: str | None = None
 7662: 
 7663:         if normalized_to_status == "RUNNING":
 7664:             if started_at is None:
 7665:                 started_at = now
 7666:             completed_at = None
 7667:         elif normalized_to_status in {"DRAFT_READY", "PARTIAL_SUCCESS", "CANCELLED"}:
 7668:             if started_at is None:
 7669:                 started_at = now
 7670:             completed_at = now
 7671:         elif normalized_to_status == "FAILED":
 7672:             if started_at is None:
 7673:                 started_at = now
 7674:             completed_at = now
 7675:             failure_code_value = normalized_failure_code or "UNSPECIFIED_FAILURE"
 7676:             failure_details_value = _canonical_json_text(normalized_failure_details or {})
 7677: 
 7678:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 7679:             """
 7680:             UPDATE e3_execution_runs
 7681:             SET status = ?,
 7682:                 failure_code = ?,
 7683:                 failure_details_json = ?,
 7684:                 started_at = ?,
 7685:                 completed_at = ?
 7686:             WHERE id = ?
 7687:               AND tenant_id = ?
 7688:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7689:               AND status = ?
 7690:             """,
 7691:             (
 7692:                 normalized_to_status,
 7693:                 failure_code_value,
 7694:                 failure_details_value,
 7695:                 started_at,
 7696:                 completed_at,
 7697:                 normalized_run_id,
 7698:                 normalized_tenant,
 7699:                 normalized_workspace,
 7700:                 from_status,
 7701:             ),
 7702:         )
 7703:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 7704:             raise RuntimeError("execution_run status transition failed.")
 7705: 
 7706:         transition_payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
 7707:         if failure_code_value:
 7708:             transition_payload["failure_code"] = failure_code_value
 7709:         if normalized_failure_details is not None:
 7710:             transition_payload["failure_details_json"] = normalized_failure_details
 7711:         _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 7712:             conn,
 7713:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 7714:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 7715:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 7716:             event_type="STATUS_TRANSITION",
 7717:             from_status=from_status,
 7718:             to_status=normalized_to_status,
 7719:             event_payload_json=transition_payload,
 7720:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
 7721:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
 7722:             created_at=now,
 7723:         )
 7724: 
 7725:         updated = conn.execute(
 7726:             """
 7727:             SELECT
 7728:                 id,
 7729:                 tenant_id,
 7730:                 workspace_id,
 7731:                 action_type,
 7732:                 action_scope_json,
 7733:                 canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
 7734:                 canonical_anchors_json,
 7735:                 module_template_refs_json,
 7736:                 deterministic_config_json,
 7737:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
 7738:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 7739:                 artifact_refs_json,
 7740:                 replay_bundle_hash,
 7741:                 status,
 7742:                 failure_code,
 7743:                 failure_details_json,
 7744:                 created_at,
 7745:                 started_at,
 7746:                 completed_at
 7747:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 7748:             WHERE id = ?
 7749:               AND tenant_id = ?
 7750:               AND workspace_id = ?
 7751:             LIMIT 1
 7752:             """,
 7753:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 7754:         ).fetchone()
 7755:         if not updated:
 7756:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 execution run became unavailable after transition.")
 7757:         return dict(updated), True
 7758: 
 7759: 
 7760: def _normalize_engine3_je_draft_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 7761:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 7762:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_JE_DRAFT_STATUSES:
 7763:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_JE_DRAFT_STATUSES)
 7764:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 7765:     return normalized
 7766: 
 7767: 
 7768: def _normalize_engine3_je_date(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 7769:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name)
 7770:     if not re.match(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$", normalized):
 7771:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must use YYYY-MM-DD format.")
 7772:     try:
 7773:         datetime.strptime(normalized, "%Y-%m-%d")
 7774:     except ValueError as exc:
 7775:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a valid calendar date.") from exc
 7776:     return normalized
 7777: 
 7778: 
 7779: def _normalize_engine3_je_text(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 7780:     if not isinstance(value, str):
 7781:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a string.")
 7782:     return value.strip()
 7783: 
 7784: 
 7785: def _normalize_engine3_je_amount(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> Decimal:
 7786:     if isinstance(value, bool):
 7787:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be numeric.")
 7788:     try:
 7789:         normalized = Decimal(str(value)).quantize(ENGINE3_JE_AMOUNT_QUANTUM, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
 7790:     except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
 7791:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be numeric.") from exc
 7792:     if normalized < Decimal("0"):
 7793:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be greater than or equal to 0.")
 7794:     return normalized
 7795: 
 7796: 
 7797: def _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(value: Decimal) -> str:
 7798:     return format(value.quantize(ENGINE3_JE_AMOUNT_QUANTUM, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP), ".2f")
 7799: 
 7800: 
 7801: def _normalize_engine3_je_dimensions(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 7802:     dimensions = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name=field_name)
 7803:     canonical = _canonical_json_text(dimensions)
 7804:     return json.loads(canonical)
 7805: 
 7806: 
 7807: def _normalize_engine3_je_line(
 7808:     line_payload: Any,
 7809:     *,
 7810:     index: int,
 7811: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], tuple[str, str, str, str, str], Decimal, Decimal]:
 7812:     field_prefix = f"je_draft_json.lines[{index}]"
 7813:     line = _normalize_engine3_json_object(line_payload, field_name=field_prefix)
 7814:     line_keys = set(line.keys())
 7815:     allowed_line_keys = set(ENGINE3_JE_LINE_KEYS)
 7816:     unknown_line_keys = sorted(line_keys - allowed_line_keys)
 7817:     missing_line_keys = sorted(allowed_line_keys - line_keys)
 7818:     if unknown_line_keys or missing_line_keys:
 7819:         raise ValueError("INVALID_JE_SCHEMA: je_draft_json line object keys are invalid.")
 7820: 
 7821:     account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 7822:         line.get("account_code"),
 7823:         field_name=f"{field_prefix}.account_code",
 7824:     )
 7825:     line_memo = _normalize_engine3_je_text(line.get("memo"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.memo")
 7826:     dimensions = _normalize_engine3_je_dimensions(
 7827:         line.get("dimensions"),
 7828:         field_name=f"{field_prefix}.dimensions",
 7829:     )
 7830: 
 7831:     debit = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(line.get("debit"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.debit")
 7832:     credit = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(line.get("credit"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.credit")
 7833:     debit_positive = debit > Decimal("0")
 7834:     credit_positive = credit > Decimal("0")
 7835:     if debit_positive == credit_positive:
 7836:         raise ValueError(
 7837:             "INVALID_JE_SCHEMA: exactly one of debit or credit must be greater than 0 for each JE line."
 7838:         )
 7839: 
 7840:     debit_text = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(debit)
 7841:     credit_text = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(credit)
 7842:     debit_credit_flag = "D" if debit_positive else "C"
 7843:     normalized_amount = debit_text if debit_positive else credit_text
 7844:     canonical_dimension_tuple = _canonical_json_text(dimensions)
 7845: 
 7846:     normalized_line = {
 7847:         "account_code": account_code,
 7848:         "debit": debit_text,
 7849:         "credit": credit_text,
 7850:         "memo": line_memo,
 7851:         "dimensions": dimensions,
 7852:     }
 7853:     sort_key = (
 7854:         account_code,
 7855:         debit_credit_flag,
 7856:         normalized_amount,
 7857:         canonical_dimension_tuple,
 7858:         line_memo,
 7859:     )
 7860:     return normalized_line, sort_key, debit, credit
 7861: 
 7862: 
 7863: def _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(je_draft_json: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 7864:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(je_draft_json, field_name="je_draft_json")
 7865:     payload_keys = set(payload.keys())
 7866:     allowed_root_keys = set(ENGINE3_JE_ROOT_KEYS)
 7867:     unknown_root_keys = sorted(payload_keys - allowed_root_keys)
 7868:     missing_root_keys = sorted(allowed_root_keys - payload_keys)
 7869:     if unknown_root_keys or missing_root_keys:
 7870:         raise ValueError("INVALID_JE_SCHEMA: je_draft_json root keys are invalid.")
 7871: 
 7872:     journal_date = _normalize_engine3_je_date(payload.get("journal_date"), field_name="je_draft_json.journal_date")
 7873:     currency = _normalize_engine3_currency_code(payload.get("currency"), field_name="je_draft_json.currency")
 7874:     memo = _normalize_engine3_je_text(payload.get("memo"), field_name="je_draft_json.memo")
 7875:     raw_lines = payload.get("lines")
 7876:     if not isinstance(raw_lines, list) or not raw_lines:
 7877:         raise ValueError("INVALID_JE_SCHEMA: je_draft_json.lines must be a non-empty array.")
 7878: 
 7879:     normalized_with_sort: list[tuple[dict[str, Any], tuple[str, str, str, str, str], Decimal, Decimal]] = []
 7880:     debit_total = Decimal("0.00")
 7881:     credit_total = Decimal("0.00")
 7882:     for index, line_payload in enumerate(raw_lines):
 7883:         normalized_line, sort_key, debit, credit = _normalize_engine3_je_line(line_payload, index=index)
 7884:         normalized_with_sort.append((normalized_line, sort_key, debit, credit))
 7885:         debit_total += debit
 7886:         credit_total += credit
 7887: 
 7888:     if debit_total != credit_total:
 7889:         raise RuntimeError("JE_NOT_BALANCED")
 7890: 
 7891:     normalized_lines = [
 7892:         item[0]
 7893:         for item in sorted(
 7894:             normalized_with_sort,
 7895:             key=lambda row: row[1],
 7896:         )
 7897:     ]
 7898:     return {
 7899:         "journal_date": journal_date,
 7900:         "currency": currency,
 7901:         "lines": normalized_lines,
 7902:         "memo": memo,
 7903:     }
 7904: 
 7905: 
 7906: def _engine3_je_output_fingerprint_from_normalized(je_draft_json: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 7907:     payload = {
 7908:         "journal_date": je_draft_json["journal_date"],
 7909:         "currency": je_draft_json["currency"],
 7910:         "lines": je_draft_json["lines"],
 7911:         "memo": je_draft_json["memo"],
 7912:     }
 7913:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 7914: 
 7915: 
 7916: def _normalize_engine3_je_fingerprint_context(
 7917:     value: dict[str, Any] | None,
 7918: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 7919:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
 7920:         value or {},
 7921:         field_name="fingerprint_context",
 7922:     )
 7923: 
 7924:     source_candidate_type_raw = str(payload.get("source_candidate_type") or "").strip().upper()
 7925:     source_candidate_type = source_candidate_type_raw or None
 7926:     source_candidate_id_raw = str(payload.get("source_candidate_id") or "").strip()
 7927:     source_candidate_id = source_candidate_id_raw or None
 7928:     candidate_fp = str(payload.get("candidate_output_fingerprint_sha256") or "").strip().lower()
 7929:     config_hash = str(payload.get("config_hash_sha256") or "").strip().lower()
 7930:     mapping_hash = str(payload.get("mapping_snapshot_hash_sha256") or "").strip().lower()
 7931: 
 7932:     normalized: dict[str, Any] = {
 7933:         "source_candidate_type": source_candidate_type,
 7934:         "source_candidate_id": source_candidate_id,
 7935:         "candidate_output_fingerprint_sha256": (
 7936:             _normalize_engine1_hash(candidate_fp, field_name="fingerprint_context.candidate_output_fingerprint_sha256")
 7937:             if candidate_fp
 7938:             else None
 7939:         ),
 7940:         "config_hash_sha256": (
 7941:             _normalize_engine1_hash(config_hash, field_name="fingerprint_context.config_hash_sha256")
 7942:             if config_hash
 7943:             else None
 7944:         ),
 7945:         "mapping_snapshot_hash_sha256": (
 7946:             _normalize_engine1_hash(mapping_hash, field_name="fingerprint_context.mapping_snapshot_hash_sha256")
 7947:             if mapping_hash
 7948:             else None
 7949:         ),
 7950:         "journal_date": (
 7951:             _normalize_engine3_je_date(payload.get("journal_date"), field_name="fingerprint_context.journal_date")
 7952:             if str(payload.get("journal_date") or "").strip()
 7953:             else None
 7954:         ),
 7955:         "currency": (
 7956:             _normalize_engine3_currency_code(payload.get("currency"), field_name="fingerprint_context.currency")
 7957:             if str(payload.get("currency") or "").strip()
 7958:             else None
 7959:         ),
 7960:     }
 7961:     return normalized
 7962: 
 7963: 
 7964: def compute_engine3_je_output_fingerprint(
 7965:     je_draft_json: dict[str, Any],
 7966:     *,
 7967:     fingerprint_context: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7968: ) -> str:
 7969:     normalized = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(je_draft_json)
 7970:     base_fingerprint = _engine3_je_output_fingerprint_from_normalized(normalized)
 7971:     if not fingerprint_context:
 7972:         return base_fingerprint
 7973:     normalized_context = _normalize_engine3_je_fingerprint_context(fingerprint_context)
 7974:     if not any(value is not None for value in normalized_context.values()):
 7975:         return base_fingerprint
 7976:     payload = {
 7977:         "legacy_output_fingerprint_sha256": base_fingerprint,
 7978:         "journal_date": normalized["journal_date"],
 7979:         "currency": normalized["currency"],
 7980:         "normalized_line_structure": normalized["lines"],
 7981:         "fingerprint_context": normalized_context,
 7982:     }
 7983:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 7984: 
 7985: 
 7986: def create_engine3_je_draft(
 7987:     *,
 7988:     tenant_id: str,
 7989:     workspace_id: str,
 7990:     execution_run_id: str,
 7991:     je_draft_json: dict[str, Any],
 7992:     fingerprint_context: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 7993:     emit_execution_event: bool = True,
 7994: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 7995:     draft_columns = list_table_columns("e3_je_drafts")
 7996:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 7997:     if not draft_columns:
 7998:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft schema is not available.")
 7999:     if emit_execution_event and not event_columns:
 8000:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft schema is not available.")
 8001: 
 8002:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 8003:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 8004:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
 8005:     normalized_je = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(je_draft_json)
 8006:     output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine3_je_output_fingerprint(
 8007:         normalized_je,
 8008:         fingerprint_context=fingerprint_context,
 8009:     )
 8010: 
 8011:     with get_conn() as conn:
 8012:         run_row = conn.execute(
 8013:             """
 8014:             SELECT id, tenant_id, workspace_id, status
 8015:             FROM e3_execution_runs
 8016:             WHERE id = ?
 8017:             LIMIT 1
 8018:             """,
 8019:             (normalized_run_id,),
 8020:         ).fetchone()
 8021:         if not run_row:
 8022:             raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
 8023:         run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 8024:         run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 8025:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 8026:             raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 8027:         run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
 8028:         if run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
 8029:             raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow JE draft creation.")
 8030: 
 8031:         existing = conn.execute(
 8032:             """
 8033:             SELECT
 8034:                 id,
 8035:                 execution_run_id,
 8036:                 tenant_id,
 8037:                 workspace_id,
 8038:                 je_draft_json,
 8039:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8040:                 status,
 8041:                 created_at,
 8042:                 approved_at,
 8043:                 rejected_at
 8044:             FROM e3_je_drafts
 8045:             WHERE execution_run_id = ?
 8046:               AND tenant_id = ?
 8047:               AND workspace_id = ?
 8048:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 8049:             ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
 8050:             LIMIT 1
 8051:             """,
 8052:             (
 8053:                 normalized_run_id,
 8054:                 normalized_tenant,
 8055:                 normalized_workspace,
 8056:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8057:             ),
 8058:         ).fetchone()
 8059:         if existing:
 8060:             return dict(existing), False
 8061: 
 8062:         draft_id = str(uuid4())
 8063:         now = utc_now_iso()
 8064:         try:
 8065:             conn.execute(
 8066:                 """
 8067:                 INSERT INTO e3_je_drafts (
 8068:                     id,
 8069:                     execution_run_id,
 8070:                     tenant_id,
 8071:                     workspace_id,
 8072:                     je_draft_json,
 8073:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8074:                     status,
 8075:                     created_at,
 8076:                     approved_at,
 8077:                     rejected_at
 8078:                 )
 8079:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'DRAFT', ?, NULL, NULL)
 8080:                 """,
 8081:                 (
 8082:                     draft_id,
 8083:                     normalized_run_id,
 8084:                     normalized_tenant,
 8085:                     normalized_workspace,
 8086:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_je),
 8087:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8088:                     now,
 8089:                 ),
 8090:             )
 8091:             if emit_execution_event:
 8092:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 8093:                     conn,
 8094:                     execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 8095:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 8096:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 8097:                     event_type="JE_DRAFT_CREATED",
 8098:                     event_payload_json={
 8099:                         "je_draft_id": draft_id,
 8100:                         "status": "DRAFT",
 8101:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8102:                     },
 8103:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
 8104:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
 8105:                     created_at=now,
 8106:                 )
 8107:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
 8108:             conflict = conn.execute(
 8109:                 """
 8110:                 SELECT
 8111:                     id,
 8112:                     execution_run_id,
 8113:                     tenant_id,
 8114:                     workspace_id,
 8115:                     je_draft_json,
 8116:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8117:                     status,
 8118:                     created_at,
 8119:                     approved_at,
 8120:                     rejected_at
 8121:                 FROM e3_je_drafts
 8122:                 WHERE execution_run_id = ?
 8123:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 8124:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 8125:                   AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 8126:                 LIMIT 1
 8127:                 """,
 8128:                 (
 8129:                     normalized_run_id,
 8130:                     normalized_tenant,
 8131:                     normalized_workspace,
 8132:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8133:                 ),
 8134:             ).fetchone()
 8135:             if conflict:
 8136:                 return dict(conflict), False
 8137:             raise
 8138:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 8139:             message = str(exc).lower()
 8140:             if "unique" in message or "duplicate" in message:
 8141:                 conflict = conn.execute(
 8142:                     """
 8143:                     SELECT
 8144:                         id,
 8145:                         execution_run_id,
 8146:                         tenant_id,
 8147:                         workspace_id,
 8148:                         je_draft_json,
 8149:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8150:                         status,
 8151:                         created_at,
 8152:                         approved_at,
 8153:                         rejected_at
 8154:                     FROM e3_je_drafts
 8155:                     WHERE execution_run_id = ?
 8156:                       AND tenant_id = ?
 8157:                       AND workspace_id = ?
 8158:                       AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 8159:                     LIMIT 1
 8160:                     """,
 8161:                     (
 8162:                         normalized_run_id,
 8163:                         normalized_tenant,
 8164:                         normalized_workspace,
 8165:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8166:                     ),
 8167:                 ).fetchone()
 8168:                 if conflict:
 8169:                     return dict(conflict), False
 8170:             raise
 8171: 
 8172:         created = conn.execute(
 8173:             """
 8174:             SELECT
 8175:                 id,
 8176:                 execution_run_id,
 8177:                 tenant_id,
 8178:                 workspace_id,
 8179:                 je_draft_json,
 8180:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8181:                 status,
 8182:                 created_at,
 8183:                 approved_at,
 8184:                 rejected_at
 8185:             FROM e3_je_drafts
 8186:             WHERE id = ?
 8187:               AND tenant_id = ?
 8188:               AND workspace_id = ?
 8189:             LIMIT 1
 8190:             """,
 8191:             (draft_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 8192:         ).fetchone()
 8193:         if not created:
 8194:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft was not persisted.")
 8195:         return dict(created), True
 8196: 
 8197: 
 8198: def transition_engine3_je_status(
 8199:     *,
 8200:     tenant_id: str,
 8201:     workspace_id: str,
 8202:     je_draft_id: str,
 8203:     to_status: str,
 8204:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
 8205:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
 8206:     emit_execution_event: bool = True,
 8207: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
 8208:     draft_columns = list_table_columns("e3_je_drafts")
 8209:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 8210:     if not draft_columns:
 8211:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft schema is not available.")
 8212:     if emit_execution_event and not event_columns:
 8213:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft schema is not available.")
 8214: 
 8215:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 8216:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 8217:     normalized_je_draft_id = _normalize_required_text(je_draft_id, field_name="je_draft_id")
 8218:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
 8219:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
 8220:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
 8221: 
 8222:     with get_conn() as conn:
 8223:         row = conn.execute(
 8224:             """
 8225:             SELECT
 8226:                 id,
 8227:                 execution_run_id,
 8228:                 tenant_id,
 8229:                 workspace_id,
 8230:                 status
 8231:             FROM e3_je_drafts
 8232:             WHERE id = ?
 8233:             LIMIT 1
 8234:             """,
 8235:             (normalized_je_draft_id,),
 8236:         ).fetchone()
 8237:         if not row:
 8238:             raise LookupError("je_draft_id was not found.")
 8239:         row_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 8240:         row_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 8241:         if row_tenant != normalized_tenant or row_workspace != normalized_workspace:
 8242:             raise PermissionError("je_draft_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 8243: 
 8244:         from_status = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
 8245:         if from_status == normalized_to_status:
 8246:             current = conn.execute(
 8247:                 """
 8248:                 SELECT
 8249:                     id,
 8250:                     execution_run_id,
 8251:                     tenant_id,
 8252:                     workspace_id,
 8253:                     je_draft_json,
 8254:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8255:                     status,
 8256:                     created_at,
 8257:                     approved_at,
 8258:                     rejected_at
 8259:                 FROM e3_je_drafts
 8260:                 WHERE id = ?
 8261:                 LIMIT 1
 8262:                 """,
 8263:                 (normalized_je_draft_id,),
 8264:             ).fetchone()
 8265:             if not current:
 8266:                 raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft became unavailable.")
 8267:             return dict(current), False
 8268: 
 8269:         allowed = ENGINE3_JE_DRAFT_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(from_status, set())
 8270:         if normalized_to_status not in allowed:
 8271:             raise RuntimeError("je_draft status does not allow transition.")
 8272: 
 8273:         now = utc_now_iso()
 8274:         approved_at = now if normalized_to_status == "APPROVED" else None
 8275:         rejected_at = now if normalized_to_status == "REJECTED" else None
 8276:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
 8277:             """
 8278:             UPDATE e3_je_drafts
 8279:             SET status = ?,
 8280:                 approved_at = ?,
 8281:                 rejected_at = ?
 8282:             WHERE id = ?
 8283:               AND tenant_id = ?
 8284:               AND workspace_id = ?
 8285:               AND status = ?
 8286:             """,
 8287:             (
 8288:                 normalized_to_status,
 8289:                 approved_at,
 8290:                 rejected_at,
 8291:                 normalized_je_draft_id,
 8292:                 normalized_tenant,
 8293:                 normalized_workspace,
 8294:                 from_status,
 8295:             ),
 8296:         )
 8297:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
 8298:             raise RuntimeError("je_draft status transition failed.")
 8299: 
 8300:         execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id")
 8301:         if emit_execution_event:
 8302:             _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 8303:                 conn,
 8304:                 execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
 8305:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 8306:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 8307:                 event_type="JE_STATUS_TRANSITION",
 8308:                 event_payload_json={
 8309:                     "je_draft_id": normalized_je_draft_id,
 8310:                     "from_status": from_status,
 8311:                     "to_status": normalized_to_status,
 8312:                 },
 8313:                 actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
 8314:                 actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
 8315:                 created_at=now,
 8316:             )
 8317: 
 8318:         updated = conn.execute(
 8319:             """
 8320:             SELECT
 8321:                 id,
 8322:                 execution_run_id,
 8323:                 tenant_id,
 8324:                 workspace_id,
 8325:                 je_draft_json,
 8326:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 8327:                 status,
 8328:                 created_at,
 8329:                 approved_at,
 8330:                 rejected_at
 8331:             FROM e3_je_drafts
 8332:             WHERE id = ?
 8333:               AND tenant_id = ?
 8334:               AND workspace_id = ?
 8335:             LIMIT 1
 8336:             """,
 8337:             (normalized_je_draft_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 8338:         ).fetchone()
 8339:         if not updated:
 8340:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 JE draft became unavailable after transition.")
 8341:         return dict(updated), True
 8342: 
 8343: 
 8344: def _normalize_engine3_accrual_type(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 8345:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 8346:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_TYPES:
 8347:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_TYPES)
 8348:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 8349:     return normalized
 8350: 
 8351: 
 8352: def _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 8353:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 8354:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_STATUSES:
 8355:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_STATUSES)
 8356:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 8357:     return normalized
 8358: 
 8359: 
 8360: def _normalize_engine3_account_mapping_type(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 8361:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 8362:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_ACCOUNT_MAPPING_TYPES:
 8363:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_ACCOUNT_MAPPING_TYPES)
 8364:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 8365:     return normalized
 8366:

 8368: def _normalize_engine3_accrual_source_reference_json(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8369:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name="source_reference_json")
 8370:     allowed_keys = set(ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_SOURCE_REFERENCE_KEYS)
 8371:     payload_keys = set(payload.keys())
 8372:     if sorted(payload_keys - allowed_keys) or sorted(allowed_keys - payload_keys):
 8373:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json must include only required keys.")
 8374: 
 8375:     period_key = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("period_key"), field_name="source_reference_json.period_key")
 8376:     entity_code = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("entity_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.entity_code")
 8377:     source_account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 8378:         payload.get("source_account_code"),
 8379:         field_name="source_reference_json.source_account_code",
 8380:     )
 8381:     related_account_family = _normalize_required_text(
 8382:         payload.get("related_account_family"),
 8383:         field_name="source_reference_json.related_account_family",
 8384:     ).upper()
 8385:     if related_account_family not in {"PAYABLE", "RECEIVABLE"}:
 8386:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.related_account_family must be PAYABLE or RECEIVABLE.")
 8387: 
 8388:     canonical_run_ids_raw = payload.get("canonical_run_ids")
 8389:     if not isinstance(canonical_run_ids_raw, list) or not canonical_run_ids_raw:
 8390:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_run_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8391:     canonical_run_ids = sorted(
 8392:         {
 8393:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="source_reference_json.canonical_run_ids")
 8394:             for item in canonical_run_ids_raw
 8395:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8396:         }
 8397:     )
 8398:     if not canonical_run_ids:
 8399:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_run_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8400: 
 8401:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw = payload.get("canonical_anchor_fingerprints")
 8402:     if not isinstance(canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw, list) or not canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw:
 8403:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8404:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints = sorted(
 8405:         {
 8406:             _normalize_engine1_hash(
 8407:                 item,
 8408:                 field_name="source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints",
 8409:             )
 8410:             for item in canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw
 8411:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8412:         }
 8413:     )
 8414:     if not canonical_anchor_fingerprints:
 8415:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8416: 
 8417:     basis_fact_ids_raw = payload.get("basis_fact_ids")
 8418:     if not isinstance(basis_fact_ids_raw, list) or not basis_fact_ids_raw:
 8419:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8420:     basis_fact_ids = sorted(
 8421:         {
 8422:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids")
 8423:             for item in basis_fact_ids_raw
 8424:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8425:         }
 8426:     )
 8427:     if not basis_fact_ids:
 8428:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8429: 
 8430:     rule_code = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("rule_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.rule_code").upper()
 8431:     if rule_code not in ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_RULE_CODES:
 8432:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.rule_code is invalid.")
 8433: 
 8434:     return {
 8435:         "period_key": period_key,
 8436:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 8437:         "source_account_code": source_account_code,
 8438:         "related_account_family": related_account_family,
 8439:         "canonical_run_ids": canonical_run_ids,
 8440:         "canonical_anchor_fingerprints": canonical_anchor_fingerprints,
 8441:         "basis_fact_ids": basis_fact_ids,
 8442:         "rule_code": rule_code,
 8443:     }

 8446: def _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(
 8447:     value: Any,
 8448:     *,
 8449:     empty_error_code: str = "ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT",
 8450: ) -> list[str]:
 8451:     if not isinstance(value, list):
 8452:         raise ValueError("resolved_canonical_run_ids_json must be an array.")
 8453:     normalized = sorted(
 8454:         {
 8455:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_canonical_run_ids_json")
 8456:             for item in value
 8457:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8458:         }
 8459:     )
 8460:     if not normalized:
 8461:         raise RuntimeError(_normalize_required_text(empty_error_code, field_name="empty_error_code").upper())
 8462:     return normalized

 8481: def _normalize_engine3_reclass_source_reference_json(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8482:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name="source_reference_json")
 8483:     allowed_keys = set(ENGINE3_RECLASS_SOURCE_REFERENCE_KEYS)
 8484:     payload_keys = set(payload.keys())
 8485:     if sorted(payload_keys - allowed_keys) or sorted(allowed_keys - payload_keys):
 8486:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json must include only required keys.")
 8487: 
 8488:     period_key = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("period_key"), field_name="source_reference_json.period_key")
 8489:     entity_code = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("entity_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.entity_code")
 8490:     source_account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 8491:         payload.get("source_account_code"),
 8492:         field_name="source_reference_json.source_account_code",
 8493:     )
 8494:     counterparty_entity_code = str(payload.get("counterparty_entity_code") or "").strip()
 8495:     source_row_ref = str(payload.get("source_row_ref") or "").strip()
 8496:     duplicate_group_key = str(payload.get("duplicate_group_key") or "").strip()
 8497: 
 8498:     canonical_run_ids = _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(
 8499:         payload.get("canonical_run_ids"),
 8500:     )
 8501: 
 8502:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw = payload.get("canonical_anchor_fingerprints")
 8503:     if not isinstance(canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw, list) or not canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw:
 8504:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8505:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints = sorted(
 8506:         {
 8507:             _normalize_engine1_hash(
 8508:                 item,
 8509:                 field_name="source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints",
 8510:             )
 8511:             for item in canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw
 8512:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8513:         }
 8514:     )
 8515:     if not canonical_anchor_fingerprints:
 8516:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8517: 
 8518:     basis_fact_ids_raw = payload.get("basis_fact_ids")
 8519:     if not isinstance(basis_fact_ids_raw, list) or not basis_fact_ids_raw:
 8520:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8521:     basis_fact_ids = sorted(
 8522:         {
 8523:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids")
 8524:             for item in basis_fact_ids_raw
 8525:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8526:         }
 8527:     )
 8528:     if not basis_fact_ids:
 8529:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8530: 
 8531:     allocation_targets_raw = payload.get("allocation_targets")
 8532:     if not isinstance(allocation_targets_raw, list):
 8533:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.allocation_targets must be an array.")
 8534:     allocation_targets: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 8535:     for index, item in enumerate(allocation_targets_raw):
 8536:         if not isinstance(item, dict):
 8537:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.allocation_targets items must be objects.")
 8538:         allowed_target_keys = {"dimension_key", "dimension_value", "allocation_percent"}
 8539:         if sorted(set(item.keys()) - allowed_target_keys) or sorted(allowed_target_keys - set(item.keys())):
 8540:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.allocation_targets items must include only dimension_key, dimension_value, allocation_percent.")
 8541:         allocation_targets.append(
 8542:             {
 8543:                 "dimension_key": _normalize_required_text(
 8544:                     item.get("dimension_key"),
 8545:                     field_name=f"source_reference_json.allocation_targets[{index}].dimension_key",
 8546:                 ),
 8547:                 "dimension_value": _normalize_required_text(
 8548:                     item.get("dimension_value"),
 8549:                     field_name=f"source_reference_json.allocation_targets[{index}].dimension_value",
 8550:                 ),
 8551:                 "allocation_percent": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
 8552:                     _normalize_engine3_je_amount(
 8553:                         item.get("allocation_percent"),
 8554:                         field_name=f"source_reference_json.allocation_targets[{index}].allocation_percent",
 8555:                     )
 8556:                 ),
 8557:             }
 8558:         )
 8559:     allocation_targets.sort(
 8560:         key=lambda row: (
 8561:             row["dimension_key"],
 8562:             row["dimension_value"],
 8563:             row["allocation_percent"],
 8564:         )
 8565:     )
 8566: 
 8567:     rule_code = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("rule_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.rule_code").upper()
 8568:     if rule_code not in ENGINE3_RECLASS_RULE_IDS:
 8569:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.rule_code is invalid.")
 8570: 
 8571:     if rule_code == "INTER_COMPANY_ADJ_V1":
 8572:         if not counterparty_entity_code:
 8573:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.counterparty_entity_code is required for INTER_COMPANY_ADJ.")
 8574:     if rule_code == "COST_REALLOCATION_V1":
 8575:         if not allocation_targets:
 8576:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.allocation_targets is required for COST_REALLOCATION.")
 8577:     if rule_code == "DUPLICATE_CORRECTION_V1":
 8578:         if not duplicate_group_key:
 8579:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.duplicate_group_key is required for DUPLICATE_CORRECTION.")
 8580:         if not source_row_ref:
 8581:             raise ValueError("source_reference_json.source_row_ref is required for DUPLICATE_CORRECTION.")
 8582: 
 8583:     return {
 8584:         "period_key": period_key,
 8585:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 8586:         "source_account_code": source_account_code,
 8587:         "counterparty_entity_code": counterparty_entity_code,
 8588:         "source_row_ref": source_row_ref,
 8589:         "duplicate_group_key": duplicate_group_key,
 8590:         "canonical_run_ids": canonical_run_ids,
 8591:         "canonical_anchor_fingerprints": canonical_anchor_fingerprints,
 8592:         "basis_fact_ids": basis_fact_ids,
 8593:         "allocation_targets": allocation_targets,
 8594:         "rule_code": rule_code,
 8595:     }

 8646: def _normalize_engine3_capex_source_reference_json(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8647:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name="source_reference_json")
 8648:     allowed_keys = set(ENGINE3_CAPEX_SOURCE_REFERENCE_KEYS)
 8649:     payload_keys = set(payload.keys())
 8650:     if sorted(payload_keys - allowed_keys) or sorted(allowed_keys - payload_keys):
 8651:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json must include only required keys.")
 8652: 
 8653:     period_key = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("period_key"), field_name="source_reference_json.period_key")
 8654:     entity_code = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("entity_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.entity_code")
 8655:     source_account_code = _normalize_required_text(
 8656:         payload.get("source_account_code"),
 8657:         field_name="source_reference_json.source_account_code",
 8658:     )
 8659:     source_row_ref = _normalize_required_text(
 8660:         payload.get("source_row_ref"),
 8661:         field_name="source_reference_json.source_row_ref",
 8662:     )
 8663:     canonical_run_ids = _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(
 8664:         payload.get("canonical_run_ids"),
 8665:         empty_error_code="CAPEX_DATA_INSUFFICIENT",
 8666:     )
 8667: 
 8668:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw = payload.get("canonical_anchor_fingerprints")
 8669:     if not isinstance(canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw, list) or not canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw:
 8670:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8671:     canonical_anchor_fingerprints = sorted(
 8672:         {
 8673:             _normalize_engine1_hash(
 8674:                 item,
 8675:                 field_name="source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints",
 8676:             )
 8677:             for item in canonical_anchor_fingerprints_raw
 8678:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8679:         }
 8680:     )
 8681:     if not canonical_anchor_fingerprints:
 8682:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.canonical_anchor_fingerprints must be a non-empty array.")
 8683: 
 8684:     basis_fact_ids_raw = payload.get("basis_fact_ids")
 8685:     if not isinstance(basis_fact_ids_raw, list) or not basis_fact_ids_raw:
 8686:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8687:     basis_fact_ids = sorted(
 8688:         {
 8689:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids")
 8690:             for item in basis_fact_ids_raw
 8691:             if str(item or "").strip()
 8692:         }
 8693:     )
 8694:     if not basis_fact_ids:
 8695:         raise ValueError("source_reference_json.basis_fact_ids must be a non-empty array.")
 8696: 
 8697:     rule_code = _normalize_engine3_capex_rule_code(payload.get("rule_code"), field_name="source_reference_json.rule_code")
 8698:     rule_id = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("rule_id"), field_name="source_reference_json.rule_id")
 8699:     match_type = _normalize_engine3_capex_rule_match_type(payload.get("match_type"), field_name="source_reference_json.match_type")
 8700:     match_value = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("match_value"), field_name="source_reference_json.match_value")
 8701:     classification = _normalize_engine3_capex_rule_classification(
 8702:         payload.get("classification"),
 8703:         field_name="source_reference_json.classification",
 8704:     )
 8705:     target_account_mapping_type = _normalize_engine3_capex_rule_target_mapping_type(
 8706:         payload.get("target_account_mapping_type"),
 8707:         field_name="source_reference_json.target_account_mapping_type",
 8708:     )
 8709: 
 8710:     return {
 8711:         "period_key": period_key,
 8712:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 8713:         "source_account_code": source_account_code,
 8714:         "source_row_ref": source_row_ref,
 8715:         "canonical_run_ids": canonical_run_ids,
 8716:         "canonical_anchor_fingerprints": canonical_anchor_fingerprints,
 8717:         "basis_fact_ids": basis_fact_ids,
 8718:         "rule_code": rule_code,
 8719:         "rule_id": rule_id,
 8720:         "match_type": match_type,
 8721:         "match_value": match_value,
 8722:         "classification": classification,
 8723:         "target_account_mapping_type": target_account_mapping_type,
 8724:     }

 8727: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 8728:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 8729:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_STATUSES:
 8730:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_STATUSES)
 8731:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
 8732:     return normalized

 8735: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_run_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
 8736:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
 8737:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_RUN_STATUSES:
