 8742: 
 8743: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_block(
 8744:     block_payload: Any,
 8745:     *,
 8746:     section_index: int,
 8747:     block_index: int,
 8748: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8749:     field_prefix = f"template_body_json.sections[{section_index}].blocks[{block_index}]"
 8750:     block = _normalize_engine3_json_object(block_payload, field_name=field_prefix)
 8751:     required_keys = {"type", "source", "selector_json", "format_json"}
 8752:     if sorted(set(block.keys()) - required_keys) or sorted(required_keys - set(block.keys())):
 8753:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: block must include only type, source, selector_json, format_json.")
 8754: 
 8755:     block_type = _normalize_required_text(block.get("type"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.type").upper()
 8756:     if block_type not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_BLOCK_TYPES:
 8757:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: block type is invalid.")
 8758:     source = _normalize_required_text(block.get("source"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.source").upper()
 8759:     if source not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_SOURCES:
 8760:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: block source is invalid.")
 8761: 
 8762:     selector_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(block.get("selector_json"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json")
 8763:     format_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(block.get("format_json"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.format_json")
 8764: 
 8765:     if source == "ENGINE2B_VARIANCE":
 8766:         allowed_selector = {"period_role", "measure_ids", "limit", "sort"}
 8767:         if sorted(set(selector_json.keys()) - allowed_selector):
 8768:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: ENGINE2B_VARIANCE selector keys are invalid.")
 8769:         if "period_role" in selector_json and str(selector_json.get("period_role") or "").strip():
 8770:             _normalize_engine2b_period_comparator(selector_json.get("period_role"))
 8771:         if "measure_ids" in selector_json:
 8772:             measure_ids = selector_json.get("measure_ids")
 8773:             if not isinstance(measure_ids, list):
 8774:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: measure_ids must be an array.")
 8775:             selector_json["measure_ids"] = sorted(
 8776:                 {
 8777:                     _normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.measure_ids")
 8778:                     for item in measure_ids
 8779:                     if str(item or "").strip()
 8780:                 }
 8781:             )
 8782:         if "limit" in selector_json:
 8783:             try:
 8784:                 limit_value = int(selector_json.get("limit"))
 8785:             except (TypeError, ValueError) as exc:
 8786:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: selector limit must be an integer.") from exc
 8787:             if limit_value <= 0:
 8788:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: selector limit must be positive.")
 8789:             selector_json["limit"] = limit_value
 8790:         if "sort" in selector_json:
 8791:             sort_value = _normalize_required_text(selector_json.get("sort"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.sort").upper()
 8792:             if sort_value not in {"ABS_DESC", "ABS_ASC", "ROW_ID_ASC"}:
 8793:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: variance sort must be ABS_DESC, ABS_ASC, or ROW_ID_ASC.")
 8794:             selector_json["sort"] = sort_value
 8795:     elif source == "ENGINE3_ACTIONS":
 8796:         allowed_selector = {"modules", "statuses", "limit"}
 8797:         if sorted(set(selector_json.keys()) - allowed_selector):
 8798:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: ENGINE3_ACTIONS selector keys are invalid.")
 8799:         if "modules" in selector_json:
 8800:             modules = selector_json.get("modules")
 8801:             if not isinstance(modules, list):
 8802:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: modules must be an array.")
 8803:             normalized_modules = sorted(
 8804:                 {
 8805:                     _normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.modules").upper()
 8806:                     for item in modules
 8807:                     if str(item or "").strip()
 8808:                 }
 8809:             )
 8810:             for module in normalized_modules:
 8811:                 if module not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_ACTION_MODULE_TYPES:
 8812:                     raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: unknown action module selector.")
 8813:             selector_json["modules"] = normalized_modules
 8814:         if "statuses" in selector_json:
 8815:             statuses = selector_json.get("statuses")
 8816:             if not isinstance(statuses, list):
 8817:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: statuses must be an array.")
 8818:             selector_json["statuses"] = sorted(
 8819:                 {
 8820:                     _normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.statuses").upper()
 8821:                     for item in statuses
 8822:                     if str(item or "").strip()
 8823:                 }
 8824:             )
 8825:         if "limit" in selector_json:
 8826:             try:
 8827:                 limit_value = int(selector_json.get("limit"))
 8828:             except (TypeError, ValueError) as exc:
 8829:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: selector limit must be an integer.") from exc
 8830:             if limit_value <= 0:
 8831:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: selector limit must be positive.")
 8832:             selector_json["limit"] = limit_value
 8833:     else:
 8834:         if block_type == "TEXT":
 8835:             allowed_selector = {"text"}
 8836:             if sorted(set(selector_json.keys()) - allowed_selector) or "text" not in selector_json:
 8837:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC TEXT selector must include only text.")
 8838:             selector_json["text"] = _normalize_required_text(selector_json.get("text"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.text")
 8839:         elif block_type == "BULLETS":
 8840:             allowed_selector = {"items"}
 8841:             if sorted(set(selector_json.keys()) - allowed_selector) or "items" not in selector_json:
 8842:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC BULLETS selector must include only items.")
 8843:             items = selector_json.get("items")
 8844:             if not isinstance(items, list) or not items:
 8845:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC BULLETS items must be a non-empty array.")
 8846:             selector_json["items"] = [
 8847:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.items")
 8848:                 for item in items
 8849:             ]
 8850:         else:
 8851:             allowed_selector = {"columns", "rows"}
 8852:             if sorted(set(selector_json.keys()) - allowed_selector):
 8853:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC TABLE selector keys are invalid.")
 8854:             columns = selector_json.get("columns")
 8855:             rows = selector_json.get("rows")
 8856:             if not isinstance(columns, list) or not columns:
 8857:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC TABLE columns must be a non-empty array.")
 8858:             if not isinstance(rows, list):
 8859:                 raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC TABLE rows must be an array.")
 8860:             selector_json["columns"] = [
 8861:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.columns")
 8862:                 for item in columns
 8863:             ]
 8864:             normalized_rows: list[list[str]] = []
 8865:             for row in rows:
 8866:                 if not isinstance(row, list):
 8867:                     raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: STATIC TABLE row must be an array.")
 8868:                 normalized_rows.append([_normalize_required_text(item, field_name=f"{field_prefix}.selector_json.rows") for item in row])
 8869:             selector_json["rows"] = normalized_rows
 8870: 
 8871:     allowed_format = {"label", "number_decimals", "show_amount", "delimiter"}
 8872:     if sorted(set(format_json.keys()) - allowed_format):
 8873:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: format_json contains unknown keys.")
 8874:     if "label" in format_json:
 8875:         format_json["label"] = _normalize_required_text(format_json.get("label"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.format_json.label")
 8876:     if "number_decimals" in format_json:
 8877:         try:
 8878:             number_decimals = int(format_json.get("number_decimals"))
 8879:         except (TypeError, ValueError) as exc:
 8880:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: number_decimals must be an integer.") from exc
 8881:         if number_decimals < 0 or number_decimals > 6:
 8882:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: number_decimals out of range.")
 8883:         format_json["number_decimals"] = number_decimals
 8884:     if "show_amount" in format_json and not isinstance(format_json.get("show_amount"), bool):
 8885:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: show_amount must be boolean.")
 8886:     if "delimiter" in format_json:
 8887:         format_json["delimiter"] = _normalize_required_text(format_json.get("delimiter"), field_name=f"{field_prefix}.format_json.delimiter")
 8888: 
 8889:     return {
 8890:         "type": block_type,
 8891:         "source": source,
 8892:         "selector_json": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(selector_json)),
 8893:         "format_json": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(format_json)),
 8894:     }
 8895: 
 8896: 
 8897: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_body_json(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8898:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name="template_body_json")
 8899:     required_keys = {"title", "sections"}
 8900:     if sorted(set(payload.keys()) - required_keys) or sorted(required_keys - set(payload.keys())):
 8901:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: template_body_json must include only title and sections.")
 8902: 
 8903:     title = _normalize_required_text(payload.get("title"), field_name="template_body_json.title")
 8904:     sections_raw = payload.get("sections")
 8905:     if not isinstance(sections_raw, list) or not sections_raw:
 8906:         raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: sections must be a non-empty array.")
 8907:     sections: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 8908:     for section_index, section_payload in enumerate(sections_raw):
 8909:         section = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
 8910:             section_payload,
 8911:             field_name=f"template_body_json.sections[{section_index}]",
 8912:         )
 8913:         required_section_keys = {"heading", "blocks"}
 8914:         if sorted(set(section.keys()) - required_section_keys) or sorted(required_section_keys - set(section.keys())):
 8915:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: section must include only heading and blocks.")
 8916:         heading = _normalize_required_text(
 8917:             section.get("heading"),
 8918:             field_name=f"template_body_json.sections[{section_index}].heading",
 8919:         )
 8920:         blocks_raw = section.get("blocks")
 8921:         if not isinstance(blocks_raw, list) or not blocks_raw:
 8922:             raise ValueError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_INVALID: blocks must be a non-empty array.")
 8923:         blocks = [
 8924:             _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_block(
 8925:                 block_payload,
 8926:                 section_index=section_index,
 8927:                 block_index=block_index,
 8928:             )
 8929:             for block_index, block_payload in enumerate(blocks_raw)
 8930:         ]
 8931:         sections.append({"heading": heading, "blocks": blocks})
 8932:     return {"title": title, "sections": sections}
 8933: 
 8934: 
 8935: def _engine3_narrative_template_fingerprint(
 8936:     *,
 8937:     template_key: str,
 8938:     version_number: int,
 8939:     period_grain: str,
 8940:     template_body_json: dict[str, Any],
 8941: ) -> str:
 8942:     payload = {
 8943:         "template_key": _normalize_required_text(template_key, field_name="template_key"),
 8944:         "version_number": int(version_number),
 8945:         "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(period_grain),
 8946:         "template_body_json": _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_body_json(template_body_json),
 8947:     }
 8948:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 8949: 
 8950: 
 8951: def _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> Decimal:
 8952:     amount = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(value, field_name=field_name)
 8953:     if amount <= Decimal("0"):
 8954:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be greater than 0.")
 8955:     return amount
 8956: 
 8957: 
 8958: def _engine3_account_matches_prefixes(account_code: str, prefixes: tuple[str, ...]) -> bool:
 8959:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(account_code, field_name="account_code")
 8960:     return any(normalized.startswith(prefix) for prefix in prefixes)
 8961: 
 8962: 
 8963: def _engine3_period_end_date_iso(*, period_grain: str, period_key: str) -> str:
 8964:     grain = _normalize_required_text(period_grain, field_name="period_grain").upper()
 8965:     if grain == "MONTH":
 8966:         normalized = _normalize_engine3_period_key(period_key, grain="MONTH")
 8967:         year = int(normalized[:4])
 8968:         month = int(normalized[5:7])
 8969:         if month == 12:
 8970:             next_first = datetime(year + 1, 1, 1)
 8971:         else:
 8972:             next_first = datetime(year, month + 1, 1)
 8973:         return (next_first - timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
 8974:     if grain == "QUARTER":
 8975:         normalized = _normalize_engine3_period_key(period_key, grain="QUARTER")
 8976:         quarter_match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})-Q([1-4])$", normalized)
 8977:         if not quarter_match:
 8978:             raise ValueError("INVALID_ACTION_SCOPE")
 8979:         year = int(quarter_match.group(1))
 8980:         quarter = int(quarter_match.group(2))
 8981:         month = quarter * 3
 8982:         if month == 12:
 8983:             next_first = datetime(year + 1, 1, 1)
 8984:         else:
 8985:             next_first = datetime(year, month + 1, 1)
 8986:         return (next_first - timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
 8987:     if grain == "YEAR":
 8988:         normalized = _normalize_engine3_period_key(period_key, grain="YEAR")
 8989:         return f"{normalized}-12-31"
 8990:     raise ValueError("INVALID_ACTION_SCOPE")
 8991: 
 8992: 
 8993: def _engine3_parse_json_object_text(raw: Any, *, field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 8994:     text = str(raw or "").strip()
 8995:     if not text:
 8996:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} is required.")
 8997:     try:
 8998:         parsed = json.loads(text)
 8999:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 9000:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be valid JSON.") from exc
 9001:     if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
 9002:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a JSON object.")
 9003:     return parsed
 9004: 
 9005: 
 9006: def _engine3_parse_json_array_text(raw: Any, *, field_name: str) -> list[Any]:
 9007:     text = str(raw or "").strip()
 9008:     if not text:
 9009:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} is required.")
 9010:     try:
 9011:         parsed = json.loads(text)
 9012:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 9013:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be valid JSON.") from exc
 9014:     if not isinstance(parsed, list):
 9015:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a JSON array.")
 9016:     return parsed
 9017: 
 9018: 
 9019: def _engine3_require_execution_run_for_accrual(
 9020:     conn: Any,
 9021:     *,
 9022:     tenant_id: str,
 9023:     workspace_id: str,
 9024:     execution_run_id: str,
 9025:     enforce_status: bool = True,
 9026: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9027:     run_row = conn.execute(
 9028:         """
 9029:         SELECT
 9030:             id,
 9031:             tenant_id,
 9032:             workspace_id,
 9033:             action_type,
 9034:             action_scope_json,
 9035:             canonical_anchors_json,
 9036:             status
 9037:         FROM e3_execution_runs
 9038:         WHERE id = ?
 9039:         LIMIT 1
 9040:         """,
 9041:         (execution_run_id,),
 9042:     ).fetchone()
 9043:     if not run_row:
 9044:         raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
 9045: 
 9046:     run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 9047:     run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 9048:     if run_tenant != tenant_id or run_workspace != workspace_id:
 9049:         raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 9050: 
 9051:     run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
 9052:     if enforce_status and run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
 9053:         raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow accrual operation.")
 9054: 
 9055:     action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(run_row["action_type"], field_name="action_type")
 9056:     if action_type != "ACCRUAL_PREPARATION":
 9057:         raise ValueError("INVALID_ACTION_SCOPE")
 9058:     action_scope_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
 9059:         run_row["action_scope_json"],
 9060:         field_name="action_scope_json",
 9061:     )
 9062:     normalized_scope = _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 9063:         action_scope_json,
 9064:         action_type=action_type,
 9065:     )
 9066:     canonical_anchors_raw = _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
 9067:         run_row["canonical_anchors_json"],
 9068:         field_name="canonical_anchors_json",
 9069:     )
 9070:     canonical_anchors = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors_raw)
 9071:     return {
 9072:         "id": str(run_row["id"]),
 9073:         "status": run_status,
 9074:         "action_type": action_type,
 9075:         "action_scope_json": normalized_scope,
 9076:         "canonical_anchors": canonical_anchors,
 9077:     }
 9078: 
 9079: 
 9080: def _engine3_resolve_unique_anchor_runs_for_accrual(
 9081:     conn: Any,
 9082:     *,
 9083:     tenant_id: str,
 9084:     workspace_id: str,
 9085:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 9086: ) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
 9087:     normalized_anchors = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors)
 9088:     resolved: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 9089:     for anchor in normalized_anchors:
 9090:         rows = conn.execute(
 9091:             """
 9092:             SELECT id
 9093:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 9094:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 9095:               AND workspace_id = ?
 9096:               AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 9097:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 9098:             ORDER BY id ASC
 9099:             """,
 9100:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, anchor),
 9101:         ).fetchall()
 9102:         if not rows:
 9103:             raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9104:         if len(rows) > 1:
 9105:             raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_LINEAGE_AMBIGUOUS")
 9106:         resolved.append(
 9107:             {
 9108:                 "anchor_output_fingerprint_sha256": anchor,
 9109:                 "canonical_run_id": _normalize_required_text(rows[0]["id"], field_name="canonical_run_id"),
 9110:             }
 9111:         )
 9112:     resolved.sort(
 9113:         key=lambda item: (
 9114:             item["anchor_output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 9115:             item["canonical_run_id"],
 9116:         )
 9117:     )
 9118:     return resolved
 9119: 
 9120: 
 9121: def _engine3_sorted_resolved_canonical_run_ids_for_accrual(
 9122:     resolved_anchors: list[dict[str, str]],
 9123: ) -> list[str]:
 9124:     if not resolved_anchors:
 9125:         raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9126:     resolved_ids = sorted(
 9127:         {
 9128:             _normalize_required_text(item.get("canonical_run_id"), field_name="canonical_run_id")
 9129:             for item in resolved_anchors
 9130:         }
 9131:     )
 9132:     return _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(resolved_ids)
 9133: 
 9134: 
 9135: def _engine3_lookup_accrual_offset_accounts(
 9136:     conn: Any,
 9137:     *,
 9138:     tenant_id: str,
 9139:     workspace_id: str,
 9140: ) -> dict[str, str]:
 9141:     rows = conn.execute(
 9142:         """
 9143:         SELECT mapping_type, account_code
 9144:         FROM e3_account_mappings
 9145:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
 9146:           AND workspace_id = ?
 9147:         ORDER BY mapping_type ASC
 9148:         """,
 9149:         (tenant_id, workspace_id),
 9150:     ).fetchall()
 9151:     mapping_by_type: dict[str, str] = {}
 9152:     for row in rows:
 9153:         mapping_type = _normalize_engine3_account_mapping_type(
 9154:             row["mapping_type"],
 9155:             field_name="mapping_type",
 9156:         )
 9157:         account_code = _normalize_required_text(row["account_code"], field_name="account_code")
 9158:         mapping_by_type[mapping_type] = account_code
 9159: 
 9160:     required = {
 9161:         "ACCRUED_LIABILITY": "accrued_liability_account_code",
 9162:         "ACCRUED_ASSET": "accrued_asset_account_code",
 9163:     }
 9164:     for mapping_type in required:
 9165:         if mapping_type not in mapping_by_type:
 9166:             raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_ACCOUNT_MAPPING_MISSING")
 9167: 
 9168:     return {
 9169:         "accrued_liability_account_code": mapping_by_type["ACCRUED_LIABILITY"],
 9170:         "accrued_asset_account_code": mapping_by_type["ACCRUED_ASSET"],
 9171:     }
 9172: 
 9173: 
 9174: def _engine3_require_execution_run_for_reclass(
 9175:     conn: Any,
 9176:     *,
 9177:     tenant_id: str,
 9178:     workspace_id: str,
 9179:     execution_run_id: str,
 9180:     enforce_status: bool = True,
 9181: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9182:     run_row = conn.execute(
 9183:         """
 9184:         SELECT
 9185:             id,
 9186:             tenant_id,
 9187:             workspace_id,
 9188:             action_type,
 9189:             action_scope_json,
 9190:             canonical_anchors_json,
 9191:             status
 9192:         FROM e3_execution_runs
 9193:         WHERE id = ?
 9194:         LIMIT 1
 9195:         """,
 9196:         (execution_run_id,),
 9197:     ).fetchone()
 9198:     if not run_row:
 9199:         raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
 9200: 
 9201:     run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["tenant_id"] or ""), field_name="tenant_id")
 9202:     run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(str(run_row["workspace_id"] or ""), field_name="workspace_id")
 9203:     if run_tenant != tenant_id or run_workspace != workspace_id:
 9204:         raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
 9205: 
 9206:     run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
 9207:     if enforce_status and run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
 9208:         raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow reclass operation.")
 9209: 
 9210:     action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(run_row["action_type"], field_name="action_type")
 9211:     if action_type != "RECLASSIFICATION":
 9212:         raise ValueError("INVALID_ACTION_SCOPE")
 9213:     action_scope_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
 9214:         run_row["action_scope_json"],
 9215:         field_name="action_scope_json",
 9216:     )
 9217:     normalized_scope = _normalize_engine3_action_scope_json(
 9218:         action_scope_json,
 9219:         action_type=action_type,
 9220:     )
 9221:     canonical_anchors_raw = _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
 9222:         run_row["canonical_anchors_json"],
 9223:         field_name="canonical_anchors_json",
 9224:     )
 9225:     canonical_anchors = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors_raw)
 9226:     return {
 9227:         "id": str(run_row["id"]),
 9228:         "status": run_status,
 9229:         "action_type": action_type,
 9230:         "action_scope_json": normalized_scope,
 9231:         "canonical_anchors": canonical_anchors,
 9232:     }
 9233:

 9235: def _engine3_resolve_unique_anchor_runs_for_reclass(
 9236:     conn: Any,
 9237:     *,
 9238:     tenant_id: str,
 9239:     workspace_id: str,
 9240:     canonical_anchors: list[str],
 9241: ) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
 9242:     normalized_anchors = _normalize_engine3_anchor_list(canonical_anchors)
 9243:     resolved: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 9244:     for anchor in normalized_anchors:
 9245:         rows = conn.execute(
 9246:             """
 9247:             SELECT id
 9248:             FROM wb_canonical_runs
 9249:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
 9250:               AND workspace_id = ?
 9251:               AND status = 'SUCCEEDED'
 9252:               AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 9253:             ORDER BY id ASC
 9254:             """,
 9255:             (tenant_id, workspace_id, anchor),
 9256:         ).fetchall()
 9257:         if not rows:
 9258:             raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9259:         if len(rows) > 1:
 9260:             raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_LINEAGE_AMBIGUOUS")
 9261:         resolved.append(
 9262:             {
 9263:                 "anchor_output_fingerprint_sha256": anchor,
 9264:                 "canonical_run_id": _normalize_required_text(rows[0]["id"], field_name="canonical_run_id"),
 9265:             }
 9266:         )
 9267:     resolved.sort(
 9268:         key=lambda item: (
 9269:             item["anchor_output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 9270:             item["canonical_run_id"],
 9271:         )
 9272:     )
 9273:     return resolved

 9275: 
 9276: def _engine3_sorted_resolved_canonical_run_ids_for_reclass(
 9277:     resolved_anchors: list[dict[str, str]],
 9278: ) -> list[str]:
 9279:     if not resolved_anchors:
 9280:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9281:     resolved_ids = sorted(
 9282:         {
 9283:             _normalize_required_text(item.get("canonical_run_id"), field_name="canonical_run_id")
 9284:             for item in resolved_anchors
 9285:         }
 9286:     )
 9287:     if not resolved_ids:
 9288:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9289:     return resolved_ids

 9291: 
 9292: def _engine3_fetch_reclass_fact_rows(
 9293:     conn: Any,
 9294:     *,
 9295:     tenant_id: str,
 9296:     workspace_id: str,
 9297:     canonical_run_ids: list[str],
 9298:     period_key: str,
 9299: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 9300:     if not canonical_run_ids:
 9301:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9302:     placeholders = ", ".join(["?"] * len(canonical_run_ids))
 9303:     params: list[Any] = [tenant_id, workspace_id, period_key]
 9304:     params.extend(canonical_run_ids)
 9305:     rows = conn.execute(
 9306:         f"""
 9307:         SELECT
 9308:             id,
 9309:             canonical_run_id,
 9310:             entity_code,
 9311:             account_code,
 9312:             dimension_json,
 9313:             debit,
 9314:             credit,
 9315:             amount_signed,
 9316:             transaction_currency,
 9317:             source_row_ref,
 9318:             canonical_row_identity_sha256,
 9319:             canonical_row_sha256,
 9320:             created_at
 9321:         FROM wb_ledger_facts
 9322:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
 9323:           AND workspace_id = ?
 9324:           AND scenario = 'actual'
 9325:           AND period_key = ?
 9326:           AND canonical_run_id IN ({placeholders})
 9327:         ORDER BY canonical_run_id ASC, entity_code ASC, account_code ASC, source_row_ref ASC, id ASC
 9328:         """,
 9329:         tuple(params),
 9330:     ).fetchall()
 9331:     fact_rows = [dict(row) for row in rows]
 9332:     if not fact_rows:
 9333:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9334:     return fact_rows
 9335: 
 9336: 
 9337: def _engine3_parse_dimension_json_map(
 9338:     value: Any,
 9339:     *,
 9340:     error_code: str = "RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT",
 9341: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9342:     normalized_error_code = _normalize_required_text(error_code, field_name="error_code").upper()
 9343:     raw = str(value or "").strip() or "{}"
 9344:     try:
 9345:         parsed = json.loads(raw)
 9346:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
 9347:         raise RuntimeError(normalized_error_code) from exc
 9348:     if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
 9349:         raise RuntimeError(normalized_error_code)
 9350:     return json.loads(_canonical_json_text(parsed))
 9351: 
 9352: 
 9353: def _engine3_reclass_offset_line_for_amount(
 9354:     *,
 9355:     amount: Decimal,
 9356:     entity_code: str,
 9357:     accrued_liability_account_code: str,
 9358:     accrued_asset_account_code: str,
 9359: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9360:     if amount > Decimal("0"):
 9361:         return {
 9362:             "account_code": accrued_asset_account_code,
 9363:             "debit": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(amount),
 9364:             "credit": "0.00",
 9365:             "memo": "Reclass offset asset",
 9366:             "dimensions": {"entity_code": entity_code},
 9367:         }
 9368:     positive = abs(amount)
 9369:     return {
 9370:         "account_code": accrued_liability_account_code,
 9371:         "debit": "0.00",
 9372:         "credit": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(positive),
 9373:         "memo": "Reclass offset liability",
 9374:         "dimensions": {"entity_code": entity_code},
 9375:     }
 9376: 
 9377: 
 9378: def _engine3_reclass_round_allocation_amount(value: Any) -> Decimal:
 9379:     try:
 9380:         normalized = Decimal(str(value)).quantize(
 9381:             ENGINE3_RECLASS_ALLOCATION_AMOUNT_QUANTUM,
 9382:             rounding=ENGINE3_RECLASS_ALLOCATION_ROUNDING_MODE,
 9383:         )
 9384:     except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
 9385:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_ALLOCATION_INVALID") from exc
 9386:     return normalized
 9387: 
 9388: 
 9389: def _engine3_reclass_fact_identity_key(
 9390:     *,
 9391:     row: dict[str, Any],
 9392:     smallest_resolved_run_id: str,
 9393: ) -> str:
 9394:     entity_code = _normalize_required_text(row.get("entity_code"), field_name="entity_code")
 9395:     account_code = _normalize_required_text(row.get("account_code"), field_name="account_code")
 9396:     currency = _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row.get("currency"), field_name="transaction_currency")
 9397:     source_row_ref = _normalize_required_text(row.get("source_row_ref"), field_name="source_row_ref")
 9398:     resolved_run_id = _normalize_required_text(row.get("canonical_run_id"), field_name="canonical_run_id")
 9399:     smallest_run_id = _normalize_required_text(
 9400:         smallest_resolved_run_id,
 9401:         field_name="smallest_resolved_canonical_run_id",
 9402:     )
 9403:     debit_text = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
 9404:         _normalize_engine3_je_amount(row.get("debit"), field_name="debit")
 9405:     )
 9406:     credit_text = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
 9407:         _normalize_engine3_je_amount(row.get("credit"), field_name="credit")
 9408:     )
 9409: 
 9410:     canonical_row_fingerprint_raw = str(row.get("canonical_row_sha256") or "").strip().lower()
 9411:     canonical_row_identity_raw = str(row.get("canonical_row_identity_sha256") or "").strip().lower()
 9412:     canonical_row_fingerprint = (
 9413:         _normalize_engine1_hash(
 9414:             canonical_row_fingerprint_raw,
 9415:             field_name="canonical_row_sha256",
 9416:         )
 9417:         if canonical_row_fingerprint_raw
 9418:         else ""
 9419:     )
 9420:     canonical_row_identity = (
 9421:         _normalize_engine1_hash(
 9422:             canonical_row_identity_raw,
 9423:             field_name="canonical_row_identity_sha256",
 9424:         )
 9425:         if canonical_row_identity_raw
 9426:         else ""
 9427:     )
 9428: 
 9429:     payload: dict[str, Any] = {
 9430:         "identity_version": "DUPLICATE_FACT_KEY_V1",
 9431:         "smallest_resolved_canonical_run_id": smallest_run_id,
 9432:         "resolved_canonical_run_id": resolved_run_id,
 9433:         "entity_code": entity_code,
 9434:         "account_code": account_code,
 9435:         "debit": debit_text,
 9436:         "credit": credit_text,
 9437:         "currency": currency,
 9438:         "source_row_ref": source_row_ref,
 9439:     }
 9440:     if canonical_row_fingerprint:
 9441:         payload["canonical_row_fingerprint_sha256"] = canonical_row_fingerprint
 9442:     if canonical_row_identity:
 9443:         payload["canonical_row_identity_sha256"] = canonical_row_identity
 9444:     return _canonical_json_text(payload)
 9445: 
 9446: 
 9447: def _engine3_fetch_accrual_fact_rows(
 9448:     conn: Any,
 9449:     *,
 9450:     tenant_id: str,
 9451:     workspace_id: str,
 9452:     canonical_run_ids: list[str],
 9453:     period_key: str,
 9454: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 9455:     if not canonical_run_ids:
 9456:         raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9457:     placeholders = ", ".join(["?"] * len(canonical_run_ids))
 9458:     params: list[Any] = [tenant_id, workspace_id, period_key]
 9459:     params.extend(canonical_run_ids)
 9460:     rows = conn.execute(
 9461:         f"""
 9462:         SELECT
 9463:             id,
 9464:             canonical_run_id,
 9465:             entity_code,
 9466:             account_code,
 9467:             debit,
 9468:             credit,
 9469:             transaction_currency,
 9470:             period_key
 9471:         FROM wb_ledger_facts
 9472:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
 9473:           AND workspace_id = ?
 9474:           AND scenario = 'actual'
 9475:           AND period_key = ?
 9476:           AND canonical_run_id IN ({placeholders})
 9477:         ORDER BY canonical_run_id ASC, entity_code ASC, account_code ASC, id ASC
 9478:         """,
 9479:         tuple(params),
 9480:     ).fetchall()
 9481:     fact_rows = [dict(row) for row in rows]
 9482:     if not fact_rows:
 9483:         raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9484:     return fact_rows
 9485: 
 9486: 
 9487: def _engine3_build_accrual_je_payload(
 9488:     *,
 9489:     accrual_type: str,
 9490:     period_grain: str,
 9491:     period_key: str,
 9492:     currency: str,
 9493:     entity_code: str,
 9494:     source_account_code: str,
 9495:     amount: Decimal,
 9496:     accrued_liability_account_code: str,
 9497:     accrued_asset_account_code: str,
 9498: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9499:     normalized_type = _normalize_engine3_accrual_type(accrual_type, field_name="accrual_type")
 9500:     normalized_currency = _normalize_engine3_currency_code(currency, field_name="currency")
 9501:     normalized_entity = _normalize_required_text(entity_code, field_name="entity_code")
 9502:     normalized_source_account = _normalize_required_text(source_account_code, field_name="source_account_code")
 9503:     normalized_amount = _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(amount, field_name="calculated_amount")
 9504:     normalized_accrued_liability_account = _normalize_required_text(
 9505:         accrued_liability_account_code,
 9506:         field_name="accrued_liability_account_code",
 9507:     )
 9508:     normalized_accrued_asset_account = _normalize_required_text(
 9509:         accrued_asset_account_code,
 9510:         field_name="accrued_asset_account_code",
 9511:     )
 9512:     amount_text = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(normalized_amount)
 9513:     journal_date = _engine3_period_end_date_iso(period_grain=period_grain, period_key=period_key)
 9514:     memo = f"Accrual {normalized_type} {period_key} {normalized_entity} {normalized_source_account}"
 9515: 
 9516:     if normalized_type == "EXPENSE":
 9517:         lines = [
 9518:             {
 9519:                 "account_code": normalized_source_account,
 9520:                 "debit": amount_text,
 9521:                 "credit": "0.00",
 9522:                 "memo": "Accrual expense",
 9523:                 "dimensions": {"entity_code": normalized_entity},
 9524:             },
 9525:             {
 9526:                 "account_code": normalized_accrued_liability_account,
 9527:                 "debit": "0.00",
 9528:                 "credit": amount_text,
 9529:                 "memo": "Accrued liability",
 9530:                 "dimensions": {"entity_code": normalized_entity},
 9531:             },
 9532:         ]
 9533:     else:
 9534:         lines = [
 9535:             {
 9536:                 "account_code": normalized_accrued_asset_account,
 9537:                 "debit": amount_text,
 9538:                 "credit": "0.00",
 9539:                 "memo": "Accrued asset",
 9540:                 "dimensions": {"entity_code": normalized_entity},
 9541:             },
 9542:             {
 9543:                 "account_code": normalized_source_account,
 9544:                 "debit": "0.00",
 9545:                 "credit": amount_text,
 9546:                 "memo": "Accrual revenue",
 9547:                 "dimensions": {"entity_code": normalized_entity},
 9548:             },
 9549:         ]
 9550: 
 9551:     return _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
 9552:         {
 9553:             "journal_date": journal_date,
 9554:             "currency": normalized_currency,
 9555:             "lines": lines,
 9556:             "memo": memo,
 9557:         }
 9558:     )
 9559: 
 9560: 
 9561: def _engine3_accrual_output_fingerprint(
 9562:     *,
 9563:     accrual_type: str,
 9564:     source_reference_json: dict[str, Any],
 9565:     calculated_amount: Decimal,
 9566:     currency: str,
 9567:     proposed_je_payload_json: dict[str, Any],
 9568: ) -> str:
 9569:     normalized_amount = _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
 9570:         _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(calculated_amount, field_name="calculated_amount")
 9571:     )
 9572:     payload = {
 9573:         "accrual_type": _normalize_engine3_accrual_type(accrual_type, field_name="accrual_type"),
 9574:         "source_reference_json": _normalize_engine3_accrual_source_reference_json(source_reference_json),
 9575:         "calculated_amount": normalized_amount,
 9576:         "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(currency, field_name="currency"),
 9577:         "proposed_je_payload_json": _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(proposed_je_payload_json),
 9578:     }
 9579:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
 9580: 
 9581: 
 9582: def _engine3_build_accrual_candidates(
 9583:     *,
 9584:     resolved_anchors: list[dict[str, str]],
 9585:     fact_rows: list[dict[str, Any]],
 9586:     period_grain: str,
 9587:     period_key: str,
 9588:     accrued_liability_account_code: str,
 9589:     accrued_asset_account_code: str,
 9590: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 9591:     expense_totals: dict[tuple[str, str, str], Decimal] = {}
 9592:     revenue_totals: dict[tuple[str, str, str], Decimal] = {}
 9593:     expense_fact_ids: dict[tuple[str, str, str], set[str]] = {}
 9594:     revenue_fact_ids: dict[tuple[str, str, str], set[str]] = {}
 9595:     expense_run_ids: dict[tuple[str, str, str], set[str]] = {}
 9596:     revenue_run_ids: dict[tuple[str, str, str], set[str]] = {}
 9597:     payable_presence: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()
 9598:     receivable_presence: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()
 9599:     run_to_anchor = {
 9600:         item["canonical_run_id"]: item["anchor_output_fingerprint_sha256"]
 9601:         for item in resolved_anchors
 9602:     }
 9603: 
 9604:     for row in fact_rows:
 9605:         fact_id = _normalize_required_text(row.get("id"), field_name="wb_ledger_facts.id")
 9606:         run_id = _normalize_required_text(row.get("canonical_run_id"), field_name="canonical_run_id")
 9607:         entity_code = _normalize_required_text(row.get("entity_code"), field_name="entity_code")
 9608:         account_code = _normalize_required_text(row.get("account_code"), field_name="account_code")
 9609:         currency = _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row.get("transaction_currency"), field_name="transaction_currency")
 9610: 
 9611:         debit = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(row.get("debit"), field_name="debit")
 9612:         credit = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(row.get("credit"), field_name="credit")
 9613:         net_debit = debit - credit
 9614:         net_credit = credit - debit
 9615: 
 9616:         if _engine3_account_matches_prefixes(account_code, ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_PAYABLE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES) and net_credit > 0:
 9617:             payable_presence.add((entity_code, currency))
 9618:         if _engine3_account_matches_prefixes(account_code, ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_RECEIVABLE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES) and net_debit > 0:
 9619:             receivable_presence.add((entity_code, currency))
 9620: 
 9621:         key = (entity_code, currency, account_code)
 9622:         if _engine3_account_matches_prefixes(account_code, ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES) and net_debit > 0:
 9623:             expense_totals[key] = expense_totals.get(key, Decimal("0.00")) + net_debit
 9624:             expense_fact_ids.setdefault(key, set()).add(fact_id)
 9625:             expense_run_ids.setdefault(key, set()).add(run_id)
 9626:         if _engine3_account_matches_prefixes(account_code, ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_REVENUE_ACCOUNT_PREFIXES) and net_credit > 0:
 9627:             revenue_totals[key] = revenue_totals.get(key, Decimal("0.00")) + net_credit
 9628:             revenue_fact_ids.setdefault(key, set()).add(fact_id)
 9629:             revenue_run_ids.setdefault(key, set()).add(run_id)
 9630: 
 9631:     proposals: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 9632: 
 9633:     for key in sorted(expense_totals.keys()):
 9634:         entity_code, currency, account_code = key
 9635:         amount = expense_totals[key].quantize(ENGINE3_JE_AMOUNT_QUANTUM, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
 9636:         if amount <= 0:
 9637:             continue
 9638:         if (entity_code, currency) in payable_presence:
 9639:             continue
 9640:         run_ids = sorted(expense_run_ids.get(key, set()))
 9641:         basis_fact_ids = sorted(expense_fact_ids.get(key, set()))
 9642:         anchor_fingerprints = sorted({run_to_anchor.get(run_id, "") for run_id in run_ids if run_to_anchor.get(run_id, "")})
 9643:         source_reference = _normalize_engine3_accrual_source_reference_json(
 9644:             {
 9645:                 "period_key": period_key,
 9646:                 "entity_code": entity_code,
 9647:                 "source_account_code": account_code,
 9648:                 "related_account_family": "PAYABLE",
 9649:                 "canonical_run_ids": run_ids,
 9650:                 "canonical_anchor_fingerprints": anchor_fingerprints,
 9651:                 "basis_fact_ids": basis_fact_ids,
 9652:                 "rule_code": "EXPENSE_INCURRED_NOT_INVOICED_V1",
 9653:             }
 9654:         )
 9655:         proposed_je = _engine3_build_accrual_je_payload(
 9656:             accrual_type="EXPENSE",
 9657:             period_grain=period_grain,
 9658:             period_key=period_key,
 9659:             currency=currency,
 9660:             entity_code=entity_code,
 9661:             source_account_code=account_code,
 9662:             amount=amount,
 9663:             accrued_liability_account_code=accrued_liability_account_code,
 9664:             accrued_asset_account_code=accrued_asset_account_code,
 9665:         )
 9666:         proposals.append(
 9667:             {
 9668:                 "accrual_type": "EXPENSE",
 9669:                 "source_reference_json": source_reference,
 9670:                 "calculated_amount": amount,
 9671:                 "currency": currency,
 9672:                 "proposed_je_payload_json": proposed_je,
 9673:             }
 9674:         )
 9675: 
 9676:     for key in sorted(revenue_totals.keys()):
 9677:         entity_code, currency, account_code = key
 9678:         amount = revenue_totals[key].quantize(ENGINE3_JE_AMOUNT_QUANTUM, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
 9679:         if amount <= 0:
 9680:             continue
 9681:         if (entity_code, currency) in receivable_presence:
 9682:             continue
 9683:         run_ids = sorted(revenue_run_ids.get(key, set()))
 9684:         basis_fact_ids = sorted(revenue_fact_ids.get(key, set()))
 9685:         anchor_fingerprints = sorted({run_to_anchor.get(run_id, "") for run_id in run_ids if run_to_anchor.get(run_id, "")})
 9686:         source_reference = _normalize_engine3_accrual_source_reference_json(
 9687:             {
 9688:                 "period_key": period_key,
 9689:                 "entity_code": entity_code,
 9690:                 "source_account_code": account_code,
 9691:                 "related_account_family": "RECEIVABLE",
 9692:                 "canonical_run_ids": run_ids,
 9693:                 "canonical_anchor_fingerprints": anchor_fingerprints,
 9694:                 "basis_fact_ids": basis_fact_ids,
 9695:                 "rule_code": "REVENUE_EARNED_NOT_INVOICED_V1",
 9696:             }
 9697:         )
 9698:         proposed_je = _engine3_build_accrual_je_payload(
 9699:             accrual_type="REVENUE",
 9700:             period_grain=period_grain,
 9701:             period_key=period_key,
 9702:             currency=currency,
 9703:             entity_code=entity_code,
 9704:             source_account_code=account_code,
 9705:             amount=amount,
 9706:             accrued_liability_account_code=accrued_liability_account_code,
 9707:             accrued_asset_account_code=accrued_asset_account_code,
 9708:         )
 9709:         proposals.append(
 9710:             {
 9711:                 "accrual_type": "REVENUE",
 9712:                 "source_reference_json": source_reference,
 9713:                 "calculated_amount": amount,
 9714:                 "currency": currency,
 9715:                 "proposed_je_payload_json": proposed_je,
 9716:             }
 9717:         )
 9718: 
 9719:     proposals.sort(
 9720:         key=lambda row: (
 9721:             row["accrual_type"],
 9722:             row["source_reference_json"]["entity_code"],
 9723:             row["source_reference_json"]["source_account_code"],
 9724:             row["currency"],
 9725:             _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(row["calculated_amount"]),
 9726:             _canonical_json_text(row["source_reference_json"]),
 9727:         )
 9728:     )
 9729:     return proposals
 9730: 
 9731: 
 9732: def _engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9733:     return {
 9734:         "id": str(row["id"]),
 9735:         "execution_run_id": str(row["execution_run_id"]),
 9736:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
 9737:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
 9738:         "accrual_type": str(row["accrual_type"]),
 9739:         "source_reference_json": _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
 9740:             row["source_reference_json"],
 9741:             field_name="source_reference_json",
 9742:         ),
 9743:         "resolved_canonical_run_ids_json": _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(
 9744:             _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
 9745:                 row["resolved_canonical_run_ids_json"],
 9746:                 field_name="resolved_canonical_run_ids_json",
 9747:             )
 9748:         ),
 9749:         "calculated_amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
 9750:             _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
 9751:         ),
 9752:         "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
 9753:         "proposed_je_payload_json": _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
 9754:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
 9755:                 row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
 9756:                 field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
 9757:             )
 9758:         ),
 9759:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
 9760:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 9761:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
 9762:         ),
 9763:         "status": _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
 9764:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
 9765:     }
 9766: 
 9767: 
 9768: def detect_engine3_accrual_proposals(
 9769:     *,
 9770:     tenant_id: str,
 9771:     workspace_id: str,
 9772:     execution_run_id: str,
 9773: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 9774:     proposal_columns = list_table_columns("e3_accrual_proposals")
 9775:     mapping_columns = list_table_columns("e3_account_mappings")
 9776:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
 9777:     if not proposal_columns or not mapping_columns or not event_columns:
 9778:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual schema is not available.")
 9779: 
 9780:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 9781:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 9782:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
 9783: 
 9784:     with get_conn() as conn:
 9785:         run_context = _engine3_require_execution_run_for_accrual(
 9786:             conn,
 9787:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9788:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9789:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 9790:             enforce_status=True,
 9791:         )
 9792:         period = run_context["action_scope_json"]["period"]
 9793:         period_grain = _normalize_required_text(period["grain"], field_name="action_scope_json.period.grain")
 9794:         period_key = _normalize_required_text(period["period_key"], field_name="action_scope_json.period.period_key")
 9795: 
 9796:         resolved_anchors = _engine3_resolve_unique_anchor_runs_for_accrual(
 9797:             conn,
 9798:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9799:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9800:             canonical_anchors=run_context["canonical_anchors"],
 9801:         )
 9802:         resolved_canonical_run_ids = _engine3_sorted_resolved_canonical_run_ids_for_accrual(resolved_anchors)
 9803:         offset_accounts = _engine3_lookup_accrual_offset_accounts(
 9804:             conn,
 9805:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9806:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9807:         )
 9808:         fact_rows = _engine3_fetch_accrual_fact_rows(
 9809:             conn,
 9810:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9811:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9812:             canonical_run_ids=resolved_canonical_run_ids,
 9813:             period_key=period_key,
 9814:         )
 9815:         candidates = _engine3_build_accrual_candidates(
 9816:             resolved_anchors=resolved_anchors,
 9817:             fact_rows=fact_rows,
 9818:             period_grain=period_grain,
 9819:             period_key=period_key,
 9820:             accrued_liability_account_code=offset_accounts["accrued_liability_account_code"],
 9821:             accrued_asset_account_code=offset_accounts["accrued_asset_account_code"],
 9822:         )
 9823:         if not candidates:
 9824:             raise RuntimeError("ACCRUAL_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
 9825: 
 9826:         created_count = 0
 9827:         persisted: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 9828:         for candidate in candidates:
 9829:             fingerprint = _engine3_accrual_output_fingerprint(
 9830:                 accrual_type=candidate["accrual_type"],
 9831:                 source_reference_json=candidate["source_reference_json"],
 9832:                 calculated_amount=candidate["calculated_amount"],
 9833:                 currency=candidate["currency"],
 9834:                 proposed_je_payload_json=candidate["proposed_je_payload_json"],
 9835:             )
 9836:             now = utc_now_iso()
 9837:             proposal_id = str(uuid4())
 9838:             try:
 9839:                 conn.execute(
 9840:                     """
 9841:                     INSERT INTO e3_accrual_proposals (
 9842:                         id,
 9843:                         execution_run_id,
 9844:                         tenant_id,
 9845:                         workspace_id,
 9846:                         accrual_type,
 9847:                         source_reference_json,
 9848:                         resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
 9849:                         calculated_amount,
 9850:                         currency,
 9851:                         proposed_je_payload_json,
 9852:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
 9853:                         status,
 9854:                         created_at
 9855:                     )
 9856:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'PROPOSED', ?)
 9857:                     """,
 9858:                     (
 9859:                         proposal_id,
 9860:                         normalized_run_id,
 9861:                         normalized_tenant,
 9862:                         normalized_workspace,
 9863:                         candidate["accrual_type"],
 9864:                         _canonical_json_text(candidate["source_reference_json"]),
 9865:                         _canonical_json_text(resolved_canonical_run_ids),
 9866:                         _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(candidate["calculated_amount"]),
 9867:                         candidate["currency"],
 9868:                         _canonical_json_text(candidate["proposed_je_payload_json"]),
 9869:                         fingerprint,
 9870:                         now,
 9871:                     ),
 9872:                 )
 9873:                 created_count += 1
 9874:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
 9875:                     conn,
 9876:                     execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 9877:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9878:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9879:                     event_type="ACCRUAL_PROPOSED",
 9880:                     event_payload_json={
 9881:                         "accrual_id": proposal_id,
 9882:                         "accrual_type": candidate["accrual_type"],
 9883:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": fingerprint,
 9884:                     },
 9885:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
 9886:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
 9887:                     created_at=now,
 9888:                 )
 9889:             except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
 9890:                 pass
 9891:             except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
 9892:                 message = str(exc).lower()
 9893:                 if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
 9894:                     raise
 9895: 
 9896:             row = conn.execute(
 9897:                 """
 9898:                 SELECT
 9899:                     id,
 9900:                     execution_run_id,
 9901:                     tenant_id,
 9902:                     workspace_id,
 9903:                     accrual_type,
 9904:                     source_reference_json,
 9905:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
 9906:                     calculated_amount,
 9907:                     currency,
 9908:                     proposed_je_payload_json,
 9909:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
 9910:                     status,
 9911:                     created_at
 9912:                 FROM e3_accrual_proposals
 9913:                 WHERE execution_run_id = ?
 9914:                   AND tenant_id = ?
 9915:                   AND workspace_id = ?
 9916:                   AND output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
 9917:                 LIMIT 1
 9918:                 """,
 9919:                 (
 9920:                     normalized_run_id,
 9921:                     normalized_tenant,
 9922:                     normalized_workspace,
 9923:                     fingerprint,
 9924:                 ),
 9925:             ).fetchone()
 9926:             if not row:
 9927:                 raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual proposal persistence failed.")
 9928:             persisted.append(_engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(row))
 9929: 
 9930:         persisted.sort(
 9931:             key=lambda row: (
 9932:                 row["accrual_type"],
 9933:                 row["source_reference_json"]["entity_code"],
 9934:                 row["source_reference_json"]["source_account_code"],
 9935:                 row["currency"],
 9936:                 row["calculated_amount"],
 9937:                 row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
 9938:             )
 9939:         )
 9940:         return {"proposals": persisted, "created_count": created_count}
 9941: 
 9942: 
 9943: def list_engine3_accrual_proposals(
 9944:     *,
 9945:     tenant_id: str,
 9946:     workspace_id: str,
 9947:     execution_run_id: str,
 9948: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 9949:     proposal_columns = list_table_columns("e3_accrual_proposals")
 9950:     if not proposal_columns:
 9951:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual schema is not available.")
 9952: 
 9953:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
 9954:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
 9955:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
 9956: 
 9957:     with get_conn() as conn:
 9958:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_accrual(
 9959:             conn,
 9960:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
 9961:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
 9962:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
 9963:             enforce_status=True,
 9964:         )
 9965:         rows = conn.execute(
 9966:             """
 9967:             SELECT
 9968:                 id,
 9969:                 execution_run_id,
 9970:                 tenant_id,
 9971:                 workspace_id,
 9972:                 accrual_type,
 9973:                 source_reference_json,
 9974:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
 9975:                 calculated_amount,
 9976:                 currency,
 9977:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
 9978:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
 9979:                 status,
 9980:                 created_at
 9981:             FROM e3_accrual_proposals
 9982:             WHERE execution_run_id = ?
 9983:               AND tenant_id = ?
 9984:               AND workspace_id = ?
 9985:             ORDER BY accrual_type ASC, output_fingerprint_sha256 ASC, id ASC
 9986:             """,
 9987:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
 9988:         ).fetchall()
 9989:         return [_engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
 9990: 
 9991: 
 9992: def transition_engine3_accrual_status(
 9993:     *,
 9994:     tenant_id: str,
 9995:     workspace_id: str,
 9996:     accrual_id: str,
 9997:     to_status: str,
 9998:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
 9999:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
10000: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
10001:     proposal_columns = list_table_columns("e3_accrual_proposals")
10002:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
10003:     if not proposal_columns or not event_columns:
10004:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual schema is not available.")
10005: 
10006:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
10007:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
10008:     normalized_accrual_id = _normalize_required_text(accrual_id, field_name="accrual_id")
10009:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
10010:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
10011:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
10012: 
10013:     with get_conn() as conn:
10014:         row = conn.execute(
10015:             """
10016:             SELECT
10017:                 p.id,
10018:                 p.execution_run_id,
10019:                 p.tenant_id,
10020:                 p.workspace_id,
10021:                 p.status,
10022:                 p.output_fingerprint_sha256,
10023:                 r.status AS execution_run_status
10024:             FROM e3_accrual_proposals p
10025:             JOIN e3_execution_runs r ON r.id = p.execution_run_id
10026:             WHERE p.id = ?
10027:             LIMIT 1
10028:             """,
10029:             (normalized_accrual_id,),
10030:         ).fetchone()
10031:         if not row:
10032:             raise LookupError("accrual_id was not found.")
10033: 
10034:         row_tenant = _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
10035:         row_workspace = _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
10036:         if row_tenant != normalized_tenant or row_workspace != normalized_workspace:
10037:             raise PermissionError("accrual_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
10038: 
10039:         execution_run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(
10040:             row["execution_run_status"],
10041:             field_name="execution_run_status",
10042:         )
10043:         if execution_run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
10044:             raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow accrual operation.")
10045: 
10046:         from_status = _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
10047:         if from_status == normalized_to_status:
10048:             current = conn.execute(
10049:                 """
10050:                 SELECT
10051:                     id,
10052:                     execution_run_id,
10053:                     tenant_id,
10054:                     workspace_id,
10055:                     accrual_type,
10056:                     source_reference_json,
10057:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
10058:                     calculated_amount,
10059:                     currency,
10060:                     proposed_je_payload_json,
10061:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
10062:                     status,
10063:                     created_at
10064:                 FROM e3_accrual_proposals
10065:                 WHERE id = ?
10066:                 LIMIT 1
10067:                 """,
10068:                 (normalized_accrual_id,),
10069:             ).fetchone()
10070:             if not current:
10071:                 raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual proposal became unavailable.")
10072:             return _engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(current), False
10073: 
10074:         allowed = ENGINE3_ACCRUAL_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(from_status, set())
10075:         if normalized_to_status not in allowed:
10076:             raise RuntimeError("accrual status does not allow transition.")
10077: 
10078:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
10079:             """
10080:             UPDATE e3_accrual_proposals
10081:             SET status = ?
10082:             WHERE id = ?
10083:               AND tenant_id = ?
10084:               AND workspace_id = ?
10085:               AND status = ?
10086:             """,
10087:             (
10088:                 normalized_to_status,
10089:                 normalized_accrual_id,
10090:                 normalized_tenant,
10091:                 normalized_workspace,
10092:                 from_status,
10093:             ),
10094:         )
10095:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
10096:             current = conn.execute(
10097:                 """
10098:                 SELECT
10099:                     id,
10100:                     execution_run_id,
10101:                     tenant_id,
10102:                     workspace_id,
10103:                     accrual_type,
10104:                     source_reference_json,
10105:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
10106:                     calculated_amount,
10107:                     currency,
10108:                     proposed_je_payload_json,
10109:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
10110:                     status,
10111:                     created_at
10112:                 FROM e3_accrual_proposals
10113:                 WHERE id = ?
10114:                 LIMIT 1
10115:                 """,
10116:                 (normalized_accrual_id,),
10117:             ).fetchone()
10118:             if not current:
10119:                 raise RuntimeError("accrual status transition failed.")
10120:             current_status = _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(current["status"], field_name="status")
10121:             if current_status == normalized_to_status:
10122:                 return _engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(current), False
10123:             raise RuntimeError("accrual status transition failed.")
10124: 
10125:         execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id")
10126:         output_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
10127:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
10128:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
10129:         )
10130:         now = utc_now_iso()
10131:         event_type = "ACCRUAL_CONVERTED_TO_JE" if normalized_to_status == "CONVERTED_TO_JE" else "ACCRUAL_REJECTED"
10132:         _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
10133:             conn,
10134:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
10135:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
10136:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
10137:             event_type=event_type,
10138:             event_payload_json={
10139:                 "accrual_id": normalized_accrual_id,
10140:                 "from_status": from_status,
10141:                 "to_status": normalized_to_status,
10142:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
10143:             },
10144:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
10145:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
10146:             created_at=now,
10147:         )
10148: 
10149:         updated = conn.execute(
10150:             """
10151:             SELECT
10152:                 id,
10153:                 execution_run_id,
10154:                 tenant_id,
10155:                 workspace_id,
10156:                 accrual_type,
10157:                 source_reference_json,
10158:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
10159:                 calculated_amount,
10160:                 currency,
10161:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
10162:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
10163:                 status,
10164:                 created_at
10165:             FROM e3_accrual_proposals
10166:             WHERE id = ?
10167:             LIMIT 1
10168:             """,
10169:             (normalized_accrual_id,),
10170:         ).fetchone()
10171:         if not updated:
10172:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual proposal became unavailable after transition.")
10173:         return _engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(updated), True
10174: 
10175: 
10176: def convert_accrual_to_je(
10177:     *,
10178:     tenant_id: str,
10179:     workspace_id: str,
10180:     execution_run_id: str,
10181:     accrual_id: str,
10182:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
10183:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
10184: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
10185:     proposal_columns = list_table_columns("e3_accrual_proposals")
10186:     if not proposal_columns:
10187:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual schema is not available.")
10188: 
10189:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
10190:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
10191:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
10192:     normalized_accrual_id = _normalize_required_text(accrual_id, field_name="accrual_id")
10193:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
10194:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
10195: 
10196:     with get_conn() as conn:
10197:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_accrual(
10198:             conn,
10199:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
10200:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
10201:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
10202:             enforce_status=True,
10203:         )
10204:         row = conn.execute(
10205:             """
10206:             SELECT
10207:                 id,
10208:                 execution_run_id,
10209:                 tenant_id,
10210:                 workspace_id,
10211:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
10212:                 status
10213:             FROM e3_accrual_proposals
10214:             WHERE id = ?
10215:             LIMIT 1
10216:             """,
10217:             (normalized_accrual_id,),
10218:         ).fetchone()
10219:         if not row:
10220:             raise LookupError("accrual_id was not found.")
10221:         if _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id") != normalized_run_id:
10222:             raise PermissionError("accrual_id is outside execution_run scope.")
10223:         row_tenant = _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
10224:         row_workspace = _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
10225:         if row_tenant != normalized_tenant or row_workspace != normalized_workspace:
10226:             raise PermissionError("accrual_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
10227:         current_status = _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
10228:         if current_status == "REJECTED":
10229:             raise RuntimeError("accrual status does not allow transition.")
10230:         proposed_je_payload_json = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
10231:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
10232:                 row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
10233:                 field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
10234:             )
10235:         )
10236: 
10237:     je_draft, je_created = create_engine3_je_draft(
10238:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
10239:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
10240:         execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
10241:         je_draft_json=proposed_je_payload_json,
10242:     )
10243:     converted = False
10244:     if current_status == "PROPOSED":
10245:         _accrual_row, converted = transition_engine3_accrual_status(
10246:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
10247:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
10248:             accrual_id=normalized_accrual_id,
10249:             to_status="CONVERTED_TO_JE",
10250:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
10251:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
10252:         )
10253:     with get_conn() as conn:
10254:         accrual_row = conn.execute(
10255:             """
10256:             SELECT
10257:                 id,
10258:                 execution_run_id,
10259:                 tenant_id,
10260:                 workspace_id,
10261:                 accrual_type,
10262:                 source_reference_json,
10263:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
10264:                 calculated_amount,
10265:                 currency,
10266:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
10267:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
10268:                 status,
10269:                 created_at
10270:             FROM e3_accrual_proposals
10271:             WHERE id = ?
10272:             LIMIT 1
10273:             """,
10274:             (normalized_accrual_id,),
10275:         ).fetchone()
10276:         if not accrual_row:
10277:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 accrual proposal became unavailable after conversion.")
10278: 
10279:     return {
10280:         "accrual": _engine3_accrual_row_to_dict(accrual_row),
10281:         "je_draft": {
10282:             "id": str(je_draft.get("id") or ""),
10283:             "execution_run_id": str(je_draft.get("execution_run_id") or ""),
10284:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": str(je_draft.get("output_fingerprint_sha256") or ""),
10285:             "status": str(je_draft.get("status") or ""),
10286:             "created_at": str(je_draft.get("created_at") or ""),
10287:             "approved_at": str(je_draft.get("approved_at") or "") or None,
10288:             "rejected_at": str(je_draft.get("rejected_at") or "") or None,
10289:         },
10290:         "idempotent": (not je_created) and (not converted),
10291:     }
10292: 
10293: 
10294: def _engine3_reclass_output_fingerprint(
10295:     *,
10296:     reclass_type: str,
10297:     detection_rule_id: str,
10298:     source_reference_json: dict[str, Any],
10299:     calculated_amount: Decimal,
10300:     currency: str,
10301:     proposed_je_payload_json: dict[str, Any],
10302: ) -> str:
10303:     payload = {
10304:         "reclass_type": _normalize_engine3_reclass_type(reclass_type, field_name="reclass_type"),
10305:         "detection_rule_id": _normalize_required_text(detection_rule_id, field_name="detection_rule_id"),
10306:         "source_reference_json": _normalize_engine3_reclass_source_reference_json(source_reference_json),
10307:         "calculated_amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
10308:             _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(calculated_amount, field_name="calculated_amount")
10309:         ),
10310:         "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(currency, field_name="currency"),
10311:         "proposed_je_payload_json": _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(proposed_je_payload_json),
10312:     }
10313:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
10314: 
10315: 
10316: def _engine3_reclass_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
10317:     return {
10318:         "id": str(row["id"]),
10319:         "execution_run_id": str(row["execution_run_id"]),
10320:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
10321:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
10322:         "reclass_type": _normalize_engine3_reclass_type(row["reclass_type"], field_name="reclass_type"),
10323:         "detection_rule_id": _normalize_required_text(row["detection_rule_id"], field_name="detection_rule_id"),
10324:         "source_reference_json": _normalize_engine3_reclass_source_reference_json(
10325:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
10326:                 row["source_reference_json"],
10327:                 field_name="source_reference_json",
10328:             )
10329:         ),
10330:         "resolved_canonical_run_ids_json": _normalize_engine3_resolved_canonical_run_ids_json(
10331:             _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
10332:                 row["resolved_canonical_run_ids_json"],
10333:                 field_name="resolved_canonical_run_ids_json",
10334:             )
10335:         ),
10336:         "calculated_amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
10337:             _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
10338:         ),
10339:         "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
10340:         "proposed_je_payload_json": _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
10341:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
10342:                 row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
10343:                 field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
10344:             )
10345:         ),
10346:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
10347:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
10348:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
10349:         ),
10350:         "status": _normalize_engine3_reclass_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
10351:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
10352:     }
10353: 
10354: 
10355: def _engine3_reclass_allocation_targets(
10356:     conn: Any,
10357:     *,
10358:     tenant_id: str,
10359:     workspace_id: str,
10360:     source_account_code: str,
10361: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
10362:     rows = conn.execute(
10363:         """
10364:         SELECT
10365:             id,
10366:             target_dimension_key,
10367:             target_dimension_value,
10368:             allocation_percent
10369:         FROM e3_reclass_allocation_rules
10370:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
10371:           AND workspace_id = ?
10372:           AND source_account_code = ?
10373:         ORDER BY target_dimension_key ASC, target_dimension_value ASC, id ASC
10374:         """,
10375:         (tenant_id, workspace_id, source_account_code),
10376:     ).fetchall()
10377:     if not rows:
10378:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_ALLOCATION_RULE_MISSING")
10379:     targets: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
10380:     total = Decimal("0")
10381:     for row in rows:
10382:         percent = _normalize_engine3_je_amount(row["allocation_percent"], field_name="allocation_percent")
10383:         total += percent
10384:         targets.append(
10385:             {
10386:                 "dimension_key": _normalize_required_text(row["target_dimension_key"], field_name="target_dimension_key"),
10387:                 "dimension_value": _normalize_required_text(row["target_dimension_value"], field_name="target_dimension_value"),
10388:                 "allocation_percent": percent,
10389:             }
10390:         )
10391:     if total != Decimal("100.00"):
10392:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_ALLOCATION_INVALID")
10393:     return targets
10394: 
10395: 
10396: def _engine3_allocate_reclass_amounts(
10397:     *,
10398:     total_amount: Decimal,
10399:     targets: list[dict[str, Any]],
10400: ) -> list[tuple[dict[str, Any], Decimal]]:
10401:     normalized_total = _engine3_reclass_round_allocation_amount(total_amount)
10402:     if normalized_total <= Decimal("0"):
10403:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
10404:     if not targets:
10405:         raise RuntimeError("RECLASS_ALLOCATION_RULE_MISSING")
10406:     ordered_targets = sorted(
10407:         targets,
10408:         key=lambda target: (
