12097:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
12098:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
12099:     normalized_capex_id = _normalize_required_text(capex_id, field_name="capex_id")
12100:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine3_capex_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
12101:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
12102:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
12103: 
12104:     with get_conn() as conn:
12105:         row = conn.execute(
12106:             """
12107:             SELECT
12108:                 p.id,
12109:                 p.execution_run_id,
12110:                 p.tenant_id,
12111:                 p.workspace_id,
12112:                 p.status,
12113:                 p.output_fingerprint_sha256,
12114:                 r.status AS execution_run_status
12115:             FROM e3_capex_proposals p
12116:             JOIN e3_execution_runs r ON r.id = p.execution_run_id
12117:             WHERE p.id = ?
12118:             LIMIT 1
12119:             """,
12120:             (normalized_capex_id,),
12121:         ).fetchone()
12122:         if not row:
12123:             raise LookupError("capex_id was not found.")
12124: 
12125:         row_tenant = _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
12126:         row_workspace = _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
12127:         if row_tenant != normalized_tenant or row_workspace != normalized_workspace:
12128:             raise PermissionError("capex_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
12129:         execution_run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(
12130:             row["execution_run_status"],
12131:             field_name="execution_run_status",
12132:         )
12133:         if execution_run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
12134:             raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow capex operation.")
12135: 
12136:         from_status = _normalize_engine3_capex_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
12137:         if from_status == normalized_to_status:
12138:             current = conn.execute(
12139:                 """
12140:                 SELECT
12141:                     id,
12142:                     execution_run_id,
12143:                     tenant_id,
12144:                     workspace_id,
12145:                     capex_type,
12146:                     detection_rule_id,
12147:                     source_reference_json,
12148:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
12149:                     calculated_amount,
12150:                     currency,
12151:                     proposed_je_payload_json,
12152:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
12153:                     status,
12154:                     created_at
12155:                 FROM e3_capex_proposals
12156:                 WHERE id = ?
12157:                 LIMIT 1
12158:                 """,
12159:                 (normalized_capex_id,),
12160:             ).fetchone()
12161:             if not current:
12162:                 raise RuntimeError("Engine3 capex proposal became unavailable.")
12163:             return _engine3_capex_row_to_dict(current), False
12164: 
12165:         allowed = ENGINE3_CAPEX_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(from_status, set())
12166:         if normalized_to_status not in allowed:
12167:             raise RuntimeError("capex status does not allow transition.")
12168: 
12169:         update_cursor = conn.execute(
12170:             """
12171:             UPDATE e3_capex_proposals
12172:             SET status = ?
12173:             WHERE id = ?
12174:               AND tenant_id = ?
12175:               AND workspace_id = ?
12176:               AND status = ?
12177:             """,
12178:             (
12179:                 normalized_to_status,
12180:                 normalized_capex_id,
12181:                 normalized_tenant,
12182:                 normalized_workspace,
12183:                 from_status,
12184:             ),
12185:         )
12186:         if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
12187:             raise RuntimeError("capex status transition failed.")
12188: 
12189:         execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id")
12190:         output_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
12191:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
12192:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
12193:         )
12194:         now = utc_now_iso()
12195:         event_type = "CAPEX_CONVERTED_TO_JE" if normalized_to_status == "CONVERTED_TO_JE" else "CAPEX_REJECTED"
12196:         _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
12197:             conn,
12198:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
12199:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
12200:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
12201:             event_type=event_type,
12202:             event_payload_json={
12203:                 "capex_id": normalized_capex_id,
12204:                 "from_status": from_status,
12205:                 "to_status": normalized_to_status,
12206:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
12207:             },
12208:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
12209:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
12210:             created_at=now,
12211:         )
12212: 
12213:         updated = conn.execute(
12214:             """
12215:             SELECT
12216:                 id,
12217:                 execution_run_id,
12218:                 tenant_id,
12219:                 workspace_id,
12220:                 capex_type,
12221:                 detection_rule_id,
12222:                 source_reference_json,
12223:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
12224:                 calculated_amount,
12225:                 currency,
12226:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
12227:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
12228:                 status,
12229:                 created_at
12230:             FROM e3_capex_proposals
12231:             WHERE id = ?
12232:             LIMIT 1
12233:             """,
12234:             (normalized_capex_id,),
12235:         ).fetchone()
12236:         if not updated:
12237:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 capex proposal became unavailable after transition.")
12238:         return _engine3_capex_row_to_dict(updated), True
12239: 
12240: 
12241: def convert_capex_to_je(
12242:     *,
12243:     tenant_id: str,
12244:     workspace_id: str,
12245:     execution_run_id: str,
12246:     capex_id: str,
12247:     actor_type: str = "SYSTEM",
12248:     actor_id: str = "engine3_system",
12249: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
12250:     proposal_columns = list_table_columns("e3_capex_proposals")
12251:     if not proposal_columns:
12252:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 capex schema is not available.")
12253: 
12254:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
12255:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
12256:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
12257:     normalized_capex_id = _normalize_required_text(capex_id, field_name="capex_id")
12258:     normalized_actor_type = _normalize_engine3_actor_type(actor_type, field_name="actor_type")
12259:     normalized_actor_id = _normalize_required_text(actor_id, field_name="actor_id")
12260: 
12261:     with get_conn() as conn:
12262:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_capex(
12263:             conn,
12264:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
12265:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
12266:             execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
12267:             enforce_status=True,
12268:         )
12269:         row = conn.execute(
12270:             """
12271:             SELECT
12272:                 id,
12273:                 execution_run_id,
12274:                 tenant_id,
12275:                 workspace_id,
12276:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
12277:                 status
12278:             FROM e3_capex_proposals
12279:             WHERE id = ?
12280:             LIMIT 1
12281:             """,
12282:             (normalized_capex_id,),
12283:         ).fetchone()
12284:         if not row:
12285:             raise LookupError("capex_id was not found.")
12286:         if _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id") != normalized_run_id:
12287:             raise PermissionError("capex_id is outside execution_run scope.")
12288:         row_tenant = _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
12289:         row_workspace = _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
12290:         if row_tenant != normalized_tenant or row_workspace != normalized_workspace:
12291:             raise PermissionError("capex_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
12292:         current_status = _normalize_engine3_capex_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
12293:         if current_status == "REJECTED":
12294:             raise RuntimeError("capex status does not allow transition.")
12295:         proposed_je_payload_json = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
12296:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
12297:                 row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
12298:                 field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
12299:             )
12300:         )
12301: 
12302:     je_draft, je_created = create_engine3_je_draft(
12303:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
12304:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
12305:         execution_run_id=normalized_run_id,
12306:         je_draft_json=proposed_je_payload_json,
12307:     )
12308:     converted = False
12309:     if current_status == "PROPOSED":
12310:         _capex_row, converted = transition_engine3_capex_status(
12311:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
12312:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
12313:             capex_id=normalized_capex_id,
12314:             to_status="CONVERTED_TO_JE",
12315:             actor_type=normalized_actor_type,
12316:             actor_id=normalized_actor_id,
12317:         )
12318: 
12319:     with get_conn() as conn:
12320:         capex_row = conn.execute(
12321:             """
12322:             SELECT
12323:                 id,
12324:                 execution_run_id,
12325:                 tenant_id,
12326:                 workspace_id,
12327:                 capex_type,
12328:                 detection_rule_id,
12329:                 source_reference_json,
12330:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
12331:                 calculated_amount,
12332:                 currency,
12333:                 proposed_je_payload_json,
12334:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
12335:                 status,
12336:                 created_at
12337:             FROM e3_capex_proposals
12338:             WHERE id = ?
12339:             LIMIT 1
12340:             """,
12341:             (normalized_capex_id,),
12342:         ).fetchone()
12343:         if not capex_row:
12344:             raise RuntimeError("Engine3 capex proposal became unavailable after conversion.")
12345: 
12346:     return {
12347:         "capex": _engine3_capex_row_to_dict(capex_row),
12348:         "je_draft": {
12349:             "id": str(je_draft.get("id") or ""),
12350:             "execution_run_id": str(je_draft.get("execution_run_id") or ""),
12351:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": str(je_draft.get("output_fingerprint_sha256") or ""),
12352:             "status": str(je_draft.get("status") or ""),
12353:             "created_at": str(je_draft.get("created_at") or ""),
12354:             "approved_at": str(je_draft.get("approved_at") or "") or None,
12355:             "rejected_at": str(je_draft.get("rejected_at") or "") or None,
12356:         },
12357:         "idempotent": (not je_created) and (not converted),
12358:     }
12359: 
12360: 
12361: def compute_engine3_narrative_replay_bundle_hash(
12362:     *,
12363:     template_fingerprint_sha256: str,
12364:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
12365:     resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json: list[str],
12366:     resolved_engine3_action_ids_json: list[str],
12367:     input_fingerprint_sha256: str,
12368:     output_fingerprint_sha256: str,
12369:     artifact_refs_json: list[dict[str, Any]] | None = None,
12370: ) -> str:
12371:     payload = {
12372:         "template_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12373:             template_fingerprint_sha256,
12374:             field_name="template_fingerprint_sha256",
12375:         ),
12376:         "period_scope_json": canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(period_scope_json),
12377:         "resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json": sorted(
12378:             {
12379:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json")
12380:                 for item in resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json
12381:             }
12382:         ),
12383:         "resolved_engine3_action_ids_json": sorted(
12384:             {
12385:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine3_action_ids_json")
12386:                 for item in resolved_engine3_action_ids_json
12387:             }
12388:         ),
12389:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12390:             input_fingerprint_sha256,
12391:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
12392:         ),
12393:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12394:             output_fingerprint_sha256,
12395:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
12396:         ),
12397:         "artifact_refs_json": _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(artifact_refs_json),
12398:     }
12399:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
12400: 
12401: 
12402: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_llm_validation_status(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
12403:     normalized = _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
12404:     if normalized not in ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_LLM_VALIDATION_STATUSES:
12405:         allowed = ", ".join(ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_LLM_VALIDATION_STATUSES)
12406:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {allowed}.")
12407:     return normalized
12408: 
12409: 
12410: def _normalize_engine3_llm_provider(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
12411:     return _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name).upper()
12412: 
12413: 
12414: def _normalize_engine3_llm_model_id(value: Any, *, field_name: str) -> str:
12415:     return _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=field_name)
12416: 
12417: 
12418: def _normalize_engine3_narrative_llm_input_json(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
12419:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name="llm_input_json")
12420:     required_keys = {
12421:         "deterministic_narrative_text",
12422:         "structured_narrative_json",
12423:         "action_summary",
12424:         "constraints",
12425:     }
12426:     if set(payload.keys()) != required_keys:
12427:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json must include only deterministic_narrative_text, structured_narrative_json, action_summary, constraints.")
12428:     narrative_text = _normalize_required_text(
12429:         payload.get("deterministic_narrative_text"),
12430:         field_name="llm_input_json.deterministic_narrative_text",
12431:     )
12432:     structured = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
12433:         payload.get("structured_narrative_json"),
12434:         field_name="llm_input_json.structured_narrative_json",
12435:     )
12436:     action_summary = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
12437:         payload.get("action_summary"),
12438:         field_name="llm_input_json.action_summary",
12439:     )
12440:     constraints = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
12441:         payload.get("constraints"),
12442:         field_name="llm_input_json.constraints",
12443:     )
12444:     required_constraints = {
12445:         "no_new_numbers",
12446:         "no_new_metrics",
12447:         "no_assumptions",
12448:         "style",
12449:     }
12450:     if set(constraints.keys()) != required_constraints:
12451:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json.constraints must include only no_new_numbers, no_new_metrics, no_assumptions, style.")
12452:     if constraints.get("no_new_numbers") is not True:
12453:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json.constraints.no_new_numbers must be true.")
12454:     if constraints.get("no_new_metrics") is not True:
12455:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json.constraints.no_new_metrics must be true.")
12456:     if constraints.get("no_assumptions") is not True:
12457:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json.constraints.no_assumptions must be true.")
12458:     style = _normalize_required_text(constraints.get("style"), field_name="llm_input_json.constraints.style")
12459:     if style != "executive_summary":
12460:         raise ValueError("llm_input_json.constraints.style must be executive_summary.")
12461:     return {
12462:         "deterministic_narrative_text": narrative_text,
12463:         "structured_narrative_json": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(structured)),
12464:         "action_summary": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(action_summary)),
12465:         "constraints": {
12466:             "no_new_numbers": True,
12467:             "no_new_metrics": True,
12468:             "no_assumptions": True,
12469:             "style": style,
12470:         },
12471:     }
12472: 
12473: 
12474: def _engine3_narrative_llm_prompt_hash(*, system_prompt: str, llm_input_json: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
12475:     normalized_prompt = _normalize_required_text(system_prompt, field_name="system_prompt")
12476:     canonical_input = _canonical_json_text(
12477:         _normalize_engine3_narrative_llm_input_json(llm_input_json)
12478:     )
12479:     return determinism.sha256_hex_text(f"{normalized_prompt}\n{canonical_input}")
12480: 
12481: 
12482: def _engine3_normalize_numeric_token(token: str) -> str:
12483:     raw = str(token or "").strip()
12484:     if not raw:
12485:         return ""
12486:     upper = raw.upper().replace("USD", "").replace("$", "").replace(",", "").strip()
12487:     is_percent = upper.endswith("%")
12488:     if is_percent:
12489:         upper = upper[:-1].strip()
12490:     if not upper:
12491:         return ""
12492:     try:
12493:         numeric = Decimal(upper)
12494:     except (InvalidOperation, ValueError):
12495:         return ""
12496:     canonical = format(numeric.normalize(), "f")
12497:     if "." in canonical:
12498:         canonical = canonical.rstrip("0").rstrip(".")
12499:     if not canonical:
12500:         canonical = "0"
12501:     if canonical == "-0":
12502:         canonical = "0"
12503:     return f"{canonical}%" if is_percent else canonical
12504: 
12505: 
12506: def _engine3_extract_numeric_tokens(text: Any) -> set[str]:
12507:     source_text = str(text or "")
12508:     normalized_tokens: set[str] = set()
12509:     for match in _ENGINE3_NUMERIC_TOKEN_RE.finditer(source_text):
12510:         normalized = _engine3_normalize_numeric_token(match.group(0))
12511:         if normalized:
12512:             normalized_tokens.add(normalized)
12513:     return normalized_tokens
12514: 
12515: 
12516: def _engine3_validate_narrative_llm_numeric_drift(
12517:     *,
12518:     deterministic_narrative_text: str,
12519:     llm_output_text: str,
12520: ) -> None:
12521:     source_tokens = _engine3_extract_numeric_tokens(deterministic_narrative_text)
12522:     output_tokens = _engine3_extract_numeric_tokens(llm_output_text)
12523:     if output_tokens.difference(source_tokens):
12524:         raise RuntimeError("LLM_NUMERIC_DRIFT_DETECTED")
12525: 
12526: 
12527: def _engine3_normalize_metric_label_token(token: Any) -> str:
12528:     normalized = re.sub(r"[^A-Z0-9\s]", " ", str(token or "").upper())
12529:     normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", normalized).strip()
12530:     if not normalized:
12531:         return ""
12532:     parts = [part for part in normalized.split(" ") if part]
12533:     if not parts:
12534:         return ""
12535:     if all(part in _ENGINE3_METRIC_STOP_WORDS for part in parts):
12536:         return ""
12537:     return " ".join(parts)
12538: 
12539: 
12540: def _engine3_iter_json_string_values(payload: Any) -> Iterable[str]:
12541:     if isinstance(payload, dict):
12542:         for key, value in payload.items():
12543:             yield str(key)
12544:             yield from _engine3_iter_json_string_values(value)
12545:         return
12546:     if isinstance(payload, list):
12547:         for item in payload:
12548:             yield from _engine3_iter_json_string_values(item)
12549:         return
12550:     if isinstance(payload, str):
12551:         text = payload.strip()
12552:         if text:
12553:             yield text
12554: 
12555: 
12556: def _engine3_extract_metric_labels_from_text(
12557:     text: str,
12558:     *,
12559:     allow_title_case_non_finance: bool,
12560: ) -> set[str]:
12561:     labels: set[str] = set()
12562:     source = str(text or "")
12563:     for match in _ENGINE3_METRIC_UPPER_TOKEN_RE.finditer(source):
12564:         normalized = _engine3_normalize_metric_label_token(match.group(0))
12565:         if normalized:
12566:             labels.add(normalized)
12567:     for match in _ENGINE3_METRIC_TITLE_PHRASE_RE.finditer(source):
12568:         raw_phrase = match.group(0)
12569:         normalized = _engine3_normalize_metric_label_token(raw_phrase)
12570:         if not normalized:
12571:             continue
12572:         if allow_title_case_non_finance:
12573:             labels.add(normalized)
12574:             continue
12575:         phrase_upper = normalized.upper()
12576:         if any(keyword in phrase_upper for keyword in _ENGINE3_FINANCE_KEYWORDS):
12577:             labels.add(normalized)
12578:     for keyword in _ENGINE3_FINANCE_KEYWORDS:
12579:         keyword_pattern = re.compile(rf"\b{re.escape(keyword)}\b", re.IGNORECASE)
12580:         if keyword_pattern.search(source):
12581:             labels.add(_engine3_normalize_metric_label_token(keyword))
12582:     return {item for item in labels if item}
12583: 
12584: 
12585: def _engine3_extract_allowed_metric_labels(
12586:     *,
12587:     structured_narrative_json: dict[str, Any],
12588:     deterministic_narrative_text: str,
12589: ) -> set[str]:
12590:     allowed: set[str] = set()
12591:     for value in _engine3_iter_json_string_values(structured_narrative_json):
12592:         normalized = _engine3_normalize_metric_label_token(value)
12593:         if normalized:
12594:             allowed.add(normalized)
12595:         allowed.update(
12596:             _engine3_extract_metric_labels_from_text(
12597:                 value,
12598:                 allow_title_case_non_finance=True,
12599:             )
12600:         )
12601:     allowed.update(
12602:         _engine3_extract_metric_labels_from_text(
12603:             deterministic_narrative_text,
12604:             allow_title_case_non_finance=True,
12605:         )
12606:     )
12607:     return {item for item in allowed if item}
12608: 
12609: 
12610: def _engine3_extract_candidate_metric_labels(llm_output_text: str) -> set[str]:
12611:     return _engine3_extract_metric_labels_from_text(
12612:         llm_output_text,
12613:         allow_title_case_non_finance=False,
12614:     )
12615: 
12616: 
12617: def _engine3_validate_narrative_llm_metric_drift(
12618:     *,
12619:     structured_narrative_json: dict[str, Any],
12620:     deterministic_narrative_text: str,
12621:     llm_output_text: str,
12622: ) -> None:
12623:     allowed_labels = _engine3_extract_allowed_metric_labels(
12624:         structured_narrative_json=structured_narrative_json,
12625:         deterministic_narrative_text=deterministic_narrative_text,
12626:     )
12627:     output_labels = _engine3_extract_candidate_metric_labels(llm_output_text)
12628:     if output_labels.difference(allowed_labels):
12629:         raise RuntimeError("LLM_METRIC_DRIFT_DETECTED")
12630: 
12631: 
12632: def _engine3_normalize_period_token(token: Any) -> str:
12633:     normalized = re.sub(r"[^A-Z0-9]", "", str(token or "").upper()).strip()
12634:     return normalized
12635: 
12636: 
12637: def _engine3_extract_period_tokens(text: str) -> set[str]:
12638:     source = str(text or "")
12639:     tokens: set[str] = set()
12640:     patterns = (
12641:         _ENGINE3_PERIOD_YYYY_MM_RE,
12642:         _ENGINE3_PERIOD_QUARTER_RE,
12643:         _ENGINE3_PERIOD_FY_RE,
12644:         _ENGINE3_PERIOD_MONTH_NAME_RE,
12645:         _ENGINE3_PERIOD_YEAR_RE,
12646:     )
12647:     for pattern in patterns:
12648:         for match in pattern.finditer(source):
12649:             normalized = _engine3_normalize_period_token(match.group(0))
12650:             if normalized:
12651:                 tokens.add(normalized)
12652:     return tokens
12653: 
12654: 
12655: def _engine3_validate_narrative_llm_period_drift(
12656:     *,
12657:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
12658:     structured_narrative_json: dict[str, Any],
12659:     deterministic_narrative_text: str,
12660:     llm_output_text: str,
12661: ) -> None:
12662:     allowed_periods: set[str] = set()
12663:     allowed_periods.update(_engine3_extract_period_tokens(_canonical_json_text(period_scope_json)))
12664:     allowed_periods.update(_engine3_extract_period_tokens(_canonical_json_text(structured_narrative_json)))
12665:     allowed_periods.update(_engine3_extract_period_tokens(deterministic_narrative_text))
12666:     output_periods = _engine3_extract_period_tokens(llm_output_text)
12667:     if output_periods.difference(allowed_periods):
12668:         raise RuntimeError("LLM_PERIOD_DRIFT_DETECTED")
12669: 
12670: 
12671: def _engine3_narrative_llm_output_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
12672:     return {
12673:         "id": str(row["id"]),
12674:         "narrative_run_id": str(row["narrative_run_id"]),
12675:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
12676:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
12677:         "llm_provider": _normalize_engine3_llm_provider(row["llm_provider"], field_name="llm_provider"),
12678:         "model_id": _normalize_engine3_llm_model_id(row["model_id"], field_name="model_id"),
12679:         "prompt_hash_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12680:             row["prompt_hash_sha256"],
12681:             field_name="prompt_hash_sha256",
12682:         ),
12683:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12684:             row["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
12685:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
12686:         ),
12687:         "llm_input_json": _normalize_engine3_narrative_llm_input_json(
12688:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["llm_input_json"], field_name="llm_input_json")
12689:         ),
12690:         "llm_output_text": str(row["llm_output_text"] or ""),
12691:         "llm_output_hash_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12692:             row["llm_output_hash_sha256"],
12693:             field_name="llm_output_hash_sha256",
12694:         ),
12695:         "validation_status": _normalize_engine3_narrative_llm_validation_status(
12696:             row["validation_status"],
12697:             field_name="validation_status",
12698:         ),
12699:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
12700:     }
12701: 
12702: 
12703: def _engine3_narrative_input_fingerprint(
12704:     *,
12705:     execution_run_id: str,
12706:     template_key: str,
12707:     template_version_number: int,
12708:     template_fingerprint_sha256: str,
12709:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
12710:     resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json: list[str],
12711:     resolved_engine3_action_ids_json: list[str],
12712: ) -> str:
12713:     payload = {
12714:         "execution_run_id": _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id"),
12715:         "template_key": _normalize_required_text(template_key, field_name="template_key"),
12716:         "template_version_number": int(template_version_number),
12717:         "template_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12718:             template_fingerprint_sha256,
12719:             field_name="template_fingerprint_sha256",
12720:         ),
12721:         "period_scope_json": canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(period_scope_json),
12722:         "resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json": sorted(
12723:             {
12724:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json")
12725:                 for item in resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json
12726:             }
12727:         ),
12728:         "resolved_engine3_action_ids_json": sorted(
12729:             {
12730:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine3_action_ids_json")
12731:                 for item in resolved_engine3_action_ids_json
12732:             }
12733:         ),
12734:     }
12735:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
12736: 
12737: 
12738: def _engine3_narrative_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
12739:     return {
12740:         "id": str(row["id"]),
12741:         "execution_run_id": str(row["execution_run_id"]),
12742:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
12743:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
12744:         "template_key": _normalize_required_text(row["template_key"], field_name="template_key"),
12745:         "template_version_number": int(row["template_version_number"]),
12746:         "period_scope_json": canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(
12747:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
12748:                 row["period_scope_json"],
12749:                 field_name="period_scope_json",
12750:             )
12751:         ),
12752:         "resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json": sorted(
12753:             {
12754:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json")
12755:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
12756:                     row["resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json"],
12757:                     field_name="resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json",
12758:                 )
12759:             }
12760:         ),
12761:         "resolved_engine3_action_ids_json": sorted(
12762:             {
12763:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_engine3_action_ids_json")
12764:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
12765:                     row["resolved_engine3_action_ids_json"],
12766:                     field_name="resolved_engine3_action_ids_json",
12767:                 )
12768:             }
12769:         ),
12770:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12771:             row["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
12772:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
12773:         ),
12774:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": (
12775:             _normalize_engine1_hash(
12776:                 row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
12777:                 field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
12778:             )
12779:             if str(row["output_fingerprint_sha256"] or "").strip()
12780:             else None
12781:         ),
12782:         "status": _normalize_engine3_narrative_run_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
12783:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
12784:     }
12785: 
12786: 
12787: def _engine3_narrative_output_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
12788:     structured_narrative_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
12789:         row["structured_narrative_json"],
12790:         field_name="structured_narrative_json",
12791:     )
12792:     artifact_refs_json = _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(
12793:         _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
12794:             row["artifact_refs_json"],
12795:             field_name="artifact_refs_json",
12796:         )
12797:     )
12798:     return {
12799:         "id": str(row["id"]),
12800:         "narrative_run_id": str(row["narrative_run_id"]),
12801:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
12802:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
12803:         "narrative_text": str(row["narrative_text"] or ""),
12804:         "structured_narrative_json": structured_narrative_json,
12805:         "artifact_refs_json": artifact_refs_json,
12806:         "replay_bundle_hash": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12807:             row["replay_bundle_hash"],
12808:             field_name="replay_bundle_hash",
12809:         ),
12810:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
12811:     }
12812: 
12813: 
12814: def _engine3_narrative_template_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
12815:     template_body_json = _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_body_json(
12816:         _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
12817:             row["template_body_json"],
12818:             field_name="template_body_json",
12819:         )
12820:     )
12821:     return {
12822:         "id": str(row["id"]),
12823:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
12824:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
12825:         "template_key": _normalize_required_text(row["template_key"], field_name="template_key"),
12826:         "version_number": int(row["version_number"]),
12827:         "status": _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
12828:         "period_grain": _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(row["period_grain"]),
12829:         "template_body_json": template_body_json,
12830:         "template_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
12831:             row["template_fingerprint_sha256"],
12832:             field_name="template_fingerprint_sha256",
12833:         ),
12834:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
12835:         "certified_at": str(row["certified_at"] or "") or None,
12836:     }
12837: 
12838: 
12839: def create_engine3_narrative_template(
12840:     *,
12841:     tenant_id: str,
12842:     workspace_id: str,
12843:     template_key: str,
12844:     period_grain: str,
12845:     template_body_json: dict[str, Any],
12846: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
12847:     template_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_templates")
12848:     if not template_columns:
12849:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 narrative template schema is not available.")
12850: 
12851:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
12852:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
12853:     normalized_template_key = _normalize_required_text(template_key, field_name="template_key")
12854:     normalized_period_grain = _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(period_grain)
12855:     normalized_template_body = _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_body_json(template_body_json)
12856: 
12857:     with get_conn() as conn:
12858:         current_version = conn.execute(
12859:             """
12860:             SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_number), 0) AS max_version
12861:             FROM e3_narrative_templates
12862:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
12863:               AND workspace_id = ?
12864:               AND template_key = ?
12865:             """,
12866:             (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_template_key),
12867:         ).fetchone()
12868:         version_number = int(current_version["max_version"] or 0) + 1
12869:         template_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_narrative_template_fingerprint(
12870:             template_key=normalized_template_key,
12871:             version_number=version_number,
12872:             period_grain=normalized_period_grain,
12873:             template_body_json=normalized_template_body,
12874:         )
12875:         template_id = str(uuid4())
12876:         now = utc_now_iso()
12877:         conn.execute(
12878:             """
12879:             INSERT INTO e3_narrative_templates (
12880:                 id,
12881:                 tenant_id,
12882:                 workspace_id,
12883:                 template_key,
12884:                 version_number,
12885:                 status,
12886:                 period_grain,
12887:                 template_body_json,
12888:                 template_fingerprint_sha256,
12889:                 created_at,
12890:                 certified_at
12891:             )
12892:             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'DRAFT', ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
12893:             """,
12894:             (
12895:                 template_id,
12896:                 normalized_tenant,
12897:                 normalized_workspace,
12898:                 normalized_template_key,
12899:                 version_number,
12900:                 normalized_period_grain,
12901:                 _canonical_json_text(normalized_template_body),
12902:                 template_fingerprint_sha256,
12903:                 now,
12904:             ),
12905:         )
12906:         row = conn.execute(
12907:             """
12908:             SELECT
12909:                 id,
12910:                 tenant_id,
12911:                 workspace_id,
12912:                 template_key,
12913:                 version_number,
12914:                 status,
12915:                 period_grain,
12916:                 template_body_json,
12917:                 template_fingerprint_sha256,
12918:                 created_at,
12919:                 certified_at
12920:             FROM e3_narrative_templates
12921:             WHERE id = ?
12922:             LIMIT 1
12923:             """,
12924:             (template_id,),
12925:         ).fetchone()
12926:         if not row:
12927:             raise RuntimeError("Narrative template creation failed.")
12928:         return _engine3_narrative_template_row_to_dict(row)
12929: 
12930: 
12931: def _engine3_transition_narrative_template_status(
12932:     conn: Any,
12933:     *,
12934:     tenant_id: str,
12935:     workspace_id: str,
12936:     template_key: str,
12937:     version_number: int,
12938:     to_status: str,
12939: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
12940:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
12941:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
12942:     normalized_template_key = _normalize_required_text(template_key, field_name="template_key")
12943:     normalized_version = int(version_number)
12944:     if normalized_version <= 0:
12945:         raise ValueError("version_number must be greater than 0.")
12946:     normalized_to_status = _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_status(to_status, field_name="to_status")
12947: 
12948:     row = conn.execute(
12949:         """
12950:         SELECT
12951:             id,
12952:             tenant_id,
12953:             workspace_id,
12954:             template_key,
12955:             version_number,
12956:             status,
12957:             period_grain,
12958:             template_body_json,
12959:             template_fingerprint_sha256,
12960:             created_at,
12961:             certified_at
12962:         FROM e3_narrative_templates
12963:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
12964:           AND workspace_id = ?
12965:           AND template_key = ?
12966:           AND version_number = ?
12967:         LIMIT 1
12968:         """,
12969:         (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_template_key, normalized_version),
12970:     ).fetchone()
12971:     if not row:
12972:         raise LookupError("Narrative template version was not found.")
12973:     from_status = _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
12974:     if from_status == normalized_to_status:
12975:         return _engine3_narrative_template_row_to_dict(row), False
12976: 
12977:     allowed = ENGINE3_NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(from_status, set())
12978:     if normalized_to_status not in allowed:
12979:         raise RuntimeError("narrative template status does not allow transition.")
12980: 
12981:     now = utc_now_iso()
12982:     if normalized_to_status == "CERTIFIED":
12983:         conn.execute(
12984:             """
12985:             UPDATE e3_narrative_templates
12986:             SET status = 'RETIRED'
12987:             WHERE tenant_id = ?
12988:               AND workspace_id = ?
12989:               AND template_key = ?
12990:               AND status = 'CERTIFIED'
12991:               AND version_number <> ?
12992:             """,
12993:             (normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace, normalized_template_key, normalized_version),
12994:         )
12995:     update_cursor = conn.execute(
12996:         """
12997:         UPDATE e3_narrative_templates
12998:         SET status = ?,
12999:             certified_at = CASE
13000:                 WHEN ? = 'CERTIFIED' THEN ?
13001:                 ELSE certified_at
13002:             END
13003:         WHERE id = ?
13004:           AND tenant_id = ?
13005:           AND workspace_id = ?
13006:           AND status = ?
13007:         """,
13008:         (
13009:             normalized_to_status,
13010:             normalized_to_status,
13011:             now,
13012:             str(row["id"]),
13013:             normalized_tenant,
13014:             normalized_workspace,
13015:             from_status,
13016:         ),
13017:     )
13018:     if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
13019:         raise RuntimeError("narrative template status transition failed.")
13020:     updated = conn.execute(
13021:         """
13022:         SELECT
13023:             id,
13024:             tenant_id,
13025:             workspace_id,
13026:             template_key,
13027:             version_number,
13028:             status,
13029:             period_grain,
13030:             template_body_json,
13031:             template_fingerprint_sha256,
13032:             created_at,
13033:             certified_at
13034:         FROM e3_narrative_templates
13035:         WHERE id = ?
13036:         LIMIT 1
13037:         """,
13038:         (str(row["id"]),),
13039:     ).fetchone()
13040:     if not updated:
13041:         raise RuntimeError("Narrative template became unavailable after transition.")
13042:     return _engine3_narrative_template_row_to_dict(updated), True
13043: 
13044: 
13045: def certify_engine3_narrative_template(
13046:     *,
13047:     tenant_id: str,
13048:     workspace_id: str,
13049:     template_key: str,
13050:     version_number: int,
13051: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
13052:     template_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_templates")
13053:     if not template_columns:
13054:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 narrative template schema is not available.")
13055:     with get_conn() as conn:
13056:         return _engine3_transition_narrative_template_status(
13057:             conn,
13058:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
13059:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
13060:             template_key=template_key,
13061:             version_number=version_number,
13062:             to_status="CERTIFIED",
13063:         )
13064: 
13065: 
13066: def retire_engine3_narrative_template(
13067:     *,
13068:     tenant_id: str,
13069:     workspace_id: str,
13070:     template_key: str,
13071:     version_number: int,
13072: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
13073:     template_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_templates")
13074:     if not template_columns:
13075:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 narrative template schema is not available.")
13076:     with get_conn() as conn:
13077:         return _engine3_transition_narrative_template_status(
13078:             conn,
13079:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
13080:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
13081:             template_key=template_key,
13082:             version_number=version_number,
13083:             to_status="RETIRED",
13084:         )

13086: 
13087: def _engine3_require_execution_run_for_narrative(
13088:     conn: Any,
13089:     *,
13090:     tenant_id: str,
13091:     workspace_id: str,
13092:     execution_run_id: str,
13093: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
13094:     run_row = conn.execute(
13095:         """
13096:         SELECT
13097:             id,
13098:             tenant_id,
13099:             workspace_id,
13100:             action_type,
13101:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
13102:             status
13103:         FROM e3_execution_runs
13104:         WHERE id = ?
13105:         LIMIT 1
13106:         """,
13107:         (execution_run_id,),
13108:     ).fetchone()
13109:     if not run_row:
13110:         raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
13111:     run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(run_row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
13112:     run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(run_row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
13113:     if run_tenant != tenant_id or run_workspace != workspace_id:
13114:         raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
13115:     run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
13116:     if run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
13117:         raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow narrative operation.")
13118:     action_type = _normalize_engine3_action_type(run_row["action_type"], field_name="action_type")
13119:     if action_type != "VARIANCE_NARRATIVE":
13120:         raise ValueError("INVALID_ACTION_SCOPE")
13121:     return {
13122:         "id": _normalize_required_text(run_row["id"], field_name="id"),
13123:         "tenant_id": run_tenant,
13124:         "workspace_id": run_workspace,
13125:         "status": run_status,
13126:         "canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
13127:             run_row["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
13128:             field_name="canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256",
13129:         ),
13130:     }
13131: 
13132: 
13133: def _engine3_resolve_certified_narrative_template(
13134:     conn: Any,
13135:     *,
13136:     tenant_id: str,
13137:     workspace_id: str,
13138:     template_key: str,
13139:     period_grain: str,
13140: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
13141:     normalized_template_key = _normalize_required_text(template_key, field_name="template_key")
13142:     normalized_period_grain = _normalize_engine2b_period_grain(period_grain)
13143:     rows = conn.execute(
13144:         """
13145:         SELECT
13146:             id,
13147:             tenant_id,
13148:             workspace_id,
13149:             template_key,
13150:             version_number,
13151:             status,
13152:             period_grain,
13153:             template_body_json,
13154:             template_fingerprint_sha256,
13155:             created_at,
13156:             certified_at
13157:         FROM e3_narrative_templates
13158:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
13159:           AND workspace_id = ?
13160:           AND template_key = ?
13161:           AND period_grain = ?
13162:           AND status = 'CERTIFIED'
13163:         ORDER BY version_number DESC, id DESC
13164:         """,
13165:         (tenant_id, workspace_id, normalized_template_key, normalized_period_grain),
13166:     ).fetchall()
13167:     if not rows:
13168:         raise RuntimeError("NARRATIVE_TEMPLATE_NOT_CERTIFIED")
13169:     if len(rows) > 1:
13170:         raise RuntimeError("NARRATIVE_LINEAGE_AMBIGUOUS")
13171:     return _engine3_narrative_template_row_to_dict(rows[0])
13172: 
13173: 
13174: def _engine3_resolve_narrative_engine2b_inputs(
13175:     conn: Any,
13176:     *,
13177:     tenant_id: str,
13178:     workspace_id: str,
13179:     canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256: str,
13180:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
13181: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
13182:     period_scope_canonical = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(period_scope_json)
13183:     period_scope_text = _canonical_json_text(period_scope_canonical)
13184:     rows = conn.execute(
13185:         """
13186:         SELECT
13187:             r.id AS mis_run_id,
13188:             o.structured_output_json
13189:         FROM e2b_mis_runs r
13190:         JOIN e2b_mis_outputs o ON o.mis_run_id = r.id
13191:         WHERE r.tenant_id = ?
13192:           AND r.workspace_id = ?
13193:           AND r.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
13194:           AND r.canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256 = ?
13195:           AND r.period_scope_json = ?
13196:         ORDER BY r.id ASC
13197:         """,
13198:         (
13199:             tenant_id,
13200:             workspace_id,
13201:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256,
13202:             period_scope_text,
13203:         ),
13204:     ).fetchall()
13205:     if not rows:
13206:         raise RuntimeError("NARRATIVE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
13207:     if len(rows) > 1:
13208:         raise RuntimeError("NARRATIVE_LINEAGE_AMBIGUOUS")
13209:     mis_run_id = _normalize_required_text(rows[0]["mis_run_id"], field_name="mis_run_id")
13210:     structured_raw = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
13211:         rows[0]["structured_output_json"],
13212:         field_name="structured_output_json",
13213:     )
13214:     structured_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(structured_raw)
13215:     return [mis_run_id], structured_payload
13216: 
13217: 
13218: def _engine3_resolve_narrative_action_summaries(
13219:     conn: Any,
13220:     *,
13221:     tenant_id: str,
13222:     workspace_id: str,
13223:     execution_run_id: str,
13224: ) -> tuple[list[str], list[dict[str, Any]]]:
13225:     required_tables = ("e3_accrual_proposals", "e3_reclass_proposals", "e3_capex_proposals")
13226:     if any(not list_table_columns(table) for table in required_tables):
13227:         raise RuntimeError("NARRATIVE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
13228: 
13229:     action_ids: list[str] = []
13230:     summaries: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
13231: 
13232:     accrual_rows = conn.execute(
13233:         """
13234:         SELECT id, accrual_type, status, calculated_amount, currency
13235:         FROM e3_accrual_proposals
13236:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
13237:           AND workspace_id = ?
13238:           AND execution_run_id = ?
13239:         ORDER BY id ASC
13240:         """,
13241:         (tenant_id, workspace_id, execution_run_id),
13242:     ).fetchall()
13243:     for row in accrual_rows:
13244:         item_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id")
13245:         action_ids.append(f"ACCRUAL:{item_id}")
13246:         summaries.append(
13247:             {
13248:                 "module": "ACCRUAL",
13249:                 "id": item_id,
13250:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_accrual_type(row["accrual_type"], field_name="accrual_type"),
13251:                 "status": _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
13252:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
13253:                     _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
13254:                 ),
13255:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
13256:             }
13257:         )
13258: 
13259:     reclass_rows = conn.execute(
13260:         """
13261:         SELECT id, reclass_type, status, calculated_amount, currency
13262:         FROM e3_reclass_proposals
13263:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
13264:           AND workspace_id = ?
13265:           AND execution_run_id = ?
13266:         ORDER BY id ASC
13267:         """,
13268:         (tenant_id, workspace_id, execution_run_id),
13269:     ).fetchall()
13270:     for row in reclass_rows:
13271:         item_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id")
13272:         action_ids.append(f"RECLASS:{item_id}")
13273:         summaries.append(
13274:             {
13275:                 "module": "RECLASS",
13276:                 "id": item_id,
13277:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_reclass_type(row["reclass_type"], field_name="reclass_type"),
13278:                 "status": _normalize_engine3_reclass_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
13279:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
13280:                     _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
13281:                 ),
13282:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
13283:             }
13284:         )
13285: 
13286:     capex_rows = conn.execute(
13287:         """
13288:         SELECT id, capex_type, status, calculated_amount, currency
13289:         FROM e3_capex_proposals
13290:         WHERE tenant_id = ?
13291:           AND workspace_id = ?
13292:           AND execution_run_id = ?
13293:         ORDER BY id ASC
13294:         """,
13295:         (tenant_id, workspace_id, execution_run_id),
13296:     ).fetchall()
13297:     for row in capex_rows:
13298:         item_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id")
13299:         action_ids.append(f"CAPEX:{item_id}")
13300:         summaries.append(
13301:             {
13302:                 "module": "CAPEX",
13303:                 "id": item_id,
13304:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_capex_type(row["capex_type"], field_name="capex_type"),
13305:                 "status": _normalize_engine3_capex_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
13306:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_fixed_2(
13307:                     _normalize_engine3_accrual_amount(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
13308:                 ),
13309:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
13310:             }
13311:         )
13312: 
13313:     action_ids = sorted({item for item in action_ids})
13314:     summaries.sort(key=lambda row: (row["module"], row["id"]))
13315:     return action_ids, summaries
13316: 
13317: 
13318: def _engine3_format_decimal_string(value: Any, decimals: int) -> str:
13319:     try:
13320:         number = Decimal(str(value))
13321:     except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
13322:         number = Decimal("0")
13323:     quantum = Decimal("1").scaleb(-decimals) if decimals > 0 else Decimal("1")
13324:     rounded = number.quantize(quantum, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
13325:     format_string = f".{decimals}f"
13326:     return format(rounded, format_string)
13327: 
13328: 
13329: def _engine3_narrative_render_variance_block(
13330:     *,
13331:     block: dict[str, Any],
13332:     variance_payload: dict[str, Any],
13333: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], list[str]]:
13334:     selector = dict(block["selector_json"])
13335:     format_json = dict(block["format_json"])
13336:     rows = [dict(item) for item in list(variance_payload.get("rows") or [])]
13337:     period_role = str(selector.get("period_role") or "").strip().upper()
13338:     if period_role:
13339:         rows = [row for row in rows if str(row.get("period_role") or "").strip().upper() == period_role]
13340:     measure_ids = list(selector.get("measure_ids") or [])
13341:     if measure_ids:
13342:         measure_id_set = {str(item) for item in measure_ids}
13343:         rows = [row for row in rows if str(row.get("measure_id") or "") in measure_id_set]
13344:     sort_mode = str(selector.get("sort") or "ROW_ID_ASC").strip().upper()
13345:     if sort_mode == "ABS_DESC":
13346:         rows.sort(
13347:             key=lambda row: (
13348:                 -abs(_normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("absolute_variance"), field_name="absolute_variance")),
13349:                 str(row.get("row_identity_sha256") or ""),
13350:             )
13351:         )
13352:     elif sort_mode == "ABS_ASC":
13353:         rows.sort(
13354:             key=lambda row: (
13355:                 abs(_normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("absolute_variance"), field_name="absolute_variance")),
13356:                 str(row.get("row_identity_sha256") or ""),
13357:             )
13358:         )
13359:     else:
13360:         rows.sort(key=lambda row: str(row.get("row_identity_sha256") or ""))
13361:     limit = int(selector.get("limit") or 5)
13362:     if limit <= 0:
13363:         limit = 5
13364:     resolved_rows = rows[:limit]
13365: 
13366:     decimals = int(format_json.get("number_decimals") or 2)
13367:     resolved_payload: dict[str, Any] = {"rows": resolved_rows}
13368:     lines: list[str] = []
13369:     block_type = block["type"]
13370:     if block_type == "TEXT":
13371:         lines.append(f"Variance rows: {len(resolved_rows)}")
13372:     elif block_type == "BULLETS":
13373:         for row in resolved_rows:
13374:             amount_text = _engine3_format_decimal_string(row.get("absolute_variance"), decimals)
13375:             lines.append(
13376:                 f"{row.get('measure_id')} [{row.get('period_role')}] variance={amount_text}"
13377:             )
13378:     else:
13379:         columns = ["measure_id", "period_role", "absolute_variance"]
13380:         resolved_payload["columns"] = columns
13381:         for row in resolved_rows:
13382:             amount_text = _engine3_format_decimal_string(row.get("absolute_variance"), decimals)
13383:             lines.append(f"{row.get('measure_id')} | {row.get('period_role')} | {amount_text}")
13384:     return resolved_payload, lines
13385: 
13386: 
13387: def _engine3_narrative_render_actions_block(
13388:     *,
13389:     block: dict[str, Any],
13390:     action_summaries: list[dict[str, Any]],
13391: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], list[str]]:
13392:     selector = dict(block["selector_json"])
13393:     entries = [dict(item) for item in action_summaries]
13394:     modules = sorted({str(item).strip().upper() for item in list(selector.get("modules") or []) if str(item).strip()})
13395:     if modules:
13396:         entries = [item for item in entries if str(item.get("module") or "").upper() in modules]
13397:     statuses = sorted({str(item).strip().upper() for item in list(selector.get("statuses") or []) if str(item).strip()})
13398:     if statuses:
13399:         entries = [item for item in entries if str(item.get("status") or "").upper() in statuses]
13400:     entries.sort(key=lambda item: (str(item.get("module") or ""), str(item.get("id") or "")))
13401:     limit = int(selector.get("limit") or 10)
13402:     if limit <= 0:
13403:         limit = 10
13404:     entries = entries[:limit]
13405:     block_type = block["type"]
13406:     resolved_payload: dict[str, Any] = {"items": entries}
13407:     lines: list[str] = []
13408:     if block_type == "TEXT":
13409:         lines.append(f"Action proposals: {len(entries)}")
13410:     elif block_type == "BULLETS":
13411:         for item in entries:
13412:             lines.append(
13413:                 f"{item.get('module')} {item.get('id')} status={item.get('status')} amount={item.get('amount')} {item.get('currency')}"
13414:             )
13415:     else:
13416:         columns = ["module", "id", "status", "amount", "currency"]
13417:         resolved_payload["columns"] = columns
13418:         for item in entries:
13419:             lines.append(
13420:                 f"{item.get('module')} | {item.get('id')} | {item.get('status')} | {item.get('amount')} | {item.get('currency')}"
13421:             )
13422:     return resolved_payload, lines
13423: 
13424: 
13425: def _engine3_render_narrative_template(
13426:     *,
13427:     template_body_json: dict[str, Any],
13428:     variance_payload: dict[str, Any],
13429:     action_summaries: list[dict[str, Any]],
13430: ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
13431:     template = _normalize_engine3_narrative_template_body_json(template_body_json)
13432:     narrative_lines: list[str] = [template["title"]]
13433:     structured_sections: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
13434:     for section in template["sections"]:
13435:         heading = _normalize_required_text(section["heading"], field_name="heading")
13436:         narrative_lines.append(f"{heading}:")
13437:         structured_blocks: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
13438:         for block in section["blocks"]:
13439:             source = block["source"]
13440:             if source == "ENGINE2B_VARIANCE":
13441:                 resolved_payload, lines = _engine3_narrative_render_variance_block(
13442:                     block=block,
13443:                     variance_payload=variance_payload,
13444:                 )
13445:             elif source == "ENGINE3_ACTIONS":
13446:                 resolved_payload, lines = _engine3_narrative_render_actions_block(
13447:                     block=block,
13448:                     action_summaries=action_summaries,
13449:                 )
13450:             else:
13451:                 selector = dict(block["selector_json"])
13452:                 block_type = block["type"]
13453:                 if block_type == "TEXT":
13454:                     text_value = _normalize_required_text(selector.get("text"), field_name="selector_json.text")
13455:                     resolved_payload = {"text": text_value}
13456:                     lines = [text_value]
13457:                 elif block_type == "BULLETS":
13458:                     items = list(selector.get("items") or [])
13459:                     resolved_payload = {"items": items}
13460:                     lines = [str(item) for item in items]
13461:                 else:
13462:                     columns = list(selector.get("columns") or [])
13463:                     rows = list(selector.get("rows") or [])
13464:                     resolved_payload = {"columns": columns, "rows": rows}
13465:                     lines = [" | ".join([str(col) for col in columns])]
13466:                     for row in rows:
13467:                         lines.append(" | ".join([str(item) for item in list(row or [])]))
13468: 
13469:             structured_blocks.append(
13470:                 {
13471:                     "type": block["type"],
13472:                     "source": source,
13473:                     "selector_json": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(block["selector_json"])),
13474:                     "format_json": json.loads(_canonical_json_text(block["format_json"])),
13475:                     "resolved": resolved_payload,
13476:                 }
13477:             )
13478:             if block["type"] == "TEXT":
13479:                 if lines:
13480:                     narrative_lines.append(lines[0])
13481:             else:
13482:                 for line in lines:
13483:                     narrative_lines.append(f"- {line}")
13484:         structured_sections.append({"heading": heading, "blocks": structured_blocks})
13485: 
13486:     structured_narrative_json = {"title": template["title"], "sections": structured_sections}
13487:     narrative_text = "\n".join(narrative_lines)
13488:     return narrative_text, structured_narrative_json
13489: 
13490: 
13491: def _engine3_narrative_output_fingerprint(
13492:     *,
13493:     narrative_text: str,
13494:     structured_narrative_json: dict[str, Any],
13495: ) -> str:
13496:     payload = {
13497:         "narrative_text": str(narrative_text),
13498:         "structured_narrative_json": _normalize_engine3_json_object(
13499:             structured_narrative_json,
13500:             field_name="structured_narrative_json",
13501:         ),
13502:     }
13503:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
13504: 
13505: 
13506: def run_engine3_narrative(
13507:     *,
13508:     tenant_id: str,
13509:     workspace_id: str,
13510:     execution_run_id: str,
13511:     template_key: str,
13512:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
13513: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
13514:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_runs")
13515:     output_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_outputs")
13516:     template_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_templates")
13517:     event_columns = list_table_columns("e3_execution_events")
13518:     if not run_columns or not output_columns or not template_columns or not event_columns:
13519:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 narrative schema is not available.")
13520: 
13521:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
13522:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
13523:     normalized_execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
13524:     normalized_period_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(period_scope_json)
13525:     run_id = ""
13526:     created = False
13527:     with get_conn() as conn:
13528:         execution_context = _engine3_require_execution_run_for_narrative(
13529:             conn,
13530:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13531:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13532:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13533:         )
13534:         template = _engine3_resolve_certified_narrative_template(
13535:             conn,
13536:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13537:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13538:             template_key=template_key,
13539:             period_grain=normalized_period_scope["grain"],
13540:         )
13541:         resolved_engine2b_run_ids, variance_payload = _engine3_resolve_narrative_engine2b_inputs(
13542:             conn,
13543:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13544:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13545:             canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256=execution_context["canonical_lineage_anchor_sha256"],
13546:             period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
13547:         )
13548:         resolved_engine3_action_ids, action_summaries = _engine3_resolve_narrative_action_summaries(
13549:             conn,
13550:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13551:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13552:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13553:         )
13554:         input_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_narrative_input_fingerprint(
13555:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13556:             template_key=template["template_key"],
13557:             template_version_number=int(template["version_number"]),
13558:             template_fingerprint_sha256=template["template_fingerprint_sha256"],
13559:             period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
13560:             resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json=resolved_engine2b_run_ids,
13561:             resolved_engine3_action_ids_json=resolved_engine3_action_ids,
13562:         )
13563: 
13564:         existing = conn.execute(
13565:             """
13566:             SELECT
13567:                 id,
13568:                 execution_run_id,
13569:                 tenant_id,
13570:                 workspace_id,
13571:                 template_key,
13572:                 template_version_number,
13573:                 period_scope_json,
13574:                 resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json,
13575:                 resolved_engine3_action_ids_json,
13576:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
13577:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
13578:                 status,
13579:                 created_at
13580:             FROM e3_narrative_runs
13581:             WHERE execution_run_id = ?
13582:               AND template_key = ?
13583:               AND template_version_number = ?
13584:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
13585:               AND tenant_id = ?
13586:               AND workspace_id = ?
13587:             LIMIT 1
13588:             """,
13589:             (
13590:                 normalized_execution_run_id,
13591:                 template["template_key"],
13592:                 int(template["version_number"]),
13593:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
13594:                 normalized_tenant,
13595:                 normalized_workspace,
13596:             ),
13597:         ).fetchone()
13598:         if existing:
13599:             run_id = _normalize_required_text(existing["id"], field_name="id")
13600:         else:
13601:             run_id = str(uuid4())
13602:             now = utc_now_iso()
13603:             conn.execute(
13604:                 """
13605:                 INSERT INTO e3_narrative_runs (
13606:                     id,
13607:                     execution_run_id,
13608:                     tenant_id,
13609:                     workspace_id,
13610:                     template_key,
13611:                     template_version_number,
13612:                     period_scope_json,
13613:                     resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json,
13614:                     resolved_engine3_action_ids_json,
13615:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
13616:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
13617:                     status,
13618:                     created_at
13619:                 )
13620:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, 'QUEUED', ?)
13621:                 """,
13622:                 (
13623:                     run_id,
13624:                     normalized_execution_run_id,
13625:                     normalized_tenant,
13626:                     normalized_workspace,
13627:                     template["template_key"],
13628:                     int(template["version_number"]),
13629:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_period_scope),
13630:                     _canonical_json_text(resolved_engine2b_run_ids),
13631:                     _canonical_json_text(resolved_engine3_action_ids),
13632:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
13633:                     now,
13634:                 ),
13635:             )
13636:             created = True
13637:             _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
13638:                 conn,
13639:                 execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13640:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13641:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13642:                 event_type="NARRATIVE_RUN_CREATED",
13643:                 event_payload_json={
13644:                     "narrative_run_id": run_id,
13645:                     "template_key": template["template_key"],
13646:                     "template_version_number": int(template["version_number"]),
13647:                     "input_fingerprint_sha256": input_fingerprint_sha256,
13648:                 },
13649:                 actor_type="SYSTEM",
13650:                 actor_id="engine3_system",
13651:                 created_at=now,
13652:             )
13653: 
13654:         run_row = conn.execute(
13655:             """
13656:             SELECT
13657:                 id,
13658:                 execution_run_id,
13659:                 tenant_id,
13660:                 workspace_id,
13661:                 template_key,
13662:                 template_version_number,
13663:                 period_scope_json,
13664:                 resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json,
13665:                 resolved_engine3_action_ids_json,
13666:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
13667:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
13668:                 status,
13669:                 created_at
13670:             FROM e3_narrative_runs
13671:             WHERE id = ?
13672:             LIMIT 1
13673:             """,
13674:             (run_id,),
13675:         ).fetchone()
13676:         if not run_row:
13677:             raise RuntimeError("Narrative run became unavailable.")
13678: 
13679:         current_status = _normalize_engine3_narrative_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
13680:         if current_status == "QUEUED":
13681:             update_cursor = conn.execute(
13682:                 """
13683:                 UPDATE e3_narrative_runs
13684:                 SET status = 'RUNNING'
13685:                 WHERE id = ?
13686:                   AND status = 'QUEUED'
13687:                 """,
13688:                 (run_id,),
13689:             )
13690:             if int(getattr(update_cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
13691:                 raise RuntimeError("narrative run status transition failed.")
13692:             current_status = "RUNNING"
13693: 
13694:         if current_status == "RUNNING":
13695:             try:
13696:                 narrative_text, structured_narrative_json = _engine3_render_narrative_template(
13697:                     template_body_json=template["template_body_json"],
13698:                     variance_payload=variance_payload,
13699:                     action_summaries=action_summaries,
13700:                 )
13701:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_narrative_output_fingerprint(
13702:                     narrative_text=narrative_text,
13703:                     structured_narrative_json=structured_narrative_json,
13704:                 )
13705:                 artifact_refs_json: list[dict[str, str]] = []
13706:                 replay_bundle_hash = compute_engine3_narrative_replay_bundle_hash(
13707:                     template_fingerprint_sha256=template["template_fingerprint_sha256"],
13708:                     period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
13709:                     resolved_engine2b_run_ids_json=resolved_engine2b_run_ids,
13710:                     resolved_engine3_action_ids_json=resolved_engine3_action_ids,
13711:                     input_fingerprint_sha256=input_fingerprint_sha256,
13712:                     output_fingerprint_sha256=output_fingerprint_sha256,
13713:                     artifact_refs_json=artifact_refs_json,
13714:                 )
13715:             except Exception:
13716:                 conn.execute(
13717:                     """
13718:                     UPDATE e3_narrative_runs
13719:                     SET status = 'FAILED'
13720:                     WHERE id = ?
13721:                       AND status = 'RUNNING'
13722:                     """,
13723:                     (run_id,),
13724:                 )
13725:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
13726:                     conn,
13727:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13728:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13729:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13730:                     event_type="NARRATIVE_RUN_FAILED",
13731:                     event_payload_json={"narrative_run_id": run_id},
13732:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
13733:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
13734:                     created_at=utc_now_iso(),
13735:                 )
13736:                 raise
13737: 
13738:             output_row = conn.execute(
13739:                 """
13740:                 SELECT
13741:                     id,
13742:                     narrative_run_id,
13743:                     tenant_id,
13744:                     workspace_id,
13745:                     narrative_text,
13746:                     structured_narrative_json,
13747:                     artifact_refs_json,
13748:                     replay_bundle_hash,
13749:                     created_at
13750:                 FROM e3_narrative_outputs
13751:                 WHERE narrative_run_id = ?
13752:                 LIMIT 1
13753:                 """,
13754:                 (run_id,),
13755:             ).fetchone()
13756:             if not output_row:
13757:                 output_id = str(uuid4())
13758:                 now = utc_now_iso()
13759:                 conn.execute(
13760:                     """
13761:                     INSERT INTO e3_narrative_outputs (
13762:                         id,
13763:                         narrative_run_id,
13764:                         tenant_id,
13765:                         workspace_id,
13766:                         narrative_text,
13767:                         structured_narrative_json,
13768:                         artifact_refs_json,
13769:                         replay_bundle_hash,
13770:                         created_at
13771:                     )
13772:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
13773:                     """,
13774:                     (
13775:                         output_id,
13776:                         run_id,
13777:                         normalized_tenant,
13778:                         normalized_workspace,
13779:                         narrative_text,
13780:                         _canonical_json_text(structured_narrative_json),
13781:                         _canonical_json_text(artifact_refs_json),
13782:                         replay_bundle_hash,
13783:                         now,
13784:                     ),
13785:                 )
13786:             conn.execute(
13787:                 """
13788:                 UPDATE e3_narrative_runs
13789:                 SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
13790:                     output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
13791:                 WHERE id = ?
13792:                   AND status = 'RUNNING'
13793:                 """,
13794:                 (output_fingerprint_sha256, run_id),
13795:             )
13796:             _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
13797:                 conn,
13798:                 execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13799:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13800:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13801:                 event_type="NARRATIVE_RUN_SUCCEEDED",
13802:                 event_payload_json={
13803:                     "narrative_run_id": run_id,
13804:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
13805:                 },
13806:                 actor_type="SYSTEM",
13807:                 actor_id="engine3_system",
13808:                 created_at=utc_now_iso(),
13809:             )
13810: 
13811:     return get_engine3_narrative_run(
13812:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13813:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13814:         narrative_run_id=run_id,
13815:         idempotent=not created,
13816:     )
13817: 
13818: 
13819: def list_engine3_narrative_runs(
13820:     *,
13821:     tenant_id: str,
13822:     workspace_id: str,
13823:     execution_run_id: str,
13824: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
13825:     run_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_runs")
13826:     output_columns = list_table_columns("e3_narrative_outputs")
13827:     if not run_columns or not output_columns:
13828:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 narrative schema is not available.")
13829:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
13830:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
13831:     normalized_execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
13832:     with get_conn() as conn:
13833:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_narrative(
13834:             conn,
13835:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
13836:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
13837:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
13838:         )
