15578:         candidates = _eligible(int(params["min_severity"]))
15579:         sample_size = min(int(params["sample_size"]), len(candidates))
15580:         scored: list[tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]] = []
15581:         for row in candidates:
15582:             item_id = str(row["item_id"])
15583:             score = determinism.sha256_hex_text(f"{seed}:{item_id}")
15584:             scored.append((score, row))
15585:         scored.sort(key=lambda entry: (entry[0], str(entry[1].get("item_id") or "")))
15586:         for _score, row in scored[:sample_size]:
15587:             selected.append({"item_id": str(row["item_id"]), "reason": "RANDOM_DETERMINISTIC"})
15588:     else:
15589:         raise RuntimeError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15590: 
15591:     sample_items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
15592:     for row in selected:
15593:         item_id = _normalize_required_text(row["item_id"], field_name="item_id")
15594:         reason = _normalize_required_text(row["reason"], field_name="reason")
15595:         sample_id = determinism.sha256_hex_text(f"{policy_id}:{item_id}:{reason}")
15596:         sample_items.append(
15597:             {
15598:                 "sample_id": sample_id,
15599:                 "item_id": item_id,
15600:                 "reason": reason,
15601:             }
15602:         )
15603:     sample_items.sort(key=lambda row: str(row["sample_id"]))
15604:     return {
15605:         "version": "1.0",
15606:         "method": policy_type,
15607:         "seed": seed,
15608:         "items": sample_items,
15609:     }
15610: 
15611: 
15612: def _normalize_engine3_risk_register_json(payload: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
15613:     register = _normalize_engine3_json_object(payload, field_name="risk_register_json")
15614:     if set(register.keys()) != {"version", "items", "summary"}:
15615:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15616:     version = _normalize_required_text(register.get("version"), field_name="risk_register_json.version")
15617:     if version != "1.0":
15618:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15619:     items_raw = register.get("items")
15620:     if not isinstance(items_raw, list):
15621:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15622:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
15623:     for item in items_raw:
15624:         row = _normalize_engine3_json_object(item, field_name="risk_register_json.items[]")
15625:         required_keys = {"item_id", "source", "canonical_ref", "risk_flags", "amount", "currency", "period", "dimensions"}
15626:         if set(row.keys()) != required_keys:
15627:             raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15628:         canonical_ref = _normalize_engine3_json_object(row.get("canonical_ref"), field_name="canonical_ref")
15629:         if set(canonical_ref.keys()) != {
15630:             "canonical_run_id",
15631:             "fact_id",
15632:             "source_row_ref",
15633:             "canonical_row_identity_sha256",
15634:             "account_code",
15635:             "entity_code",
15636:         }:
15637:             raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15638:         flags_raw = row.get("risk_flags")
15639:         if not isinstance(flags_raw, list):
15640:             raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15641:         flags: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
15642:         for flag in flags_raw:
15643:             flag_row = _normalize_engine3_json_object(flag, field_name="risk_flag")
15644:             if set(flag_row.keys()) != {"rule_id", "rule_type", "severity"}:
15645:                 raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15646:             severity = int(flag_row.get("severity"))
15647:             if severity < 1 or severity > 5:
15648:                 raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15649:             flags.append(
15650:                 {
15651:                     "rule_id": _normalize_required_text(flag_row.get("rule_id"), field_name="rule_id"),
15652:                     "rule_type": _normalize_engine3_risk_rule_type(flag_row.get("rule_type"), field_name="rule_type"),
15653:                     "severity": severity,
15654:                 }
15655:             )
15656:         dimensions = _normalize_engine3_json_object(row.get("dimensions"), field_name="dimensions")
15657:         items.append(
15658:             {
15659:                 "item_id": _normalize_required_text(row.get("item_id"), field_name="item_id"),
15660:                 "source": "CANONICAL_FACT",
15661:                 "canonical_ref": {
15662:                     key: _normalize_required_text(value, field_name=f"canonical_ref.{key}")
15663:                     for key, value in sorted(canonical_ref.items(), key=lambda entry: str(entry[0]))
15664:                 },
15665:                 "risk_flags": sorted(flags, key=lambda entry: (-int(entry["severity"]), str(entry["rule_id"]))),
15666:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_number(_normalize_engine1_decimal(row.get("amount"), field_name="amount")),
15667:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row.get("currency"), field_name="currency"),
15668:                 "period": _normalize_required_text(row.get("period"), field_name="period"),
15669:                 "dimensions": {str(key): str(value) for key, value in sorted(dimensions.items(), key=lambda entry: str(entry[0]))},
15670:             }
15671:         )
15672:     items.sort(key=lambda row: str(row["item_id"]))
15673:     summary_raw = _normalize_engine3_json_object(register.get("summary"), field_name="summary")
15674:     if set(summary_raw.keys()) != {"total_items", "by_severity"}:
15675:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15676:     by_severity_raw = _normalize_engine3_json_object(summary_raw.get("by_severity"), field_name="by_severity")
15677:     expected_keys = {"1", "2", "3", "4", "5"}
15678:     if set(by_severity_raw.keys()) != expected_keys:
15679:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15680:     by_severity = {key: int(by_severity_raw[key]) for key in sorted(expected_keys)}
15681:     return {
15682:         "version": "1.0",
15683:         "items": items,
15684:         "summary": {
15685:             "total_items": int(summary_raw.get("total_items") or 0),
15686:             "by_severity": by_severity,
15687:         },
15688:     }
15689: 
15690: 
15691: def _normalize_engine3_sample_set_json(payload: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
15692:     sample_set = _normalize_engine3_json_object(payload, field_name="sample_set_json")
15693:     if set(sample_set.keys()) != {"version", "method", "seed", "items"}:
15694:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15695:     version = _normalize_required_text(sample_set.get("version"), field_name="sample_set_json.version")
15696:     if version != "1.0":
15697:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15698:     method = _normalize_engine3_risk_policy_type(sample_set.get("method"), field_name="sample_set_json.method")
15699:     seed = _normalize_engine1_hash(sample_set.get("seed"), field_name="sample_set_json.seed")
15700:     items_raw = sample_set.get("items")
15701:     if not isinstance(items_raw, list):
15702:         raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15703:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
15704:     for row in items_raw:
15705:         item = _normalize_engine3_json_object(row, field_name="sample_set_json.items[]")
15706:         if set(item.keys()) != {"sample_id", "item_id", "reason"}:
15707:             raise ValueError("RISK_SCHEMA_VIOLATION")
15708:         items.append(
15709:             {
15710:                 "sample_id": _normalize_engine1_hash(item.get("sample_id"), field_name="sample_id"),
15711:                 "item_id": _normalize_required_text(item.get("item_id"), field_name="item_id"),
15712:                 "reason": _normalize_required_text(item.get("reason"), field_name="reason"),
15713:             }
15714:         )
15715:     items.sort(key=lambda row: str(row["sample_id"]))
15716:     return {
15717:         "version": "1.0",
15718:         "method": method,
15719:         "seed": seed,
15720:         "items": items,
15721:     }
15722: 
15723: 
15724: def _engine3_risk_run_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
15725:     return {
15726:         "id": str(row["id"]),
15727:         "execution_run_id": str(row["execution_run_id"]),
15728:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
15729:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
15730:         "period_scope_json": canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(
15731:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["period_scope_json"], field_name="period_scope_json")
15732:         ),
15733:         "resolved_canonical_run_ids_json": sorted(
15734:             {
15735:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_canonical_run_ids_json")
15736:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
15737:                     row["resolved_canonical_run_ids_json"],
15738:                     field_name="resolved_canonical_run_ids_json",
15739:                 )
15740:             }
15741:         ),
15742:         "risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
15743:             row["risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256"],
15744:             field_name="risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256",
15745:         ),
15746:         "sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
15747:             row["sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256"],
15748:             field_name="sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256",
15749:         ),
15750:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
15751:             row["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
15752:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
15753:         ),
15754:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": (
15755:             _normalize_engine1_hash(row["output_fingerprint_sha256"], field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256")
15756:             if str(row["output_fingerprint_sha256"] or "").strip()
15757:             else None
15758:         ),
15759:         "status": _normalize_engine3_risk_run_status(row["status"], field_name="status"),
15760:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
15761:     }
15762: 
15763: 
15764: def _engine3_risk_output_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
15765:     return {
15766:         "id": str(row["id"]),
15767:         "risk_run_id": str(row["risk_run_id"]),
15768:         "tenant_id": str(row["tenant_id"]),
15769:         "workspace_id": str(row["workspace_id"]),
15770:         "risk_register_json": _normalize_engine3_risk_register_json(
15771:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["risk_register_json"], field_name="risk_register_json")
15772:         ),
15773:         "sample_set_json": _normalize_engine3_sample_set_json(
15774:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["sample_set_json"], field_name="sample_set_json")
15775:         ),
15776:         "artifact_refs_json": _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(
15777:             _engine3_parse_json_array_text(row["artifact_refs_json"], field_name="artifact_refs_json")
15778:         ),
15779:         "replay_bundle_hash": _normalize_engine1_hash(row["replay_bundle_hash"], field_name="replay_bundle_hash"),
15780:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
15781:     }
15782: 
15783: 
15784: def run_engine3_risk(
15785:     *,
15786:     tenant_id: str,
15787:     workspace_id: str,
15788:     execution_run_id: str,
15789:     period_scope_json: dict[str, Any],
15790:     sampling_policy_id: str,
15791: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
15792:     required_tables = (
15793:         "e3_risk_rules",
15794:         "e3_sampling_policies",
15795:         "e3_risk_runs",
15796:         "e3_risk_outputs",
15797:         "e3_execution_events",
15798:     )
15799:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
15800:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 risk schema is not available.")
15801:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
15802:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
15803:     normalized_execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
15804:     normalized_period_scope = canonicalize_engine2b_period_scope(period_scope_json)
15805:     run_id = ""
15806:     created = False
15807: 
15808:     with get_conn() as conn:
15809:         execution_context = _engine3_require_execution_run_for_risk(
15810:             conn,
15811:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
15812:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
15813:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
15814:         )
15815:         resolved_anchors = _engine3_resolve_unique_anchor_runs_for_risk(
15816:             conn,
15817:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
15818:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
15819:             canonical_anchors=execution_context["canonical_anchors"],
15820:         )
15821:         resolved_canonical_run_ids_json = _engine3_sorted_resolved_canonical_run_ids_for_risk(resolved_anchors)
15822:         enabled_rules = _engine3_fetch_enabled_risk_rules(
15823:             conn,
15824:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
15825:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
15826:         )
15827:         sampling_policy = _engine3_fetch_sampling_policy_for_run(
15828:             conn,
15829:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
15830:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
15831:             policy_id=sampling_policy_id,
15832:         )
15833:         risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_risk_rule_set_fingerprint(enabled_rules)
15834:         sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_sampling_policy_fingerprint(sampling_policy)
15835:         input_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine3_risk_input_fingerprint(
15836:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
15837:             period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
15838:             resolved_canonical_run_ids_json=resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
15839:             risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256=risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
15840:             sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256=sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
15841:         )
15842: 
15843:         existing = conn.execute(
15844:             """
15845:             SELECT
15846:                 id,
15847:                 execution_run_id,
15848:                 tenant_id,
15849:                 workspace_id,
15850:                 period_scope_json,
15851:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
15852:                 risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
15853:                 sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
15854:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
15855:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
15856:                 status,
15857:                 created_at
15858:             FROM e3_risk_runs
15859:             WHERE execution_run_id = ?
15860:               AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
15861:               AND tenant_id = ?
15862:               AND workspace_id = ?
15863:             LIMIT 1
15864:             """,
15865:             (
15866:                 normalized_execution_run_id,
15867:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
15868:                 normalized_tenant,
15869:                 normalized_workspace,
15870:             ),
15871:         ).fetchone()
15872:         if existing:
15873:             run_id = _normalize_required_text(existing["id"], field_name="id")
15874:         else:
15875:             run_id = f"e3riskrun_{uuid4().hex}"
15876:             now = utc_now_iso()
15877:             try:
15878:                 conn.execute(
15879:                     """
15880:                     INSERT INTO e3_risk_runs (
15881:                         id,
15882:                         execution_run_id,
15883:                         tenant_id,
15884:                         workspace_id,
15885:                         period_scope_json,
15886:                         resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
15887:                         risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
15888:                         sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
15889:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
15890:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
15891:                         status,
15892:                         created_at
15893:                     )
15894:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, 'QUEUED', ?)
15895:                     """,
15896:                     (
15897:                         run_id,
15898:                         normalized_execution_run_id,
15899:                         normalized_tenant,
15900:                         normalized_workspace,
15901:                         _canonical_json_text(normalized_period_scope),
15902:                         _canonical_json_text(resolved_canonical_run_ids_json),
15903:                         risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
15904:                         sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
15905:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
15906:                         now,
15907:                     ),
15908:                 )
15909:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
15910:                     conn,
15911:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
15912:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
15913:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
15914:                     event_type="RISK_RUN_CREATED",
15915:                     event_payload_json={
15916:                         "risk_run_id": run_id,
15917:                         "input_fingerprint_sha256": input_fingerprint_sha256,
15918:                     },
15919:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
15920:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
15921:                     created_at=now,
15922:                 )
15923:                 created = True
15924:             except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
15925:                 created = False
15926:             except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
15927:                 message = str(exc).lower()
15928:                 if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
15929:                     raise
15930:                 created = False
15931:             if not created:
15932:                 conflict = conn.execute(
15933:                     """
15934:                     SELECT id
15935:                     FROM e3_risk_runs
15936:                     WHERE execution_run_id = ?
15937:                       AND input_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
15938:                       AND tenant_id = ?
15939:                       AND workspace_id = ?
15940:                     LIMIT 1
15941:                     """,
15942:                     (
15943:                         normalized_execution_run_id,
15944:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
15945:                         normalized_tenant,
15946:                         normalized_workspace,
15947:                     ),
15948:                 ).fetchone()
15949:                 if not conflict:
15950:                     raise RuntimeError("Risk run idempotent lookup failed.")
15951:                 run_id = _normalize_required_text(conflict["id"], field_name="id")
15952: 
15953:         run_row = conn.execute(
15954:             """
15955:             SELECT
15956:                 id,
15957:                 execution_run_id,
15958:                 tenant_id,
15959:                 workspace_id,
15960:                 period_scope_json,
15961:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
15962:                 risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
15963:                 sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
15964:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
15965:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
15966:                 status,
15967:                 created_at
15968:             FROM e3_risk_runs
15969:             WHERE id = ?
15970:             LIMIT 1
15971:             """,
15972:             (run_id,),
15973:         ).fetchone()
15974:         if not run_row:
15975:             raise RuntimeError("Risk run became unavailable.")
15976:         current_status = _normalize_engine3_risk_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
15977:         if current_status == "QUEUED":
15978:             cursor = conn.execute(
15979:                 """
15980:                 UPDATE e3_risk_runs
15981:                 SET status = 'RUNNING'
15982:                 WHERE id = ?
15983:                   AND status = 'QUEUED'
15984:                 """,
15985:                 (run_id,),
15986:             )
15987:             if int(getattr(cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) == 1:
15988:                 current_status = "RUNNING"
15989:             else:
15990:                 refreshed = conn.execute(
15991:                     """
15992:                     SELECT status
15993:                     FROM e3_risk_runs
15994:                     WHERE id = ?
15995:                     LIMIT 1
15996:                     """,
15997:                     (run_id,),
15998:                 ).fetchone()
15999:                 if not refreshed:
16000:                     raise RuntimeError("Risk run became unavailable.")
16001:                 current_status = _normalize_engine3_risk_run_status(refreshed["status"], field_name="status")
16002:         if current_status == "RUNNING":
16003:             try:
16004:                 fact_rows = _engine3_fetch_risk_fact_rows(
16005:                     conn,
16006:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16007:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16008:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json=resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
16009:                     period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
16010:                 )
16011:                 risk_register_json = _normalize_engine3_risk_register_json(
16012:                     _engine3_build_risk_register(
16013:                         conn=conn,
16014:                         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16015:                         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16016:                         fact_rows=fact_rows,
16017:                         rules=enabled_rules,
16018:                         period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
16019:                         resolved_canonical_run_ids_json=resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
16020:                     )
16021:                 )
16022:                 sample_set_json = _normalize_engine3_sample_set_json(
16023:                     _engine3_build_sample_set(
16024:                         risk_register_json=risk_register_json,
16025:                         sampling_policy=sampling_policy,
16026:                         input_fingerprint_sha256=input_fingerprint_sha256,
16027:                     )
16028:                 )
16029:                 output_fingerprint_sha256 = _engine3_risk_output_fingerprint(
16030:                     risk_register_json=risk_register_json,
16031:                     sample_set_json=sample_set_json,
16032:                 )
16033:                 artifact_refs_json: list[dict[str, str]] = []
16034:                 replay_bundle_hash = compute_engine3_risk_replay_bundle_hash(
16035:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
16036:                     period_scope_json=normalized_period_scope,
16037:                     resolved_canonical_run_ids_json=resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
16038:                     risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256=risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
16039:                     sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256=sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
16040:                     input_fingerprint_sha256=input_fingerprint_sha256,
16041:                     output_fingerprint_sha256=output_fingerprint_sha256,
16042:                     artifact_refs_json=artifact_refs_json,
16043:                 )
16044:             except Exception:
16045:                 conn.execute(
16046:                     """
16047:                     UPDATE e3_risk_runs
16048:                     SET status = 'FAILED'
16049:                     WHERE id = ?
16050:                       AND status = 'RUNNING'
16051:                     """,
16052:                     (run_id,),
16053:                 )
16054:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
16055:                     conn,
16056:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
16057:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16058:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16059:                     event_type="RISK_RUN_FAILED",
16060:                     event_payload_json={"risk_run_id": run_id},
16061:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
16062:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
16063:                     created_at=utc_now_iso(),
16064:                 )
16065:                 raise
16066: 
16067:             output_row = conn.execute(
16068:                 """
16069:                 SELECT id
16070:                 FROM e3_risk_outputs
16071:                 WHERE risk_run_id = ?
16072:                 LIMIT 1
16073:                 """,
16074:                 (run_id,),
16075:             ).fetchone()
16076:             if not output_row:
16077:                 now = utc_now_iso()
16078:                 try:
16079:                     conn.execute(
16080:                         """
16081:                         INSERT INTO e3_risk_outputs (
16082:                             id,
16083:                             risk_run_id,
16084:                             tenant_id,
16085:                             workspace_id,
16086:                             risk_register_json,
16087:                             sample_set_json,
16088:                             artifact_refs_json,
16089:                             replay_bundle_hash,
16090:                             created_at
16091:                         )
16092:                         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
16093:                         """,
16094:                         (
16095:                             f"e3riskout_{uuid4().hex}",
16096:                             run_id,
16097:                             normalized_tenant,
16098:                             normalized_workspace,
16099:                             _canonical_json_text(risk_register_json),
16100:                             _canonical_json_text(sample_set_json),
16101:                             _canonical_json_text(artifact_refs_json),
16102:                             replay_bundle_hash,
16103:                             now,
16104:                         ),
16105:                     )
16106:                 except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
16107:                     pass
16108:                 except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
16109:                     message = str(exc).lower()
16110:                     if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
16111:                         raise
16112:             cursor = conn.execute(
16113:                 """
16114:                 UPDATE e3_risk_runs
16115:                 SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
16116:                     output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
16117:                 WHERE id = ?
16118:                   AND status = 'RUNNING'
16119:                 """,
16120:                 (output_fingerprint_sha256, run_id),
16121:             )
16122:             if int(getattr(cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) == 1:
16123:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
16124:                     conn,
16125:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
16126:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16127:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16128:                     event_type="RISK_RUN_SUCCEEDED",
16129:                     event_payload_json={
16130:                         "risk_run_id": run_id,
16131:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
16132:                     },
16133:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
16134:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
16135:                     created_at=utc_now_iso(),
16136:                 )
16137:             else:
16138:                 refreshed = conn.execute(
16139:                     """
16140:                     SELECT status
16141:                     FROM e3_risk_runs
16142:                     WHERE id = ?
16143:                     LIMIT 1
16144:                     """,
16145:                     (run_id,),
16146:                 ).fetchone()
16147:                 if not refreshed:
16148:                     raise RuntimeError("Risk run became unavailable.")
16149:                 refreshed_status = _normalize_engine3_risk_run_status(refreshed["status"], field_name="status")
16150:                 if refreshed_status not in {"SUCCEEDED", "FAILED"}:
16151:                     raise RuntimeError("Risk run completion transition failed.")
16152: 
16153:     return get_engine3_risk_run(
16154:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16155:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16156:         risk_run_id=run_id,
16157:         idempotent=not created,
16158:     )
16159: 
16160: 
16161: def list_engine3_risk_runs(
16162:     *,
16163:     tenant_id: str,
16164:     workspace_id: str,
16165:     execution_run_id: str,
16166: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
16167:     required_tables = ("e3_risk_runs", "e3_risk_outputs")
16168:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
16169:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 risk schema is not available.")
16170:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
16171:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
16172:     normalized_execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
16173:     with get_conn() as conn:
16174:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_risk(
16175:             conn,
16176:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
16177:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
16178:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
16179:             enforce_status=False,
16180:         )
16181:         rows = conn.execute(
16182:             """
16183:             SELECT
16184:                 r.id,
16185:                 r.execution_run_id,
16186:                 r.tenant_id,
16187:                 r.workspace_id,
16188:                 r.period_scope_json,
16189:                 r.resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
16190:                 r.risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
16191:                 r.sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
16192:                 r.input_fingerprint_sha256,
16193:                 r.output_fingerprint_sha256,
16194:                 r.status,
16195:                 r.created_at,
16196:                 o.id AS output_id,
16197:                 o.replay_bundle_hash
16198:             FROM e3_risk_runs r
16199:             LEFT JOIN e3_risk_outputs o ON o.risk_run_id = r.id
16200:             WHERE r.execution_run_id = ?
16201:               AND r.tenant_id = ?
16202:               AND r.workspace_id = ?
16203:             ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
16204:             """,
16205:             (normalized_execution_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
16206:         ).fetchall()
16207:         result: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
16208:         for row in rows:
16209:             item = _engine3_risk_run_row_to_dict(row)
16210:             item["output_id"] = str(row["output_id"] or "") or None
16211:             item["replay_bundle_hash"] = (
16212:                 _normalize_engine1_hash(row["replay_bundle_hash"], field_name="replay_bundle_hash")
16213:                 if str(row["replay_bundle_hash"] or "").strip()
16214:                 else None
16215:             )
16216:             result.append(item)
16217:         return result
16218: 
16219: 
16220: def get_engine3_risk_run(
16221:     *,
16222:     tenant_id: str,
16223:     workspace_id: str,
16224:     risk_run_id: str,
16225:     idempotent: bool = False,
16226: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
16227:     required_tables = ("e3_risk_runs", "e3_risk_outputs")
16228:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
16229:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 risk schema is not available.")
16230:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
16231:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
16232:     normalized_risk_run_id = _normalize_required_text(risk_run_id, field_name="risk_run_id")
16233:     with get_conn() as conn:
16234:         run_row = conn.execute(
16235:             """
16236:             SELECT
16237:                 id,
16238:                 execution_run_id,
16239:                 tenant_id,
16240:                 workspace_id,
16241:                 period_scope_json,
16242:                 resolved_canonical_run_ids_json,
16243:                 risk_rule_set_fingerprint_sha256,
16244:                 sampling_policy_fingerprint_sha256,
16245:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
16246:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
16247:                 status,
16248:                 created_at
16249:             FROM e3_risk_runs
16250:             WHERE id = ?
16251:             LIMIT 1
16252:             """,
16253:             (normalized_risk_run_id,),
16254:         ).fetchone()
16255:         if not run_row:
16256:             raise LookupError("risk_run_id was not found.")
16257:         run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(run_row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
16258:         run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(run_row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
16259:         if run_tenant != normalized_tenant or run_workspace != normalized_workspace:
16260:             raise PermissionError("risk_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
16261:         run_payload = _engine3_risk_run_row_to_dict(run_row)
16262:         output_row = conn.execute(
16263:             """
16264:             SELECT
16265:                 id,
16266:                 risk_run_id,
16267:                 tenant_id,
16268:                 workspace_id,
16269:                 risk_register_json,
16270:                 sample_set_json,
16271:                 artifact_refs_json,
16272:                 replay_bundle_hash,
16273:                 created_at
16274:             FROM e3_risk_outputs
16275:             WHERE risk_run_id = ?
16276:             LIMIT 1
16277:             """,
16278:             (normalized_risk_run_id,),
16279:         ).fetchone()
16280:         output_payload = _engine3_risk_output_row_to_dict(output_row) if output_row else None
16281:     return {
16282:         "run": run_payload,
16283:         "output": output_payload,
16284:         "idempotent": bool(idempotent),
16285:     }
16286: def list_recent_uploads(conversation_id: str, limit: int = 5) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
16287:     with get_conn() as conn:
16288:         rows = conn.execute(
16289:             """
16290:             SELECT original_name, stored_path, created_at
16291:             FROM uploads
16292:             WHERE conversation_id = ?
16293:             ORDER BY id DESC
16294:             LIMIT ?
16295:             """,
16296:             (conversation_id, limit),
16297:         ).fetchall()
16298:     return [dict(row) for row in rows]
16299: 
16300: 
16301: @dataclass
16302: class ConversationMeta:
16303:     id: str
16304:     title: str
16305:     workspace_path: str | None
16306:     created_at: str
16307:     updated_at: str
16308: 
16309: 
16310: def compute_engine3_working_paper_input_fingerprint(
16311:     *,
16312:     execution_run_id: str,
16313:     paper_type: str,
16314:     resolved_object_ids_json: list[str],
16315: ) -> str:
16316:     payload = {
16317:         "execution_run_id": _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id"),
16318:         "paper_type": _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(paper_type, field_name="paper_type"),
16319:         "resolved_object_ids_json": sorted(
16320:             {
16321:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_object_ids_json")
16322:                 for item in resolved_object_ids_json
16323:             }
16324:         ),
16325:     }
16326:     if not payload["resolved_object_ids_json"]:
16327:         raise ValueError("resolved_object_ids_json must include at least one value.")
16328:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
16329: 
16330: 
16331: def compute_engine3_working_paper_output_fingerprint(
16332:     structured_paper_json: dict[str, Any],
16333: ) -> str:
16334:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
16335:         determinism.canonical_json_bytes(
16336:             _normalize_engine3_json_object(structured_paper_json, field_name="structured_paper_json")
16337:         )
16338:     )
16339: 
16340: 
16341: def compute_engine3_evidence_pack_hash(
16342:     *,
16343:     execution_run_id: str,
16344:     included_paper_types_json: list[str],
16345:     resolved_paper_ids_json: list[str],
16346:     working_paper_output_fingerprints: list[dict[str, str]],
16347: ) -> str:
16348:     normalized_types = sorted(
16349:         {
16350:             _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(item, field_name="included_paper_types_json")
16351:             for item in included_paper_types_json
16352:         }
16353:     )
16354:     normalized_paper_ids = sorted(
16355:         {
16356:             _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_paper_ids_json")
16357:             for item in resolved_paper_ids_json
16358:         }
16359:     )
16360:     if not normalized_types or not normalized_paper_ids:
16361:         raise ValueError("Evidence pack requires non-empty paper types and paper IDs.")
16362:     normalized_fingerprints: list[dict[str, str]] = []
16363:     for row in working_paper_output_fingerprints:
16364:         item = _normalize_engine3_json_object(row, field_name="working_paper_output_fingerprints[]")
16365:         if set(item.keys()) != {"paper_type", "output_fingerprint_sha256"}:
16366:             raise ValueError("working_paper_output_fingerprints entries are invalid.")
16367:         normalized_fingerprints.append(
16368:             {
16369:                 "paper_type": _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(item["paper_type"], field_name="paper_type"),
16370:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16371:                     item["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16372:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16373:                 ),
16374:             }
16375:         )
16376:     normalized_fingerprints.sort(key=lambda row: row["paper_type"])
16377:     payload = {
16378:         "execution_run_id": _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id"),
16379:         "included_paper_types_json": normalized_types,
16380:         "resolved_paper_ids_json": normalized_paper_ids,
16381:         "working_paper_output_fingerprints": normalized_fingerprints,
16382:     }
16383:     return determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(payload))
16384: 
16385: 
16386: def _engine3_require_execution_run_for_evidence(
16387:     conn: Any,
16388:     *,
16389:     tenant_id: str,
16390:     workspace_id: str,
16391:     execution_run_id: str,
16392:     enforce_status: bool = True,
16393: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
16394:     run_row = conn.execute(
16395:         """
16396:         SELECT
16397:             id,
16398:             tenant_id,
16399:             workspace_id,
16400:             action_type,
16401:             status
16402:         FROM e3_execution_runs
16403:         WHERE id = ?
16404:         LIMIT 1
16405:         """,
16406:         (execution_run_id,),
16407:     ).fetchone()
16408:     if not run_row:
16409:         raise LookupError("execution_run_id was not found.")
16410:     run_tenant = _normalize_required_text(run_row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id")
16411:     run_workspace = _normalize_required_text(run_row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id")
16412:     if run_tenant != tenant_id or run_workspace != workspace_id:
16413:         raise PermissionError("execution_run_id is outside tenant/workspace scope.")
16414:     run_status = _normalize_engine3_execution_run_status(run_row["status"], field_name="status")
16415:     if enforce_status and run_status not in ENGINE3_JE_ALLOWED_EXECUTION_RUN_STATUSES:
16416:         raise RuntimeError("execution_run status does not allow evidence operation.")
16417:     return {
16418:         "id": _normalize_required_text(run_row["id"], field_name="execution_run_id"),
16419:         "action_type": _normalize_engine3_action_type(run_row["action_type"], field_name="action_type"),
16420:         "status": run_status,
16421:     }
16422: 
16423: 
16424: def _engine3_extract_mapped_accounts_from_je_payload(je_payload_json: Any) -> list[str]:
16425:     normalized_je = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(je_payload_json)
16426:     accounts = sorted(
16427:         {
16428:             _normalize_required_text(line.get("account_code"), field_name="account_code")
16429:             for line in normalized_je["lines"]
16430:         }
16431:     )
16432:     if not accounts:
16433:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16434:     return accounts
16435: 
16436: 
16437: def _engine3_build_accrual_summary_paper(
16438:     conn: Any,
16439:     *,
16440:     tenant_id: str,
16441:     workspace_id: str,
16442:     execution_run_id: str,
16443: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16444:     rows = conn.execute(
16445:         """
16446:         SELECT
16447:             id,
16448:             accrual_type,
16449:             calculated_amount,
16450:             currency,
16451:             proposed_je_payload_json,
16452:             status,
16453:             output_fingerprint_sha256
16454:         FROM e3_accrual_proposals
16455:         WHERE execution_run_id = ?
16456:           AND tenant_id = ?
16457:           AND workspace_id = ?
16458:         ORDER BY output_fingerprint_sha256 ASC, id ASC
16459:         """,
16460:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16461:     ).fetchall()
16462:     if not rows:
16463:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16464:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
16465:     by_status: dict[str, int] = {}
16466:     resolved_object_ids_json: list[str] = []
16467:     for row in rows:
16468:         accrual_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="accrual_id")
16469:         resolved_object_ids_json.append(accrual_id)
16470:         status = _normalize_engine3_accrual_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
16471:         by_status[status] = int(by_status.get(status, 0)) + 1
16472:         amount = _normalize_engine1_decimal(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
16473:         proposed_je_payload_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
16474:             row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
16475:             field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
16476:         )
16477:         items.append(
16478:             {
16479:                 "accrual_id": accrual_id,
16480:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_accrual_type(row["accrual_type"], field_name="accrual_type"),
16481:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_number(amount),
16482:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
16483:                 "mapped_accounts": _engine3_extract_mapped_accounts_from_je_payload(proposed_je_payload_json),
16484:                 "lifecycle_status": status,
16485:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16486:                     row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16487:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16488:                 ),
16489:             }
16490:         )
16491:     return sorted(resolved_object_ids_json), {
16492:         "version": "1.0",
16493:         "paper_type": "ACCRUAL_SUMMARY",
16494:         "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
16495:         "items": items,
16496:         "summary": {
16497:             "total_items": len(items),
16498:             "by_status": {key: int(value) for key, value in sorted(by_status.items(), key=lambda item: item[0])},
16499:         },
16500:     }
16501: 
16502: 
16503: def _engine3_build_reclass_summary_paper(
16504:     conn: Any,
16505:     *,
16506:     tenant_id: str,
16507:     workspace_id: str,
16508:     execution_run_id: str,
16509: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16510:     rows = conn.execute(
16511:         """
16512:         SELECT
16513:             id,
16514:             reclass_type,
16515:             calculated_amount,
16516:             currency,
16517:             proposed_je_payload_json,
16518:             status,
16519:             output_fingerprint_sha256
16520:         FROM e3_reclass_proposals
16521:         WHERE execution_run_id = ?
16522:           AND tenant_id = ?
16523:           AND workspace_id = ?
16524:         ORDER BY output_fingerprint_sha256 ASC, id ASC
16525:         """,
16526:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16527:     ).fetchall()
16528:     if not rows:
16529:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16530:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
16531:     by_status: dict[str, int] = {}
16532:     resolved_object_ids_json: list[str] = []
16533:     for row in rows:
16534:         reclass_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="reclass_id")
16535:         resolved_object_ids_json.append(reclass_id)
16536:         status = _normalize_engine3_reclass_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
16537:         by_status[status] = int(by_status.get(status, 0)) + 1
16538:         amount = _normalize_engine1_decimal(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
16539:         proposed_je_payload_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
16540:             row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
16541:             field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
16542:         )
16543:         items.append(
16544:             {
16545:                 "reclass_id": reclass_id,
16546:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_reclass_type(row["reclass_type"], field_name="reclass_type"),
16547:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_number(amount),
16548:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
16549:                 "mapped_accounts": _engine3_extract_mapped_accounts_from_je_payload(proposed_je_payload_json),
16550:                 "lifecycle_status": status,
16551:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16552:                     row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16553:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16554:                 ),
16555:             }
16556:         )
16557:     return sorted(resolved_object_ids_json), {
16558:         "version": "1.0",
16559:         "paper_type": "RECLASS_SUMMARY",
16560:         "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
16561:         "items": items,
16562:         "summary": {
16563:             "total_items": len(items),
16564:             "by_status": {key: int(value) for key, value in sorted(by_status.items(), key=lambda item: item[0])},
16565:         },
16566:     }

16569: def _engine3_build_capex_summary_paper(
16570:     conn: Any,
16571:     *,
16572:     tenant_id: str,
16573:     workspace_id: str,
16574:     execution_run_id: str,
16575: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16576:     rows = conn.execute(
16577:         """
16578:         SELECT
16579:             id,
16580:             capex_type,
16581:             calculated_amount,
16582:             currency,
16583:             proposed_je_payload_json,
16584:             status,
16585:             output_fingerprint_sha256
16586:         FROM e3_capex_proposals
16587:         WHERE execution_run_id = ?
16588:           AND tenant_id = ?
16589:           AND workspace_id = ?
16590:         ORDER BY output_fingerprint_sha256 ASC, id ASC
16591:         """,
16592:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16593:     ).fetchall()
16594:     if not rows:
16595:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16596:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
16597:     by_status: dict[str, int] = {}
16598:     resolved_object_ids_json: list[str] = []
16599:     for row in rows:
16600:         capex_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="capex_id")
16601:         resolved_object_ids_json.append(capex_id)
16602:         status = _normalize_engine3_capex_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
16603:         by_status[status] = int(by_status.get(status, 0)) + 1
16604:         amount = _normalize_engine1_decimal(row["calculated_amount"], field_name="calculated_amount")
16605:         proposed_je_payload_json = _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
16606:             row["proposed_je_payload_json"],
16607:             field_name="proposed_je_payload_json",
16608:         )
16609:         items.append(
16610:             {
16611:                 "capex_id": capex_id,
16612:                 "type": _normalize_engine3_capex_type(row["capex_type"], field_name="capex_type"),
16613:                 "amount": _engine3_decimal_to_number(amount),
16614:                 "currency": _normalize_engine3_currency_code(row["currency"], field_name="currency"),
16615:                 "mapped_accounts": _engine3_extract_mapped_accounts_from_je_payload(proposed_je_payload_json),
16616:                 "lifecycle_status": status,
16617:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16618:                     row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16619:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16620:                 ),
16621:             }
16622:         )
16623:     return sorted(resolved_object_ids_json), {
16624:         "version": "1.0",
16625:         "paper_type": "CAPEX_SUMMARY",
16626:         "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
16627:         "items": items,
16628:         "summary": {
16629:             "total_items": len(items),
16630:             "by_status": {key: int(value) for key, value in sorted(by_status.items(), key=lambda item: item[0])},
16631:         },
16632:     }
16633: 
16634: def _engine3_build_je_register_paper(
16635:     conn: Any,
16636:     *,
16637:     tenant_id: str,
16638:     workspace_id: str,
16639:     execution_run_id: str,
16640: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16641:     rows = conn.execute(
16642:         """
16643:         SELECT
16644:             id,
16645:             je_draft_json,
16646:             output_fingerprint_sha256,
16647:             status
16648:         FROM e3_je_drafts
16649:         WHERE execution_run_id = ?
16650:           AND tenant_id = ?
16651:           AND workspace_id = ?
16652:         ORDER BY output_fingerprint_sha256 ASC, id ASC
16653:         """,
16654:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16655:     ).fetchall()
16656:     if not rows:
16657:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16658:     items: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
16659:     by_status: dict[str, int] = {}
16660:     resolved_object_ids_json: list[str] = []
16661:     for row in rows:
16662:         je_draft_id = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="je_draft_id")
16663:         resolved_object_ids_json.append(je_draft_id)
16664:         status = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_status(row["status"], field_name="status")
16665:         by_status[status] = int(by_status.get(status, 0)) + 1
16666:         je_draft_json = _normalize_engine3_je_draft_json(
16667:             _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["je_draft_json"], field_name="je_draft_json")
16668:         )
16669:         total_debit = Decimal("0")
16670:         total_credit = Decimal("0")
16671:         for line in je_draft_json["lines"]:
16672:             total_debit += _normalize_engine1_decimal(line.get("debit"), field_name="debit")
16673:             total_credit += _normalize_engine1_decimal(line.get("credit"), field_name="credit")
16674:         items.append(
16675:             {
16676:                 "je_draft_id": je_draft_id,
16677:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16678:                     row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16679:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16680:                 ),
16681:                 "lifecycle_status": status,
16682:                 "journal_date": je_draft_json["journal_date"],
16683:                 "currency": je_draft_json["currency"],
16684:                 "memo": je_draft_json["memo"],
16685:                 "line_count": len(je_draft_json["lines"]),
16686:                 "total_debit": _engine3_decimal_to_number(total_debit),
16687:                 "total_credit": _engine3_decimal_to_number(total_credit),
16688:             }
16689:         )
16690:     return sorted(resolved_object_ids_json), {
16691:         "version": "1.0",
16692:         "paper_type": "JE_REGISTER",
16693:         "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
16694:         "items": items,
16695:         "summary": {
16696:             "total_items": len(items),
16697:             "by_status": {key: int(value) for key, value in sorted(by_status.items(), key=lambda item: item[0])},
16698:         },
16699:     }
16700: 
16701: 
16702: def _engine3_select_unique_risk_output_for_paper(
16703:     conn: Any,
16704:     *,
16705:     tenant_id: str,
16706:     workspace_id: str,
16707:     execution_run_id: str,
16708: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
16709:     rows = conn.execute(
16710:         """
16711:         SELECT
16712:             r.id AS risk_run_id,
16713:             o.id AS risk_output_id,
16714:             o.risk_register_json,
16715:             o.sample_set_json
16716:         FROM e3_risk_runs r
16717:         JOIN e3_risk_outputs o ON o.risk_run_id = r.id
16718:         WHERE r.execution_run_id = ?
16719:           AND r.tenant_id = ?
16720:           AND r.workspace_id = ?
16721:         ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
16722:         """,
16723:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16724:     ).fetchall()
16725:     if not rows:
16726:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16727:     if len(rows) > 1:
16728:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_AMBIGUOUS")
16729:     return dict(rows[0])
16730: 
16731: 
16732: def _engine3_build_risk_register_paper(
16733:     conn: Any,
16734:     *,
16735:     tenant_id: str,
16736:     workspace_id: str,
16737:     execution_run_id: str,
16738: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16739:     row = _engine3_select_unique_risk_output_for_paper(
16740:         conn,
16741:         tenant_id=tenant_id,
16742:         workspace_id=workspace_id,
16743:         execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16744:     )
16745:     resolved_ids = sorted(
16746:         [
16747:             _normalize_required_text(row["risk_run_id"], field_name="risk_run_id"),
16748:             _normalize_required_text(row["risk_output_id"], field_name="risk_output_id"),
16749:         ]
16750:     )
16751:     return resolved_ids, _normalize_engine3_risk_register_json(
16752:         _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["risk_register_json"], field_name="risk_register_json")
16753:     )

16757:     conn: Any,
16758:     *,
16759:     tenant_id: str,
16760:     workspace_id: str,
16761:     execution_run_id: str,
16762: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16763:     row = _engine3_select_unique_risk_output_for_paper(
16764:         conn,
16765:         tenant_id=tenant_id,
16766:         workspace_id=workspace_id,
16767:         execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16768:     )
16769:     resolved_ids = sorted(
16770:         [
16771:             _normalize_required_text(row["risk_run_id"], field_name="risk_run_id"),
16772:             _normalize_required_text(row["risk_output_id"], field_name="risk_output_id"),
16773:         ]
16774:     )
16775:     return resolved_ids, _normalize_engine3_sample_set_json(
16776:         _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["sample_set_json"], field_name="sample_set_json")

16779: 
16780: def _engine3_build_narrative_paper(
16781:     conn: Any,
16782:     *,
16783:     tenant_id: str,
16784:     workspace_id: str,
16785:     execution_run_id: str,
16786: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16787:     rows = conn.execute(
16788:         """
16789:         SELECT
16790:             r.id AS narrative_run_id,
16791:             r.template_key,
16792:             r.template_version_number,
16793:             o.id AS narrative_output_id,
16794:             o.narrative_text,
16795:             o.structured_narrative_json
16796:         FROM e3_narrative_runs r
16797:         JOIN e3_narrative_outputs o ON o.narrative_run_id = r.id
16798:         WHERE r.execution_run_id = ?
16799:           AND r.tenant_id = ?
16800:           AND r.workspace_id = ?
16801:         ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
16802:         """,
16803:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16804:     ).fetchall()
16805:     if not rows:
16806:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16807:     if len(rows) > 1:
16808:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_AMBIGUOUS")
16809:     row = dict(rows[0])
16810:     narrative_run_id = _normalize_required_text(row["narrative_run_id"], field_name="narrative_run_id")
16811:     resolved_object_ids_json = sorted(
16812:         [
16813:             narrative_run_id,
16814:             _normalize_required_text(row["narrative_output_id"], field_name="narrative_output_id"),
16815:         ]
16816:     )
16817:     payload = {
16818:         "version": "1.0",
16819:         "paper_type": "NARRATIVE",
16820:         "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
16821:         "narrative_run_id": narrative_run_id,
16822:         "template_key": _normalize_required_text(row["template_key"], field_name="template_key"),
16823:         "template_version_number": int(row["template_version_number"]),
16824:         "deterministic_narrative_text": _normalize_required_text(row["narrative_text"], field_name="narrative_text"),
16825:         "structured_narrative_json": _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
16826:             row["structured_narrative_json"],
16827:             field_name="structured_narrative_json",
16828:         ),
16829:     }
16830:     llm_rows = conn.execute(
16831:         """
16832:         SELECT
16833:             id,
16834:             llm_provider,
16835:             model_id,
16836:             llm_output_text
16837:         FROM e3_narrative_llm_outputs
16838:         WHERE narrative_run_id = ?
16839:           AND tenant_id = ?
16840:           AND workspace_id = ?
16841:           AND validation_status = 'VALIDATED'
16842:         ORDER BY model_id ASC, id ASC
16843:         """,
16844:         (narrative_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
16845:     ).fetchall()
16846:     if len(llm_rows) > 1:
16847:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_AMBIGUOUS")
16848:     if llm_rows:
16849:         llm_row = dict(llm_rows[0])
16850:         resolved_object_ids_json.append(_normalize_required_text(llm_row["id"], field_name="llm_output_id"))
16851:         payload["llm_rewrite"] = {
16852:             "llm_output_id": _normalize_required_text(llm_row["id"], field_name="llm_output_id"),
16853:             "llm_provider": _normalize_required_text(llm_row["llm_provider"], field_name="llm_provider"),
16854:             "model_id": _normalize_required_text(llm_row["model_id"], field_name="model_id"),
16855:             "llm_output_text": _normalize_required_text(llm_row["llm_output_text"], field_name="llm_output_text"),
16856:         }
16857:     return sorted(resolved_object_ids_json), payload
16858: 
16859: 
16860: def _engine3_build_working_paper_payload(
16861:     conn: Any,
16862:     *,
16863:     paper_type: str,
16864:     tenant_id: str,
16865:     workspace_id: str,
16866:     execution_run_id: str,
16867: ) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
16868:     normalized_paper_type = _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(paper_type, field_name="paper_type")
16869:     if normalized_paper_type == "ACCRUAL_SUMMARY":
16870:         return _engine3_build_accrual_summary_paper(
16871:             conn,
16872:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16873:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16874:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16875:         )
16876:     if normalized_paper_type == "RECLASS_SUMMARY":
16877:         return _engine3_build_reclass_summary_paper(
16878:             conn,
16879:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16880:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16881:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16882:         )
16883:     if normalized_paper_type == "CAPEX_SUMMARY":
16884:         return _engine3_build_capex_summary_paper(
16885:             conn,
16886:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16887:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16888:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16889:         )
16890:     if normalized_paper_type == "JE_REGISTER":
16891:         return _engine3_build_je_register_paper(
16892:             conn,
16893:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16894:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16895:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16896:         )
16897:     if normalized_paper_type == "RISK_REGISTER":
16898:         return _engine3_build_risk_register_paper(
16899:             conn,
16900:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16901:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16902:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16903:         )
16904:     if normalized_paper_type == "SAMPLE_SET":
16905:         return _engine3_build_sample_set_paper(
16906:             conn,
16907:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16908:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16909:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16910:         )
16911:     if normalized_paper_type == "NARRATIVE":
16912:         return _engine3_build_narrative_paper(
16913:             conn,
16914:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
16915:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
16916:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
16917:         )
16918:     raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
16919: 
16920: 
16921: def _engine3_working_paper_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
16922:     return {
16923:         "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id"),
16924:         "execution_run_id": _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id"),
16925:         "tenant_id": _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id"),
16926:         "workspace_id": _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id"),
16927:         "paper_type": _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(row["paper_type"], field_name="paper_type"),
16928:         "resolved_object_ids_json": sorted(
16929:             {
16930:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_object_ids_json")
16931:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
16932:                     row["resolved_object_ids_json"],
16933:                     field_name="resolved_object_ids_json",
16934:                 )
16935:             }
16936:         ),
16937:         "input_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16938:             row["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
16939:             field_name="input_fingerprint_sha256",
16940:         ),
16941:         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
16942:             row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
16943:             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
16944:         ),
16945:         "structured_paper_json": _engine3_parse_json_object_text(
16946:             row["structured_paper_json"],
16947:             field_name="structured_paper_json",
16948:         ),
16949:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
16950:     }
16951: 
16952: 
16953: def _engine3_verify_working_paper_row(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
16954:     payload = _engine3_working_paper_row_to_dict(row)
16955:     recomputed_input_fingerprint = compute_engine3_working_paper_input_fingerprint(
16956:         execution_run_id=payload["execution_run_id"],
16957:         paper_type=payload["paper_type"],
16958:         resolved_object_ids_json=list(payload["resolved_object_ids_json"]),
16959:     )
16960:     if recomputed_input_fingerprint != payload["input_fingerprint_sha256"]:
16961:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_PACK_REPLAY_MISMATCH")
16962:     recomputed_output_fingerprint = compute_engine3_working_paper_output_fingerprint(payload["structured_paper_json"])
16963:     if recomputed_output_fingerprint != payload["output_fingerprint_sha256"]:
16964:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_PACK_REPLAY_MISMATCH")
16965:     return payload
16966: 
16967: def _engine3_evidence_pack_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
16968:     return {
16969:         "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id"),
16970:         "execution_run_id": _normalize_required_text(row["execution_run_id"], field_name="execution_run_id"),
16971:         "tenant_id": _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id"),
16972:         "workspace_id": _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id"),
16973:         "included_paper_types_json": sorted(
16974:             {
16975:                 _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(item, field_name="included_paper_types_json")
16976:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
16977:                     row["included_paper_types_json"],
16978:                     field_name="included_paper_types_json",
16979:                 )
16980:             }
16981:         ),
16982:         "resolved_paper_ids_json": sorted(
16983:             {
16984:                 _normalize_required_text(item, field_name="resolved_paper_ids_json")
16985:                 for item in _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
16986:                     row["resolved_paper_ids_json"],
16987:                     field_name="resolved_paper_ids_json",
16988:                 )
16989:             }
16990:         ),
16991:         "pack_hash_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(row["pack_hash_sha256"], field_name="pack_hash_sha256"),
16992:         "artifact_refs_json": _normalize_engine3_artifact_refs(
16993:             _engine3_parse_json_array_text(
16994:                 row["artifact_refs_json"],
16995:                 field_name="artifact_refs_json",
16996:             )
16997:         ),
16998:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
16999:     }
17000: 
17001: 
17002: def _engine3_fetch_working_paper_rows_for_pack(
17003:     conn: Any,
17004:     *,
17005:     tenant_id: str,
17006:     workspace_id: str,
17007:     execution_run_id: str,
17008:     included_paper_types_json: list[str],
17009: ) -> list[Any]:
17010:     normalized_types = sorted(
17011:         {
17012:             _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(item, field_name="included_paper_types_json")
17013:             for item in included_paper_types_json
17014:         }
17015:     )
17016:     if not normalized_types:
17017:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
17018:     placeholders = ", ".join("?" for _ in normalized_types)
17019:     rows = conn.execute(
17020:         f"""
17021:         SELECT
17022:             id,
17023:             execution_run_id,
17024:             tenant_id,
17025:             workspace_id,
17026:             paper_type,
17027:             resolved_object_ids_json,
17028:             input_fingerprint_sha256,
17029:             output_fingerprint_sha256,
17030:             structured_paper_json,
17031:             created_at
17032:         FROM e3_working_papers
17033:         WHERE execution_run_id = ?
17034:           AND tenant_id = ?
17035:           AND workspace_id = ?
17036:           AND paper_type IN ({placeholders})
17037:         ORDER BY paper_type ASC, id ASC
17038:         """,
17039:         (execution_run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, *normalized_types),
17040:     ).fetchall()
17041:     if len(rows) != len(normalized_types):
17042:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
17043:     seen: set[str] = set()
17044:     verified_rows: list[Any] = []
17045:     for row in rows:
17046:         paper_type = _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(row["paper_type"], field_name="paper_type")
17047:         if paper_type in seen:
17048:             raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_AMBIGUOUS")
17049:         seen.add(paper_type)
17050:         _engine3_verify_working_paper_row(row)
17051:         verified_rows.append(row)
17052:     if seen != set(normalized_types):
17053:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_DATA_INSUFFICIENT")
17054:     return verified_rows
17055: 
17056: 
17057: def _engine3_recompute_evidence_pack_hash_from_working_papers(
17058:     *,
17059:     execution_run_id: str,
17060:     working_paper_rows: list[Any],
17061: ) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], str]:
17062:     paper_rows = [_engine3_verify_working_paper_row(row) for row in working_paper_rows]
17063:     included_paper_types_json = sorted(
17064:         {
17065:             _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type(row["paper_type"], field_name="paper_type")
17066:             for row in paper_rows
17067:         }
17068:     )
17069:     resolved_paper_ids_json = sorted(
17070:         {
17071:             _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="paper_id")
17072:             for row in paper_rows
17073:         }
17074:     )
17075:     working_paper_output_fingerprints = [
17076:         {
17077:             "paper_type": row["paper_type"],
17078:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
17079:         }
17080:         for row in sorted(paper_rows, key=lambda item: item["paper_type"])
17081:     ]
17082:     pack_hash_sha256 = compute_engine3_evidence_pack_hash(
17083:         execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
17084:         included_paper_types_json=included_paper_types_json,
17085:         resolved_paper_ids_json=resolved_paper_ids_json,
17086:         working_paper_output_fingerprints=working_paper_output_fingerprints,
17087:     )
17088:     return included_paper_types_json, resolved_paper_ids_json, pack_hash_sha256
17089: 
17090: 
17091: def _engine3_validate_evidence_pack_row(
17092:     conn: Any,
17093:     *,
17094:     row: Any,
17095: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], list[dict[str, Any]]]:
17096:     pack_payload = _engine3_evidence_pack_row_to_dict(row)
17097:     working_paper_rows = _engine3_fetch_working_paper_rows_for_pack(
17098:         conn,
17099:         tenant_id=pack_payload["tenant_id"],
17100:         workspace_id=pack_payload["workspace_id"],
17101:         execution_run_id=pack_payload["execution_run_id"],
17102:         included_paper_types_json=list(pack_payload["included_paper_types_json"]),
17103:     )
17104:     working_papers = [_engine3_verify_working_paper_row(item) for item in working_paper_rows]
17105:     included_types, resolved_ids, recomputed_hash = _engine3_recompute_evidence_pack_hash_from_working_papers(
17106:         execution_run_id=pack_payload["execution_run_id"],
17107:         working_paper_rows=working_paper_rows,
17108:     )
17109:     if included_types != list(pack_payload["included_paper_types_json"]):
17110:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_PACK_REPLAY_MISMATCH")
17111:     if resolved_ids != list(pack_payload["resolved_paper_ids_json"]):
17112:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_PACK_REPLAY_MISMATCH")
17113:     if recomputed_hash != pack_payload["pack_hash_sha256"]:
17114:         raise RuntimeError("EVIDENCE_PACK_REPLAY_MISMATCH")
17115:     return pack_payload, sorted(working_papers, key=lambda item: item["paper_type"])
17116: 
17117: 
17118: def generate_engine3_working_papers(
17119:     *,
17120:     tenant_id: str,
17121:     workspace_id: str,
17122:     execution_run_id: str,
17123:     paper_types: list[str] | None = None,
17124: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
17125:     required_tables = (
17126:         "e3_working_papers",
17127:         "e3_execution_events",
17128:     )
17129:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
17130:         raise RuntimeError("Engine3 evidence schema is not available.")
17131:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
17132:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
17133:     normalized_execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(execution_run_id, field_name="execution_run_id")
17134:     normalized_paper_types = _normalize_engine3_working_paper_type_list(paper_types)
17135:     created_any = False
17136:     with get_conn() as conn:
17137:         _engine3_require_execution_run_for_evidence(
17138:             conn,
17139:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
17140:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
17141:             execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
17142:             enforce_status=True,
17143:         )
17144:         results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
17145:         for paper_type in normalized_paper_types:
17146:             existing_row = conn.execute(
17147:                 """
17148:                 SELECT
17149:                     id,
17150:                     execution_run_id,
17151:                     tenant_id,
17152:                     workspace_id,
17153:                     paper_type,
17154:                     resolved_object_ids_json,
17155:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
17156:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
17157:                     structured_paper_json,
17158:                     created_at
17159:                 FROM e3_working_papers
17160:                 WHERE execution_run_id = ?
17161:                   AND tenant_id = ?
17162:                   AND workspace_id = ?
17163:                   AND paper_type = ?
17164:                 LIMIT 1
17165:                 """,
17166:                 (
17167:                     normalized_execution_run_id,
17168:                     normalized_tenant,
17169:                     normalized_workspace,
17170:                     paper_type,
17171:                 ),
17172:             ).fetchone()
17173:             if existing_row:
17174:                 results.append(_engine3_verify_working_paper_row(existing_row))
17175:                 continue
17176: 
17177:             resolved_object_ids_json, structured_paper_json = _engine3_build_working_paper_payload(
17178:                 conn,
17179:                 paper_type=paper_type,
17180:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
17181:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
17182:                 execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
17183:             )
17184:             input_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine3_working_paper_input_fingerprint(
17185:                 execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
17186:                 paper_type=paper_type,
17187:                 resolved_object_ids_json=resolved_object_ids_json,
17188:             )
17189:             output_fingerprint_sha256 = compute_engine3_working_paper_output_fingerprint(structured_paper_json)
17190:             row_id = f"e3wp_{uuid4().hex}"
17191:             now = utc_now_iso()
17192:             inserted_row = None
17193:             try:
17194:                 conn.execute(
17195:                     """
17196:                     INSERT INTO e3_working_papers (
17197:                         id,
17198:                         execution_run_id,
17199:                         tenant_id,
17200:                         workspace_id,
17201:                         paper_type,
17202:                         resolved_object_ids_json,
17203:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
17204:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
17205:                         structured_paper_json,
17206:                         created_at
17207:                     )
17208:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
17209:                     """,
17210:                     (
17211:                         row_id,
17212:                         normalized_execution_run_id,
17213:                         normalized_tenant,
17214:                         normalized_workspace,
17215:                         paper_type,
17216:                         _canonical_json_text(sorted(resolved_object_ids_json)),
17217:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
17218:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
17219:                         _canonical_json_text(structured_paper_json),
17220:                         now,
17221:                     ),
17222:                 )
17223:                 _insert_engine3_execution_event_row(
17224:                     conn,
17225:                     execution_run_id=normalized_execution_run_id,
17226:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
17227:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
17228:                     event_type="WORKING_PAPER_GENERATED",
17229:                     event_payload_json={
17230:                         "working_paper_id": row_id,
17231:                         "paper_type": paper_type,
17232:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
17233:                     },
17234:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
17235:                     actor_id="engine3_system",
17236:                     created_at=now,
17237:                 )
17238:                 created_any = True
17239:                 inserted_row = conn.execute(
17240:                     """
17241:                     SELECT
17242:                         id,
17243:                         execution_run_id,
17244:                         tenant_id,
17245:                         workspace_id,
17246:                         paper_type,
17247:                         resolved_object_ids_json,
17248:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
17249:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
17250:                         structured_paper_json,
17251:                         created_at
17252:                     FROM e3_working_papers
17253:                     WHERE id = ?
17254:                     LIMIT 1
17255:                     """,
17256:                     (row_id,),
17257:                 ).fetchone()
17258:             except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
17259:                 inserted_row = conn.execute(
17260:                     """
17261:                     SELECT
17262:                         id,
17263:                         execution_run_id,
17264:                         tenant_id,
17265:                         workspace_id,
17266:                         paper_type,
17267:                         resolved_object_ids_json,
17268:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
17269:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
17270:                         structured_paper_json,
17271:                         created_at
