19031:             execution_run_id=ensured["execution_run_id"],
19032:             template_key=template_key,
19033:             period_scope_json=period_scope,
19034:         )
19035:         run_payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(narrative_result.get("run"), field_name="narrative_result.run")
19036:         output_payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(narrative_result.get("output"), field_name="narrative_result.output")
19037:         return {
19038:             "engine_run_id": _normalize_required_text(run_payload.get("id"), field_name="narrative_run_id"),
19039:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
19040:                 run_payload.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
19041:                 field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
19042:             ),
19043:             "output_ref_json": {
19044:                 "step_type": step_type,
19045:                 "execution_run_id": ensured["execution_run_id"],
19046:                 "narrative_run_id": _normalize_required_text(run_payload.get("id"), field_name="narrative_run_id"),
19047:                 "narrative_output_id": _normalize_required_text(
19048:                     output_payload.get("id"),
19049:                     field_name="narrative_output_id",
19050:                 ),
19051:             },
19052:         }
19053: 
19054:     if step_type in {"run_engine3_accrual", "run_engine3_reclass", "run_engine3_capex"}:
19055:         action_type_map = {
19056:             "run_engine3_accrual": "ACCRUAL_PREPARATION",
19057:             "run_engine3_reclass": "RECLASSIFICATION",
19058:             "run_engine3_capex": "CAPITALIZATION",
19059:         }
19060:         ensured = _engine4_ensure_engine3_execution_run(
19061:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19062:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19063:             intent_type=intent["intent_type"],
19064:             period_scope_json=period_scope,
19065:             action_type=action_type_map[step_type],
19066:             canonical_anchors=canonical_anchors,
19067:             state=state,
19068:         )
19069:         execution_run_id = ensured["execution_run_id"]
19070:         converted_je_fingerprint = None
19071: 
19072:         if step_type == "run_engine3_accrual":
19073:             detected = detect_engine3_accrual_proposals(
19074:                 tenant_id=tenant_id,
19075:                 workspace_id=workspace_id,
19076:                 execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19077:             )
19078:             proposals = list(detected.get("proposals") or [])
19079:             if proposals:
19080:                 converted = convert_accrual_to_je(
19081:                     tenant_id=tenant_id,
19082:                     workspace_id=workspace_id,
19083:                     execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19084:                     accrual_id=_normalize_required_text(proposals[0].get("id"), field_name="accrual_id"),
19085:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
19086:                     actor_id="engine4_system",
19087:                 )
19088:                 converted_je_fingerprint = _normalize_required_text(
19089:                     _normalize_engine3_json_object(converted.get("je_draft"), field_name="je_draft").get(
19090:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256"
19091:                     ),
19092:                     field_name="je_draft.output_fingerprint_sha256",
19093:                 )
19094:         elif step_type == "run_engine3_reclass":
19095:             detected = detect_engine3_reclass_proposals(
19096:                 tenant_id=tenant_id,
19097:                 workspace_id=workspace_id,
19098:                 execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19099:             )
19100:             proposals = list(detected.get("proposals") or [])
19101:             if proposals:
19102:                 converted = convert_reclass_to_je(
19103:                     tenant_id=tenant_id,
19104:                     workspace_id=workspace_id,
19105:                     execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19106:                     reclass_id=_normalize_required_text(proposals[0].get("id"), field_name="reclass_id"),
19107:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
19108:                     actor_id="engine4_system",
19109:                 )
19110:                 converted_je_fingerprint = _normalize_required_text(
19111:                     _normalize_engine3_json_object(converted.get("je_draft"), field_name="je_draft").get(
19112:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256"
19113:                     ),
19114:                     field_name="je_draft.output_fingerprint_sha256",
19115:                 )
19116:         else:
19117:             detected = detect_engine3_capex_proposals(
19118:                 tenant_id=tenant_id,
19119:                 workspace_id=workspace_id,
19120:                 execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19121:             )
19122:             proposals = list(detected.get("proposals") or [])
19123:             if proposals:
19124:                 converted = convert_capex_to_je(
19125:                     tenant_id=tenant_id,
19126:                     workspace_id=workspace_id,
19127:                     execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19128:                     capex_id=_normalize_required_text(proposals[0].get("id"), field_name="capex_id"),
19129:                     actor_type="SYSTEM",
19130:                     actor_id="engine4_system",
19131:                 )
19132:                 converted_je_fingerprint = _normalize_required_text(
19133:                     _normalize_engine3_json_object(converted.get("je_draft"), field_name="je_draft").get(
19134:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256"
19135:                     ),
19136:                     field_name="je_draft.output_fingerprint_sha256",
19137:                 )
19138: 
19139:         proposal_fingerprints = sorted(
19140:             {
19141:                 _normalize_engine1_hash(
19142:                     _normalize_engine3_json_object(item, field_name="proposal").get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
19143:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
19144:                 )
19145:                 for item in proposals
19146:             }
19147:         )
19148:         output_fingerprint = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
19149:             determinism.canonical_json_bytes(
19150:                 {
19151:                     "step_type": step_type,
19152:                     "proposal_output_fingerprints": proposal_fingerprints,
19153:                     "converted_je_output_fingerprint_sha256": converted_je_fingerprint,
19154:                 }
19155:             )
19156:         )
19157:         return {
19158:             "engine_run_id": execution_run_id,
19159:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint,
19160:             "output_ref_json": {
19161:                 "step_type": step_type,
19162:                 "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
19163:                 "proposal_count": len(proposals),
19164:             },
19165:         }
19166: 
19167:     if step_type == "run_engine2b_mis":
19168:         with get_conn() as conn:
19169:             template_version_id = _engine4_resolve_engine2b_template_version_id(
19170:                 conn,
19171:                 tenant_id=tenant_id,
19172:                 workspace_id=workspace_id,
19173:                 requested_template_id=intent_payload.get("engine2b_template_id"),
19174:             )
19175:         mis_run, _created = create_engine2b_mis_run_skeleton(
19176:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19177:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19178:             template_version_id=template_version_id,
19179:             canonical_anchors=canonical_anchors,
19180:             period_scope_json=period_scope,
19181:         )
19182:         mis_run_id = _normalize_required_text(mis_run.get("id"), field_name="mis_run_id")
19183:         resolve_engine2b_mis_run_periods(
19184:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19185:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19186:             mis_run_id=mis_run_id,
19187:         )
19188:         output = compute_engine2b_mis_variance(
19189:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19190:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19191:             mis_run_id=mis_run_id,
19192:         )
19193:         state["last_engine2b_mis_run_id"] = mis_run_id
19194:         return {
19195:             "engine_run_id": mis_run_id,
19196:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
19197:                 output.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
19198:                 field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
19199:             ),
19200:             "output_ref_json": {
19201:                 "step_type": step_type,
19202:                 "mis_run_id": mis_run_id,
19203:                 "output_id": _normalize_required_text(output.get("output_id"), field_name="output_id"),
19204:             },
19205:         }
19206: 
19207:     if step_type == "generate_engine3_working_papers":
19208:         execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(
19209:             state.get("last_engine3_execution_run_id"),
19210:             field_name="execution_run_id",
19211:         )
19212:         result = generate_engine3_working_papers(
19213:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19214:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19215:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19216:             paper_types=None,
19217:         )
19218:         papers = [
19219:             _normalize_engine3_json_object(item, field_name="papers[]")
19220:             for item in list(result.get("papers") or [])
19221:         ]
19222:         output_fingerprint = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
19223:             determinism.canonical_json_bytes(
19224:                 {
19225:                     "step_type": step_type,
19226:                     "paper_output_fingerprint_sha256_list": sorted(
19227:                         {
19228:                             _normalize_engine1_hash(
19229:                                 item.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
19230:                                 field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
19231:                             )
19232:                             for item in papers
19233:                         }
19234:                     ),
19235:                 }
19236:             )
19237:         )
19238:         state["working_papers_execution_run_id"] = execution_run_id
19239:         return {
19240:             "engine_run_id": execution_run_id,
19241:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint,
19242:             "output_ref_json": {
19243:                 "step_type": step_type,
19244:                 "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
19245:                 "paper_ids": sorted(
19246:                     {
19247:                         _normalize_required_text(item.get("id"), field_name="working_paper_id")
19248:                         for item in papers
19249:                     }
19250:                 ),
19251:             },
19252:         }
19253: 
19254:     if step_type == "generate_engine3_evidence_pack":
19255:         execution_run_id = _normalize_required_text(
19256:             state.get("working_papers_execution_run_id") or state.get("last_engine3_execution_run_id"),
19257:             field_name="execution_run_id",
19258:         )
19259:         result = generate_engine3_evidence_pack(
19260:             tenant_id=tenant_id,
19261:             workspace_id=workspace_id,
19262:             execution_run_id=execution_run_id,
19263:             included_paper_types=None,
19264:         )
19265:         evidence_pack = _normalize_engine3_json_object(result.get("evidence_pack"), field_name="evidence_pack")
19266:         return {
19267:             "engine_run_id": execution_run_id,
19268:             "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
19269:                 evidence_pack.get("pack_hash_sha256"),
19270:                 field_name="pack_hash_sha256",
19271:             ),
19272:             "output_ref_json": {
19273:                 "step_type": step_type,
19274:                 "execution_run_id": execution_run_id,
19275:                 "evidence_pack_id": _normalize_required_text(evidence_pack.get("id"), field_name="evidence_pack_id"),
19276:             },
19277:         }
19278: 
19279:     raise RuntimeError(f"ENGINE4_STEP_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED:{step_type}")
19280: 
19281: 
19282: def create_engine4_intent_run(
19283:     *,
19284:     tenant_id: str,
19285:     workspace_id: str,
19286:     intent_id: str,
19287: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
19288:     required_tables = ("e4_intents", "e4_execution_plans", "e4_plan_steps", "e4_intent_runs", "e4_intent_run_steps")
19289:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
19290:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 run schema is not available.")
19291:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
19292:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
19293:     normalized_intent_id = _normalize_required_text(intent_id, field_name="intent_id")
19294:     now = utc_now_iso()
19295: 
19296:     with get_conn() as conn:
19297:         intent_row = _engine4_load_intent_row_for_scope(
19298:             conn,
19299:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19300:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19301:             intent_id=normalized_intent_id,
19302:         )
19303:         intent = _engine4_intent_row_to_dict(intent_row)
19304:         if intent["status"] != "READY":
19305:             raise RuntimeError("intent status must be READY to create run.")
19306: 
19307:         plan_row = conn.execute(
19308:             """
19309:             SELECT
19310:                 id,
19311:                 tenant_id,
19312:                 workspace_id,
19313:                 intent_id,
19314:                 plan_json,
19315:                 plan_fingerprint_sha256,
19316:                 status,
19317:                 created_at
19318:             FROM e4_execution_plans
19319:             WHERE intent_id = ?
19320:             LIMIT 1
19321:             """,
19322:             (normalized_intent_id,),
19323:         ).fetchone()
19324:         if not plan_row:
19325:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_PLAN_NOT_FOUND")
19326:         plan = _engine4_execution_plan_row_to_dict(plan_row)
19327:         if plan["status"] != "LOCKED":
19328:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_PLAN_NOT_LOCKED")
19329:         plan_steps = _engine4_list_plan_steps(
19330:             conn,
19331:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19332:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19333:             execution_plan_id=plan["id"],
19334:         )
19335: 
19336:         input_fingerprint_sha256 = _compute_engine4_intent_run_input_fingerprint(
19337:             intent_input_fingerprint_sha256=intent["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
19338:             plan_fingerprint_sha256=plan["plan_fingerprint_sha256"],
19339:         )
19340:         run_id = f"e4run_{uuid4().hex}"
19341:         created = False
19342:         try:
19343:             conn.execute(
19344:                 """
19345:                 INSERT INTO e4_intent_runs (
19346:                     id,
19347:                     tenant_id,
19348:                     workspace_id,
19349:                     intent_id,
19350:                     execution_plan_id,
19351:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
19352:                     plan_fingerprint_sha256,
19353:                     resolved_engine_run_ids_json,
19354:                     output_refs_json,
19355:                     replay_bundle_hash_sha256,
19356:                     status,
19357:                     error_code,
19358:                     error_payload_json,
19359:                     created_at,
19360:                     started_at,
19361:                     ended_at
19362:                 )
19363:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]', '[]', NULL, 'QUEUED', NULL, NULL, ?, NULL, NULL)
19364:                 """,
19365:                 (
19366:                     run_id,
19367:                     normalized_tenant,
19368:                     normalized_workspace,
19369:                     normalized_intent_id,
19370:                     plan["id"],
19371:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
19372:                     plan["plan_fingerprint_sha256"],
19373:                     now,
19374:                 ),
19375:             )
19376:             created = True
19377:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
19378:             created = False
19379:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
19380:             message = str(exc).lower()
19381:             if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
19382:                 raise
19383:             created = False
19384: 
19385:         if not created:
19386:             existing_row = conn.execute(
19387:                 """
19388:                 SELECT
19389:                     id,
19390:                     tenant_id,
19391:                     workspace_id,
19392:                     intent_id,
19393:                     execution_plan_id,
19394:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
19395:                     plan_fingerprint_sha256,
19396:                     resolved_engine_run_ids_json,
19397:                     output_refs_json,
19398:                     replay_bundle_hash_sha256,
19399:                     status,
19400:                     error_code,
19401:                     error_payload_json,
19402:                     created_at,
19403:                     started_at,
19404:                     ended_at
19405:                 FROM e4_intent_runs
19406:                 WHERE intent_id = ?
19407:                   AND plan_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
19408:                   AND tenant_id = ?
19409:                   AND workspace_id = ?
19410:                 LIMIT 1
19411:                 """,
19412:                 (
19413:                     normalized_intent_id,
19414:                     plan["plan_fingerprint_sha256"],
19415:                     normalized_tenant,
19416:                     normalized_workspace,
19417:                 ),
19418:             ).fetchone()
19419:             if not existing_row:
19420:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_IDEMPOTENT_LOOKUP_FAILED")
19421:             run = _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(existing_row)
19422:             run_id = run["id"]
19423:         else:
19424:             run = {
19425:                 "id": run_id,
19426:                 "execution_plan_id": plan["id"],
19427:                 "input_fingerprint_sha256": input_fingerprint_sha256,
19428:             }
19429: 
19430:         for step in plan_steps:
19431:             step_input_fingerprint = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
19432:                 determinism.canonical_json_bytes(
19433:                     {
19434:                         "intent_run_input_fingerprint_sha256": run["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
19435:                         "step_no": int(step["step_no"]),
19436:                         "step_payload_json": step["payload"],
19437:                     }
19438:                 )
19439:             )
19440:             try:
19441:                 conn.execute(
19442:                     """
19443:                     INSERT INTO e4_intent_run_steps (
19444:                         id,
19445:                         tenant_id,
19446:                         workspace_id,
19447:                         intent_run_id,
19448:                         execution_plan_id,
19449:                         step_no,
19450:                         step_type,
19451:                         engine,
19452:                         action,
19453:                         engine_run_id,
19454:                         status,
19455:                         input_fingerprint_sha256,
19456:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
19457:                         started_at,
19458:                         ended_at
19459:                     )
19460:                     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, 'QUEUED', ?, NULL, NULL, NULL)
19461:                     """,
19462:                     (
19463:                         f"e4rst_{uuid4().hex}",
19464:                         normalized_tenant,
19465:                         normalized_workspace,
19466:                         run_id,
19467:                         plan["id"],
19468:                         int(step["step_no"]),
19469:                         _normalize_required_text(step["step_type"], field_name="step_type"),
19470:                         _normalize_required_text(step["payload"]["engine"], field_name="engine"),
19471:                         _normalize_required_text(step["payload"]["action"], field_name="action"),
19472:                         step_input_fingerprint,
19473:                     ),
19474:                 )
19475:             except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
19476:                 pass
19477:             except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
19478:                 message = str(exc).lower()
19479:                 if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
19480:                     raise
19481: 
19482:         persisted_row = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19483:             conn,
19484:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19485:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19486:             run_id=run_id,
19487:         )
19488:         return _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(persisted_row), created
19489: 
19490: 
19491: def execute_engine4_intent_run(
19492:     *,
19493:     tenant_id: str,
19494:     workspace_id: str,
19495:     run_id: str,
19496: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
19497:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs", "e4_intent_run_steps", "e4_intents", "e4_execution_plans")
19498:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
19499:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 run schema is not available.")
19500:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
19501:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
19502:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(run_id, field_name="run_id")
19503: 
19504:     with get_conn() as conn:
19505:         run_row = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19506:             conn,
19507:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19508:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19509:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
19510:         )
19511:         run = _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(run_row)
19512:         status = _normalize_engine4_intent_run_status(run["status"], field_name="status")
19513:         if status in {"SUCCEEDED", "FAILED", "CANCELLED"}:
19514:             return run, False
19515:         if status == "RUNNING":
19516:             return run, False
19517:         cursor = conn.execute(
19518:             """
19519:             UPDATE e4_intent_runs
19520:             SET status = 'RUNNING',
19521:                 started_at = ?,
19522:                 ended_at = NULL,
19523:                 error_code = NULL,
19524:                 error_payload_json = NULL
19525:             WHERE id = ?
19526:               AND tenant_id = ?
19527:               AND workspace_id = ?
19528:               AND status = 'QUEUED'
19529:             """,
19530:             (utc_now_iso(), normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
19531:         )
19532:         if int(getattr(cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
19533:             refreshed = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19534:                 conn,
19535:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19536:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19537:                 run_id=normalized_run_id,
19538:             )
19539:             return _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(refreshed), False
19540: 
19541:     with get_conn() as conn:
19542:         run = _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(
19543:             _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19544:                 conn,
19545:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19546:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19547:                 run_id=normalized_run_id,
19548:             )
19549:         )
19550:         intent = _engine4_intent_row_to_dict(
19551:             _engine4_load_intent_row_for_scope(
19552:                 conn,
19553:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19554:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19555:                 intent_id=run["intent_id"],
19556:             )
19557:         )
19558:         plan_row = conn.execute(
19559:             """
19560:             SELECT
19561:                 id,
19562:                 tenant_id,
19563:                 workspace_id,
19564:                 intent_id,
19565:                 plan_json,
19566:                 plan_fingerprint_sha256,
19567:                 status,
19568:                 created_at
19569:             FROM e4_execution_plans
19570:             WHERE id = ?
19571:             LIMIT 1
19572:             """,
19573:             (run["execution_plan_id"],),
19574:         ).fetchone()
19575:         if not plan_row:
19576:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_PLAN_NOT_FOUND")
19577:         plan = _engine4_execution_plan_row_to_dict(plan_row)
19578:         if plan["status"] != "LOCKED":
19579:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_PLAN_NOT_LOCKED")
19580:         plan_steps = _engine4_list_plan_steps(
19581:             conn,
19582:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19583:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19584:             execution_plan_id=plan["id"],
19585:         )
19586:         canonical_anchors = _engine4_sorted_canonical_anchors_for_intent_execution(
19587:             conn,
19588:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19589:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19590:         )
19591: 
19592:     state: dict[str, Any] = {"canonical_anchors": canonical_anchors}
19593:     output_refs: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
19594: 
19595:     for step in plan_steps:
19596:         step_no = int(step["step_no"])
19597:         with get_conn() as conn:
19598:             step_row = conn.execute(
19599:                 """
19600:                 SELECT
19601:                     id,
19602:                     tenant_id,
19603:                     workspace_id,
19604:                     intent_run_id,
19605:                     execution_plan_id,
19606:                     step_no,
19607:                     step_type,
19608:                     engine,
19609:                     action,
19610:                     engine_run_id,
19611:                     status,
19612:                     input_fingerprint_sha256,
19613:                     output_fingerprint_sha256,
19614:                     started_at,
19615:                     ended_at
19616:                 FROM e4_intent_run_steps
19617:                 WHERE intent_run_id = ?
19618:                   AND step_no = ?
19619:                 LIMIT 1
19620:                 """,
19621:                 (normalized_run_id, step_no),
19622:             ).fetchone()
19623:             if not step_row:
19624:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_MISSING")
19625:             step_state = _engine4_intent_run_step_row_to_dict(step_row)
19626:             if step_state["status"] == "SUCCEEDED":
19627:                 if step_state["engine_run_id"] and step_state["output_fingerprint_sha256"]:
19628:                     output_refs.append(
19629:                         {
19630:                             "step_no": step_state["step_no"],
19631:                             "step_type": step_state["step_type"],
19632:                             "engine_run_id": step_state["engine_run_id"],
19633:                             "output_fingerprint_sha256": step_state["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
19634:                         }
19635:                     )
19636:                 continue
19637:             if step_state["status"] in {"FAILED", "SKIPPED"}:
19638:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_TERMINAL")
19639:             if step_state["status"] != "QUEUED":
19640:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_STATE_INVALID")
19641:             claim = conn.execute(
19642:                 """
19643:                 UPDATE e4_intent_run_steps
19644:                 SET status = 'RUNNING',
19645:                     started_at = ?,
19646:                     ended_at = NULL
19647:                 WHERE id = ?
19648:                   AND tenant_id = ?
19649:                   AND workspace_id = ?
19650:                   AND status = 'QUEUED'
19651:                 """,
19652:                 (utc_now_iso(), step_state["id"], normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
19653:             )
19654:             if int(getattr(claim, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
19655:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_CLAIM_FAILED")
19656: 
19657:         try:
19658:             result = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
19659:                 _engine4_execute_plan_step_internal(
19660:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19661:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19662:                     intent=intent,
19663:                     plan=plan,
19664:                     step=step,
19665:                     state=state,
19666:                 ),
19667:                 field_name="step_result",
19668:             )
19669:             engine_run_id = _normalize_required_text(result.get("engine_run_id"), field_name="engine_run_id")
19670:             output_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
19671:                 result.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
19672:                 field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
19673:             )
19674:             output_refs.append(
19675:                 {
19676:                     "step_no": step_no,
19677:                     "step_type": _normalize_required_text(step["step_type"], field_name="step_type"),
19678:                     "engine_run_id": engine_run_id,
19679:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": output_fingerprint_sha256,
19680:                 }
19681:             )
19682:             with get_conn() as conn:
19683:                 done = conn.execute(
19684:                     """
19685:                     UPDATE e4_intent_run_steps
19686:                     SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
19687:                         engine_run_id = ?,
19688:                         output_fingerprint_sha256 = ?,
19689:                         ended_at = ?
19690:                     WHERE intent_run_id = ?
19691:                       AND step_no = ?
19692:                       AND tenant_id = ?
19693:                       AND workspace_id = ?
19694:                       AND status = 'RUNNING'
19695:                     """,
19696:                     (
19697:                         engine_run_id,
19698:                         output_fingerprint_sha256,
19699:                         utc_now_iso(),
19700:                         normalized_run_id,
19701:                         step_no,
19702:                         normalized_tenant,
19703:                         normalized_workspace,
19704:                     ),
19705:                 )
19706:                 if int(getattr(done, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
19707:                     raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_COMPLETE_FAILED")
19708:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
19709:             error_message = str(exc).strip() or "Step execution failed."
19710:             error_code = "ENGINE4_STEP_EXECUTION_FAILED"
19711:             upper = error_message.upper()
19712:             if upper.startswith("ENGINE4_"):
19713:                 error_code = error_message.split(":", 1)[0].strip().upper()
19714:             with get_conn() as conn:
19715:                 conn.execute(
19716:                     """
19717:                     UPDATE e4_intent_run_steps
19718:                     SET status = 'FAILED',
19719:                         ended_at = ?
19720:                     WHERE intent_run_id = ?
19721:                       AND step_no = ?
19722:                       AND tenant_id = ?
19723:                       AND workspace_id = ?
19724:                       AND status = 'RUNNING'
19725:                     """,
19726:                     (utc_now_iso(), normalized_run_id, step_no, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
19727:                 )
19728:                 conn.execute(
19729:                     """
19730:                     UPDATE e4_intent_runs
19731:                     SET status = 'FAILED',
19732:                         error_code = ?,
19733:                         error_payload_json = ?,
19734:                         ended_at = ?
19735:                     WHERE id = ?
19736:                       AND tenant_id = ?
19737:                       AND workspace_id = ?
19738:                       AND status = 'RUNNING'
19739:                     """,
19740:                     (
19741:                         error_code,
19742:                         _canonical_json_text(
19743:                             {
19744:                                 "message": error_message,
19745:                                 "step_no": step_no,
19746:                                 "step_type": _normalize_required_text(step["step_type"], field_name="step_type"),
19747:                             }
19748:                         ),
19749:                         utc_now_iso(),
19750:                         normalized_run_id,
19751:                         normalized_tenant,
19752:                         normalized_workspace,
19753:                     ),
19754:                 )
19755:                 failed_row = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19756:                     conn,
19757:                     tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19758:                     workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19759:                     run_id=normalized_run_id,
19760:                 )
19761:                 return _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(failed_row), True
19762: 
19763:     resolved_engine_run_ids_json = sorted({item["engine_run_id"] for item in output_refs})
19764:     replay_bundle_hash_sha256 = _compute_engine4_replay_bundle_hash(
19765:         intent_input_fingerprint_sha256=intent["input_fingerprint_sha256"],
19766:         plan_fingerprint_sha256=plan["plan_fingerprint_sha256"],
19767:         resolved_engine_run_ids_json=resolved_engine_run_ids_json,
19768:         output_refs_json=output_refs,
19769:     )
19770:     with get_conn() as conn:
19771:         cursor = conn.execute(
19772:             """
19773:             UPDATE e4_intent_runs
19774:             SET status = 'SUCCEEDED',
19775:                 resolved_engine_run_ids_json = ?,
19776:                 output_refs_json = ?,
19777:                 replay_bundle_hash_sha256 = ?,
19778:                 error_code = NULL,
19779:                 error_payload_json = NULL,
19780:                 ended_at = ?
19781:             WHERE id = ?
19782:               AND tenant_id = ?
19783:               AND workspace_id = ?
19784:               AND status = 'RUNNING'
19785:             """,
19786:             (
19787:                 _canonical_json_text(resolved_engine_run_ids_json),
19788:                 _canonical_json_text(
19789:                     sorted(output_refs, key=lambda item: (int(item["step_no"]), str(item["step_type"])))
19790:                 ),
19791:                 replay_bundle_hash_sha256,
19792:                 utc_now_iso(),
19793:                 normalized_run_id,
19794:                 normalized_tenant,
19795:                 normalized_workspace,
19796:             ),
19797:         )
19798:         if int(getattr(cursor, "rowcount", 0) or 0) != 1:
19799:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_COMPLETE_FAILED")
19800:         final_row = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19801:             conn,
19802:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19803:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19804:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
19805:         )
19806:         return _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(final_row), True
19807: 
19808: 
19809: def get_engine4_intent_run(
19810:     *,
19811:     tenant_id: str,
19812:     workspace_id: str,
19813:     run_id: str,
19814: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
19815:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs",)
19816:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
19817:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 run schema is not available.")
19818:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
19819:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
19820:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(run_id, field_name="run_id")
19821:     with get_conn() as conn:
19822:         row = _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19823:             conn,
19824:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19825:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19826:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
19827:         )
19828:         return _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(row)
19829: 
19830: 
19831: def list_engine4_intent_run_steps(
19832:     *,
19833:     tenant_id: str,
19834:     workspace_id: str,
19835:     run_id: str,
19836: ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
19837:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs", "e4_intent_run_steps")
19838:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
19839:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 run schema is not available.")
19840:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
19841:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
19842:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(run_id, field_name="run_id")
19843:     with get_conn() as conn:
19844:         _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19845:             conn,
19846:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19847:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19848:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
19849:         )
19850:         rows = conn.execute(
19851:             """
19852:             SELECT
19853:                 id,
19854:                 tenant_id,
19855:                 workspace_id,
19856:                 intent_run_id,
19857:                 execution_plan_id,
19858:                 step_no,
19859:                 step_type,
19860:                 engine,
19861:                 action,
19862:                 engine_run_id,
19863:                 status,
19864:                 input_fingerprint_sha256,
19865:                 output_fingerprint_sha256,
19866:                 started_at,
19867:                 ended_at
19868:             FROM e4_intent_run_steps
19869:             WHERE intent_run_id = ?
19870:               AND tenant_id = ?
19871:               AND workspace_id = ?
19872:             ORDER BY step_no ASC, id ASC
19873:             """,
19874:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
19875:         ).fetchall()
19876:         return [_engine4_intent_run_step_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
19877: 
19878: 
19879: def _engine4_run_response_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
19880:     response_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
19881:         _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["response_json"], field_name="response_json"),
19882:         field_name="response_json",
19883:     )
19884:     response_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
19885:         row["response_fingerprint_sha256"],
19886:         field_name="response_fingerprint_sha256",
19887:     )
19888:     recomputed = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(response_json))
19889:     if recomputed != response_fingerprint_sha256:
19890:         raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_FINGERPRINT_MISMATCH")
19891:     return {
19892:         "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id"),
19893:         "tenant_id": _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id"),
19894:         "workspace_id": _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id"),
19895:         "intent_run_id": _normalize_required_text(row["intent_run_id"], field_name="intent_run_id"),
19896:         "execution_plan_id": _normalize_required_text(row["execution_plan_id"], field_name="execution_plan_id"),
19897:         "response_json": response_json,
19898:         "response_fingerprint_sha256": response_fingerprint_sha256,
19899:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
19900:     }
19901: 
19902: 
19903: def _engine4_fetch_cached_run_response(
19904:     conn: Any,
19905:     *,
19906:     tenant_id: str,
19907:     workspace_id: str,
19908:     run_id: str,
19909: ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
19910:     row = conn.execute(
19911:         """
19912:         SELECT
19913:             id,
19914:             tenant_id,
19915:             workspace_id,
19916:             intent_run_id,
19917:             execution_plan_id,
19918:             response_json,
19919:             response_fingerprint_sha256,
19920:             created_at
19921:         FROM e4_run_responses
19922:         WHERE intent_run_id = ?
19923:           AND tenant_id = ?
19924:           AND workspace_id = ?
19925:         LIMIT 1
19926:         """,
19927:         (run_id, tenant_id, workspace_id),
19928:     ).fetchone()
19929:     return _engine4_run_response_row_to_dict(row) if row else None
19930: 
19931: 
19932: def assemble_engine4_run_response(
19933:     *,
19934:     tenant_id: str,
19935:     workspace_id: str,
19936:     intent_run_id: str,
19937: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
19938:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs", "e4_intent_run_steps", "e4_run_responses")
19939:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
19940:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 response schema is not available.")
19941:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
19942:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
19943:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(intent_run_id, field_name="intent_run_id")
19944: 
19945:     with get_conn() as conn:
19946:         run = _engine4_intent_run_row_to_dict(
19947:             _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
19948:                 conn,
19949:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19950:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19951:                 run_id=normalized_run_id,
19952:             )
19953:         )
19954:         if run["status"] != "SUCCEEDED":
19955:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_NOT_SUCCEEDED")
19956:         cached = _engine4_fetch_cached_run_response(
19957:             conn,
19958:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19959:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19960:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
19961:         )
19962:         if cached:
19963:             return cached, False
19964:         intent = _engine4_intent_row_to_dict(
19965:             _engine4_load_intent_row_for_scope(
19966:                 conn,
19967:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19968:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19969:                 intent_id=run["intent_id"],
19970:             )
19971:         )
19972: 
19973:     steps = list_engine4_intent_run_steps(
19974:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19975:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19976:         run_id=normalized_run_id,
19977:     )
19978:     if not steps:
19979:         raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEPS_MISSING")
19980:     for step in steps:
19981:         if str(step["status"]) != "SUCCEEDED":
19982:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RUN_STEP_NOT_SUCCEEDED")
19983: 
19984:     summary: dict[str, Any] = {}
19985:     actions: dict[str, Any] = {}
19986:     artifacts: dict[str, Any] = {}
19987:     journal_drafts: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
19988: 
19989:     for step in sorted(steps, key=lambda item: (int(item["step_no"]), str(item["id"]))):
19990:         step_type = _normalize_required_text(step["step_type"], field_name="step_type")
19991:         engine_run_id = _normalize_required_text(step["engine_run_id"], field_name="engine_run_id")
19992:         if step_type == "run_engine3_risk":
19993:             risk_result = get_engine3_risk_run(
19994:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
19995:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
19996:                 risk_run_id=engine_run_id,
19997:                 idempotent=True,
19998:             )
19999:             risk_run = _normalize_engine3_json_object(risk_result.get("run"), field_name="risk_run")
20000:             risk_output = risk_result.get("output")
20001:             if not isinstance(risk_output, dict):
20002:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_MISSING_RISK_OUTPUT")
20003:             risk_output_obj = _normalize_engine3_json_object(risk_output, field_name="risk_output")
20004:             risk_register = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20005:                 risk_output_obj.get("risk_register_json"),
20006:                 field_name="risk_register_json",
20007:             )
20008:             sample_set = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20009:                 risk_output_obj.get("sample_set_json"),
20010:                 field_name="sample_set_json",
20011:             )
20012:             summary["risk_results"] = {
20013:                 "risk_run_id": _normalize_required_text(risk_run.get("id"), field_name="risk_run_id"),
20014:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20015:                     risk_run.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
20016:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20017:                 ),
20018:                 "summary": _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20019:                     risk_register.get("summary"),
20020:                     field_name="risk_register_json.summary",
20021:                 ),
20022:                 "sample_method": _normalize_required_text(sample_set.get("method"), field_name="sample_set_json.method"),
20023:             }
20024:             continue
20025: 
20026:         if step_type == "run_engine2b_mis":
20027:             with get_conn() as conn:
20028:                 row = conn.execute(
20029:                     """
20030:                     SELECT
20031:                         r.id AS mis_run_id,
20032:                         r.output_fingerprint_sha256,
20033:                         o.id AS output_id,
20034:                         o.structured_output_json
20035:                     FROM e2b_mis_runs r
20036:                     LEFT JOIN e2b_mis_outputs o ON o.mis_run_id = r.id
20037:                     WHERE r.id = ?
20038:                       AND r.tenant_id = ?
20039:                       AND r.workspace_id = ?
20040:                     LIMIT 1
20041:                     """,
20042:                     (engine_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
20043:                 ).fetchone()
20044:             if not row:
20045:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_MISSING_MIS_RUN")
20046:             output_id = str(row["output_id"] or "").strip()
20047:             raw_output = str(row["structured_output_json"] or "").strip()
20048:             if not output_id or not raw_output:
20049:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_MISSING_MIS_OUTPUT")
20050:             output_payload = canonicalize_engine2b_mis_output_payload(json.loads(raw_output))
20051:             rows = list(output_payload.get("rows") or [])
20052:             summary["mis_results"] = {
20053:                 "mis_run_id": _normalize_required_text(row["mis_run_id"], field_name="mis_run_id"),
20054:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20055:                     row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
20056:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20057:                 ),
20058:                 "output_id": _normalize_required_text(output_id, field_name="output_id"),
20059:                 "row_count": len(rows),
20060:             }
20061:             continue
20062: 
20063:         if step_type == "run_engine3_narratives":
20064:             narrative = get_engine3_narrative_run(
20065:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20066:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20067:                 narrative_run_id=engine_run_id,
20068:                 idempotent=True,
20069:             )
20070:             run_payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(narrative.get("run"), field_name="narrative.run")
20071:             output_payload_raw = narrative.get("output")
20072:             if not isinstance(output_payload_raw, dict):
20073:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_MISSING_NARRATIVE_OUTPUT")
20074:             output_payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(output_payload_raw, field_name="narrative.output")
20075:             narrative_item: dict[str, Any] = {
20076:                 "narrative_run_id": _normalize_required_text(run_payload.get("id"), field_name="narrative_run_id"),
20077:                 "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20078:                     run_payload.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
20079:                     field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20080:                 ),
20081:                 "narrative_text": _normalize_required_text(output_payload.get("narrative_text"), field_name="narrative_text"),
20082:                 "structured_narrative_json": _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20083:                     output_payload.get("structured_narrative_json"),
20084:                     field_name="structured_narrative_json",
20085:                 ),
20086:             }
20087:             with get_conn() as conn:
20088:                 llm_row = conn.execute(
20089:                     """
20090:                     SELECT llm_output_text
20091:                     FROM e3_narrative_llm_outputs
20092:                     WHERE narrative_run_id = ?
20093:                       AND tenant_id = ?
20094:                       AND workspace_id = ?
20095:                       AND validation_status = 'VALIDATED'
20096:                     ORDER BY model_id ASC, id ASC
20097:                     LIMIT 1
20098:                     """,
20099:                     (engine_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
20100:                 ).fetchone()
20101:             if llm_row and str(llm_row["llm_output_text"] or "").strip():
20102:                 narrative_item["validated_llm_rewrite"] = _normalize_required_text(
20103:                     llm_row["llm_output_text"],
20104:                     field_name="validated_llm_rewrite",
20105:                 )
20106:             summary["narratives"] = narrative_item
20107:             continue
20108: 
20109:         if step_type == "generate_engine3_working_papers":
20110:             papers = list_engine3_working_papers(
20111:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20112:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20113:                 execution_run_id=engine_run_id,
20114:             )
20115:             if not papers:
20116:                 raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_MISSING_WORKING_PAPERS")
20117:             artifacts["working_papers"] = sorted(
20118:                 [
20119:                     {
20120:                         "id": _normalize_required_text(item.get("id"), field_name="working_paper_id"),
20121:                         "paper_type": _normalize_required_text(item.get("paper_type"), field_name="paper_type"),
20122:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20123:                             item.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
20124:                             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20125:                         ),
20126:                     }
20127:                     for item in papers
20128:                 ],
20129:                 key=lambda item: (item["id"], item["paper_type"]),
20130:             )
20131:             continue
20132: 
20133:         if step_type == "generate_engine3_evidence_pack":
20134:             evidence = get_engine3_evidence_pack(
20135:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20136:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20137:                 execution_run_id=engine_run_id,
20138:             )
20139:             evidence_pack = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20140:                 evidence.get("evidence_pack"),
20141:                 field_name="evidence_pack",
20142:             )
20143:             artifacts["evidence_pack"] = {
20144:                 "pack_id": _normalize_required_text(evidence_pack.get("id"), field_name="pack_id"),
20145:                 "pack_hash": _normalize_engine1_hash(evidence_pack.get("pack_hash_sha256"), field_name="pack_hash"),
20146:             }
20147:             continue
20148: 
20149:         if step_type == "run_engine3_accrual":
20150:             proposals = list_engine3_accrual_proposals(
20151:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20152:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20153:                 execution_run_id=engine_run_id,
20154:             )
20155:             actions["accrual_proposals"] = sorted(
20156:                 [
20157:                     {
20158:                         "id": _normalize_required_text(item.get("id"), field_name="accrual_id"),
20159:                         "status": _normalize_required_text(item.get("status"), field_name="status"),
20160:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20161:                             item.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
20162:                             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20163:                         ),
20164:                     }
20165:                     for item in proposals
20166:                 ],
20167:                 key=lambda item: item["id"],
20168:             )
20169:             with get_conn() as conn:
20170:                 rows = conn.execute(
20171:                     """
20172:                     SELECT id, status, output_fingerprint_sha256
20173:                     FROM e3_je_drafts
20174:                     WHERE execution_run_id = ?
20175:                       AND tenant_id = ?
20176:                       AND workspace_id = ?
20177:                     ORDER BY id ASC
20178:                     """,
20179:                     (engine_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
20180:                 ).fetchall()
20181:             for row in rows:
20182:                 journal_drafts[_normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="je_draft_id")] = {
20183:                     "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="je_draft_id"),
20184:                     "status": _normalize_required_text(row["status"], field_name="status"),
20185:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20186:                         row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
20187:                         field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20188:                     ),
20189:                 }
20190:             continue
20191: 
20192:         if step_type == "run_engine3_reclass":
20193:             proposals = list_engine3_reclass_proposals(
20194:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20195:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20196:                 execution_run_id=engine_run_id,
20197:             )
20198:             actions["reclass_proposals"] = sorted(
20199:                 [
20200:                     {
20201:                         "id": _normalize_required_text(item.get("id"), field_name="reclass_id"),
20202:                         "status": _normalize_required_text(item.get("status"), field_name="status"),
20203:                         "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20204:                             item.get("output_fingerprint_sha256"),
20205:                             field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20206:                         ),
20207:                     }
20208:                     for item in proposals
20209:                 ],
20210:                 key=lambda item: item["id"],
20211:             )
20212:             with get_conn() as conn:
20213:                 rows = conn.execute(
20214:                     """
20215:                     SELECT id, status, output_fingerprint_sha256
20216:                     FROM e3_je_drafts
20217:                     WHERE execution_run_id = ?
20218:                       AND tenant_id = ?
20219:                       AND workspace_id = ?
20220:                     ORDER BY id ASC
20221:                     """,
20222:                     (engine_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
20223:                 ).fetchall()
20224:             for row in rows:
20225:                 journal_drafts[_normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="je_draft_id")] = {
20226:                     "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="je_draft_id"),
20227:                     "status": _normalize_required_text(row["status"], field_name="status"),
20228:                     "output_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20229:                         row["output_fingerprint_sha256"],
20230:                         field_name="output_fingerprint_sha256",
20231:                     ),
20232:                 }
20233:             continue
20234: 
20235:     if journal_drafts:
20236:         actions["journal_drafts"] = sorted(journal_drafts.values(), key=lambda item: item["id"])
20237: 
20238:     response_json: dict[str, Any] = {
20239:         "intent_run_id": normalized_run_id,
20240:         "intent_type": _normalize_engine4_intent_type(intent["intent_type"], field_name="intent_type"),
20241:         "plan_fingerprint": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20242:             run["plan_fingerprint_sha256"],
20243:             field_name="plan_fingerprint_sha256",
20244:         ),
20245:     }
20246:     if summary:
20247:         response_json["summary"] = summary
20248:     if actions:
20249:         response_json["actions"] = actions
20250:     if artifacts:
20251:         response_json["artifacts"] = artifacts
20252: 
20253:     normalized_response_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(response_json, field_name="response_json")
20254:     response_fingerprint_sha256 = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
20255:         determinism.canonical_json_bytes(normalized_response_json)
20256:     )
20257:     response_id = f"e4resp_{uuid4().hex}"
20258:     now = utc_now_iso()
20259: 
20260:     with get_conn() as conn:
20261:         try:
20262:             conn.execute(
20263:                 """
20264:                 INSERT INTO e4_run_responses (
20265:                     id,
20266:                     tenant_id,
20267:                     workspace_id,
20268:                     intent_run_id,
20269:                     execution_plan_id,
20270:                     response_json,
20271:                     response_fingerprint_sha256,
20272:                     created_at
20273:                 )
20274:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
20275:                 """,
20276:                 (
20277:                     response_id,
20278:                     normalized_tenant,
20279:                     normalized_workspace,
20280:                     normalized_run_id,
20281:                     _normalize_required_text(run["execution_plan_id"], field_name="execution_plan_id"),
20282:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_response_json),
20283:                     response_fingerprint_sha256,
20284:                     now,
20285:                 ),
20286:             )
20287:             _insert_engine4_intent_event_row(
20288:                 conn,
20289:                 intent_id=_normalize_required_text(run["intent_id"], field_name="intent_id"),
20290:                 tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20291:                 workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20292:                 event_type="ENGINE4_RESPONSE_GENERATED",
20293:                 event_payload_json={
20294:                     "intent_run_id": normalized_run_id,
20295:                     "response_id": response_id,
20296:                     "response_fingerprint_sha256": response_fingerprint_sha256,
20297:                 },
20298:                 created_at=now,
20299:             )
20300:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
20301:             pass
20302:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
20303:             message = str(exc).lower()
20304:             if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
20305:                 raise
20306: 
20307:         row = conn.execute(
20308:             """
20309:             SELECT
20310:                 id,
20311:                 tenant_id,
20312:                 workspace_id,
20313:                 intent_run_id,
20314:                 execution_plan_id,
20315:                 response_json,
20316:                 response_fingerprint_sha256,
20317:                 created_at
20318:             FROM e4_run_responses
20319:             WHERE intent_run_id = ?
20320:               AND tenant_id = ?
20321:               AND workspace_id = ?
20322:             LIMIT 1
20323:             """,
20324:             (normalized_run_id, normalized_tenant, normalized_workspace),
20325:         ).fetchone()
20326:         if not row:
20327:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_RESPONSE_PERSISTENCE_FAILED")
20328:         created = _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id") == response_id
20329:         return _engine4_run_response_row_to_dict(row), created
20330: 
20331: 
20332: def get_engine4_run_response(
20333:     *,
20334:     tenant_id: str,
20335:     workspace_id: str,
20336:     run_id: str,
20337: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
20338:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs", "e4_run_responses")
20339:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
20340:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 response schema is not available.")
20341:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
20342:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
20343:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(run_id, field_name="run_id")
20344:     with get_conn() as conn:
20345:         _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
20346:             conn,
20347:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20348:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20349:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
20350:         )
20351:         cached = _engine4_fetch_cached_run_response(
20352:             conn,
20353:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20354:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20355:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
20356:         )
20357:         if cached:
20358:             return cached
20359:     response, _created = assemble_engine4_run_response(
20360:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20361:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20362:         intent_run_id=normalized_run_id,
20363:     )
20364:     return response
20365: 
20366: 
20367: def _normalize_engine4_explanation_json(value: Any, *, field_name: str = "explanation_json") -> dict[str, str]:
20368:     payload = _normalize_engine3_json_object(value, field_name=field_name)
20369:     allowed = set(ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_SECTION_KEYS)
20370:     extra = sorted(set(payload.keys()) - allowed)
20371:     if extra:
20372:         raise ValueError(
20373:             f"{field_name} contains unknown keys: {', '.join(extra)}."
20374:         )
20375:     if not payload:
20376:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must include at least one explanation section.")
20377:     normalized: dict[str, str] = {}
20378:     for key in ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_SECTION_KEYS:
20379:         if key not in payload:
20380:             continue
20381:         normalized[key] = _normalize_required_text(payload[key], field_name=f"{field_name}.{key}")
20382:     if not normalized:
20383:         raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must include at least one explanation section.")
20384:     return normalized
20385: 
20386: 
20387: def _engine4_explanation_text(explanation_json: dict[str, str]) -> str:
20388:     normalized = _normalize_engine4_explanation_json(explanation_json, field_name="explanation_json")
20389:     return "\n".join(normalized[key] for key in ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_SECTION_KEYS if key in normalized)
20390: 
20391: 
20392: def validate_engine4_explanation(
20393:     *,
20394:     response_json: dict[str, Any],
20395:     explanation_json: Any,
20396: ) -> dict[str, str]:
20397:     try:
20398:         normalized_response = _normalize_engine3_json_object(response_json, field_name="response_json")
20399:         normalized_explanation = _normalize_engine4_explanation_json(
20400:             explanation_json,
20401:             field_name="explanation_json",
20402:         )
20403:         summary = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20404:             normalized_response.get("summary") or {},
20405:             field_name="response_json.summary",
20406:         )
20407:         actions = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20408:             normalized_response.get("actions") or {},
20409:             field_name="response_json.actions",
20410:         )
20411:         artifacts = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20412:             normalized_response.get("artifacts") or {},
20413:             field_name="response_json.artifacts",
20414:         )
20415:         section_presence = {
20416:             "summary_explanation": bool(summary),
20417:             "risk_explanation": bool(summary.get("risk_results")),
20418:             "variance_explanation": bool(summary.get("mis_results") or summary.get("narratives")),
20419:             "action_explanation": bool(actions),
20420:             "audit_support_explanation": bool(artifacts),
20421:         }
20422:         for section_key in normalized_explanation.keys():
20423:             if not section_presence.get(section_key, False):
20424:                 raise ValueError(
20425:                     f"explanation_json.{section_key} cannot be set when source section is absent."
20426:                 )
20427: 
20428:         explanation_text = _engine4_explanation_text(normalized_explanation)
20429:         if len(explanation_text) > ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_MAX_CHARS:
20430:             raise ValueError("explanation_json length exceeds maximum configured characters.")
20431: 
20432:         source_text = _canonical_json_text(normalized_response)
20433:         source_numeric_tokens = _engine3_extract_numeric_tokens(source_text)
20434:         output_numeric_tokens = _engine3_extract_numeric_tokens(explanation_text)
20435:         if output_numeric_tokens.difference(source_numeric_tokens):
20436:             raise ValueError("Explanation introduces numeric drift.")
20437: 
20438:         allowed_metric_labels = _engine3_extract_allowed_metric_labels(
20439:             structured_narrative_json=normalized_response,
20440:             deterministic_narrative_text=source_text,
20441:         )
20442:         output_metric_labels = _engine3_extract_candidate_metric_labels(explanation_text)
20443:         if output_metric_labels.difference(allowed_metric_labels):
20444:             raise ValueError("Explanation introduces metric-label drift.")
20445: 
20446:         allowed_period_tokens = _engine3_extract_period_tokens(source_text)
20447:         output_period_tokens = _engine3_extract_period_tokens(explanation_text)
20448:         if output_period_tokens.difference(allowed_period_tokens):
20449:             raise ValueError("Explanation introduces period/date drift.")
20450: 
20451:         source_upper = source_text.upper()
20452:         output_upper = explanation_text.upper()
20453:         for token in ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_CONCLUSION_TOKENS:
20454:             if token in output_upper and token not in source_upper:
20455:                 raise ValueError("Explanation introduces conclusion drift.")
20456:         return normalized_explanation
20457:     except ValueError as exc:
20458:         raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_VALIDATION_FAILED") from exc
20459: 
20460: 
20461: def _engine4_run_explanation_row_to_dict(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
20462:     explanation_json = _normalize_engine4_explanation_json(
20463:         _engine3_parse_json_object_text(row["explanation_json"], field_name="explanation_json"),
20464:         field_name="explanation_json",
20465:     )
20466:     explanation_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
20467:         row["explanation_fingerprint_sha256"],
20468:         field_name="explanation_fingerprint_sha256",
20469:     )
20470:     recomputed_fingerprint = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(determinism.canonical_json_bytes(explanation_json))
20471:     if recomputed_fingerprint != explanation_fingerprint_sha256:
20472:         raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_FINGERPRINT_MISMATCH")
20473:     return {
20474:         "id": _normalize_required_text(row["id"], field_name="id"),
20475:         "tenant_id": _normalize_required_text(row["tenant_id"], field_name="tenant_id"),
20476:         "workspace_id": _normalize_required_text(row["workspace_id"], field_name="workspace_id"),
20477:         "intent_run_id": _normalize_required_text(row["intent_run_id"], field_name="intent_run_id"),
20478:         "response_fingerprint_sha256": _normalize_engine1_hash(
20479:             row["response_fingerprint_sha256"],
20480:             field_name="response_fingerprint_sha256",
20481:         ),
20482:         "explanation_json": explanation_json,
20483:         "explanation_fingerprint_sha256": explanation_fingerprint_sha256,
20484:         "model_name": _normalize_required_text(row["model_name"], field_name="model_name"),
20485:         "model_version": _normalize_required_text(row["model_version"], field_name="model_version"),
20486:         "created_at": _normalize_required_text(row["created_at"], field_name="created_at"),
20487:     }
20488: 
20489: 
20490: def _engine4_fetch_cached_run_explanation(
20491:     conn: Any,
20492:     *,
20493:     tenant_id: str,
20494:     workspace_id: str,
20495:     intent_run_id: str,
20496:     response_fingerprint_sha256: str,
20497: ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
20498:     row = conn.execute(
20499:         """
20500:         SELECT
20501:             id,
20502:             tenant_id,
20503:             workspace_id,
20504:             intent_run_id,
20505:             response_fingerprint_sha256,
20506:             explanation_json,
20507:             explanation_fingerprint_sha256,
20508:             model_name,
20509:             model_version,
20510:             created_at
20511:         FROM e4_run_explanations
20512:         WHERE intent_run_id = ?
20513:           AND response_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
20514:           AND tenant_id = ?
20515:           AND workspace_id = ?
20516:         LIMIT 1
20517:         """,
20518:         (intent_run_id, response_fingerprint_sha256, tenant_id, workspace_id),
20519:     ).fetchone()
20520:     return _engine4_run_explanation_row_to_dict(row) if row else None
20521: 
20522: 
20523: def _engine4_invoke_run_explanation_llm(
20524:     *,
20525:     model_name: str,
20526:     model_version: str,
20527:     system_prompt: str,
20528:     user_content_json: str,
20529:     llm_input_json: dict[str, Any],
20530: ) -> dict[str, Any] | str:
20531:     _normalize_required_text(model_name, field_name="model_name")
20532:     _normalize_required_text(model_version, field_name="model_version")
20533:     _normalize_required_text(system_prompt, field_name="system_prompt")
20534:     _normalize_required_text(user_content_json, field_name="user_content_json")
20535:     _normalize_engine3_json_object(llm_input_json, field_name="llm_input_json")
20536:     raise RuntimeError("LLM_NOT_CONFIGURED")
20537: 
20538: 
20539: def generate_engine4_run_explanation(
20540:     *,
20541:     tenant_id: str,
20542:     workspace_id: str,
20543:     intent_run_id: str,
20544:     model_name: str = "WORKBENCH_GOVERNED_LLM",
20545:     model_version: str = "v1",
20546:     invoker: Callable[..., dict[str, Any] | str] | None = None,
20547: ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], bool]:
20548:     required_tables = ("e4_intent_runs", "e4_run_responses", "e4_run_explanations")
20549:     if any(not list_table_columns(table_name) for table_name in required_tables):
20550:         raise RuntimeError("Engine4 explanation schema is not available.")
20551:     normalized_tenant = _normalize_required_text(tenant_id, field_name="tenant_id")
20552:     normalized_workspace = _normalize_required_text(workspace_id, field_name="workspace_id")
20553:     normalized_run_id = _normalize_required_text(intent_run_id, field_name="intent_run_id")
20554:     normalized_model_name = _normalize_required_text(model_name, field_name="model_name")
20555:     normalized_model_version = _normalize_required_text(model_version, field_name="model_version")
20556:     llm_invoker = invoker or _engine4_invoke_run_explanation_llm
20557: 
20558:     response = get_engine4_run_response(
20559:         tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20560:         workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20561:         run_id=normalized_run_id,
20562:     )
20563:     response_fingerprint_sha256 = _normalize_engine1_hash(
20564:         response.get("response_fingerprint_sha256"),
20565:         field_name="response_fingerprint_sha256",
20566:     )
20567:     response_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20568:         response.get("response_json"),
20569:         field_name="response_json",
20570:     )
20571: 
20572:     with get_conn() as conn:
20573:         _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
20574:             conn,
20575:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20576:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20577:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
20578:         )
20579:         cached = _engine4_fetch_cached_run_explanation(
20580:             conn,
20581:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20582:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20583:             intent_run_id=normalized_run_id,
20584:             response_fingerprint_sha256=response_fingerprint_sha256,
20585:         )
20586:         if cached:
20587:             return cached, False
20588: 
20589:     llm_input_json = _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20590:         {
20591:             "summary": _normalize_engine3_json_object(response_json.get("summary") or {}, field_name="response_json.summary"),
20592:             "actions": _normalize_engine3_json_object(response_json.get("actions") or {}, field_name="response_json.actions"),
20593:             "artifacts": _normalize_engine3_json_object(
20594:                 response_json.get("artifacts") or {},
20595:                 field_name="response_json.artifacts",
20596:             ),
20597:         },
20598:         field_name="llm_input_json",
20599:     )
20600:     user_content_json = _canonical_json_text(response_json)
20601:     llm_output = llm_invoker(
20602:         model_name=normalized_model_name,
20603:         model_version=normalized_model_version,
20604:         system_prompt=ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
20605:         user_content_json=user_content_json,
20606:         llm_input_json=llm_input_json,
20607:     )
20608: 
20609:     explanation_candidate: Any = llm_output
20610:     if isinstance(llm_output, str):
20611:         try:
20612:             explanation_candidate = json.loads(llm_output)
20613:         except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
20614:             raise RuntimeError("ENGINE4_EXPLANATION_VALIDATION_FAILED") from exc
20615:     normalized_explanation = validate_engine4_explanation(
20616:         response_json=response_json,
20617:         explanation_json=explanation_candidate,
20618:     )
20619:     explanation_fingerprint_sha256 = determinism.sha256_hex_bytes(
20620:         determinism.canonical_json_bytes(normalized_explanation)
20621:     )
20622:     explanation_id = f"e4expl_{uuid4().hex}"
20623:     now = utc_now_iso()
20624: 
20625:     with get_conn() as conn:
20626:         _engine4_load_intent_run_row_for_scope(
20627:             conn,
20628:             tenant_id=normalized_tenant,
20629:             workspace_id=normalized_workspace,
20630:             run_id=normalized_run_id,
20631:         )
20632:         try:
20633:             conn.execute(
20634:                 """
20635:                 INSERT INTO e4_run_explanations (
20636:                     id,
20637:                     tenant_id,
20638:                     workspace_id,
20639:                     intent_run_id,
20640:                     response_fingerprint_sha256,
20641:                     explanation_json,
20642:                     explanation_fingerprint_sha256,
20643:                     model_name,
20644:                     model_version,
20645:                     created_at
20646:                 )
20647:                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
20648:                 """,
20649:                 (
20650:                     explanation_id,
20651:                     normalized_tenant,
20652:                     normalized_workspace,
20653:                     normalized_run_id,
20654:                     response_fingerprint_sha256,
20655:                     _canonical_json_text(normalized_explanation),
20656:                     explanation_fingerprint_sha256,
20657:                     normalized_model_name,
20658:                     normalized_model_version,
20659:                     now,
20660:                 ),
20661:             )
20662:         except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
20663:             pass
20664:         except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
20665:             message = str(exc).lower()
20666:             if "unique" not in message and "duplicate" not in message:
20667:                 raise
20668: 
20669:         row = conn.execute(
20670:             """
20671:             SELECT
20672:                 id,
20673:                 tenant_id,
20674:                 workspace_id,
20675:                 intent_run_id,
20676:                 response_fingerprint_sha256,
20677:                 explanation_json,
20678:                 explanation_fingerprint_sha256,
20679:                 model_name,
20680:                 model_version,
20681:                 created_at
20682:             FROM e4_run_explanations
20683:             WHERE intent_run_id = ?
20684:               AND response_fingerprint_sha256 = ?
20685:               AND tenant_id = ?
20686:               AND workspace_id = ?
20687:             LIMIT 1
20688:             """,
20689:             (
20690:                 normalized_run_id,
20691:                 response_fingerprint_sha256,
20692:                 normalized_tenant,
20693:                 normalized_workspace,
20694:             ),
20695:         ).fetchone()
20696:         if not row:
